body:
I've endorsed Erik Aadland, have you?
Fellow Conservative, it’s Congressman Jack Bergman.

I know Erik Aadland emailed you already, but now I’m emailing you.

**With everything that’s going on in America, it’s clear we need more veterans, more energy experts, and more principled Conservatives in Congress.**

[**Erik Aadland embodies all three of those needs, and that’s why I’ve endorsed him. Now, I’m asking you to join me in doing the same and endorse him for Congress.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=62e9ff2717af41e89b2e4d8f0e7ad2a4&_e=LFQBjrM0x3ALkyyMfJo1esi_TNmwolyccx6_Z1hGHGT-nm1Ir_gwZQQ7EohOggHRlfWe3p9ZxNhNzXW1XnKQRr8XdSN96Gl8VA1poiAhy7WmmLTk0zL8nrLpgAbbLnP7flzMwN0de7h8p9S3SkAIpMTNm-X2foGMG1wfdCi9q38t-87RQbNoIp_9Xa-n9ouDyF6HDgiJefvk3jxdPs7lctp5RPPVce3YEmc0djlD6rSK4PqvTzfwZ5WseXNvAHuxh-yGTQ9Gzxr5wnmuPen1OCB3P2MqmqUhohNFbnTNxA2OY3Sv2jClS9ecrJd1stybw1-USK0EDSZId-O9dVX2lfYX4Y3zm1r8QvRnl90bP5Fle_EWLOQ1YrrQ3HVOz_cJ_qLuEYyCdGR2LEBL5CiRytCEVb9fgZxN2mNdbWjRnjTC7vmeXMrlgMjMUVMo84dC)

subject: A 2A Freedom Defender Award ... with Willes Lee!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f22d551a2ef0/were-off-and-running-6769486?e=ae2345792a)
---
| |
---
---
| **Oregon gubernatorial candidate Kerry McQuisten to receive Second Amendment award alongside NRA Vice President Willes Lee**

The Kerry McQuisten for Oregon campaign is pleased to announce that she will receive Restore Oregon NOW’s (RON) Second Amendment Freedom Defender award at their 2022 Freedom Awards Banquet, “Shoots & Sweets,” on April 30.

“I’m excited to meet Mr. Lee in person, and so honored to receive this award. I understand completely that without our Second Amendment, Americans have nothing with which to defend our other Constitutional rights,” says McQuisten.

McQuisten will accept the award alongside rockstar Second Amendment rights defender Willes Lee. Lee is a founding member of the Trump-Pence Second Amendment Coalition, First Vice President of the National Rifle Association (NRA), a retired Lt. Colonel and combat veteran.

Lee will be given the award for his national efforts and serve as keynote speaker. McQuisten will receive the local award for her efforts in Baker County.

In 2018, McQuisten was a member of the Baker County Republicans who worked together to wordsmith the Baker County Second Amendment Preservation Ordinance. The group opted to put the ordinance on the ballot rather than enact it via a vote of commissioners, and it passed by a vote of the people in a landslide. This past year as mayor of Baker City, McQuisten helped usher through a city-level Second Amendment Sanctuary Resolution. She has often participated in other advocacy against Oregon’s many bad gun grab bills. McQuisten is a proud member of the NRA.

The event will be held at 5 p.m. in the Tumwater Ballroom in Oregon City, including a no-host bar, silent auction, and dinner followed by a dessert and live firearms auction. Tickets are available via RON for $75, [https://restoreoregonnow.org.](https://KerryMcQuisten.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a6f5300a53ab781de615e5a1&id=e94ebc4477&e=ae2345792a)

If elected, Kerry would become Oregon’s first female Republican governor, and the first governor from eastern Oregon since the 1950s.

Additional information can be found at the candidate’s web site: [www.KerryMcQuisten.com.](https://KerryMcQuisten.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a6f5300a53ab781de615e5a1&id=000e2ee697&e=ae2345792a)

name: Dr. Yadira Caraveo
subject: BREAKING: We won the Democratic nomination!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43856709/339016028/1781007925?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220406nomination_yc_allop_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2EwZjU5OS0wYWI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vmsWXmu4XqyPBvUDpPE3SNfMGIBiq84BnD_Ec9dcymk=)
---
We won, Peter. I’m so excited, honored, and humbled to report that our campaign for the working families in Colorado’s 8th District _**secured the Democratic nomination**_ at last night’s Congressional Assembly, with more than 70% of the vote! Let that sink in for a minute: _We won_. A Latina, a daughter of immigrants from Mexico, will be the Democratic nominee on the ballot in November; and with a win, will be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress. **I want you to know how grateful I am for the outpouring of support from family, friends, and neighbors across the 8th Congressional District.** Our grassroots coalition is widespread, diverse, and growing stronger by the day. As the daughter of immigrants, raised on my dad’s construction worker salary, I know the value of hard work. As a pediatrician serving patients across CO-08, more than 65% of whom are on Medicaid, I know that the system is no longer working for too many families. As a state legislator, I’ve worked hard to deliver for working families across Colorado, to solve many of those issues — and I’m proud of what I’ve accomplished to lower healthcare costs, protect choice, expand access to the ballot box, and stand up to big corporations. _**But there's so much more work to be done.**_ Together, our coalition will ensure that working families from Commerce City up to Greeley will have a representative in Congress who will advocate for them — not just the powerful few. It’s time for our voices — the voices of working Coloradans, too long overlooked — to be represented in Washington. I look forward to growing the Caraveo Coalition through November, so we can together create a better future for working families and for our children. The toughest and most intense phase of this race is just beginning. If you could give our campaign an extra boost and help us build on this momentum, I’d be grateful for any support you can offer — [_**a grassroots contribution of any amount goes a long way towards building the kind of resilient, small-dollar power we’ll need to win in November.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43856710/339016029/252970791?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220406nomination_yc_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2EwZjU5OS0wYWI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vmsWXmu4XqyPBvUDpPE3SNfMGIBiq84BnD_Ec9dcymk=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = We won, Peter. I’m so excited, honored, and humbled to report that our campaign for the working families in Colorado’s 8th District secured the Democratic nomination at last night’s Congressional Assembly, with more than 70% of the vote! Let that sink in for a minute: We won. A Latina, a daughter of immigrants from Mexico, will be the Democratic nominee on the ballot in November; and with a win, will be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress. I want you to know how grateful I am for the outpouring of support from family, friends, and neighbors across the 8th Congressional District. Our grassroots coalition is widespread, diverse, and growing stronger by the day. As the daughter of immigrants, raised on my dad’s construction worker salary, I know the value of hard work. As a pediatrician serving patients across CO-08, more than 65% of whom are on Medicaid, I know that the system is no longer working for too many families. As a state legislator, I’ve worked hard to deliver for working families across Colorado, to solve many of those issues — and I’m proud of what I’ve accomplished to lower healthcare costs, protect choice, expand access to the ballot box, and stand up to big corporations. But there's so much more work to be done. Together, our coalition will ensure that working families from Commerce City up to Greeley will have a representative in Congress who will advocate for them — not just the powerful few. It’s time for our voices — the voices of working Coloradans, too long overlooked — to be represented in Washington. I look forward to growing the Caraveo Coalition through November, so we can together create a better future for working families and for our children. The toughest and most intense phase of this race is just beginning. If you could give our campaign an extra boost and help us build on this momentum, I’d be grateful for any support you can offer — = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Let's go win this. With gratitude, Yadira | Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests. Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation. = | = | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Nicolaus Sleister
subject: It's time to Be The Change
body:
The tides are changing, and we are gaining traction.

| [ ](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=our_april_goal&n=1)

Peter, As we work to turn the tide and we are gaining traction we must keep funds coming in. This month we have a goal of$15,000 and we need your help to reach that. Taking action right now will help us project our month if we can reach $5,000 tonight we can build a great ground team we just need your help right now. **[Donate $30 right now to help us reach our goal and build a ground game that will bring us to victory so that we can pass Medicare for All and the Green New Deal.](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsG17eJk9nLluAPhGuplYY6QKGHthmjPNejiBrizxBU6w&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=our_april_goal&n=2)** **** I am the **only U.S. Senate Candidate** here in Washington who supports **Medicare for All** , **Ending the Filibuster** once and for all, and passing the **Green New Deal.** With **68%** of Americans supporting Public Health Insurance, there is no reason other than corporate greed and money stopping us from achieving this life-saving issue. **81%** of Democrats are open to eliminating the filibuster. Why won't we do this? **57%** of Americans want the Green New Deal. This is a great start to ensuring that we work to build a cleaner world. If you are in support of one or all of these it's time for a change in our Senate and that means getting out the corporate politicians. **[We need you to donate $30 right now to help us win this name: Herschel Walker
subject: The media really wants me to lose
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
You’ll never believe what The New York Times is saying about me. You'll never believe what The New York Times is saying about me. |
---
Fellow American,

**_The New York Times_ just attacked me.**

You'd think they would focus on important topics like 40-year high inflation, President Biden's disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan, or the record number of illegal immigrants crossing our Southern border.

Instead, they want to talk about my high school report card, how bad of a candidate I am, and why I shouldn't be a senator because I'm not a career politician.

No, seriously. Their headline says it all.

clean_body: You’ll never believe what The New York Times is saying about me. You'll never believe what The New York Times is saying about me. | Fellow American, The New York Times just attacked me. You'd think they would focus on important topics like 40-year high inflation, President Biden's disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan, or the record number of illegal immigrants crossing our Southern border. Instead, they want to talk about my high school report card, how bad of a candidate I am, and why I shouldn't be a senator because I'm not a career politician. No, seriously. Their headline says it all. There's a saying in conservative circles that is truer today than ever: If The New York Times is attacking you, you must be doing something right. The media bias is out of control in America and in our race. CNN, The New York Times , and The Atlanta Journal-Constitution have been attacking us since before the campaign even started. They've collectively written over 30 hit pieces about us while only writing one semi-challenging piece about our Democrat opponent. Growing up, my coaches taught us that when the other side double-teams a player or changes their defensive scheme to focus on one key offensive player, it's because they respect -or fear - the abilities of that outstanding player. The same is true in politics. The Democrats and their allies in the media are double-teaming me because they're scared of losing the Senate race in Georgia. But they clearly don't know me very well. I WON'T BACK DOWN. The New York Times went so far as to suggest the only reason I'm doing well in the Senate race is because I'm Black and Republican. They simply don't get it. This race is not about me. It's about the people of Georgia and the values we share. That's why the Democrats are going to lose this race. While it's only April, the Democrats and their billionaire-funded super PACs have already scheduled $40 million in attack ads against our campaign from now through the election in November. If you'll stand with us at this critical time, we can show the media and Democrats they are not going to win this fight. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: Fetterman for U.S. Senate
subject: Choose your fighter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Our grassroots momentum is reaching D.C.
#
Derek, Senate Dems are speaking up about our campaign to elect John Fetterman + flip PA blue. Brand new from Politico:
> “[John Fetterman is] the kind of populist that I think would do very well in Pennsylvania.”
> -Senator Debbie Stabenow (D-MI)
> “I saw the PAC ad that is currently running in Pennsylvania. **It is wrong and it is disgusting.** And if Conor Lamb wants to stand up as a Democrat, then he needs to disavow that ad today...”
> -Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA)
Meanwhile, Conor Lamb has at least *one* fan in the Democratic caucus...
> “[Conor Lamb would] be an outstanding U.S. senator.”
> -Senator Joe Manchin (D-WV)
_Yikes._ Let’s be clear. If you want another Joe Manchin type in the U.S. Senate slowing our progress down, John’s not + has never been your guy. 😬
But if you want a strong Democrat who’s 100% behind President Biden’s agenda, who’s ready to cast the 51st vote to end the filibuster, and who will *never* waver in the fight for a living wage, voting rights, or the PRO Act, you’re on the right team, Derek.
**[This is important: Can you be the next donor from PA to pitch in to our campaign? Our people-powered momentum in PA is undeniable — even leaders in D.C. can feel it — and your donation will help ensure John wins the Democratic nomination to flip PA’s open Senate seat.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47005?refcode=em20220406-5288&t=1&akid=5288%2E434096%2ExCd1l2)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47005?refcode=em20220406-5288&amounts=5&t=20&akid=5288%2E434096%2ExCd1l2)**
The choice in the Pennsylvania’s Democratic primary is crystal-clear. We can choose a fighter for working people who will make our Senate majority stronger, OR we can choose a candidate who’s willing to rely on dirty super PAC money to attack a fellow Democrat.
With all eyes on this race, we need to send a message right now that the dishonest attack ads from Conor Lamb’s super PAC are completely backfiring. We can show everyone that John is THE candidate to flip CNN’s “#1 Most Likely to Flip” U.S. Senate seat in November.
**[Will you help us do that tonight? Chip in $5 or more now to keep our grassroots momentum strong with less than six weeks until the primary.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47005?refcode=em20220406-5288&t=21&akid=5288%2E434096%2ExCd1l2)**
Thank you, again, for having John’s back. Let’s WIN this together.
— Team Fetterman💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220406-5288-footer&t=22&refcode2=5288_434096_xCd1l2&akid=5288%2E434096%2ExCd1l2)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=5288%2E434096%2ExCd1l2)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=5288%2E434096%2ExCd1l2)

body:
American people deserve better than this... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tyyhltdd-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyhltdd-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyhltdd-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [We're All Border States Now](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyhltdd-kujkulhluu-j/)
The chaos at our southern border is about to get even worse, if that's possible. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyhltdd-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyhltdd-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [We Must Never Forget](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyhltdd-kujkulhluu-d/)
The focus on the international scene right now is, and ought to be, on Ukraine. But we must not forget the plight of the people of Afghanistan (abandoned by Joe Biden.) [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyhltdd-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyhltdd-kujkulhluu-k/)
### ["He Did This"](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyhltdd-kujkulhluu-u/)
Gas prices are ridiculously high. It's principally the Biden administration's fault (but of course they're trying to blame Putin.) Some interesting developments in this week's blog. Read it here. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyhltdd-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyhltdd-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Is it Really Putin's Price Hike?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyyhltdd-kujkulhluu-n/)
The Democrats want you to believe that higher prices at the pump, at the grocery store, and record inflation, are all Putin's fault, not Biden's. Here's the truth. **OUR NEW VIDEO **Americans know exactly why Washington and the corporate press are fixated on manufacturing false narratives about January 6: to delegitimize patriotic dissent, intimidate the public, and unjustly persecute political opposition. Our new video, "How to Talk About January 6th," compels the GOP to fight courageously for our country by pursuing the truth.After watching, read how Republican leaders should be discussing this narrative with Firebrand's ["Guide to Talking About January 6th."](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bijtug-ihhjkhtyud-r/) [Watch Now!](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bijtug-ihhjkhtyud-y/)**NEW PODCASTS** Inspired by our leaders' fixation on Ukraine while our own homeland falls apart, [Paige Willey](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bijtug-ihhjkhtyud-j/) on THIS IS YOUR COUNTRY explores a defining question of our era: whose interests are being advanced by our government despite obvious contradictions to the welfare of the American people?**LISTEN NOW! **[Apple Podcasts](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bijtug-ihhjkhtyud-t/)[ ](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bijtug-ihhjkhtyud-i/) [Spotify ](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bijtug-ihhjkhtyud-d/) | **New Podcast **

name: Max Steiner
subject: LaMalfa voted against capping insulin prices and protecting veterans.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43857149/339030366/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTNhNjM0NC0xOGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Crhts2idMpjytJ_PprlVxDzx0MaiIMdiNLVfViD5SPA=)
Friend,

I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your ongoing support of my campaign to flip CA-01 from red to blue. With your help, we're heading into April on strong footing, which is important because Doug LaMalfa is continuing to raise the stakes and remind us why we must do everything in our power to unseat him: **» Last month, LaMalfa voted NO on The Honoring our PACT Act -- a bill that would provide funding to care for toxic-exposed veterans and research for the impact of burn pits on military service members.** Burn pits are my generation's Agent Orange -- a long-term health catastrophe that the Department of Defense and Veterans Affairs have tried to sweep under the rug. It’s reprehensible for LaMalfa to vote against veterans, but it’s also par for the course.

**» Last week, Republicans and Democrats came together in a bipartisan fashion to limit the cost of insulin to $35 a month for Americans who depend on it. LaMalfa voted against it.** The only interests who support price gouging Americans are Big Pharma and the insurance industry. That should tell you all you need to know about where LaMalfa stands.

**» Last night, Rep. LaMalfa voted NO on a resolution that would have reaffirmed American support for NATO.** As Russia continues its invasion, Republicans have been radio silent on Trump's outright support for Vladimir Putin. It's sickening, and it’s time LaMalfa is held accountable. **[LaMalfa is making a habit of voting NO on sound policies. Voters are going to vote NO on Rep. LaMalfa's re-election effort this fall. Help us send LaMalfa packing by chipping in a donation to our campaign to unseat him.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43857150/339030367/-96927706?refcode=em-4.6.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTNhNjM0NC0xOGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Crhts2idMpjytJ_PprlVxDzx0MaiIMdiNLVfViD5SPA=)**

Thanks,

Max

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sarah=20Pritchard?=
subject: Check Out These Volunteer Opportunities!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5272c1742b37/check-out-these-volunteer-opportunities?e=7bbb93570f)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Volunteers,

Kelvin continues to work harder than any other candidate in this U.S. Senate race in Georgia, and he needs our support! In March, we had volunteers at HQ making thousands of phone calls and writing hundreds of post cards. We also had volunteers making calls and writing post cards from home, waiving signs, and handing out Kelvin King buttons. Can Kelvin count on your help?

Campaign HQ will be open for Volunteer Days on the following dates in April. Please stop by to make phone calls or write postcards so we can share Kelvin's #WinForAmerica message to voters across Georgia.

Thursday, April 7 from 4pm to 6pm
Saturday, April 16 from 10am to 12pm
Tuesday, April 19 from 4pm to 6pm
Thursday, April 21 from 4pm to 6pm
Saturday, April 23 from 10am to 12pm
Tuesday, April 26 from 4pm to 6pm

We're asking each volunteer to sign up for at least one Volunteer Day in April so we can reach our goal of making 30,000 calls this month. RSVP to Volunteer Days by responding to this email ([sarah@kelvinking.com](mailto:sarah@kelvinking.com)). If you can't make any of these dates, or want to volunteer from home, let me know and we can set it up!

If you're interested in door knocking or volunteering at any upcoming forums or debates, let me know!
---
| Thank you,

Sarah Pritchard
Director of Operations
Kelvin King for US Senate
(404) 401-5500 (cell)
---

body:
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Peter,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I'm representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I've watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I'm asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can't do this without your support.

That's why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you'll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW TO BECOME AN OFFICIAL FOUNDING SUPPORTER.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60061280:6lFBFCoiN:m:1:3253819041:38E30ABC91F728971A117BB05B220745:r)**

name: Paul Hueper
subject: They stole my pocket Constitution.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hueper for Alaska PO Box 871181 Wasilla AK 99687
body:
I'm running to restore integrity in Alaska's elections.

| Dear Peter, My name is Paul Hueper. _I am a Christian businessman, husband, father, Trump supporter, and lover of liberty. I’m running for Lt. Governor on a ticket with Christopher Kurka to clean up Alaska’s election system_. **_My agenda is not easy, but it is simple:_**
* **_Secure the voter rolls which have been repeatedly hacked by criminal actors_**
* **_Ban Dominion Voting Machines_**
* **_End mail-in voting_**
* **_Institute Voter Photo ID_**
* **_Purge Alaska voter rolls which currently show 111% registration-rate of eligible Alaska voters_**
* **_End the state’s disastrous ranked choice voting system_**
* **_Work to make election day a State Holiday._**

Why am I running? I’m glad you asked. Just a few months ago, I had no plan to ever run for public office. Then the great heist of 2020 happened, and I could no longer sit on the sidelines. _Concerned about widespread voting irregularities uncovered during the 2020 national election, my wife Marilyn and I decided to join hundreds of thousands of other patriots in support of President Donald J. Trump at his last presidential rally on January 6 th, 2021_. We were joined in Washington D.C. by people of every creed, ethnicity, and culture; seniors on mobility scooters, infants in strollers, and families representing all 50 states – all calling for election transparency and accountability. **Little did we know, three months later, our privacy, residence, and business, would be targeted and violated in a blatant display of federal intimidation committed by Capital Police and the Federal Bureau of Investigation.** _Our door was kicked in, we were held at gunpoint, and falsely accused of participating in the January 6 riot, even though we never joined the rioters, nor did we enter the Capitol Building at any time_. Through sloppy police work resembling something more like the Keystone Cops than one of the world’s most elite law enforcement agencies, we were handcuffed and detained for hours, denied our constitutional rights, and interrogated like high-value criminal targets. **My wife was even accused of stealing Nancy Pelosi’s laptop.** _Several hour later, despite admitting it was a case of mistaken identity, the FBI left our business and home with a broken front door, stole our electronic devices_ . . . _AND TOOK OUR POCKET CONSTITUTION_!!! Who knew the Constitution of the United States was illegal contraband? Peter, our federal government is out of control. And sadly, most of our state governments are too. **It’s time to stand up. As the great Ronald Reagan once asked: “If not us, who? If not now, when?”** Believe me, the political elites hate candidates who are serious about enacting an aggressive conservative agenda. Make no mistake about it, they will fight me every step of the way. But _I’m not running to make them comfortable. I’m running to take the fight to them, and change the game._ As a political outsider, I refuse to kiss the ring of establishment party powerbrokers. I don’t seek to win their tainted endorsements, nor will I trade my values for political favors. However, I must have the support of patriots like yourself, who don’t apologize for their country, who say what they mean and mean what they say, and who are willing to stand and fight to preserve this “last best hope of man on earth.” **We can’t elect a new President this year, but we can fix the process, one state at a time. And that’s exactly what I intend to do in Alaska.** When Christopher Kurka asked me to run on his ticket for Lt. Governor, **I knew I had to do it**. I simply cannot stand idly by while the enemies of freedom dismantle our Constitution and our way of life. **Nothing is more important than the people having confidence that the government they get is one they have chosen.** Can I count on you to rise and stand with me to secure liberty and integrity for the next generation of Alaskans? _As go the States, so goes the country_. **Please consider a generous donation** of any amount to help me restore election integrity to Alaska. **There are currently no limits on what you can give** , so please [make your most generous donation today](https://kurkaforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=3F5_uCalxgTEIyX1F6Uq2tlEjRo03gcze1lc0_i_e3wW3m7nZNcwGspFBDnctKj4&e=c3e286dcf444e6546a293f48f4c73831&utm_source=kurkaforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=paul_hueper_fundraiser_final&n=1)! Thanks for your generosity and support! Sincerely, Paul Hueper Republican Candidate Lt. Governor of Alaska [](https://kurkaforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=HTIUaYWGgtW-Sq8jttULzW-zEK-3Z9mAZxjdCeR3iqLWUT4kcfhLZxsXf_4rl-GR&e=c3e286dcf444e6546a293f48f4c73831&utm_source=kurkaforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=paul_hueper_fundraiser_final&n=2) **_P.S. – Please don’t delay. It is imperative I have your help to take on the political Establishment. clean_body: I'm running to restore integrity in Alaska's elections. | Dear Peter, My name is Paul Hueper. I am a Christian businessman, husband, father, Trump supporter, and lover of liberty. I’m running for Lt. Governor on a ticket with Christopher Kurka to clean up Alaska’s election system. My agenda is not easy, but it is simple: Secure the voter rolls which have been repeatedly hacked by criminal actors Ban Dominion Voting Machines End mail-in voting Institute Voter Photo ID Purge Alaska voter rolls which currently show 111% registration-rate of eligible Alaska voters End the state’s disastrous ranked choice voting system Work to make election day a State Holiday. Why am I running? I’m glad you asked. Just a few months ago, I had no plan to ever run for public office. Then the great heist of 2020 happened, and I could no longer sit on the sidelines. Concerned about widespread voting irregularities uncovered during the 2020 national election, my wife Marilyn and I decided to join hundreds of thousands of other patriots in support of President Donald J. Trump at his last presidential rally on January 6 th, 2021. We were joined in Washington D.C. by people of every creed, ethnicity, and culture; seniors on mobility scooters, infants in strollers, and families representing all 50 states – all calling for election transparency and accountability. Little did we know, three months later, our privacy, residence, and business, would be targeted and violated in a blatant display of federal intimidation committed by Capital Police and the Federal Bureau of Investigation. Our door was kicked in, we were held at gunpoint, and falsely accused of participating in the January 6 riot, even though we never joined the rioters, nor did we enter the Capitol Building at any time. Through sloppy police work resembling something more like the Keystone Cops than one of the world’s most elite law enforcement agencies, we were handcuffed and detained for hours, denied our constitutional rights, and interrogated like high-value criminal targets. My wife was even accused of stealing Nancy Pelosi’s laptop. Several hour later, despite admitting it was a case of mistaken identity, the FBI left our business and home with a broken front door, stole our electronic devices . . . AND TOOK OUR POCKET CONSTITUTION!!! Who knew the Constitution of the United States was illegal contraband? Peter, our federal government is out of control. And sadly, most of our state governments are too. It’s time to stand up. As the great Ronald Reagan once asked: “If not us, who? If not now, when?” Believe me, the political elites hate candidates who are serious about enacting an aggressive conservative agenda. Make no mistake about it, they will fight me every step of the way. But I’m not running to make them comfortable. I’m running to take the fight to them, and change the game. As a political outsider, I refuse to kiss the ring of establishment party powerbrokers. I don’t seek to win their tainted endorsements, nor will I trade my values for political favors. However, I must have the support of patriots like yourself, who don’t apologize for their country, who say what they mean and mean what they say, and who are willing to stand and fight to preserve this “last best hope of man on earth.” We can’t elect a new President this year, but we can fix the process, one state at a time. And that’s exactly what I intend to do in Alaska. When Christopher Kurka asked me to run on his ticket for Lt. Governor, I knew I had to do it. I simply cannot stand idly by while the enemies of freedom dismantle our Constitution and our way of life. Nothing is more important than the people having confidence that the government they get is one they have chosen. Can I count on you to rise and stand with me to secure liberty and integrity for the next generation of Alaskans? As go the States, so goes the country. Please consider a generous donation of any amount to help me restore election integrity to Alaska. There are currently no limits on what you can give , so please ! Thanks for your generosity and support! Sincerely, Paul Hueper Republican Candidate Lt. Governor of Alaska P.S. – Please don’t delay. It is imperative I have your help to take on the political Establishment. I cannot do this alone**. Paid for by Hueper for Alaska PO Box 871181 Wasilla AK 99687. -=-=- Kurka for Governor · AK 99654, United States

subject: The 5 lies of Critical Race Theory
body:

Dear Fellow Conservative, The anti-critical race theory movement is gaining traction both ideologically and politically. And that has progressives both outraged and panicked. They'll do anything they can to stop this movement. Their latest strategy is to distort the truth and mislead the American people so that they can continue to push their Marxist agenda. And they are using their friends in the establishment media and Big Tech to do so. But these lies are being unmasked and exposed by The Heritage Foundation. That's why I'm sending you this email today.
---
| | I'm told that you are an American who is concerned about the levels of indoctrination we've seen from Critical Race Theory-and what that could mean for the future of our country. **So, today,[ I want to send you a FREE copy of The Heritage Foundation's latest eBook, ](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**[** _The 5 Lies of CRT_****.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)

* None of CRT's policy approaches would help people of any race or national origin.
* All of the biggest names pushing CRT have affirmed that they are promoting Marxism.
* The Left is using CRT to wage a battle royal for the soul of America-and even the West itself.

**You can get instant access to your FREE eBook right now using this secure link:[ https://secured.heritage.org/5lies-of-crt-ebook/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** As the Left ramps up their campaign through the power of the media and Big Tech, it is crucial that we inform as many people as possible with the truth about what is really going on. I hope this is a helpful resource for you. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development, The Heritage Foundation

Hello,
A federal judge finally said what we’ve all known for years: **Donald J. Trump “more likely than not” committed serious federal crimes, calling the events leading up to January 6th an attempted “coup.”**
The only word missing from the judge’s ruling: “Treason”
When Donald Trump was elected in 2016, I was a three-star admiral in the U.S. Navy. But it was clear what kind of a man Trump was. I voted with my feet. I retired after 36 years because there was no way I was going to take orders from a guy – a demagogue – like that.
Now I’m home where I was born and raised, running for the U.S. Senate against Trump’s stooge, Chuck Grassley – a guy who first ran for office when I was a toddler.
Every single poll shows we can win: Grassley’s approval ratings are the lowest they’ve ever been among Iowa voters. And the pundits say we must win: Control of the Senate will likely be decided here in Iowa.
That’s why Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump are already begging their billionaire buddies for millions to plow into Super PACs and spend trying to defeat me.
**If we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, we need to raise another $35,000 before midnight tomorrow, and right now, we’re still coming up short. The only way to hit our goal and win is if grassroots donors like you give right now:**
[**Please, will you give $5 or more right now – whatever you can spare before our critical deadline at midnight tomorrow – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43860844/339037741/-42398318?refcode=em20220407am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTg5ZDIzZC02YWI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tUWZTnRTgA54Pu4Vds1Zgfu1inTjuU3K4ly4BFZV5PU=)

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: The KEY To Unlock Miracles | From The Desk Of Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
body:
The KEY To Your Miracle The Bible is full of stories about the miraculous. Stories about God splitting the Red Sea, shutting the mouths of lions, h
| | |
---
## The KEY To Your Miracle
---
|
---
The Bible is full of stories about the miraculous.
Stories about God **splitting the Red Sea** , **shutting the mouths of lions** , **healing people of incurable diseases** and even **raising people from the dead**.
As the Pastor of [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6525777.5028.1.528f9e9682d39bb2d9c731e6bfc05812) in Tulsa, OK, I get asked all the time to pray for miracles. It's always AMAZING to watch God do what only He can do.
Often people will ask me **"How can I receive my miracle?"**
The simple answer is _by faith_.
It is by faith we receive the miracle working power of God operating in our lives.
But what does "By Faith" actually mean?
To answer that we need to define what faith is.
Faith simply put is: _hearing_ , _believing_ , _speaking_ and _acting_ on the Word of God.
**Hearing** : "So then faith comes by hearing, and hearing by the word of God" - Romans 10:17
**Believing** : "Now faith is the substance of things hoped for, the evidence of things not seen" - Hebrews 11:1
**Speaking** : "We have the same spirit of faith, according to what is written, 'I believed and therefore I spoke,' we also believe and therefore speak" - 2nd Corinthians 4:13
**Acting** : "Faith without works is dead" - James 2:26
A clear example of faith operating and leading to the miraculous is the story of **the woman with an issue of blood** found in Mark 5:25-34.
This woman had an incurable disease that plagued her for twelve years and nobody could help her. She was in desperate need for a miracle.
The moment came when she **HEARD** about someone named Jesus who was going around healing the sick. She **BELIEVED** in her heart that this same Jesus could heal her. She then **SAID** , “If only I may touch His clothes, I shall be made well.” (Mark 5:28). But... she did not stop there. She **ACTED** and touched the hem of His garment.
That woman with the issue of blood heard, believed, spoke and acted by faith and was completely healed by the power of God. She received her miracle.
If you are in need of a miracle, I want to encourage you to be bold like that woman with the issue of blood.
God is still a miracle-working God! If you will release your faith, then you will unlock your miracle.
If you need prayer, please email [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6525777.5029.1.3a27e086075801b4203cd2d8ed4fbd83) at connect@sheridan.church and we will pray for you.
Be sure to join me at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6525777.5030.1.52a3811dea4e7870c4b358cf2a4145e8) for one of our Sunday services:
In-Person: Sundays at 9 or 11am CT
4121 S Sheridan Rd Tulsa, OK
Online: Facebook or YouTube at 11am CT
[www.facebook.com/SheridanCC](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6525777.5031.1.ad121971f0530b65e18426020abcc8af)
[www.youtube.com/c/sheridanchurch](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6525777.5032.1.d997d3416b63bfb3ea62e12f87669716)
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on TruthSocial, GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6525777.5033.1.114d2b038269ab051aea0d0296a9a7c6), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6525777.5034.1.510158dea59bb663719357e399e8c6dd), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6525777.5035.1.c600f7437c5c1bffa68350780b8b59a3), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6525777.5036.1.4b88857849d6f05415d5465e6e963ee0), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6525777.5037.1.3aeafd251d059c0959d51451ad54df7c)).
| | [ Connect With Sheridan.Church ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6525777.5038.1.1df68e11046c976b8800d7f3452b54ba)
---
---

It is very important that we continue to support **Mike Lindell** in this battle. We are at war right now. Spend wisely. Spend America First.

name: Scott Taylor
subject: UPDATE
body:
| | | | | February 07, 2022
---
| UPDATE
---
| This is a good year for Republicans to take back the House (and possibly the Senate), The 2nd District has gotten better for Republicans after redistricting and our team's poll numbers show quite a clear path to win the Republican primary again by double digits. However, in the first political cycle in over a decade, I will not be on the ballot.
As I reflect on what my team accomplished in service, both in the Virginia House of Delegates and U.S. Congress. From putting an officer in Virginia community colleges to help veterans access their educational benefits, to groundbreaking crowdfunding legislation, to helping thousands of our neighbors navigate the federal government, to accountability at the VA, to directly bringing back hundreds of millions of dollars to the Hampton Roads economy, to creating the life saving federal Ashanti Alert...I'm proud.
I am beyond grateful for all the supporters who volunteered their valuable time and treasure. I am especially thankful to my family, who were willing to support any decision I made, I love them so much. For the majority of my adult life I have served our community, our commonwealth, and our country. I have no doubt, in some capacity, I will step up once again to serve.
VA02 is definitely a winnable district. However, while it may seem like a red wave is coming, there is still a long time before November and we must not get complacent. It will take a candidate who has all the pieces in place to prevail, especially if the political winds shift. When I look at the current field, Jen Kiggans stands out amongst the rest in the best position to take back this seat. While posing like a moderate, Elaine Luria has been a rubber stamp vote for some of the most radically left legislation this country has ever seen. Kiggans, a State Senator, Nurse Practitioner, and Navy Veteran will vote for, support, and fight for the issues the majority of us care about. Please consider giving her the same support you have given me.
Our country needs strong leaders, especially now, at every level of government and I'm confident many will decide that service, while a sacrifice, is worth it. In the meantime, I'm enjoying the simple things, such as taking my son to school in the morning and spending precious time with him. The best is yet to come!
Your Humble Servant, ST

---
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | | | The Honorable Scott Taylor | 3419 Virginia Beach BLVD. #490, Virginia Beach, VA 23452
---

clean_body: | | | | | February 07, 2022 | UPDATE | This is a good year for Republicans to take back the House (and possibly the Senate), The 2nd District has gotten better for Republicans after redistricting and our team's poll numbers show quite a clear path to win the Republican primary again by double digits. However, in the first political cycle in over a decade, I will not be on the ballot. As I reflect on what my team accomplished in service, both in the Virginia House of Delegates and U.S. Congress. From putting an officer in Virginia community colleges to help veterans access their educational benefits, to groundbreaking crowdfunding legislation, to helping thousands of our neighbors navigate the federal government, to accountability at the VA, to directly bringing back hundreds of millions of dollars to the Hampton Roads economy, to creating the life saving federal Ashanti Alert...I'm proud. I am beyond grateful for all the supporters who volunteered their valuable time and treasure. I am especially thankful to my family, who were willing to support any decision I made, I love them so much. For the majority of my adult life I have served our community, our commonwealth, and our country. I have no doubt, in some capacity, I will step up once again to serve. VA02 is definitely a winnable district. However, while it may seem like a red wave is coming, there is still a long time before November and we must not get complacent. It will take a candidate who has all the pieces in place to prevail, especially if the political winds shift. When I look at the current field, Jen Kiggans stands out amongst the rest in the best position to take back this seat. While posing like a moderate, Elaine Luria has been a rubber stamp vote for some of the most radically left legislation this country has ever seen. Kiggans, a State Senator, Nurse Practitioner, and Navy Veteran will vote for, support, and fight for the issues the majority of us care about. Please consider giving her the same support you have given me. Our country needs strong leaders, especially now, at every level of government and I'm confident many will decide that service, while a sacrifice, is worth it. In the meantime, I'm enjoying the simple things, such as taking my son to school in the morning and spending precious time with him. The best is yet to come! Your Humble Servant, ST | | | | | | | | | | | The Honorable Scott Taylor | 3419 Virginia Beach BLVD. #490, Virginia Beach, VA 23452 | | == Sent by mailto:scotttaylorinfo@gmail.com powered by == ==

name: NextGen America
subject: Urgent: Final vote on Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination
body:
| | Friend, **Later today, the Senate is expected to vote on the final confirmation of Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination to serve on the U.S. Supreme Court.** Despite the GOP’s best efforts to diminish her distinguished record, Judge Jackson has proved she has the qualifications, integrity, and grace to serve on the Supreme Court. **We are on the verge of making history.** If confirmed, Judge Jackson would be the first Black woman on our nation’s highest court. Though this milestone is long overdue, it moves us closer to a judiciary that truly reflects the diversity of our nation. [Before your senators vote on Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination today, take a minute to send them a message in support of her historic confirmation.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43861978/339042873/1686487394?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjZlZWM1My03M2I2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0tcqGFTySZxybQNziIukQUUh-xF0vT1G3ONHeaMyCVY=&emci=eede56a9-ebb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=726eec53-73b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172) As the 6–3 far-right majority on the Supreme Court continues to undermine our rights, Ketanji Brown Jackson’s confirmation is the first step in restoring balance to our courts. She will be a fierce protector of reproductive rights, access to the ballot box, and much more. As a federal district court judge, Jackson upheld our fundamental rights and approached each decision with fairness and reason. Prior to her nine years on the federal judiciary, she was a public defender and the vice chair of the U.S. Sentencing Commission, working to reform discriminatory drug sentencing practices. With the final confirmation vote fast approaching, your senators need to hear from you. [Write your senators and urge them to vote YES to confirm Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43861979/339042874/120403453?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjZlZWM1My03M2I2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0tcqGFTySZxybQNziIukQUUh-xF0vT1G3ONHeaMyCVY=&emci=eede56a9-ebb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=726eec53-73b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172) Thank you, NextGen America

Recently Robert Kiyosaki, the author of Rich Dad Poor Dad, tweeted the following:
> **" The best time to prepare for a crash is before the crash. The biggest crash in world history is coming. The good news is the best time to get rich is during a crash. Bad news is the next crash will be a long one." **
With the market at all-time high, **inflation on the other hand reached a 40-year high** as well, marking its highest levels since 1982. However, to say that this came as a surprise would be very foolish. Many billionaires and analysts forecasted that inflation would rise and a market correction could be coming. Americans are truly concerned and**have noticed how the cost of******everything**** **is going up...** The constant warnings from analysts have, somehow, to do with the currency circulation increasing by $226.3 Billion. In layman's terms, **almost 20% of all US dollars were created in 2020 alone.** Isn't that a strong indicator of inflation? **[This Report ](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvp4nke4svjp5nvsl01aner2705svir3lsctimp8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4spj66ob2chh2bs)is made free to you in order to** learn how to protect your wealth from Inflation and the next possible market correction. **If such a disaster could be in the making, your assets are at risk and this requires your immediate attention!** And if you believe that now isn't the time to protect yourself and your family, when will it be? **[Your FREE Report](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7s0e3cov0afpnhl7bbshit7m0r81h10eaad0ps8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4spj66ob2chh2bs)** will expand on what Robert Kiyosaki is suggesting. When opportunity comes knocking, grab it. Don’t miss out on it. Robert Kiyosaki’s tweet is a warning for you to protect your wealth and thrive during uncertain times. You know that you can’t afford to let the new policies ruin your wealth and future. Why not protect what you really care for the most! The constant warnings from analysts have, somehow, to do with the currency circulation increasing by $226.3 Billion. In layman's terms, almost 20% of all US dollars were created in 2020 alone. Isn't that a strong indicator of inflation? made free to you in order to learn how to protect your wealth from Inflation and the next possible market correction. name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: Resign, Recall, Replace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you’re thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4ha6b6vssgajh2qa1epk04l2iah7d23j9016tmo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbo71pb3cppn4tr4ekoj8dbgctge5dj1m1q31c5hchobcd9n69gn2pjhmiprap30cv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66libadhnmaqmcc9imdiefc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5iecoj5cdj69oh5u)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpnr8stri4ka86i9hhtgfnu3o68nrceaa05ut1dg_) Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you’re thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I’ll tell you why. I’ve seen what’s happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I’m sure you have too. Public schools all over the country are relentlessly pushing Critical Race Theory, and convincing America’s children that they need to change their sexual preferences and gender identities. _[**It’s state-sanctioned leftist indoctrination, plain and simple.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj9ckdj8jhgegau5vp9jukghvruaja7v9a43muh0_)_** ** As I discussed on **_Tucker Carlson Tonight_** , I get rid of the people who are indoctrinating our children by replacing them with SANE conservative Americans. **[But, I can’t do any of this without your help. Would you consider making a generous donation of ANY amount to help me put an end to state sanctioned leftist indoctrination?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8n37526evsn2jjlgh34psg9vr8qh9aeknuvirro_)** For decades, shady dark-money billionaires like **_George Soros_** have funneled massive amounts of cash into the pockets of radical left-wing activists to take up government positions in communities all over the country. **[One of Soros's favorite targets is local school board races](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zup666rnmr1l6qq3iviu940bhsocu3kdjprn52a8_).** _And I hate to break it to you, but his plan has been wildly successful. _ Right now, in EVERY STATE IN AMERICA (including the red states), teachers are indoctrinating our students with CRT. If you’re not familiar with CRT, it's the doctrine that all white people are oppressors, and that your skin color determines everything about you. Beyond this, _CRT teaches kids that America is evil to its core, and that everything that makes our country great, is secretly racist._** ** **_Then, what’s worse is that these radical school boards allow, hire, and encourage teachers who have been caught ACTIVELY recruiting children to become transgender._** And friend, you may not have seen it happening at the time, but for too long Republicans have neglected local races and instead focused on "BIG" races for President, Governor, and Congress. But in the process, we’ve left room for people like George Soros to take over local governments all over the country, right under our noses. Now, with all this doom and gloom, it’s easy to feel defeated. **But I know, and Tucker Carlson knows that this fight is far from over... ** And we CAN take back our schools from the radical left. [**HELP US TAKE BACK OUR SCHOOLS TODAY!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh37mj8buti0f163s84kin9m2s989tcbpvmjh63g_) Let me introduce myself. [**My name is Ryan Girdusky, and I founded the 1776 Project PAC to take back our local school boards from the radical left. **](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgql21d6vi80tr2bjodg8supq44iskjj6cuk6ef8_) **_And I have the 3 R’s Battle Plan to do just that!_** **_Resign:_** we'll turn up the public pressure with TV, Radio, and Print media campaigns calling for far left school board members to quit. **_Recall:_** we'll help collect petitions signatures and aid local parents, grandparents, and concerned taxpayers in efforts to recall radical school board members who must be removed from office. **_Replace:_** We'll support the campaigns of pro-America conservatives who run for local school board against liberal pro-CRT school board members. In the coming year, we are hoping to triple our impact! [**But, friend, we can't roll out this plan without your support. Will you rush in $17.76 to the 1776 Project PAC as we prepared to target more than 200 races this year??**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zamml92d30a0tmvkqc44psd5pm8hd0gnphdb8qfg_) Now, I’m guessing you’ve never heard of me before... **....But, I’d be willing to bet you’ve heard Tucker, Laura Ingraham, and Donald Trump Jr. ** I’ve had the chance to discuss my plan with them, and they all believe that _the 1776 Project PAC’s 3 R’s Campaign Battle Plan is a game-changer!_ Here’s what each of them said: **> >>> Tucker Carlson: "**Parents have almost no support, _but now they do_. The **_1776 Project PAC_** __ is a political action committee designed to help school boards and communities elect sane people.... If you're thinking of writing a check... Think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky." **> >>> Laura Ingraham: **"For all the parents out there looking to reclaim your local school boards from radical leftists, help is on the way, a new political action committee called the **_1776 Project_** is going to support school board candidates who oppose indoctrinating kids with things like Critical Race Theory." **> >>> Donald Trump Jr.: **"The **_1776 Project_** is the very first Political Action Committee of it's kind, specifically created to take on this sinister attack on our way of life from within our own communities by working to take local schools boards out of the hands of these America-hating radical liberals..." Even the failing and biased New York Times admitted that we _"lit a fire"_ that is only growing as more conservative patriots like you join the fight in supporting the 1776 Project PAC.** ** **But here is the best part. The 1776 Project PAC has only been around for a year, and we already have a track-record of success. ** In November of 2021, we flipped 44 seats. In the coming year, as long as we have your help, we are set to more than TRIPLE our impact. **After 30 years of left-wing billionaires like George Soros flooding cash into local school board races, we finally have a way to fight back with the 1776 Project PAC.** [**Please consider helping us fight back against George Soros and the radical socialist left in our school boards with a generous contribution of $17.76, $25, $50, or $100.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zac0tum43jfe8kl4i4kbbf61ihtqmmo9m0fv0pvg_) _With your help, we will rid our schools of radical leftists who are hell-bent on turning our kids against conservative, American values.._. **And we'll replace them with sane, America-loving citizens.** Sincerely, [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq955ala22r7rrtantgu1fgvn2fdbcr0fsbjepdg_) Ryan Girdusky P.S. I know you may not know anything about me, but I hope that the endorsements from incredible conservative leaders like my friends Tucker, Laura, and Donald Trump Jr. give you confidence in my dedication to the mission of taking school boards back from radical liberals. [**Will you invest in the future of our country by making a generous contribution to the 1776 Project PAC as we fight to Resign, Recall, or Replace far-left indoctrinators?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze5qjletb3tobedt23hkm1npjavnfqtugfrdeo7g_) [**DONATE NOW**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5fmia249uecafa035juamlq8nulbphq5jf8lslo_) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zob42tamnar2p59sg1rjbstr3s3jj4370t1lsas0_) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znts0u31e1uq2ear62uqat5frqskcvisr8mtpj98_)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
184 7th Ave #106, New York, NY 10011 Not Authorized by any candidate or campaign committee
---

name: Markwayne Mullin
subject: Joe Biden tried to kill me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mullin for America
body:
But I'm still here, and my fight isn't over.

| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60063865:J2aM8Yo8N:m:1:3299561967:2D5F2E36532575EB03B4155615A8D6F4:r)
When the Biden administration left Americans behind in Afghanistan, the team and I went to get Americans out. And what did the Biden administration do in response?

**Without question, they tried to kill me. **

They released information about my location while I was in Afghanistan. They didn't care if I got killed. They just didn't want anyone to know that they left Americans behind.

To be quite frank, I didn't do it for political clout or popularity. I didn't even intend for it to get out. Despite the media outing us and putting the mission in jeopardy we were ultimately successful.

**I did this because I care deeply about every single American. It angered me that they got left behind in harm 's way. I care that we have a President who not only left them in a warzone, but that he tried to kill a United States Congressman who went to save them. **

I saw an opportunity to help. As a Christian, helping others is what God intended me to do. I saw a need and I went to it.

Now, I see another need. I'm running for the United States Senate to continue to fight for the American people like I've done my whole life. As the next Senator for Oklahoma, **I will never stop fighting.**

**Even if a corrupt administration tries to stop me.

[It would be my honor if you could join me in this battle today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60063865:J2aM8Yo8N:m:1:3299561967:2D5F2E36532575EB03B4155615A8D6F4:r)**
---
[**JOIN TEAM MULLIN**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60063865:J2aM8Yo8N:m:1:3299561967:2D5F2E36532575EB03B4155615A8D6F4:r)
[**FIGHT FOR AMERICA**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60063865:J2aM8Yo8N:m:1:3299561967:2D5F2E36532575EB03B4155615A8D6F4:r)
God bless America.
Markwayne Mullin

Candidate for US Senate

name: Mike Pence
subject: JUST LAUNCHED: the Freedom Agenda 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Advancing American Freedom Inc |
body:
This is the battle plan to fight President Biden’s failures and save America. LEARN MORE >>>
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5av653vdefb7ju44v8ind2spbj7n1j0ancn7uko_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpnac3n66obeddhe1ib1odim3h38orh6eqj6pj6m2obedr2eppbccr0c5jb9dtnmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66libadhnmarmcdb76mp6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5iecoj7c5gm2oh5u)
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zv2r8ara2ds2vcs7rkvl7joh9i56k7t118ga39og_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sph6eob1c5h2bs)
---
Fellow Conservative, _When will President Biden finally admit failure?_ There’s no denying it: His big government socialist policies would destroy America as we know it. **That’s why I called on dozens of other conservative leaders to work with me to put together a plan to fight Biden’s failures: To save America, we MUST return to the pro-freedom policies of Reagan and Trump. ** Fellow Conservative, the Freedom Agenda is THE complete plan to push back against the far-left Biden administration, right now. But I need your help to make it happen.
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zabgbnqgjj81lim99rurvvp8lp3ls2mfq0chl1g8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sph6eob1c5h2bs)
---
__Remember what life was like under the Trump-Pence administration?__ In just 48 months, we achieved:
* the lowest unemployment,
* the highest household incomes,
* the most energy production,
* the most pro-American trade deals,
* the most secure border,
* and the strongest military in the history of the world.

_**And we can do it again.**_ Our Founders knew that our nation's greatness stretched only as far as our people's freedom. America's revival begins only when we reestablish our rights to live, work, and worship. We must restore our liberties to renew our culture, our prosperity, and our leadership. **And at AAF, we have a plan to do just that with**[**our brand-new Freedom Agenda**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8nlr5ldpvcr776cpsoctfob48encogjvrmm7a6g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sph6eob1c5h2bs)**[.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztokn0jukqts9he5vu2il3vg182est32nhqf84ro_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sph6eob1c5h2bs) **
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z973soj5hveih8th8u3cj1vqgsjinp74sovinr10_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sph6eob1c5h2bs)
---
[**WATCH NOW**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsk6bht3nbupigt3cm036f4obu9it1bgivj706f0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sph6eob1c5h2bs)
---
America can be as free and prosperous as ever if we stand firm on the principles that made America the greatest nation in the history of the world. There is no holding back freedom and America’s prosperity if we lean on those ideas outlined in this agenda. **The organization I founded, Advancing American Freedom, brought our movement’s leaders together to build this plan.****_And now, we’re ready to fight to make it happen._** We don’t need to wait for a change of leadership in Washington to start building the conservative comeback. _We’ve got the roadmap right here. _ **All we need is YOUR SUPPORT to fuel our efforts. We need to get this in the hands of millions more American patriots** **Will you help us save America from Joe Biden’s disastrous policies, Fellow Conservative?**
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zms3ugpcvlda4tvhnelb1v3htpk6gm6c85jv7qe0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sph6eob1c5h2bs)
---
Thank you,Mike PenceFounder, Advancing American Freedom

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: It wasn’t a hard question was it?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zl24d3hbt4hgv7l6hhulsfkabu6be7p6vok5hnu0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sph6aor7cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6phic8or3crjm2r6ap71mmp62phnmeqb8p33c1hn5dj5mkqb2obmedhj1d1je3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8omcs3gmdi3fcjncooj1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
I didn’t mean for the question to be so hard...

| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmitdcmacdlgveuvsfdvbtiljnbuagml2gg087eo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sph6aor7cdh2bs)
---

I didn’t mean for the question to be that hard. I didn’t. I promise. Pinky-swear.

This is all that I asked Supreme Court nominee Ketanji Brown Jackson the other day: “When does life begin?”

She responded, **“I don’t know.”**
| [**DONATE HERE TO SUPPORT COMMON SENSE ON THE SUPREME COURT**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg5ln28qsc90uq97kggkfdqkvk5mn4uofqrsob6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sph6aor7cdh2bs)
---

We’ve got to ensure that there's common sense on our Supreme Court that understands when life begins or can at least give a better answer than “I don’t know.”

**[WATCH THE FULL VIDEO BELOW](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zm47lab9vjn9b7lu7e47g4fvnse6hd0k7giqop2g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sph6aor7cdh2bs)**
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7bvdsk7i7fa9t88sci1amohgqrcsc6kf4dn1nj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sph6aor7cdh2bs)
I’m fighting every day in Washington to protect all life and keep as much common sense in Washington as humanly possible, and that’s asking a lot.

That’s why I need your help to continue to have the resources to keep fighting. **We cannot allow the Left to handpick their Socialist candidate who can’t answer questions like “what is a woman?” or “When does life begin?”** These are simple questions with simple answers, and that’s why I need your help to keep common sense on the Supreme Court.

**[Will you rush a donation below to help me keep common sense on the Supreme Court?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z97bte10t10vmdv7qnqbtk0n5mge1eq1i3noum68_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sph6aor7cdh2bs)**

**In Iowa, Democrat Abby Finkenauer is running to defeat GOP incumbent Sen. Chuck Grassley. Here's what you need to know about this crucial race:**
* Abby is the **youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue** and, if elected, she would become the youngest woman in the U.S. Senate.

body:
I need your help -
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bt3FoovHGlqZzYXqVNZXkO9rLI57vWsCTBbg7ZIjSjt_P9gJhZCLE8KR6tApcL3ChfHoO4pPek2sH6BpA9PQQaXcZBOk4DvY4GPQ3YZWTmE2EWIH1-0nsiBGW76Q2QawaBSyWp1w3QLreJbJq_dIdg==&c=QxBMPyW72Fn4ZoS1V7I5-GpTU7RYb3DdRcMlOxs8YA8YtOAUbpisWA==&ch=Xb6IubHbv8XZfd2IjZPTLrea2LMcnOp3-Ni7dimLwg3FmjDjtW5Neg==)

|
Dear Supporters, I NEED Your Help!
Facebook and Twitter have been Shadow Banning us: We have over 70,000 Followers between Facebook and Twitter and our posts are getting between 30 and 200 likes? I have asked friends of mine if they saw this post or this tweet and they said they haven't. This is happening over and over again. ShadowBannned Accounts that are shadowbanned are put into a kind of invisible mode. In other words, they become a "shadow" that no one can see. Shadowbanning is when your posts or activity don't show up on a site, but you haven't received an official ban or notification.
I'm not absolutelty sure why they are ShadowBanning us, so I need your help to fix this!
How can you help? As my supporter, you can help by clicking on our page links for Facebook and scrolling through the first 10 posts that you see, Like, Share, and then Comment on each one. You can do the same on Twitter. Then we will monitor the posts and see the changes it makes on our reach. You can also change your following to Favorite from default to see if that will help as well.
Don't let Big Tech stifle my voice. We have to get our message out to Pennsylvanians and I need my core Grassroot team to do that. And that is you. Will you help and volunteer for this project? Here are the links:
Facebook: [https://www.facebook.com/BarnetteforSenate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bt3FoovHGlqZzYXqVNZXkO9rLI57vWsCTBbg7ZIjSjt_P9gJhZCLE5FEQ-EcYo5alPM0ucVctgYXSr-lq4x0kOHYo8mgr0Ynfj5a842fpdLipZ61sojBPUjwmLxQXZ_pyV80eMTQbexXGF6ty6aDerxsFT_njJGOwEewue4Tjfs=&c=QxBMPyW72Fn4ZoS1V7I5-GpTU7RYb3DdRcMlOxs8YA8YtOAUbpisWA==&ch=Xb6IubHbv8XZfd2IjZPTLrea2LMcnOp3-Ni7dimLwg3FmjDjtW5Neg==)

clean_body: I need your help - | | | | | | == | Dear Supporters, I NEED Your Help! Facebook and Twitter have been Shadow Banning us: We have over 70,000 Followers between Facebook and Twitter and our posts are getting between 30 and 200 likes? I have asked friends of mine if they saw this post or this tweet and they said they haven't. This is happening over and over again. ShadowBannned Accounts that are shadowbanned are put into a kind of invisible mode. In other words, they become a "shadow" that no one can see. Shadowbanning is when your posts or activity don't show up on a site, but you haven't received an official ban or notification. I'm not absolutelty sure why they are ShadowBanning us, so I need your help to fix this! How can you help? As my supporter, you can help by clicking on our page links for Facebook and scrolling through the first 10 posts that you see, Like, Share, and then Comment on each one. You can do the same on Twitter. Then we will monitor the posts and see the changes it makes on our reach. You can also change your following to Favorite from default to see if that will help as well. Don't let Big Tech stifle my voice. We have to get our message out to Pennsylvanians and I need my core Grassroot team to do that. And that is you. Will you help and volunteer for this project? Here are the links: Facebook: == Twitter: == If you do not have a Twitter or Facebook, you can still help with Google, Rumble, YouTube, and Instagram. They are doing similar things to my campaign. Youtube: == Rumble: == Instagram: == Google: == On Google, you can leave a review if you have a Gmail account. You can also like my photos and posts | | | | | | | | | | Kathy Barnette for Senate | == | == == == | | | == | | | == | | | Kathy Barnette for Senate | P.O. name: American Action News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z894loknuhshfflr8b8o3pupvv7g6g5cgsu9r5v0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sph6aor2cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfaddgceor5cjkmipn2obkslrrbcrl6tjm7c9mcuo62d376ko76tj3mjj38ojgesrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm9d9m6upbaphh62pmadtgmlin49fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlmgml9f8ei563jooobl35lkhpmi1v6mthb0s4l8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sph6aor2cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd080ne2jg3f5u90b2iim0r63k5u6m8oolgs4tjo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sph6aor2cth2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt6lg5ubub5ii0d6nvtnnts2lti5pvdc3lqabp58_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sph6aor2cth2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Connor Boyack
subject: How to save American History from the Woke [Photos]
body:
The government lockdowns and the pandemic are changing everything — how we work, how we travel, and how we approach our childr
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq5qun5gg9gd01nltkcdk04vubopllll7rf7b288_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbq78p1hegor8p77caqjeo76mir76d3jcarj7cb66tjj2ptjm3gjadbielieaornmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti65j70s5jcgrr4sr66jgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5iecoj5cdj64oh5u)
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu3t0acs4vabhbgqqp2q7hdf06hpe15nc6e5ur0g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sph6aor6c9h2bs "Tuttle Twins")

Hello Friend,

The government lockdowns and the pandemic are changing everything -- how we work, how we travel, and _how we approach our children 's education_.

Parents at home are discovering how radical their children's education is becoming.
* **American history is being taught from a one-dimensional lens of racism. **

* **In some instances, kids are learning how to protest for left-wing causes instead of learning subject matter. **

* **The White House even encourages schools to adopt the New York Times ' 1619 Project. **

**Here 's how we are saving American History.**

Let me introduce myself and my plan to stop this. My name is Connor Boyack, author of _The Tuttle Twins_ , a pro-liberty children's book series.

Each book in this series focuses on a different aspect of the principles of a free society: free enterprise, competition, individual rights, personal responsibility, entrepreneurship, and many others!

I am proud to tell you about our upcoming launch of the _Tuttle Twins American History Curriculum. _

**Friend****, those who do not learn from history are condemned to repeat it. **

[_**Can you help distribute 5,000 copies of the Tuttle Twins History Curriculum to charter schools and home school families this year? Click here to donate >>>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpqbe2evd28mguk6msbpqt978tj0tr5kutdu4d50_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sph6aor6c9h2bs)

The _Tuttle Twin American History Curriculum_ books will fill the void in teaching important economic, civic, and social principles to the rising generation who will lead this country.

and apply the lessons of history.
