clean_body: The government lockdowns and the pandemic are changing everything — how we work, how we travel, and how we approach our childr "Tuttle Twins" Hello Friend, The government lockdowns and the pandemic are changing everything -- how we work, how we travel, and how we approach our children 's education. Parents at home are discovering how radical their children's education is becoming. American history is being taught from a one-dimensional lens of racism. In some instances, kids are learning how to protest for left-wing causes instead of learning subject matter. The White House even encourages schools to adopt the New York Times ' 1619 Project. Here 's how we are saving American History. Let me introduce myself and my plan to stop this. My name is Connor Boyack, author of The Tuttle Twins , a pro-liberty children's book series. Each book in this series focuses on a different aspect of the principles of a free society: free enterprise, competition, individual rights, personal responsibility, entrepreneurship, and many others! I am proud to tell you about our upcoming launch of the Tuttle Twins American History Curriculum. Friend**, those who do not learn from history are condemned to repeat it. My vision is bold. I want to get schools to adopt the Tuttle Twins American History as the official curriculum. My plan is to get 5 schools to adopt it this year with your support. Existing Kindergarten to 8th grade American history books don't help much, as they are lacking in context, relevance, and aren't helping youth find a modern application of historical ideas -- making it hard for young people to understand the ideas of liberty that inspired America's founding The Tuttle Twin American History Curriculum books will fill the void in teaching important economic, civic, and social principles to the rising generation who will lead this country. To address this widespread problem, we are producing a large volume of illustrated stories--in the popular Tuttle Twins style and format -- that resolves these issues so that young people today can actually appreciate and apply the lessons of history. These are not just a textbook, but a resource full of activities and useful extras for a child or for a whole classroom. And the best part? Kids actually love the Tuttle Twins as it connects complex ideas with them in fun ways! I've set a goal to complete the curriculum and distribute 5,000 copies this year. But I can 't do it without your support. All support is valuable and will help us offer these factual history textbooks in the hands of America's future. Click any link below to donate >>> Thank you for empowering the rising generation to fight for freedom in their circumstances and communities. Connor Boyack Author, Tuttle Twins President, Libertas Institute If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | Good morning fellow patriots,

(Very urgent... please read, I need your help)

I have chosen to keep my congressional committee open because I have committed to not giving up on our fight until we fire Dan Crenshaw from office.

Unfortunately, it has become a challenge for the Jameson Ellis For Congress campaign because donations have stopped flowing in, but the monthly bills have not...

And it's put me in a bit of a pickle.

We have about a $500-$1,000 monthly overhead that we must get covered in order for me to run again in 2024.

Whether this looks like 100 of you donating $10-$20 per/m, 10 of you donating $100-$200 per/m, or 2 of you donating the maximum of $2,900 at once, (which is the maximum an individual can donate to my congressional campaign for the 2024 primaries)...

I need your help.

ALSO...

Many of you have expressed concerns about WinRed, so I have officially moved my donation platform to Anedot.

name: Michaela with Team Kermit
subject: 60 days out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress
body:
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43876664/339096237/-714857058?refcode=fl_email_fr_2022040760days_MTK_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDczMDg4MC04NWI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T4Ki6b5n2ugQpPLw7qm37hzkRskRvu-LcX-cyZ-GPkk=)
---
Friends, you may already know that California has a top-two primary system, meaning _regardless of party, the top-two vote-getters move on to the November general election._ Dr. Kermit is the clear Democratic frontrunner, but with two well-known Republicans on the ticket, things could get dicey. **Sheriff Scott Jones and Assemblyman Kevin Kiley are raising _millions_ to turn out GOP voters in the primary.** The nightmare scenario is Democrats skip the primary thinking the real fight is in November, just for Republicans to bump Dr. Kermit into third place and torpedo our dreams of flipping this seat. Friends, we can’t let that happen. We’re mobilizing a massive Get Out The Vote push for the primary, but we need your help. [We have just 60 days before the June Primary. name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: Who put it on the line?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR
body:
It's important to remember. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen.com/who-led?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

Who led?

Who has been capable of standing by their convictions despite the slings and arrows that came?

Who's campaign has been attacked relentlessly by the far-left and old guard political talking heads?

If you believe, like my wife and I do, that we are are in the 11th hour and our state has become unrecognizable because of Tim Walz's failed policies - then you also _know_ it's going to take someone who stood in the breach and hasn't flinched to change course.

It's easy to talk about parental rights now. Our campaign has traveled the state for over a year advocating for momma bears and warrior dads having a say in their kids' health and education.

It's easy to talk about health freedom now. I went from family doctor of the year to being investigated 5 times for spearheading the issue of vaccine mandates, mask mandates, and business closures. We stood toe to toe with Walz on his ridiculous modeling, and LED the charge in calling for Jan Malcolm's firing. In Minnesota, we fought back against Joe Biden's unconstitutional mandates and pushed for Minnesota to be a [Health Freedom Sanctuary State](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=c795399450&e=33b11688c1)!

It's easy to attack other Republicans when it comes to the sacred issue of protecting the unborn. My [running mate Matt Birk](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=1d55badb60&e=33b11688c1) boycotted a [Super Bowl visit](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=e2030d772d&e=33b11688c1) to Barack Obama's White House because of his pro-life convictions. I delivered hundreds of babies throughout my career and have a lifetime 100% rating with the MCCL. We share those convictions and will fight for them when elected in November.

Our campaign has built a groundswell movement, not by hitching a wagon to the popular consensus - but by leading on the issues when others wouldn't. It's why we've [led in the polls](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=a7b8aed2ac&e=33b11688c1), [raised a record amount of money](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=777bde17f7&e=33b11688c1) through small dollar donations, inspired a [grassroots army](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=0fc6849df0&e=33b11688c1) that's building, and continue to [invigorate Minnesotans across the state](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=c4d5403c57&e=33b11688c1).

Big tech has tried to silence us, the far-left DFL has tried to silence us, and the political elite have tried to silence us. It hasn't worked.

**We are all in the arena now,** whether we wanted to be or not. I hope you'll join our movement, not because of flowery words or pandering - but because we have built this campaign with people who stood in the fire. That's what is needed now more than ever.

Are you in?
---
|
In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota
---

name: Sarah Palin
subject: Become a Founding Supporter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Peter,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I'm representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I've watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I'm asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can't do this without your support.

That's why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you'll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW TO BECOME AN OFFICIAL FOUNDING SUPPORTER.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60066805:J9OKLYolN:m:1:3317145305:457D4A78AD36B175EE8962DE0554D9C1:r)**

This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I'm running, and YOU will be the reason we win.

_**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60066805:J9OKLYolN:m:1:3317145305:457D4A78AD36B175EE8962DE0554D9C1:r)**_

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60066805:J9OKLYolN:m:1:3317145305:457D4A78AD36B175EE8962DE0554D9C1:r)

At this critical time in our nation's history, we need leaders who will combat the left's socialist, big-government, America-last agenda.

This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children's future, and selling out our nation's interest to the highest bidder.

I'm in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country.

I just have one simple question for you:

**WILL YOU JOIN ME?**

**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60066805:J9OKLYolN:m:1:3317145305:457D4A78AD36B175EE8962DE0554D9C1:r)**

Thank you & God Bless America.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60066805:J9OKLYolN:m:1:3317145305:457D4A78AD36B175EE8962DE0554D9C1:r)
Sarah Palin

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60066805:J9OKLYolN:m:1:3317145305:457D4A78AD36B175EE8962DE0554D9C1:r)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20Curry?=
subject: Curry raises $245K in first quarter of 2022
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=479fd23f6d&e=598f6aa24c)
---
| |
---
| **Curry raises $245K in first quarter of 2022******
---
| McDonough, GA - Conservative small business owner and former Georgia Revenue Commissioner David Curry announced today that his campaign brought in $245,272 during the first quarter of 2022. Curry has now raised $690,070 since entering the race in June of 2021 and will report $299,157 cash on hand as we enter the final 2 months before the Primary Election.

“It’s encouraging to see momentum building with our campaign,” said Curry. “It’s clear our message of fiscal responsibility, protecting individual freedoms, voter integrity and securing our border is resonating with voters across the 10th District. I am encouraged to see that we will have ample resources available to reach voters as we enter the final two months of the primary election.

“I’m honored to have so many hard-working Georgians invested in my campaign. The voters in Georgia’s 10th Congressional District want a congressman who has a proven conservative record of fiscal responsibility and America First values and I am grateful to have such strong support. Empty political rhetoric has become a popular campaign tactic but voters are looking for results. I have a track record of saving taxpayer dollars by staying under budget all 10 years as Henry County’s Tax Commissioner and by cutting the Georgia Department of Revenue’s budget nearly $30M over two years. In Congress, I’ll fight for Georgia values, and I will never back down from fighting for our beliefs: God, Country, and Freedom.”

###

_**David Curry is a lifelong Georgian who is running for congress to make sure the American Dream and our Georgia values aren’t infringed on by the radical left. After beginning his career at Ford Motor Company as an electrician at 18 years old, Curry went on to graduate college at Mercer University in Macon, GA and eventually got his Master’s degree from Georgia State. Curry was elected as Henry County’s Tax Commissioner in 2008 and served in this role for over 10 years before becoming Georgia’s State Revenue Commissioner in 2019._

name: Nikki Fried
subject: I have HUGE news, Peter
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Hey Peter —

We all know that it’s time to try something new in Florida.

That doesn’t just mean electing a Governor who will serve our state with compassion, pragmatism, bravery, and boldness.

It also means electing our state’s first ever woman Governor to finally bring the fight for women and women’s rights to the highest level of our state government.

Today, I’m proud to announce that Her Bold Move —an organization dedicated to electing women to offices only ever held by men — has endorsed my campaign! Will you chip in $20 to join Her Bold Move, support my campaign, and help us make history this year? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?refcode=407hbmendorsement]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=407hbmendorsement] Express Donate $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=407hbmendorsement] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=407hbmendorsement] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=407hbmendorsement] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=407hbmendorsement] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?refcode=407hbmendorsement]

While DeSantis pushed for his inhumane, cruel abortion ban, attacked our freedoms, and made it clear that our health, safety, and well-being are not his concern, I’ve been out there standing up for Florida women and speaking out against DeSantis’ anti-woman agenda.

That’s the kind of leadership we need, and it’s the kind of leadership we’ll only get if we rally behind strong, steadfast, and unwavering champions for women’s rights.

So I’m personally asking you to stand with me and stand with Her Bold Move to help us make history and elect Florida’s first woman Governor this year. If you’re with us, click here to chip in $20 right now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-apr-2022?refcode=407hbmendorsement]

Thank you for being on my team.

— Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

The AFL-CIO is the largest workers’ movement in North Carolina, protecting workers from all walks of life and careers. We are humbled and honored to receive this endorsement. Valerie has always been a strong advocate for fair wages and working conditions for North Carolinians and will continue this advocacy in Congress.

name: ICYMI News
subject: Will you share your thoughts on inflation?
body:
Inflation is on the rise in America. And there’s no sign of it slowing down. In February, consumer prices rose 7.9 percent
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv0s21ulogkn7ulqipas4c7d239es20b2eou7vmg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpb3dpgsmpr2t7165hmaclk6sob4dbkmkob5cjn6aob4p5jc1om8s3gedj78sdn6v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66libadhnm8rmcd74mdi3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5iecob7c9i6aoh5u)
| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6rsgfol0ppe3np4j68gofr0l7g8uc4j00h907dg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4spgmeoj4clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear fellow American, Inflation is on the rise in America. And there’s no sign of it slowing down. In February, consumer prices rose 7.9 percent—the highest annual inflation rate increase since January 1982. Economic historian John Steele Gordon discussed inflation in a recent issue of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty. And he noted that adding trillions more to the national debt is not the solution. In fact, it will only make the problem worse. Nevertheless, support for socialism and other ideologies destructive of the free market also appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among younger Americans. That’s why you’re receiving this email today. Hillsdale College seeks to understand more clearly what Americans think about our nation’s economy and the inflation we’re experiencing. And I’m hoping you can help by completing our **National Survey on Inflation in the United States** using the secure link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-inflation/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8ot4vu6hv1cf035bu16quecf44vlie8b6eambbo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4spgmeoj4clh2bs)** The survey will take you only a few minutes to complete. But the results will help us develop an effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about free market economics. This educational effort is critical to reining in the growing appetite in Washington, D.C., to print more money to pay for ever-expanding government programs. We think education is the surest way to reverse this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is vital as we expand our efforts to defend liberty nationwide by reaching and teaching millions. So please don’t wait. Share your opinions on inflation and the state of our nation’s economy by completing the **National Survey on Inflation in the United States** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-inflation/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z81n608pfpup464qtgvfn6ittnrfrcdt35jo9cbg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4spgmeoj4clh2bs)**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. Inflation in the United States is on the rise. We need your opinions to develop an effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about this growing threat to liberty. Please complete our **National Survey on Inflation in the United States** using the secure link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-inflation/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6teu3nlme6bh7ordumndr8sfqqj4v1kdn3b6420_rp22sh2s8i66ob4spgmeoj4clh2bs)**
---

| | Derek—[ _**I’m about to ask you to chip in $5 toward my grassroots campaign**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43881864/339113617/1583582988?refcode=mw_em_220407_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZThlNmJmOC04ZmI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CxhEsRupNfBXFzJBudzFF3FoXinVI30zHdRmcMQz9q0=). But first, I want to tell you why I’m confident we can prove the skeptics wrong and win this battleground race. 1. **Republican Senator Rob Portman is retiring** , leaving Ohio’s Senate seat wide open. Republicans are fighting it out in a messy and expensive primary—giving us a stronger chance of flipping this seat blue. 2. **Ohio already has a Democratic Senator.** Sherrod Brown has proven that Ohioans want to elect a Senator who puts workers first. 3. **A recent poll has me within single digits of my Republican opponents**. It’s still early in the race, and the more we get our message out, the more voters we’ll win over. 4\. **Working people are fed up and ready for change.** I’ve been traveling all over the state, and Ohioans are sick of handouts for big corporations and billionaires—they want good-paying jobs, health care they can afford, and a fair shot for their kids to succeed. 5.** We have grassroots momentum.** While my rich Republican opponents are propping up their campaigns with millions of their own dollars, we’re powered by folks who chip in $5, $25, or $100 at a time. So, Derek, we have a real path to winning this race—but it will take everything we have to pull it off. [_**My campaign has one final FEC deadline before the general election. clean_body: I want to tell you why I’m confident we can prove the skeptics wrong and win this battleground race. | | | Derek—=. But first, I want to tell you why I’m confident we can prove the skeptics wrong and win this battleground race. 1. Republican Senator Rob Portman is retiring , leaving Ohio’s Senate seat wide open. Republicans are fighting it out in a messy and expensive primary—giving us a stronger chance of flipping this seat blue. 2. Ohio already has a Democratic Senator. Sherrod Brown has proven that Ohioans want to elect a Senator who puts workers first. 3. A recent poll has me within single digits of my Republican opponents. It’s still early in the race, and the more we get our message out, the more voters we’ll win over. 4\. Working people are fed up and ready for change. I’ve been traveling all over the state, and Ohioans are sick of handouts for big corporations and billionaires—they want good-paying jobs, health care they can afford, and a fair shot for their kids to succeed. 5. We have grassroots momentum. While my rich Republican opponents are propping up their campaigns with millions of their own dollars, we’re powered by folks who chip in $5, $25, or $100 at a time. So, Derek, we have a real path to winning this race—but it will take everything we have to pull it off. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between Tim Ryan and Mark Warner: = = = = = = Together, I know we can get this done, \----Tim = * | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: American Update
subject: Have you felt the pinch of inflation?
body:
Inflation is on the rise in America. And there’s no sign of it slowing down. In February, consumer prices rose 7.9 percent—the highest annual inflation rate increase since January 1982. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9860%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=2CckT2Hj0Q7me%2fTUDe5bfA&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28655%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jFJdyXg6HOD4BdahPmg4FA&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear fellow American, Inflation is on the rise in America. And there’s no sign of it slowing down. In February, consumer prices rose 7.9 percent--the highest annual inflation rate increase since January 1982. Economic historian John Steele Gordon discussed inflation in a recent issue of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty. And he noted that adding trillions more to the national debt is not the solution. In fact, it will only make the problem worse. Nevertheless, support for socialism and other ideologies destructive of the free market also appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among younger Americans. That’s why you’re receiving this email today. Hillsdale College seeks to understand more clearly what Americans think about our nation’s economy and the inflation we’re experiencing. And I’m hoping you can help by completing our **National Survey on Inflation in the United States** using the secure link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-inflation/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28656%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3GKaVdio010iBedtS22rLg&sysid=1)** The survey will take you only a few minutes to complete. But the results will help us develop an effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about free market economics. This educational effort is critical to reining in the growing appetite in Washington, D.C., to print more money to pay for ever-expanding government programs. We think education is the surest way to reverse this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is vital as we expand our efforts to defend liberty nationwide by reaching and teaching millions. So please don’t wait. Share your opinions on inflation and the state of our nation’s economy by completing the **National Survey on Inflation in the United States** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-inflation/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28656%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3GKaVdio010iBedtS22rLg&sysid=1)**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. Inflation in the United States is on the rise. We need your opinions to develop an effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about this growing threat to liberty. Please complete our **National Survey on Inflation in the United States** using the secure link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-inflation/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28656%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3GKaVdio010iBedtS22rLg&sysid=1)**

clean_body: She’s attacking our kids for attention = Peter, While it’s no surprise after her long history of homophobia and transphobia, it’s no less outrageous that Marjorie Taylor Greene recently announced her plan to introduce a federal “Don’t Say Gay” bill — on INFOWARS, no less. While she knows, of course, there is no chance the bill will pass, actually governing doesn’t matter to do-nothing MTG. All she cares about is attention, and she’s perfectly willing to elevate this horrendous bill’s place in a national discussion if it means getting more attention. = = Reports have already come in that the passage and discussion around Florida’s Don’t Say Gay bill have damaged the mental health of LGBT+ youth not just in Florida, but across the country. Anyone with a shred of decency would be ashamed to be part of that. But bullies like Marge don’t care if they can get attention for it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = No more, Holly McCormack for Congress || || Holly McCormack for Congress 862 Lafayette St PO Box 1035 Ringgold, GA 30736 United States ** | Paid for by Holly for Congress

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Press Contact: [info@barnetteforsenate.com](mailto:info@barnetteforsenate.com) April 5, 2022 Kathy Barnette, Candidate for U.S. Senate, Wins PA Leadership Conference Straw Poll in a Landslide Kathy Barnette, candidate for U.S. Senate, won the Pennsylvania Leadership Conference's Straw Poll on April 2, 2022. Winning by a landslide with 127 votes, Barnette was the clear victor. The second-place candidate, Jeff Bartos, only secured 64 votes, by comparison. Carla Sands received 52 votes, David McCormick received 50 votes, and Mehmet Oz only received 43 votes. Speaking of her commitment to the people of Pennsylvania, Barnette said, "I'm the only true Conservative on the campaign trail. It's time to make a change. I will fight for the people of Pennsylvania, their families, and their businesses. I will be their voice in the United States Senate. These are extraordinary times and we need an extraordinary candidate. We can do this - together!"
---
|
---
| | |

Friends, **It's clear Marylanders want to elect a governor with the experience needed to make our state a safer place to live.** Doug recently sat down with _Jmore_ to discuss why he's the most qualified candidate to deliver on that vision as governor. If you missed it, check out the highlights below!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/KTqGVTU95m3XYkCVwdzD9f311ceqPSZVYdXEJRymulkq0qGSEMdimW1WhZgo09MSQqUFRfHHKGKGorGfg7HsC8YwYaUgWoEBra9kUt3dn8LQbDGjhDW8H84giB2WGIawQiF9FlTAhaDQi4K4hRp74qCDP95NXyWJFuFQd1X0Hct7OUSMO7c5fuKCdIXmKzqHC-9iwdCje6Aei6kXby87y6K3MVqzPyBwIXxpD8yKdv-yAKwe_ks2f2YFhKUbfR13zVd9VopGJhX10kfsauRkKroNRlEw_8v5JOY2qKojHTLbrx8LRN9jm50TtSVe5DBWJt7reybQy1prRlZA6GV5uCYFzK7OM_uX5a4BcvctLQU/3l0/On7QL9XhRpy7k06JErV4iA/h1/NAL1x0O5vW6BtgEvY15NWT35e9J-_RAxKuPdsLkZbjQ)
---
Former Maryland Attorney General Doug Gansler Talks to Jmore about his Gubernatorial Aspirations By Alan Feiler | April 4, 2022 [...] "I'm the only pro-business, pro-social justice, practical moderate with progressive values in the race. I am the crime solution person in the race. [...] What I bring is a spectrum of experience that I would submit is unparalleled, in terms of my record on social issues, environmental issues, on leadership during times of crisis, which I think we are in now." "The most important thing I bring to the table is 23 years in criminal justice. [...] I've knelt on sidewalks with mothers grieving for the loss of their child by a bullet, for no good reason. That puts an indelible impression on your heart and your soul and your mind. I understand how to fix that, because I've done it before." [...] "We have a murder problem in Baltimore and around the state, but we also have carjackings and home invasions, thefts, and no one seems to be addressing it on a state level. If you're sitting at a light and worried about getting carjacked, I ask for your vote." [...] "I'm hearing that [voters] want people with experience, someone who's led in times of crisis. [...] And someone who has experience with criminal justice and can help people live safely. That's the number one job of government, to keep citizens safe." [...]
---
|
---

clean_body: It's clear Marylanders want to elect a governor with the experience needed to make our state a safer place to live. Doug recently sat down with Jmore to discuss why he's the most qualified candidate to deliver on that vision as governor. | | Friends, It's clear Marylanders want to elect a governor with the experience needed to make our state a safer place to live. Doug recently sat down with Jmore to discuss why he's the most qualified candidate to deliver on that vision as governor. If you missed it, check out the highlights below! | | Former Maryland Attorney General Doug Gansler Talks to Jmore about his Gubernatorial Aspirations By Alan Feiler | April 4, 2022 [...] "I'm the only pro-business, pro-social justice, practical moderate with progressive values in the race. I am the crime solution person in the race. [...] What I bring is a spectrum of experience that I would submit is unparalleled, in terms of my record on social issues, environmental issues, on leadership during times of crisis, which I think we are in now." "The most important thing I bring to the table is 23 years in criminal justice. [...] I've knelt on sidewalks with mothers grieving for the loss of their child by a bullet, for no good reason. That puts an indelible impression on your heart and your soul and your mind. I understand how to fix that, because I've done it before." [...] "We have a murder problem in Baltimore and around the state, but we also have carjackings and home invasions, thefts, and no one seems to be addressing it on a state level. If you're sitting at a light and worried about getting carjacked, I ask for your vote." [...] "I'm hearing that [voters] want people with experience, someone who's led in times of crisis. [...] And someone who has experience with criminal justice and can help people live safely. That's the number one job of government, to keep citizens safe." [...] | We know Doug can meet the challenge of this moment because he's done it before. But right now, he needs your help to win this competitive primary, team. Thanks for your support, Team Gansler By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair. Friends of Doug Gansler P.O. Box 31102 Bethesda, MD 20824 United States | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Friends of Doug Gansler, please .

name: Kevin Roberts, Ph.D.
subject: You won’t hear this on Facebook
body:
I know you appreciate taking a stand for America’s founding principles. So I wanted to tell you in the past, Heritage acc
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqamrpbpfgn24dccgqlflh47hd87msbgkoo4lh6g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4spim8o75c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbo6aspim2r74sb6emp36stim8p75cj5m9om1c9je2om0sjmeupr1d9ncdq62p37mv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66libadhge8omcdj4mmomfc5lclp2bs)
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgue7ik977nikgmpeqfeblubistcstmq068dor0o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4spim8o75c9h2bs)
---
Hello Fellow Conservative, I know you appreciate taking a stand for America’s founding principles. So I wanted to tell you in the past, Heritage accepted donations from Facebook and Google. But no longer. Facebook and Google are **ideologically corrupt, **so we returned six-figure donations from both companies. They **censor and suppress conservative ideas.** For example, approaching the 2020 election Facebook recklessly concealed a major news article from one of the nation’s oldest newspapers simply because it posed a risk to their narrative. And that’s just one instance. Sadly, Facebook, Google, and other Big Tech companies such as Twitter have chosen to become **destructive of core American principles** that sustain us as a free society. So we don’t want their tainted leftwing money. Instead, we want to stop the agenda of Facebook and Big Tech. We’re taking action to counter their abuses of power. The problem is that their ideological bias targets and censors conservative voices, shrinks the marketplace of ideas, and undermines the foundation of our republic. And that’s why I’m asking you, as someone who cares about the future of America, to stand with us. Heritage is strategically moving to _counter _Big Tech’s ideological bullying. _Our _efforts give **_you_** an effective way to fight back—and stand up for the America you love. Stand with Heritage by signing our Big Tech Petition today by using the secure link below: **[https://secured.heritage.org/sign-thf-big-tech-petition/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z75jj96buah69eolsha998opse2udr85aemb40j0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4spim8o75c9h2bs)** When you sign the petition today, you are joining **Heritage’s strategy to stop the Radical Left’s agenda,** which is being championed by Facebook, Google, Twitter, and others in Big Tech. They are giants. They are powerful. But their agenda _can _be stopped. [**Consider joining us in standing against them by signing the petition today.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ze9rjlr226ep0ssdlst32i9pch5k578orhc3qoe8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4spim8o75c9h2bs) All the best, Kevin Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Tom Perez
subject: Save the Date: Reception in Kensington on Saturday, May 7
body:
Join me on May 7!
#

Dear Peter,
I hope you are well. I wanted to reach out and ask you to**[save the date for Saturday, May 7 at 4:00 PM](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43884000/339124098/-41628105?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzAyYWVhYS05N2I2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aVsZsA7HqvwDEsfucsE4CXHoO8Bgd8kwxMKXn2YDnEs=&emci=bfb701e1-bab5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=8c02aeaa-97b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837) **for a special fundraising reception in support of my campaign for Governor of Maryland at the home of Eden Durbin in Kensington.

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: RINOs Fund Failure Again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
|
---
Peter: They did it again.
Democrats needed Republican votes to fund the government. Senate Republican leaders had the leverage to fight for real reforms - building a border wall, boosting U.S. energy production, defunding unconstitutional vaccine mandates.
And what did they do? **Nothing.**
Mitch McConnell and his lackeys not only worked with Democrats to pass the $1.5 trillion bill. They brought back earmarks, too - 4,000 of them! As usual, establishment Republicans sold out their principles, their constituents, and our children.
What did we get? More spending, more debt, and more fuel to the inflation fire.
_**You and I both know that these outrageous Senate votes will not change until the Senators do.**_
**[Let's dump the Senate establishment to save America!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60067414:JvjkyYoN5:m:1:3317145305:1A1CF3D7D6CDE05E4B72BD599E9D0A94:r)**
The Senate Conservatives Fund (SCF) is committed to creating a conservative majority in the U.S. Senate. No more corporate cronies! No more party hacks! No more McConnell lapdogs!
In 2022, we can stop the Washington Mono-Party by electing true conservatives to Senate seats across the country:
---
* **MO BROOKS** in Alabama;
* **JOSH MANDEL** in Ohio;
* **TED BUDD** in North Carolina;
* **ADAM LAXALT** in Nevada; and
* Senators **MIKE LEE** , **RAND PAUL** , and **RON JOHNSON**.

---
Fighting, principled conservatives like them - joining America First leaders like Ted Cruz, Josh Hawley, and others - can change the Senate, Washington, and America.
SCF exists to leverage activist energy around the country and concentrates it on the most critical Senate races every cycle. This year, these races will determine not only whether the Senate goes Republican or Democrat but whether it will even matter.
**[Help us stop the endless Senate Sellouts by supporting SCF and our priority candidates today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60067414:JvjkyYoN5:m:1:3317145305:1A1CF3D7D6CDE05E4B72BD599E9D0A94:r)**
_You can donate directly to multiple candidates with one transaction, and SCF will pay all processing fees so those candidates can spend 100% of your contributions on voter contact._
If moderate Republicans take these seats, conservatives will be left on the outside looking in, regardless of which party wins the majority. Only by nominating and electing tough, tenacious patriots will they have a chance to take on the Swamp next year.
**[Let 's make this latest sellout the last one we ever see.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60067414:JvjkyYoN5:m:1:3317145305:1A1CF3D7D6CDE05E4B72BD599E9D0A94:r)**
Thank you for considering this important request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future. Sincerely,
---
---
Matt Hoskins Senior Advisor Senate Conservatives Fund

As usual, establishment Republicans sold out their principles, their constituents, and our children. What did we get? More spending, more debt, and more fuel to the inflation fire. You and I both know that these outrageous Senate votes will not change until the Senators do. The Senate Conservatives Fund (SCF) is committed to creating a conservative majority in the U.S. Senate. No more corporate cronies! No more party hacks! No more McConnell lapdogs! In 2022, we can stop the Washington Mono-Party by electing true conservatives to Senate seats across the country: MO BROOKS in Alabama; JOSH MANDEL in Ohio; TED BUDD in North Carolina; ADAM LAXALT in Nevada; and Senators MIKE LEE , RAND PAUL , and RON JOHNSON. Fighting, principled conservatives like them - joining America First leaders like Ted Cruz, Josh Hawley, and others - can change the Senate, Washington, and America. SCF exists to leverage activist energy around the country and concentrates it on the most critical Senate races every cycle. This year, these races will determine not only whether the Senate goes Republican or Democrat but whether it will even matter. You can donate directly to multiple candidates with one transaction, and SCF will pay all processing fees so those candidates can spend 100% of your contributions on voter contact. If moderate Republicans take these seats, conservatives will be left on the outside looking in, regardless of which party wins the majority. Only by nominating and electing tough, tenacious patriots will they have a chance to take on the Swamp next year. Thank you for considering this important request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future. Sincerely, Matt Hoskins Senior Advisor Senate Conservatives Fund | PRIORITY SENATE CANDIDATES** | | "DONATE" Senate Conservatives Fund 300 Independence Ave SE Washington, DC 20003 | Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington. Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: Resign, Recall, Replace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60066925:Jr-AyYoNT:m:1:3253819041:5FE5844495FB752890160DC3D6FE0F35:r) Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you're thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I'll tell you why. I've seen what's happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I'm sure you have too. Public schools all over the country are relentlessly pushing Critical Race Theory, and convincing America's children that they need to change their sexual preferences and gender identities. _[**It's state-sanctioned leftist indoctrination, plain and simple.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60066925:Jr-AyYoNT:m:1:3253819041:5FE5844495FB752890160DC3D6FE0F35:r)_** ** As I discussed on **_Tucker Carlson Tonight_** , I get rid of the people who are indoctrinating our children by replacing them with SANE conservative Americans. **[But, I can't do any of this without your help. Would you consider making a generous donation of ANY amount to help me put an end to state sanctioned leftist indoctrination?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60066925:Jr-AyYoNT:m:1:3253819041:5FE5844495FB752890160DC3D6FE0F35:r)** For decades, shady dark-money billionaires like **_George Soros_** have funneled massive amounts of cash into the pockets of radical left-wing activists to take up government positions in communities all over the country. **[One of Soros's favorite targets is local school board races](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60066925:Jr-AyYoNT:m:1:3253819041:5FE5844495FB752890160DC3D6FE0F35:r).** _And I hate to break it to you, but his plan has been wildly successful. _ Right now, in EVERY STATE IN AMERICA (including the red states), teachers are indoctrinating our students with CRT. If you're not familiar with CRT, it's the doctrine that all white people are oppressors, and that your skin color determines everything about you. Beyond this, _CRT teaches kids that America is evil to its core, and that everything that makes our country great, is secretly racist._** ** **_Then, what's worse is that these radical school boards allow, hire, and encourage teachers who have been caught ACTIVELY recruiting children to become transgender._** And friend, you may not have seen it happening at the time, but for too long Republicans have neglected local races and instead focused on "BIG" races for President, Governor, and Congress. But in the process, we've left room for people like George Soros to take over local governments all over the country, right under our noses. Now, with all this doom and gloom, it's easy to feel defeated. **But I know, and Tucker Carlson knows that this fight is far from over... ** And we CAN take back our schools from the radical left. [**HELP US TAKE BACK OUR SCHOOLS TODAY!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60066925:Jr-AyYoNT:m:1:3253819041:5FE5844495FB752890160DC3D6FE0F35:r) Let me introduce myself. [**My name is Ryan Girdusky, and I founded the 1776 Project PAC to take back our local school boards from the radical left. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60066925:Jr-AyYoNT:m:1:3253819041:5FE5844495FB752890160DC3D6FE0F35:r) **_And I have the 3 R's Battle Plan to do just that!_** **_Resign:_** we'll turn up the public pressure with TV, Radio, and Print media campaigns calling for far left school board members to quit. **_Recall:_** we'll help collect petitions signatures and aid local parents, grandparents, and concerned taxpayers in efforts to recall radical school board members who must be removed from office. **_Replace:_** We'll support the campaigns of pro-America conservatives who run for local school board against liberal pro-CRT school board members. In the coming year, we are hoping to triple our impact! [**But, friend, we can't roll out this plan without your support. Will you rush in $17.76 to the 1776 Project PAC as we prepared to target more than 200 races this year??**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60066925:Jr-AyYoNT:m:1:3253819041:5FE5844495FB752890160DC3D6FE0F35:r) Now, I'm guessing you've never heard of me before... **....But, I'd be willing to bet you've heard Tucker, Laura Ingraham, and Donald Trump Jr. ** I've had the chance to discuss my plan with them, and they all believe that _the 1776 Project PAC's 3 R's Campaign Battle Plan is a game-changer!_ Here's what each of them said: **> >>> Tucker Carlson: "**Parents have almost no support, _but now they do_. The **_1776 Project PAC_** __ is a political action committee designed to help school boards and communities elect sane people.... If you're thinking of writing a check... Think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky." **> >>> Laura Ingraham: **"For all the parents out there looking to reclaim your local school boards from radical leftists, help is on the way, a new political action committee called the **_1776 Project_** is going to support school board candidates who oppose indoctrinating kids with things like Critical Race Theory." **> >>> Donald Trump Jr.: **"The **_1776 Project_** is the very first Political Action Committee of it's kind, specifically created to take on this sinister attack on our way of life from within our own communities by working to take local schools boards out of the hands of these America-hating radical liberals..." Even the failing and biased New York Times admitted that we _" lit a fire"_ that is only growing as more conservative patriots like you join the fight in supporting the 1776 Project PAC.** ** **But here is the best part. The 1776 Project PAC has only been around for a year, and we already have a track-record of success. ** In November of 2021, we flipped 44 seats. In the coming year, as long as we have your help, we are set to more than TRIPLE our impact. **After 30 years of left-wing billionaires like George Soros flooding cash into local school board races, we finally have a way to fight back with the 1776 Project PAC.** [**Please consider helping us fight back against George Soros and the radical socialist left in our school boards with a generous contribution of $17.76, $25, $50, or $100.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60066925:Jr-AyYoNT:m:1:3253819041:5FE5844495FB752890160DC3D6FE0F35:r) _With your help, we will rid our schools of radical leftists who are hell-bent on turning our kids against conservative, American values.._. **And we'll replace them with sane, America-loving citizens.** Sincerely, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60066925:Jr-AyYoNT:m:1:3253819041:5FE5844495FB752890160DC3D6FE0F35:r) Ryan Girdusky P.S. I know you may not know anything about me, but I hope that the endorsements from incredible conservative leaders like my friends Tucker, Laura, and Donald Trump Jr. give you confidence in my dedication to the mission of taking school boards back from radical liberals. [**Will you invest in the future of our country by making a generous contribution to the 1776 Project PAC as we fight to Resign, Recall, or Replace far-left indoctrinators?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60066925:Jr-AyYoNT:m:1:3253819041:5FE5844495FB752890160DC3D6FE0F35:r) [**DONATE NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60066925:Jr-AyYoNT:m:1:3253819041:5FE5844495FB752890160DC3D6FE0F35:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60066925:Jr-AyYoNT:m:1:3253819041:5FE5844495FB752890160DC3D6FE0F35:r) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60066925:Jr-AyYoNT:m:1:3253819041:5FE5844495FB752890160DC3D6FE0F35:r)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC

If you're not familiar with CRT, it's the doctrine that all white people are oppressors, and that your skin color determines everything about you. Beyond this, CRT teaches kids that America is evil to its core, and that everything that makes our country great, is secretly racist. Then, what's worse is that these radical school boards allow, hire, and encourage teachers who have been caught ACTIVELY recruiting children to become transgender. And friend, you may not have seen it happening at the time, but for too long Republicans have neglected local races and instead focused on "BIG" races for President, Governor, and Congress. But in the process, we've left room for people like George Soros to take over local governments all over the country, right under our noses. Now, with all this doom and gloom, it's easy to feel defeated. But I know, and Tucker Carlson knows that this fight is far from over... And we CAN take back our schools from the radical left. Let me introduce myself. And I have the 3 R's Battle Plan to do just that! Resign: we'll turn up the public pressure with TV, Radio, and Print media campaigns calling for far left school board members to quit. Recall: we'll help collect petitions signatures and aid local parents, grandparents, and concerned taxpayers in efforts to recall radical school board members who must be removed from office. Replace: We'll support the campaigns of pro-America conservatives who run for local school board against liberal pro-CRT school board members. In the coming year, we are hoping to triple our impact! Now, I'm guessing you've never heard of me before... ....But, I'd be willing to bet you've heard Tucker, Laura Ingraham, and Donald Trump Jr. I've had the chance to discuss my plan with them, and they all believe that the 1776 Project PAC's 3 R's Campaign Battle Plan is a game-changer! Here's what each of them said: > >>> Tucker Carlson: "Parents have almost no support, but now they do. The 1776 Project PAC is a political action committee designed to help school boards and communities elect sane people.... If you're thinking of writing a check... Think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky." > >>> Laura Ingraham: "For all the parents out there looking to reclaim your local school boards from radical leftists, help is on the way, a new political action committee called the 1776 Project is going to support school board candidates who oppose indoctrinating kids with things like Critical Race Theory." > >>> Donald Trump Jr.: "The 1776 Project is the very first Political Action Committee of it's kind, specifically created to take on this sinister attack on our way of life from within our own communities by working to take local schools boards out of the hands of these America-hating radical liberals..." Even the failing and biased New York Times admitted that we " lit a fire" that is only growing as more conservative patriots like you join the fight in supporting the 1776 Project PAC. But here is the best part. The 1776 Project PAC has only been around for a year, and we already have a track-record of success. In November of 2021, we flipped 44 seats. In the coming year, as long as we have your help, we are set to more than TRIPLE our impact. After 30 years of left-wing billionaires like George Soros flooding cash into local school board races, we finally have a way to fight back with the 1776 Project PAC. With your help, we will rid our schools of radical leftists who are hell-bent on turning our kids against conservative, American values.._. And we'll replace them with sane, America-loving citizens. Sincerely, Ryan Girdusky P.S. I know you may not know anything about me, but I hope that the endorsements from incredible conservative leaders like my friends Tucker, Laura, and Donald Trump Jr. give you confidence in my dedication to the mission of taking school boards back from radical liberals. FOR RELEASE: Thursday, April 7, 2022

Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt
# Announces Re-Election Campaign
| |
---
| ALBANY, NY - New York Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt today announced his intention to run for re-election this year, as he filed more than 7,000 signatures this week with the state Board of Elections.
"I am proud to announce the kickoff of my re-election campaign by filing more than 7,000 petition Republican and Conservative signatures. I am deeply humbled and grateful for the overwhelming amount of support I have been given by the residents of the 62nd Senate District, and the hundreds of volunteers across my district who carried my petition. Next to leading men in combat, serving the residents of the 62nd Senate District has been the honor of a lifetime. I look forward to earning the opportunity to continue to serve my community this November," said Leader Rob Ortt.
Under Senator Ortt's leadership, Senate Republicans will continue the fight to:

* Restore Public Safety by repealing cashless bail and rejecting the soft-on-crime policies of Albany one party rule;
* Cut Taxes and Lower the Cost of Living for the middle class, small businesses, farmers, and all New Yorkers; and
* End the Exodus by creating good-paying jobs for the people of New York.

Robert G. Ortt was sworn into office as a New York State Senator for the 62nd District in January of 2015. In June of 2020, Rob was elected Senate Minority Leader by his colleagues in the Republican Conference.
Rob enlisted in N.Y. Army National Guard in October 2001 in direct response to the attacks on September 11th. He is a veteran of Operation Enduring Freedom in Afghanistan, where he served from March 2008 until December of the same year. His mission was to serve as a combat mentor/advisor to the Afghan National Police in Kandahar City, the second-largest city in Afghanistan. As the Executive Officer /Unit Movement Officer for an infantry company, he was responsible for ensuring that all the logistical needs of the company were met to facilitate operational readiness, coordinate and run all company meetings, and act as the commander in his absence. He successfully moved $10 million worth of equipment to Afghanistan and back to the United States.
He is the recipient of the Bronze Star, the Army Commendation Medal, the Afghan Campaign Medal, and the Combat Infantryman's Badge in recognition of his service.
Rob lives in North Tonawanda with his wife, Meghan. To learn more about him, visit [robortt.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AvZULrvJPuAexFMy5pUkkWFz6YETUmp_Vxjhc7XqWtwKrP0qImRs45M5F9NPKC_UjoYdXmnex_gToShBxu9foTZutmNcitWuXwfSe9RNdCqB4rvMHUkSiAWb-Rov5Nhhk4lkboFRuYvBCQkitPYolw==&c=yFwKzWL5c9I04ZhaxZCrIXTTR_Pqla9VfkkfZD4Cr8lwco58p8-InA==&ch=O3CkoZvEeEOpcx7xkfCMNZLozQ4CWgo_eP5aFXgKJQrfwx6cDC2wqQ==).

Experts are concerned that Democrats are losing the battle to get their message out, and approval ratings are low, even though Democrats have passed critical legislation to support families, combat climate change, increase access to health care and decrease unemployment to record levels.

Hello, Breaking News! We now have 120 Current and Former Elected Officials on Team Eli! That is on top of the hundreds of delegates who have already pledged their support for this weekend’s State Assembly. Today, we announced 24 more Elected Officials and 18 former Party Officers. Earlier this week, we announced the endorsement of two more Members of Congress, Rep. Neal Dunn of Florida and Rep. Jim Banks of Indiana. Notable Local, County, and State CO Elected Official endorsements include Rep. Andy Pico (HD-16), Las Animas County Commissioner Felix Lopez, Colorado Board of Education Steve Durham, and Jefferson County Sheriff Jeff Shrader. The momentum is unmistakable as we move into this weekend’s State Assembly, and I want you to be a part of it. **New** Elected Official Endorsements _State and County Elected Officials_
* Rep. Andy Pico (HD-16)
* Steve Durham, Colorado Board of Education, 5th Congressional District
* Chance Hill, Former University of Colorado CD5 Regent
* Felix Lopez, Las Animas County Commissioner
* Sheriff Jeff Shrader, Jefferson County Sheriff
* Michael Allen, 4th Judicial District Attorney
* Dan May, Former 4th Judicial District Attorney
* Colt Simmons, Teller County Assessor
* Steve Schleiker, El Paso County Assessor
* Jason Mikesell, Teller County Sheriff
* Mark Czelusta, Teller County Treasurer
* Randy Keller, Fremont County Coroner

_Municipal Elected Officials_
* Tim Dennehy, Cañon City Council
* Dave Donelson, Colorado Springs City Council
* Randy Helms, Colorado Springs City Council
* Jill Gaebler, Former Colorado Springs City Council
* Larry Small, Former Colorado Springs City Council
* Tim Leigh, Former Colorado Springs City Council
* Angela Dougan, Former Colorado Springs City Council
* Ed Libby, Former Mayor of Cripple Creek
* Ron Stephens, Monument Trustee
* Darcy Schoening, Monument Trustee
* Glant Havenar, Palmer Lake Trustee
* Tom LeValley, CO School Board District 20

**New** Former County Party Officers
* Andi Allot, Arapahoe County *previously announced
* David Brittain, Denver County
* Chris Cook, Denver County
* Garrett Flicker, Denver County
* Jake Viano, Denver County
* Jenny Daines, El Paso County
* Trevor Dierdorff, El Paso County
* Jeff Hays, El Paso County *previously announced
* Josh Hosler, El Paso County
* Patsy Peters, El Paso County
* Scott Wills, Elbert County
* David Merritt, Garfield County
* Joe Webb, Jefferson County
* Don Ytterberg, Jefferson County
* Dick Elsner, Park County *previously announced
* Pete LaBarre, Teller County
* Stacey Kjeldgaard, Weld County
* Will Sander, Weld County

ICYMI:
* Eli has the support of 72 Current and Former County Commissioners because they know he will fight for LOCAL CONTROL.
* Eli has the support of 20 Current and Former CO State Legislators because they know he is dedicated to help turn Colorado RED again at the state level.
* Eli has the support of FOUR sitting Congressman because they know that Eli can win and help them take on the Democrats in DC.
* Eli is extremely proud of his first endorsement from former U.S. Senator Ben Nighthorse Campbell.

---
Sincerely,
---
---
Eli Bremer USAFA Graduate, Olympian, Veteran, Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

name: Supreme Court Alert
subject: What Lindsey Graham just said about Judge Jackson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
This is outrageous
| | |
---
This is _outrageous_ , friend: **Lindsey Graham said that if Republicans controlled the Senate right now, Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson would never have gotten a Senate confirmation hearing.**
It's clear how critical it is for Democrats to hold the Senate in November. But if we're going to protect the future of the Supreme Court and move President Biden's agenda forward, it won't be enough to just defend our razor-thin majority. We need to expand it, and **CNN is calling Florida a top pickup opportunity.**
With polls showing Val Demings and Marco Rubio neck and neck, and The Miami Times saying she's gaining ground, there's no question that she can flip this seat blue.**But that's exactly why Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are spending** _millions_**to defeat Val Demings and prop up Marco Rubio.**

name: Imani Oakley
subject: Stronger than ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
Peter,

Heading into the final months of this primary, momentum is everything.

And, because of this incredible progressive movement, we have it!

Thanks to your help and support, this campaign is stronger than ever. We have the support of local and national leaders. We have the support of prominent progressive voices. We have grassroots donors from ALL 50 STATES, and, most importantly, we have the support of this community.

These next few weeks are absolutely critical in our fight against Rep. Payne Jr.’s do-nothing brand of “leadership.” We’re going to be out in our communities, knocking doors, making calls, and mobilizing voters who’ve been silenced by New Jersey’s corrupt political machine.

I know that, with this team fighting with me, we can win this race and win a victory for everyone who’s been left behind by a corrupt system.

Thank you for standing with me, and thank you for helping us build a strong progressive movement.

Let’s win this!

With gratitude,
Imani

name: Steve Sisolak
subject: Voting rights on the line in Nevada
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak
body:
Folks, I’m running for Governor against 15 Republican candidates, and several of them refuse to say Joe Biden won the 2020 election. They’re pushing Trump’s Big Lie that the 2020 election was “stolen” and when they couldn’t get away with that, Nevada Republicans proposed new legislation to roll back the right to vote. Nevada’s future is on the line, folks. If Republicans flip the governor’s seat in Nevada, make no mistake, they _will_ dismantle our voting rights. **[I’m committed to defending the right to vote and our democracy. That’s why Republicans are coming at me with every attack to flip this seat. Can you chip in to my re-election campaign today and help me protect the right to vote?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43884758/339127243/-1561074788?refcode=email_040722_gopattackvote_t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjRhMjBkNy05YmI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=frqLDMYfTnwFwgQIQA_iRHkzZ0ogm22g-OJzlQ9zVQs=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43884759/339127244/-1382373466?refcode=email_040722_gopattackvote_t1&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjRhMjBkNy05YmI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=frqLDMYfTnwFwgQIQA_iRHkzZ0ogm22g-OJzlQ9zVQs=)

As Governor, I’ve made it _easier_ to vote by expanding Nevada’s vote-by-mail law.
I’ve worked hard to send the message that the Silver State is bucking Republicans’ plan to infringe on voting rights. Instead, we’re expanding access to the ballot.
But my Republican opponents are desperately trying to curry favor with Trump — which means trying to out-extreme each other in their proposals to gut voting rights.
That is not the leadership Nevada deserves, or the future we want to build for our state.
**[If you’re with me in the fight to defend the right to vote, then please click here to make a donation to my campaign for re-election →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43884765/339127250/-1561074788?refcode=email_040722_gopattackvote_t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjRhMjBkNy05YmI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=frqLDMYfTnwFwgQIQA_iRHkzZ0ogm22g-OJzlQ9zVQs=)**
Thanks for pitching in,
Steve Sisolak

name: Jon Roe
subject: What the Affordable Care Act has done
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANN ROE FOR CONGRESS Ann Roe for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43867775/339068443/-766995749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNThmY2MwMy03YmI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CwWnpfz3cjDKrgpx6S-1nTHtwzk1QNOOPBkru8Zcxd4=&emci=0d336ca5-acb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=258fcc03-7bb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15639879)

Friends,

If we haven't met yet, I'm Jon Roe. You might know me as the future First Gentleman of Wisconsin's First Congressional District, or as Max's dad, but in my professional life, I've been a pediatrician for 27 years.

Today marks World Health Day, and what better time to discuss the Affordable Care Act a.k.a. Obamacare?

In my work, I've seen first-hand what an incredible difference the Affordable Care Act has made in the nearly 12 years it's been in place -- especially to the nearly 200,000 Wisconsinites enrolled in ACA coverage.

The Affordable Care Act made sweeping important changes to our healthcare system: No one can be denied care or coverage because of a pre-existing condition. Small business owners are given tax credits to help them provide coverage for their employees, and mandates that businesses with 50 or more employees offer insurance. It expanded and improved coverage of preventative services, and filled gaps in private coverage and drug costs.

In short, the Affordable Care Act wasn't just a landmark piece of legislation -- it made it easier for patients to get coverage, get care, and established the baseline that all Americans deserve insurance. **Because no one should have to deny themselves or their family care on the basis of cost.**

While the Affordable Care Act has made tremendous progress, now isn't the time to rest on our laurels: The Biden Administration has been working hard to boost enrollment and increase subsidies to help middle class Americans afford coverage. But this work won't last without a supportive Congress, and I know just the candidate for the job.

**[Friends, I'm not usually the one asking this question, but healthcare for millions of Americans relies on a supportive Congress, and our current representative isn't going to help out. Chip in $5 to send Ann to Washington, where she can be a voice of reason for Wisconsin, and our nation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43867779/339068447/2093580292?refcode=em22_220407_worldhealthday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNThmY2MwMy03YmI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CwWnpfz3cjDKrgpx6S-1nTHtwzk1QNOOPBkru8Zcxd4=)**

Thank you for your time,

\-- Jon Roe [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43867783/339068451/2093580292?refcode=em22_220407_worldhealthday&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNThmY2MwMy03YmI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CwWnpfz3cjDKrgpx6S-1nTHtwzk1QNOOPBkru8Zcxd4=) [DONATE ONCE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43867786/339068454/2093580292?refcode=em22_220407_worldhealthday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNThmY2MwMy03YmI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CwWnpfz3cjDKrgpx6S-1nTHtwzk1QNOOPBkru8Zcxd4=)

# Peter,

The radical woke mob is coming after our campaign and our fight to protect the lives of the unborn... but we're fighting back. One Twitter user pledged a donation of $200 to Planned Parenthood and to become an abortionist once graduated from medical school... These sick and twisted radical liberals want you to believe that murdering unborn babies is a Constitutional right... it's not. name: =?utf-8?Q?Niki=20Conforti?=
subject: How Soon They Forget!
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/69f2ff6c9b11/conforti-for-congress-7044697?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Energy prices are off the charts! Here in Illinois, they are among the highest in the country - and we are paying for it!

After people didn't buy the 'Blame Putin for high prices' story, Sean Casten and this Administration are now blaming the Oil and Gas Industry for these prices.

But it is their failed policies that have driven gas prices to these uncomfortably high prices. Over the last year, the pipeline was cancelled, coal plants were retired, and nuclear plants were shut down. All of this has drastically reduced the supply of energy, rapidly pushing up prices.

Sean Casten and this Administration have trampled on American industry at the expense of the American people. They have slashed household disposable income and made it difficult for the average American family to live. Enough is enough!!

If you want your US Congressional Representative to fight for you and your rights, and stand up for energy independence - Vote Conforti for Congress June 28th!
Please consider donating to the Conforti for Congress campaign. [Click here](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=e063ceecce&e=25f4fa3311)
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District
---
| PS: Follow my campaign on [Facebook](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=e6b4f16b90&e=25f4fa3311), [Twitter](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=f25e313ab0&e=25f4fa3311), and [Instagram](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=2f65476daf&e=25f4fa3311)!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Neil=20Kumar=20for=20Congress?=
subject: How many illegals are there? You won't believe it.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
A new Dallas/Fort Worth every year. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066269?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=668cd4d434&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Fellow Patriot:

_Our Southern Border isn’t just wide open, it’s gone. It’s been erased._

Remember: A nation without borders is no nation at all. _Millions _of aliens are invading _our _home, and they’re bringing drugs, crime, trash, and the Third World.

**If you have a Third World population, you have a Third World country.**

The Great Replacement is underway. Our government is engaged in ethnic cleansing against the majority population of our nation.

The Regime _hates_ the American people, so it has decided to _replace _us and elect a new people, a nation of aliens.

200, 300, 400, 500 thousand invaders pour into our country _every month_ , and those are just the official numbers.

The truth is even _worse_ than we know. We don’t have any idea how many people are in our country. They’re turning _our _country into a _stinking slum_ from coast to coast.

Just using the official numbers, America’s foreign-born population soared to over 46 million as of November. That means that Third World invaders now comprise over 14% of the population, a number which has tripled since 1970 and doubled since 1990.

_In Swing States like Florida, Michigan, New Hampshire, Pennsylvania, and Nevada, the number of new, foreign-born voters already exceeds the 2016 margins of victory._

Last year, more people than the entire population of the City of Dallas and almost equal to that of San Diego illegally entered America. _If they were all held in one place, they would constitute the 9th largest city in America._

Last year’s illegal border crossers—the ones we know about—could completely displace the citizens of Irvine, Pittsburgh, Orlando, and St. Louis, all put together.

**Enough illegal aliens entered America in 2021 alone to equal or exceed all the Americans who live in each of ten U.S. States: Alaska; Delaware; Maine; Montana; New Hampshire; North Dakota; Rhode Island; South Dakota; Vermont; and Wyoming.**

And 2022 is already showing exponential increases over last year. This death spiral is rapidly accelerating, and if it is not stopped _now_ , America as a singular polity will be lost.

_**_All _immigration into our homeland, legal and illegal, _must_ end. We need a Total Immigration Moratorium, _yesterday_. We’ve got to build the Wall and deport every single illegal in this country—all _thirty_ _plus million_ of them. **_

[If elected, my very first priority will be introducing legislation for a 20-year Total Immigration Moratorium..](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=997d7a2b82&e=eda539b26b)

**[_Our Republican politicians have had DECADES to solve the immigration crisis, only for it to continue __spiraling_ _ out of control_ _._](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=ba2757958d&e=eda539b26b)**

[**_Help me, an __Immigration_ _ Patriot, defeat the Bipartisan Establishment __\-- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=a318f56773&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** people, not limp-waisted frauds who never miss an opportunity to stab us in the back._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=b4eed98164&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=3f7311c948&e=eda539b26b)** _._**
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 NeilforArkansas.com, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
NeilforArkansas.comPO Box 652Bentonville, AR 72712-0652
[Add us to your address book](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/vcard?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=1a15bf667f)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=1a15bf667f&e=eda539b26b&c=41d913c686) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=1a15bf667f&e=eda539b26b&c=41d913c686).

Crime is up. Inflation is out of control. And _gas prices are unbelievable. _ **But we won’t let Biden’s bad policies stop us, Peter.** They’re exactly why we need to continue our tour! We must take our message of freedom and opportunity to every part of the state. name: Mike Pompeo
subject: American Hero Mike Waltz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard
body:
I’m proud to endorse U.S. Green Beret Mike Waltz for Congress. Peter, **I’m proud to endorse U.S. Green Beret Mike Waltz for Congress.**
During my time as Secretary of State, I saw just how much America’s enemies want to destroy us.
_Mike is the kind of leader we need to STAND UP to our enemies and boldly lead us to a bright and safe future._
As the first Green Beret elected to congress, Col. Mike Waltz has fought for the American people in Washington D.C. just as hard as he fought to defend our freedom on the battlefield.
He’s already been an INCREDIBLE America first warrior, and I know he will continue to champion our values in Congress and be a leading voice for Republicans when we take back the majority.

clean_body: I’m proud to endorse U.S. Green Beret Mike Waltz for Congress. Peter, I’m proud to endorse U.S. Green Beret Mike Waltz for Congress. During my time as Secretary of State, I saw just how much America’s enemies want to destroy us. Mike is the kind of leader we need to STAND UP to our enemies and boldly lead us to a bright and safe future. As the first Green Beret elected to congress, Col. Mike Waltz has fought for the American people in Washington D.C. just as hard as he fought to defend our freedom on the battlefield. He’s already been an INCREDIBLE America first warrior, and I know he will continue to champion our values in Congress and be a leading voice for Republicans when we take back the majority. Thank you, Mike Pompeo Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Michael Waltz for Congress
