name: Melissa King
subject: Today we make history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
Peter, today the Senate confirmed Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson as the first Black woman to be appointed to the Supreme Court.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43886284/339134501/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220407-b1_fr_full-MSK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220407-b1_fr_full-MSK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220407&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=MSK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=8342af55-9fb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzQyYWY1NS05ZmI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=In8hqDhgcx-F_23-w7a4lZ5PTFeQNEqmc_KsvOIcoiY=)
---
| **Peter, today the Senate made history by confirming Ketanji Brown Jackson as the first Black woman to be appointed to the Supreme Court.** Like so many of you, I am grateful to and inspired by the generations of Black women who worked to make the dreams of our ancestors a reality. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43886285/339134502/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220407-b1_fr_full-MSK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220407-b1_fr_full-MSK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220407&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=MSK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=8342af55-9fb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzQyYWY1NS05ZmI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=In8hqDhgcx-F_23-w7a4lZ5PTFeQNEqmc_KsvOIcoiY=) When I first saw this photo of Justice Brown Jackson’s daughter during a Senate confirmation hearing, I couldn’t help but think of my own daughters. I am thankful that they will grow up in a world where they can dream of becoming a Supreme Court Justice, Vice President, the President of the United States – anything they put their mind to. This is a day to celebrate, but I would be remiss to ignore the baseless accusations and reckless questioning Justice Brown Jackson endured during her confirmation hearings. Republicans tried their hardest to block President Biden’s nomination of an incredibly well–qualified Black woman to the Supreme Court, and it’s the same brand of nonsense that is endorsed by our Republican opponents like Dan Cox. **That’s why it is crucial that we elect my husband, John King, to be our state’s next Democratic governor.** **John would make history, too.** If elected, he would be the nation’s FIRST Afro-Latino governor and Maryland’s first Black governor. He is committed to lifting up Black women in our economy, from prioritizing universal early education to passing Paid Family Leave to appointing more female judges of color. And, as Governor, John will continue the work he started as Secretary of Education and ensure that every child of every color and every zip code has the resources and opportunities to dream big. clean_body: Peter, today the Senate confirmed Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson as the first Black woman to be appointed to the Supreme Court. | = | Peter, today the Senate made history by confirming Ketanji Brown Jackson as the first Black woman to be appointed to the Supreme Court. Like so many of you, I am grateful to and inspired by the generations of Black women who worked to make the dreams of our ancestors a reality. = When I first saw this photo of Justice Brown Jackson’s daughter during a Senate confirmation hearing, I couldn’t help but think of my own daughters. I am thankful that they will grow up in a world where they can dream of becoming a Supreme Court Justice, Vice President, the President of the United States – anything they put their mind to. This is a day to celebrate, but I would be remiss to ignore the baseless accusations and reckless questioning Justice Brown Jackson endured during her confirmation hearings. Republicans tried their hardest to block President Biden’s nomination of an incredibly well–qualified Black woman to the Supreme Court, and it’s the same brand of nonsense that is endorsed by our Republican opponents like Dan Cox. That’s why it is crucial that we elect my husband, John King, to be our state’s next Democratic governor. John would make history, too. If elected, he would be the nation’s FIRST Afro-Latino governor and Maryland’s first Black governor. He is committed to lifting up Black women in our economy, from prioritizing universal early education to passing Paid Family Leave to appointing more female judges of color. And, as Governor, John will continue the work he started as Secretary of Education and ensure that every child of every color and every zip code has the resources and opportunities to dream big. We can’t risk electing a Trump-endorsed Republican to the governor’s mansion – we need a Governor who will build on the progress we see in Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson's confirmation today. = | = Thank you, Melissa Steel King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . name: Val Demings
subject: Re: Judge Jackson’s historic confirmation

body:
This is a moment that every American should celebrate and embrace.
| | |
---
Friend,
Moments ago, history was made.
**Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson – a Black woman from a working-class family in Florida – was just confirmed to our nation’s highest court.**
For over 230 years, the Supreme Court has failed to reflect the beautiful diversity of America. But now, with Judge _ _ Jackson’s historic confirmation, we have taken a large step in the right direction. This is a moment that every American should celebrate and embrace.
**But the path leading up to this moment was not easy.****** For several days, Judge Jackson, who is **_more_** than qualified to serve as a justice, had to sit through thinly veiled political attacks. GOP senators – my opponent Marco Rubio included – sought to undermine Jackson at every turn, throwing wild accusations at her and questioning her qualifications again and again.
**I’m all too familiar with these kinds of attacks. **
But despite these ugly political tactics, I keep pushing forward, driven by my mother’s instructions to “Never tire of doing good.” I persevere and press onward – just as we saw Judge Jackson do.
Friend, seeing Judge Jackson confirmed to the Supreme Court today is a moment I will never forget. So let’s continue our work to do good, and remember to ___never tire._
Val Demings

Val Demings | | Friend – Republican Sen. Lindsay Graham made it clear that if the GOP held the majority today, Judge Jackson wouldn't have even gotten a committee hearing. Democrats' Senate majority is vital to our agenda – but that majority is up for grabs in November. I’m running for the U.S. Senate to defend it - because Floridians deserve someone that shows up and works for them, and our nation deserves leaders who put country over party. = | | = | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates.** & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. You can also click here to or click here to . Val Demings for U.S. Senate P. O. Box 536926 Orlando, FL 32853 United States Paid for by Val Demings for U.S. Senate

Supporters,

Barrier To Entry candidate Jamie McLeod-Skinner, who is running in Oregon's 5th congressional district, is breaking all sorts of barriers in her race. Currently, Jamie is just **THREE** points behind her opponent, Kurt Schrader, who is a _Democrat_ funded by the Koch Brothers who frequently caucuses with Republicans.

Yes, you read that correctly.

This race is neck and neck. This is big news and a huge accomplishment for Jamie's grassroots campaign.

We must keep the momentum up. This poll is great news for Jamie and her campaign but it is a reminder how quickly things can change or how quickly Jamie can fall behind.

Jamie has been working tirelessly for months on end to get to this point. Endless hours of call time, attending events, and getting the word out about her race— you name it, she has done it. She is giving it her all to win this seat and has a great shot, but she could use your help!

Her opponent is funded by dirty corporations that destroy the environment and pharmaceutical companies that cripple our healthcare system.

Jamie’s has not and will not take a single dollar of corporate money. She is running a grassroots campaign fueled by people-power and low-dollar contributions.

With that being said, we must not let corporate greed win. We cannot let Jamie fall behind one step, one point, or one dollar.

**BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC** supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. We provide direct cash assistance for essential items like phones, cars, laptops, and living stipends -- which often times, these candidates and their campaigns don't have access to. We also serve as a resource for individual mentorship and training to ensure candidates and their staff feel supported and equipped to enter the political space.

clean_body: Jamie is only 3 points behind, Peter. | | | Supporters, Barrier To Entry candidate Jamie McLeod-Skinner, who is running in Oregon's 5th congressional district, is breaking all sorts of barriers in her race. Currently, Jamie is just THREE points behind her opponent, Kurt Schrader, who is a Democrat funded by the Koch Brothers who frequently caucuses with Republicans. Yes, you read that correctly. This race is neck and neck. This is big news and a huge accomplishment for Jamie's grassroots campaign. We must keep the momentum up. This poll is great news for Jamie and her campaign but it is a reminder how quickly things can change or how quickly Jamie can fall behind. Jamie has been working tirelessly for months on end to get to this point. Endless hours of call time, attending events, and getting the word out about her race— you name it, she has done it. She is giving it her all to win this seat and has a great shot, but she could use your help! Her opponent is funded by dirty corporations that destroy the environment and pharmaceutical companies that cripple our healthcare system. Jamie’s has not and will not take a single dollar of corporate money. She is running a grassroots campaign fueled by people-power and low-dollar contributions. With that being said, we must not let corporate greed win. We cannot let Jamie fall behind one step, one point, or one dollar. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through instantly: | ****************** ""**************** | **************** ""**************** ---|--- **************** ""**************** | **************** ""**************** **************** ""**************** | **************** ""**************** Let’s help Jamie win in Oregon!, \-- Elizabeth Digital Strategist, Barrier To Entry PAC EXPRESS DONATE to Barrier To Entry PAC: If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: ****************** ""**************** | **************** ""**************** | **************** ""**************** | **************** ""**************** ---|---|---|--- BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. We provide direct cash assistance for essential items like phones, cars, laptops, and living stipends -- which often times, these candidates and their campaigns don't have access to. We also serve as a resource for individual mentorship and training to ensure candidates and their staff feel supported and equipped to enter the political space. Pitch in today to help provide necessary support and resources for working class candidates today! >> __ P.O. ---
| | | Today is a historic day – the Senate just voted to confirm Ketanji Brown Jackson as the newest Supreme Court Justice! Despite Republicans’ shameful behavior during her confirmation hearings, Justice Jackson rose above, kept her composure, and showed America why she is the right person for this role. And in the process, she made history as the first Black woman on the Supreme Court. Justice Jackson’s commitment to civil rights and equal justice make her a necessary and welcome addition to the Supreme Court. [Please join us in congratulating the newest member of the Supreme Court, Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb2d90a45-ca63-41f5-9396-c9ac03de2b64/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: | | | | Only 10 more signatures needed. | HAGEMAN PETITIONS Peter, Harriet has been on the front lines from the beginning fighting the unelected bureaucrats over their unconstitutional COVID-19 regulations and mandates. And now that the media has decided to move on to the next new thing, pushing Fauci out of the headlines, we are compelled to remind everyone of what he did. We won’t forget!!! \- He lied to our country about masks \- He lied to Congress about funding gain-of-function research \- He has been thoroughly discredited The man has lost all credibility and should be fired! We only need 10 more signatures -Team Hageman | | | |

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43886992/339137363/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTQyOTIyMC1hMmI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TToX8y9C7x95A6-WHBYXjJw9ScBDgYA3BQReSNrN9wA=&emci=a74d59b1-a0b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=a1429220-a2b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=11385749)

Hi Peter,

Last week, Mike Garcia and 192 of his Republican colleagues, took a vote against the American people and voted **against** capping the cost of life-saving insulin at $35 per month.

**As if we needed _yet another_ reason to make Mike Garcia a one-term Congressman. **

**[Donate $5 or more to flip CA-27 so we don't have to suffer through one more of Mike's heartless votes against the people of this district and this country.>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43886993/339137364/2072937639?refcode=em22_220406_MikeOppo-TestC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTQyOTIyMC1hMmI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TToX8y9C7x95A6-WHBYXjJw9ScBDgYA3BQReSNrN9wA=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43886994/339137365/2072937639?refcode=em22_220406_MikeOppo-TestC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTQyOTIyMC1hMmI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TToX8y9C7x95A6-WHBYXjJw9ScBDgYA3BQReSNrN9wA=) I wonder what Mike Garcia would say to the _millions_ of people – 2.5 million in the state of California to be exact – diagnosed with diabetes who depend on insulin to literally**save their lives.**

I wonder what he would say to the nearly 13 million Californians – people like my mother – who let their diabetes or prediabetes go untreated because they can't afford the outrageously price-gouged cost of the drug (which, by the way, only costs about $10 per vial to produce, but can cost patients up to $1000 per month).

I don't know what he would say, but we don't have to wonder why he voted this way – just follow the money. Mike Garcia takes thousands from the pharmaceutical industry and dark money PACs and doesn't mind throwing his constituents under the bus if means appeasing his campaign contributors.

[**Donate $5 to make sure Mike doesn't get one more opportunity to undermine the people he's been sworn to represent. >>> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43886995/339137373/2072937639?refcode=em22_220406_MikeOppo-TestC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTQyOTIyMC1hMmI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TToX8y9C7x95A6-WHBYXjJw9ScBDgYA3BQReSNrN9wA=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43886996/339137378/2072937639?refcode=em22_220406_MikeOppo-TestC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTQyOTIyMC1hMmI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TToX8y9C7x95A6-WHBYXjJw9ScBDgYA3BQReSNrN9wA=) [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43886997/339137384/2072937639?refcode=em22_220406_MikeOppo-TestC&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTQyOTIyMC1hMmI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TToX8y9C7x95A6-WHBYXjJw9ScBDgYA3BQReSNrN9wA=) This vote isn't shocking, Peter, but it certainly is callous. And it's yet another example of how he continues to put himself and his money above the people of the district.

**If Mike Garcia wants to take a vote against saving the lives of people in this district, he has no business being in office.**

As your next Congresswoman, I will do everything in my power to hold the pharmaceutical industry accountable, so that nobody has to follow in my mother's footsteps and forgo life-saving treatment simply because they can't afford it.

Thank you so much for your support.

– Christy [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43886998/339137391/2072937639?refcode=em22_220406_MikeOppo-TestC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTQyOTIyMC1hMmI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TToX8y9C7x95A6-WHBYXjJw9ScBDgYA3BQReSNrN9wA=) [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43886999/339137396/2072937639?refcode=em22_220406_MikeOppo-TestC&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTQyOTIyMC1hMmI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TToX8y9C7x95A6-WHBYXjJw9ScBDgYA3BQReSNrN9wA=)

clean_body: Stand with Gov. Hogan! Friend, President Biden is in talks to buy oil from anti-American Venezuelan dictator Nicolás Maduro. Governor Larry Hogan is taking a stand for freedom and American values. On a recent trip to Miami to meet with Venezuelan business leaders, Governor Larry Hogan took a firm stance in favor of developing American energy, instead of begging our adversaries for help. Governor Hogan released the following statement: "The energy crisis cannot be solved by robbing the people of Venezuela of their dreams of freedom. That’s not what America stands for. Maduro makes common cause with Putin because he is a vicious dictator, not an American ally." It's just common sense. We must develop our own energy resources, not give away our resources to dangerous foreign dictators. An America United is working with local and national leaders to find better, smarter ways to ease the pain on American wallets. Governor Hogan was the first governor in America to suspend the gas tax. We believe rather than wasting efforts supporting dictators like Putin or Maduro, the United States needs to invest in an all of the above energy plan. That means funding American oil & gas production, nuclear, wind, solar, and electric energy. and let's end our reliance on the oil of foreign dictators. Thank you, Team AAU Join An America United on social media! | | | ---|--- Contributions to An America United are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

subject: Endorsement Alert: John McGuire for State Senate 10

body:
John Fredricks America First!
---
| | | | | | VA Delegate John McGuire Running for State Senate D10 in 2023 Christian Conservative (Father - Navy SEAL - Business Owner)
---
| Endorsement Alert!
---
| Dear Friend, I am honored to have the endorsement of our friend John Fredericks, America's Godzilla of truth and conservative radio and television talk show host in my campaign for 2023 to be Virginia State Senator District 10!
"As Trump for President campaign chairman of Virginia in 2016 and 2020, as well as Trump Virginia delegation chairman in 2020, I know first hand how hard John worked for President Trump. From driving around Virginia in his famous double-flagged Trump truck, to standing on street corners waving to morning commute drivers to attending events all over the Commonwealth on our behalf, John has proved to be a tireless worker for the advancement of the America First agenda. If I'm in a foxhole, I want John McGuire by my side. He's got our back. John is a strategic-doer who combines boundless energy with astute political insight to get results. He'll fight the convention riggers in VA Senate 10 just like he'll fight for us every day on the Senate floor. Virginia is being held hostage by a radical state senate. It's time to break apart their Leftist cabal. John's the one to do it. I'm honored to support John McGuire for Virginia State Senate. Let's go Brandon!" \- [John Fredericks](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YEdOlgsXfCIaySUTK8FVKxLkw4IlFLxBatcKMIoRfDgU0lykatOW2IJgYzNxQymUctF2kit7Z6_KKV37ZHWo1bZ1fypEwNf540LXVYNGvKHI9uQZJCns3QEQuKNHgFSMy55F0DiPIbVfW7a4TOtwSjvHCpH8pefq&c=BewCr7Ay7XRcICRTCIw9r46W4_UbTYaOPjt-Ud4hLsrS7Xglu1MpZA==&ch=9G6d1Ksy5q4hMVzf7c5-hVHktEmI91CtZYMiEvnxjg53rzpr8kmGew==)
As a current Member of the Virginia House of Delegates with one of the highest conservative scores in Virginia each year since 2017, I know first-hand how radical leftist policies are dividing us and making the world less safe at the federal, state, and local levels. Our children have less freedom today than we had growing up. For a better future for Virginia, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and pass Governor Glenn Youngkin's Agenda. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Please spread the word and I hope to see you around the district!
-John

body:
| | | **Friend, a new poll shows Rev. Warnock 1 POINT BEHIND Trump's handpicked candidate, Herschel Walker (R)! That’s why Rev. Warnock is reaching out directly with an URGENT call to action:** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43887038/339137639/-392698372?refcode=20220407_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDRlYzJkYS1hMWI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fkeQV7hyjK_HWg-R--mKDwcdwJCkMNcXaw9kKnKJwfM=)**[**Will you answer Rev. Warnock's call and split a donation of $25 or more with Serve America – before our critical midnight deadline – so we can pull ahead in this race, win in Georgia, and keep the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43887039/339137640/-392698372?refcode=20220407_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDRlYzJkYS1hMWI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fkeQV7hyjK_HWg-R--mKDwcdwJCkMNcXaw9kKnKJwfM=) Things aren't looking good, friend. **FIRST:** Even after national Republicans outspent us on the airwaves, polling showed Rev. Warnock surging ahead of his potential Trump-backed opponent, Herschel Walker (R). **BUT THEN:** Donald Trump held a massive MAGA rally in Georgia to prop up Walker – and Trump's allies started pumping $100,000 per day into Walker's campaign to defeat us. **NOW: A new poll shows Rev. Warnock 1 POINT DOWN – in the race experts at POLITICO say could decide Senate control! ** Rev. name: Derek Kilmer
subject: The representation we need.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
I am so proud of Judge Jackson for making it to the finish line.
Peter --

President Joe Biden entered office with the promise to strengthen and diversify the federal judiciary. And he has delivered on that promise.

I am so proud to be able to say that Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson has officially been voted through the Senate to serve as an Associate Justice of the Supreme Court. She will be the first Black woman to serve on the highest court in the land -- but certainly not the last.

She has shown beyond a doubt that she is worthy to carry on Justice Stephen Breyer's legacy. The courage Judge Jackson demonstrated during her rigorous confirmation process shows just how equipped she is to fight for justice for all Americans.

America's diversity is part of what makes our country so great. **And our institutions will now look more like the people who they represent.

I am so proud of Judge Jackson for making it to the finish line, despite the obstacles that were thrown in front of her. **

Today, I am optimistic about America's future and the work that we have done and will continue to do, together.

As always - it's an honor to serve you,

Derek Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Sign the Card: Future Supreme Court Justice Jackson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43887343/339139097/1821072217?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3394-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjJmMDI4NS1hM2I2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3POCbasEu5Ppt719radhmm87B7M6W0wczD7D3QuFs3A=&emci=5580ac8e-47b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f22f0285-a3b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=7659029)
Friend,
**Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson will officially become the first Black woman in history to serve on the Supreme Court. Words nearly fail to capture what a momentous day this is. **
Today, a barrier that has existed for 233 years has finally been broken. Today, with our most fundamental rights under relentless attack, a brilliant legal mind who will protect those very rights has been added to our nation's highest court. Today, little girls across the country are dreaming big, knowing that soon-to-be Justice Jackson paved the way for them to follow in her footsteps.
**I hope you'll join me in celebrating this historic moment by signing the congratulations card my team is putting together for future Justice Jackson. I'm looking to gather at least 10,000 names by midnight, and I hope I can count on yours.**
**[Will you sign the card now to say congratulations to future Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson on her historic confirmation to the Supreme Court? clean_body: | | | Friend, Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson will officially become the first Black woman in history to serve on the Supreme Court. Words nearly fail to capture what a momentous day this is. Today, a barrier that has existed for 233 years has finally been broken. Today, with our most fundamental rights under relentless attack, a brilliant legal mind who will protect those very rights has been added to our nation's highest court. Today, little girls across the country are dreaming big, knowing that soon-to-be Justice Jackson paved the way for them to follow in her footsteps. I hope you'll join me in celebrating this historic moment by signing the congratulations card my team is putting together for future Justice Jackson. I'm looking to gather at least 10,000 names by midnight, and I hope I can count on yours. | | Thank you for joining me in celebrating this special moment in history. name: Alex Padilla
subject: Before the vote on Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Please add your name to mine to say you support Judge Jackson’s nomination to the U.S. Supreme Court before today’s vote.
#

Hi there, it’s Alex Padilla.
I wanted to make sure you saw my team’s note and had a chance to show your support for Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination before the confirmation vote in the Senate.
Read it below, and then [**please add your name to mine to say you support Judge Jackson’s nomination to the U.S. Supreme Court before today’s vote.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/kbj-em-apr22/?source=em220407-1-30&refcode2=730.159979.WZECr7&akid=730%2E159979%2EWZECr7)
Thank you,
Alex Padilla
* * *

**FIRST:** As a member of the Senate Judiciary Committee, Alex participated in the hearings for Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination to the Supreme Court.
**THEN:** (after a short flight delay) Alex voted earlier this week to advance her nomination out of committee and to a full vote in the Senate.
**SO NOW:** We’re doing everything we can to build grassroots support for Judge Jackson before the full Senate vote later this week. And one of the best ways to do that is to show that there are a LOT of people fired up about this historic nomination.
[**Please add your name to stand with Alex and say you support Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination to the Supreme Court.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/kbj-em-apr22/?source=em220407-1-30&refcode2=730.159979.WZECr7&akid=730%2E159979%2EWZECr7)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/kbj-em-apr22/?source=em220407-1-30&refcode2=730.159979.WZECr7&akid=730%2E159979%2EWZECr7)**
Alex has said that Judge Jackson is an outstanding nominee. She has the qualifications, she has the experience, and she’ll bring a much-needed perspective to the Supreme Court — both as the first Black woman to serve as Justice, but also the first federal public defender.
Not only will Judge Jackson be an excellent jurist, but as we saw in these hearings, she has the power to inspire the next generation of Americans.
[**So please, add your name today and help us demonstrate that there’s an overwhelming amount of support for Judge Jackson’s nomination before the full Senate vote later this week.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/kbj-em-apr22/?source=em220407-1-30&refcode2=730.159979.WZECr7&akid=730%2E159979%2EWZECr7)
Thank you!
\- Team Padilla
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/kbj-em-apr22/?source=em220407-1-30&refcode2=730.159979.WZECr7&akid=730%2E159979%2EWZECr7)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate

Kirsten

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Listen to this speech - it's important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Crenshaw for Congress
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| Peter-
What do conservatives stand for? How do we win - not only the election in November - but also the culture war at large? How do we prove that conservatism is the only governing philosophy that can ensure freedom and prosperity for all Americans? I've been pondering these questions for a long time - and now it's more important than ever for conservatives to have the right answers. So, this past weekend, I tried to articulate those answers. And the right path forward for us to reverse the disastrous course America is currently headed down.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ArC_KByGZJFX_gcjIQC6yVyKYUPUVZhmhxPwy0wn_C28KtfLVNK9FQ36YQhZ4OxL82-7epWyoxxTfW0Po9uUOV4oK0LShTjHuX53F0UKBbrrYYO1Yjl20EYvNxW6HFjA7a00zKJCKE4l0Iwxt2gSoF0OtfD8OkAw9w_8F8v2hVWcA0OKSJCc8tXR6U16e1hgfh6ZeUMHHmMZdJJHtn0qBYlQvtHpPb56_HhZOpLiILrAVuG5hTDubq-jbfxBxgFDMYmtR0Pjrruxvd3o2gFdSvI-Q7evKvAFBFCP5K3ygbmUzM-xk1Dahp4rKrgczQgzQnsrQyPZhx0OPahg3M2EVhgLVZtxQVfE-O1jJQf8lIX4jyJ_fkWqxbw_9Is_0R3jg3jZJBUDveU=&c=FxFTRFZZhR88Zo_e7H1pEfI5J-3K-fOnMyOqvDBWmeFtcQ9rNP_AIg==&ch=dUpKKA_lievnLGx3Z7k4U64m90sYxwKKihYAaYTY63OaDfHhfrcYLg==)
---
| You can watch my full speech by clicking [this link](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ArC_KByGZJFX_gcjIQC6yVyKYUPUVZhmhxPwy0wn_C28KtfLVNK9FQ36YQhZ4OxL82-7epWyoxxTfW0Po9uUOV4oK0LShTjHuX53F0UKBbrrYYO1Yjl20EYvNxW6HFjA7a00zKJCKE4l0Iwxt2gSoF0OtfD8OkAw9w_8F8v2hVWcA0OKSJCc8tXR6U16e1hgfh6ZeUMHHmMZdJJHtn0qBYlQvtHpPb56_HhZOpLiILrAVuG5hTDubq-jbfxBxgFDMYmtR0Pjrruxvd3o2gFdSvI-Q7evKvAFBFCP5K3ygbmUzM-xk1Dahp4rKrgczQgzQnsrQyPZhx0OPahg3M2EVhgLVZtxQVfE-O1jJQf8lIVPuNy4Lujt8aCjkYugiOPr&c=FxFTRFZZhR88Zo_e7H1pEfI5J-3K-fOnMyOqvDBWmeFtcQ9rNP_AIg==&ch=dUpKKA_lievnLGx3Z7k4U64m90sYxwKKihYAaYTY63OaDfHhfrcYLg==) or the image above. I promise it's worth your time. I've also included a copy of the speech below.
Here is the key takeaway:
Conservatives believe that when you maximize freedom, strong people will thrive. When you rely on and build upon the proven principles of free enterprise, the protection of natural rights, the institutional structures of a republic, you create a formula for boundless success and prosperity.
And it's the values of the Republican Party that protect and promote these principles. It's the Republican Party that defends the greatest ideas and the greatest founding documents in history. It is the Republican Party that places faith in the individual to pursue their happiness without the weight of government on their back. The Republican Party is America's last great hope.
Conservatives must be happy warriors and proudly tell the world why freedom is the path to prosperity. That's how we win in November and for years to come.
In Service,
---
|
---
| Dan Crenshaw

---
| | |
---
|
THIS IS HOW CONSERVATIVES WIN
---
| We're going to have a deep conversation tonight about how to win. What's the proper way to win? What's the proper way to fight? What does winning actually look like? What does it mean to win the culture war? What does it mean to win the policy war? What do conservatives even stand for? We have to have those tough conversations.
It's really easy to bash the left - and I have a whole speech bashing the left - because you've got to talk about the problem. But then we have to have solutions. Sometimes we forget that part. Many Americans are worried right now, and rightfully so. I think there's a feeling out there that there might be an expiration date on our freedoms. You're watching what's going on, you're having trouble finding any glimmer of hope. People are getting angry, people are getting frustrated, people are desperate for answers on how we might reverse this trend.
And the truth is it won't be easy. To reverse course, we have to win elections. To win elections, we have to be persuasive, which is not to be confused with just being loud and angry. I can tell that you guys are ready to get to work on this, so I want to talk about how do we do this.
Let's review what's at stake first. It's been a little over a year since Democrats took full control. Senate, House and presidency. President Biden, in his own delusional headspace, is probably really proud of himself for setting so many records. Record inflation, record illegals crossing our border, highest crime waves of the century, record number of oil and gas pipelines canceled, record number of men defeating women in their own sport.
Those are not good records. Things are so bad for the Democrats that they aren't even trying to make the case anymore. Throughout our days in DC, we actually just vote on suspensions, which just means things we all agree on, pretty non-controversial votes, or bills that they've already passed a number of times. They're just passing the time. It's like they've given up and, frankly, you would too if you've seen those polling numbers. Their Build Back Better plan went down in flames and they have yet to come up with a strategy to revive it.
I got to say, our Republican leadership deserves some credit on this. Deftly moving the legislative chess pieces around so that Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema would hold strong against the Build Back Better plan. That thing was dangerous and it's gone.
But they're still doing everything they can to push their agenda through other means. Even with these legislative failures, Joe Biden has still managed to harm our country by refusing to do his job. His refusal to stand with our allies and stand up to our enemies has precipitated disasters in Afghanistan, Ukraine, and soon Iran. His refusal to enforce our border laws has resulted in 7,000 illegal crossings a day. His refusal to lease federal land or water for oil exploration and his refusal to permit L&G export facilities and pipelines has poured cold water on the production expansion necessary to bring oil prices back down.
Now these policies - and this is just a few of them - they seem too crazy to be true. And I spend a lot of time thinking about this question: Why? Why do they believe this? Why would anyone favor policies that so obviously harm the country? And I think it's complex. It's a lot of things, but I think it boils down to this: populism. Doing what feels good instead of what is true and right. Now I don't like populism. Some people do. It depends on how you define it.
I define it this way: it's the political act of telling the public what they want to hear as opposed to the truth. It's affirming their feelings instead of presenting the true trade-offs associated with any given policy. It is a denial of the unintended consequences of policy making.
On our side, this embrace of populism has made us angry instead of inspiring. It made us demand $2,000 checks for people who never lost their jobs instead of advocating for personal fortitude and responsibility. It's not a good trend on the right and we should note it, but the left, this is what they do. They've always engaged in this strategy.
After all, what's the easiest way to get a vote? It's bribery.
Bribery is the easiest way to get a vote. Bribing the voter. Promise you that your dreams will come true if you just elect me. And they ask, "What's your truth so I can affirm it. You're perfect the way you are. It's everyone else that's screwed up. You're fine. I'll fix it for you. Just elect me. I'll make them give you what you rightfully deserve."
Does that sound familiar from a lot of demagoguing leftist politicians? Now the problems never get solved, of course, and that's by design because grievance is powerful. Resentment is good. It keeps you mad. It keeps you engaged. It keeps you voting for the demagogues that shamelessly overpromise and bribe the citizenry. And that's just a small part of it, of course. The deeper why on the left is control. The progressive disposition is the belief that human nature can be molded into utopia. The modern French revolutionaries, believing that all tradition and foundations can be thrown out in favor of some post-modern revolution. They chastise the Constitution and its protection of natural rights and checks and balances because such things get in the way of a rapid and transformative agenda. Just ask Woodrow Wilson. He hated the Constitution.
All cultural icons that do not affirm and support the post-modern woke lingo of critical race theory or intersectionality, well, they're canceled. Dr. Seuss, Aunt Jemima be damned.
Now here's the good news. Parents are waking up to this, to the corruption of our school systems and they're fighting back and they're doing so because they know that this anti-American narrative, this idea that our founding should be torn down, should be deemed racist and evil, they know it's toxic. They know that it can never be replaced with anything good. They know that's such nihilistic revolutionary reasoning, it always ends up in bloodshed and despair.
Or in the case of the year 2020, CHAZ, in Seattle, or in the case of the 20th century, tens of millions dead, but progressives don't care because utopia is a powerful magnet and the progressive loves to chase it.
Now liberals, the few real ones that are left, they can't stand up to the progressives. There's no foundation for them. There's no set of limiting principles for the kind, compassionate, open-minded liberals - so they go along with the radical progressives who promise them their utopia.
The problems of our time become purposefully exaggerated by these radicals. The population purposefully terrified, so as to justify the most extreme solutions that result in the most possible control by the government.
You're told the world's going to end in 12 years if we don't blanket our landscapes with wind turbines and solar panels, but they scoff at building a new nuclear plant. You're told that the only way to help black communities is to defund the police, even though 80% of the black community favors the same or more policing in their communities. You're told that the rich don't pay any taxes, but in reality, the Trump tax cuts made our system more progressive, wherein the top 1% pay 40% of all federal revenue. You're told that voter ID is voter suppression, even though three out of five Americans believe that voter ID is a good idea. You're told an open border is the only way to be considered compassionate, even though it's the open border that causes death and human trafficking and prevents legal immigrants from making it through our system in a timely manner.
Their solutions make no sense if one only thinks about it briefly, but that's not the point because control is the point. Chaos and crisis. They justify their quest for more power, terrify the public, then lock down their schools and their businesses, make you believe in injustice and crisis, and then bribe you with false promises. This is the way of the progressive. That's why people are frustrated. And it seems like they're on offense all the time and we never are. Maybe that's true. But that's also our job as conservatives to be on defense, to defend the Constitution, defend our founding, defend traditions, defend the free market, defend the liberal ideas of individual dignity, due process, freedom of speech and, ultimately, defend the policies that actually work.
These things will always be under assault from the left and we will always be on defense. Get used to it. We can complain about it. We can let it demoralize us. We can turn on each other and call each other RINOs and sell-outs and establishment. We could. Plenty of people do to get attention, but that would be foolish.
We can't let this constant leftist assault demoralize our movement. We can't create these manufactured divisions within our own ranks. It should embolden us and unite us, as they expose their true colors and show their true radicalism.
So it's time we get smart about offering an alternative. Before that, we need a bit of a reset, I think, in how we fight. And I hear it all the time. For too long, Republicans in Washington, they refuse to fight. They were fine losing politely. They didn't want to alienate moderates or make the media mad by saying what we really thought.
Now, that's why President Trump won in 2016. He fought fiercely and didn't care about being polite when he did so. Now there's another element to this, however, that we sometimes forget.
That the point of fighting is to actually win. It's not just fighting for fighting's sake. It's not just pushing the limits to provoke the other side and cause a stir. That's not fighting. It's just dumb. And I think I know a thing or two about actual fighting. In combat, there's no glory in charging to your death. There's glory in winning. There's parallels between a winning strategy in war and a winning strategy in politics.
Now, in Afghanistan, it was not abnormal to receive enemy fire on patrol. It happened all the time. And when you get shot at, somebody who's maybe not as well trained, they might, because they saw some movies, they might think they should charge the hill. Take them out. Overwhelm them with fire power. Just kill some terrorists, just like in the movies. Makes for a great show, great TV ad. Die in a hail of gunfire.
But that's not the best strategy if you want to win the fight and live. Instead, we calm our breathing, we get our bearings, we set up a base of fire and maneuver element, communicate, and we move out. Put the enemy in a vulnerable position. We eliminate the threat without putting our team in unnecessary danger. It's not that sexy, but that's how it's done.
The same is true for a winning strategy in politics. The question is, do we want to still be winners? I hope so.
But let's be honest. These days we don't always reward the right people. We don't always reward those thoughtful hard workers who could recite Milton Friedman or William F. Buckley or make a persuasive argument about environmental policy, and persuade moderates to vote for us.
Sometimes the people who get rewarded are those who scream the loudest, shake their fists and say they're fighting for you. In reality, they're fighting for themselves. And they know this is true. They know that the quickest path, oftentimes, to a conservative's heart is not actually to confront Democrats, but to attack fellow Republicans. Tag them with that dreaded label RINO.
Don't fall for it. Stick together. We need it. We can't start looking like the left. It happens when people get frustrated, engaging in a cancel culture of our own, peddling grievance and victimhood, engaging in emotional reasoning and looking for reasons to be angry at each other instead of productive and persuasive. That's the hard truth. We need to recognize it.
The good news is there's a path out of it. Now the strategy's hard, just like real fighting is hard. It takes strategic thinking and wit. It means engaging in arguments with well-conceived, airtight logic. We've got to trip the leftists up. Fact check them. Know their arguments better than they do. Anticipate them.
It means presenting the conservative case without apology, but with a tone that a moderate audience can handle and then doing so across a wide variety of platforms because our goal, the path to winning, is to convince more people that our positions are right and persuade people outside our own tribe.
Fighting to win means actually understanding conservative principles and understanding how those principles make for superior governance and policy solutions. It means going to schools and universities and going on liberal media. It means calmly and intelligently having a debate on campus, not showing up just to trigger the libs and provoke somebody.
Conservatism is an easy, winning message if we deliver it with intellectual honesty and confidence and pride. We don't need to hide our principles or policies for moderates as many have done in the past. But, instead, explain why they work. We need to get into the debates on the hard stuff, the stuff we're not used to. Environmental policy, healthcare, immigration, and especially on the cultural issues.
And, to me, that last point's key because if we lose the cultural debate, we lose everything. All policy is downstream of culture, after all. So I made a list to guide us. It's a Conservative Guide to the Culture Wars. It's not exhaustive, but I think it's a pretty good start. So here it is:
1. America is worthy of our love and patriotism. 2. A victor mentality is better than a victim mentality. 3. Free speech is absolute and hate speech is not an objective term. 4. It doesn't matter what kind of gun you restrict. Criminals still hurt people, so let us protect ourselves. 5. You get to keep the wealth you create and pass it on to your kids. 6. The government has no right to shut down your business or invade your home without due process, even in a pandemic. 7. Women should not have to compete against men in women's sports. 8. Verifying ID to vote is not racist. It is common sense. 9. Borders and national sovereignty are not racist or xenophobic. 10. You can't have freedom without order, order without law, law without morality, morality without religion, or religion without God. 11. It's innocent until proven guilty, not the other way around. 12. Personal responsibility is a virtue and it's a bedrock of a successful society. 13. A policy should create prosperity, not dependence. 14. Never give in to cancel culture. 15. The founding was in 1776, not 1619. 16. Stand for the anthem. 17. Policy that favors one race over another is not social justice. It is just racist. 18. It's Latino, not Latinx. 19. Less abortion, more adoption. 20. No one has a right to someone else's money or services. 21. More police, not defund the police. 22. We don't tear up or hide from the past. We learn from it.
This is where we fight. A lot of these statements, they're moral statements. They're statements of principle. They lead to policy. And ask yourself, what is the left's version of that? They don't really have one.
That's what makes conservatism the winning argument - if we're willing to win. And this is where we fight.
No more self-pity, no more victimhood. We must be happy warriors and proudly tell the world why freedom is the path to prosperity.
So over the next few years, we're going to show the American people that conservatism means standing for one simple thing and that's policies that actually work. It's a governing philosophy based in process, not ideological outcomes, as the left prefers, but process.
Conservatism is a tradition. It's tried and true. It's based on time-tested principles. You guys call this event The Elephant Remembers. I didn't know why. So I asked and the answer - well honestly I still didn't quite understand it - but it still sounds good!
So I'm going to offer you maybe a reason why that's actually a pretty good name for a Republican event. The Elephant Remembers. Because what do we remember? We remember tradition. We remember things that work. We remember that our founders were students of history. They studied republics, they studied democracies. They studied law for centuries and they wrote down these ideas that we gathered from Athens and Rome and London and Jerusalem, and they wrote them down in Philadelphia in 1776, where we wrote the Declaration of Independence and said why governments exist. TO protect your inalienable rights. Then they wrote the Constitution, which tells us how to govern. Amazing documents. No other country has anything like them.
And so we used those documents and we use that tradition where we remember it. And then we solve problems within a framework of limiting principles that put guardrails on what government can realistically accomplish.
We ask proper questions before we jump to conclusions. Will this program be fiscally sustainable? Is the problem better solved at the local or community level? Does creating this service infringe on the individual rights of another in order to deliver it? Does this create dependency or prosperity?
Simple questions. And we don't believe in some kind of collective or generational guilt based on skin color. We believe in equality, true equality in the classical sense. We believe in meritocracies. We don't think that encouraging people to be on time is white supremacist ideology, as the wokes have said.
We're not about the policies that feel good or sound good, not the policies that Democrats use to bribe citizens for their vote. Free this and free that, but policies that are based on the timeless and universal principles that work for hardworking Americans, that work for their families, that work to improve their healthcare and their economy and to help their small business.
We believe in a certain tenet. When you maximize freedom, strong people will thrive. When you rely on and build upon the proven principles of free enterprise, the protection of natural rights, the institutional structures of a republic, you create a formula for boundless success and prosperity. Our founders knew that and they created the foundation for it in our Constitution. And I still believe it. And I think you do too.
And it's the values of the Republican Party that protect and promote these principles. It's the Republican Party that defends the greatest ideas and the greatest founding documents in history. It is the Republican Party that places faith in the individual to pursue their happiness without the weight of government on their back. The Republican Party is America's last great hope.
It is us who now defend the liberal values of free speech and due process and scientific debate. It is us who defend your right to start your business and build a life for your family and defend them from harm. We are the last defenders of the unborn, the last guardians of true equality and justice.
We're the last advocates for the importance of a Judeo-Christian moral framework and of the liberty of these moral truths underwrite. We're the ones who understand that, to be free, you must be responsible and strong and self-reliant, and that to coddle each generation is to weaken them and chip away at these precious freedoms.
We're a party that understands - now more than ever - that we have to speak out loudly and forcefully for these truths. And we will.
I'm optimistic. I hope you are too. And we have work to do and we have a country to fight for. And I'm proud to join you in that fight. And I'm so happy to be here with you today. Thank you so much for having me.
---

How do we prove that conservatism is the only governing philosophy that can ensure freedom and prosperity for all Americans? I've been pondering these questions for a long time - and now it's more important than ever for conservatives to have the right answers. So, this past weekend, I tried to articulate those answers. And the right path forward for us to reverse the disastrous course America is currently headed down. | == | You can watch my full speech by clicking == or the image above. I promise it's worth your time. I've also included a copy of the speech below. Here is the key takeaway: Conservatives believe that when you maximize freedom, strong people will thrive. When you rely on and build upon the proven principles of free enterprise, the protection of natural rights, the institutional structures of a republic, you create a formula for boundless success and prosperity. And it's the values of the Republican Party that protect and promote these principles. It's the Republican Party that defends the greatest ideas and the greatest founding documents in history. It is the Republican Party that places faith in the individual to pursue their happiness without the weight of government on their back. The Republican Party is America's last great hope. Conservatives must be happy warriors and proudly tell the world why freedom is the path to prosperity. That's how we win in November and for years to come. In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | | THIS IS HOW CONSERVATIVES WIN | We're going to have a deep conversation tonight about how to win. What's the proper way to win? What's the proper way to fight? What does winning actually look like? What does it mean to win the culture war? What does it mean to win the policy war? What do conservatives even stand for? We have to have those tough conversations. It's really easy to bash the left - and I have a whole speech bashing the left - because you've got to talk about the problem. But then we have to have solutions. Sometimes we forget that part. Many Americans are worried right now, and rightfully so. I think there's a feeling out there that there might be an expiration date on our freedoms. You're watching what's going on, you're having trouble finding any glimmer of hope. People are getting angry, people are getting frustrated, people are desperate for answers on how we might reverse this trend. And the truth is it won't be easy. To reverse course, we have to win elections. To win elections, we have to be persuasive, which is not to be confused with just being loud and angry. I can tell that you guys are ready to get to work on this, so I want to talk about how do we do this. Let's review what's at stake first. It's been a little over a year since Democrats took full control. Senate, House and presidency. President Biden, in his own delusional headspace, is probably really proud of himself for setting so many records. Record inflation, record illegals crossing our border, highest crime waves of the century, record number of oil and gas pipelines canceled, record number of men defeating women in their own sport. Those are not good records. Things are so bad for the Democrats that they aren't even trying to make the case anymore. Throughout our days in DC, we actually just vote on suspensions, which just means things we all agree on, pretty non-controversial votes, or bills that they've already passed a number of times. They're just passing the time. It's like they've given up and, frankly, you would too if you've seen those polling numbers. Their Build Back Better plan went down in flames and they have yet to come up with a strategy to revive it. I got to say, our Republican leadership deserves some credit on this. Deftly moving the legislative chess pieces around so that Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema would hold strong against the Build Back Better plan. That thing was dangerous and it's gone. But they're still doing everything they can to push their agenda through other means. Even with these legislative failures, Joe Biden has still managed to harm our country by refusing to do his job. His refusal to stand with our allies and stand up to our enemies has precipitated disasters in Afghanistan, Ukraine, and soon Iran. His refusal to enforce our border laws has resulted in 7,000 illegal crossings a day. His refusal to lease federal land or water for oil exploration and his refusal to permit L&G export facilities and pipelines has poured cold water on the production expansion necessary to bring oil prices back down. Now these policies - and this is just a few of them - they seem too crazy to be true. And I spend a lot of time thinking about this question: Why? Why do they believe this? Why would anyone favor policies that so obviously harm the country? And I think it's complex. It's a lot of things, but I think it boils down to this: populism. Doing what feels good instead of what is true and right. Now I don't like populism. Some people do. It depends on how you define it. I define it this way: it's the political act of telling the public what they want to hear as opposed to the truth. It's affirming their feelings instead of presenting the true trade-offs associated with any given policy. It is a denial of the unintended consequences of policy making. On our side, this embrace of populism has made us angry instead of inspiring. It made us demand $2,000 checks for people who never lost their jobs instead of advocating for personal fortitude and responsibility. It's not a good trend on the right and we should note it, but the left, this is what they do. They've always engaged in this strategy. After all, what's the easiest way to get a vote? It's bribery. Bribery is the easiest way to get a vote. Bribing the voter. Promise you that your dreams will come true if you just elect me. And they ask, "What's your truth so I can affirm it. You're perfect the way you are. It's everyone else that's screwed up. You're fine. I'll fix it for you. Just elect me. I'll make them give you what you rightfully deserve." Does that sound familiar from a lot of demagoguing leftist politicians? Now the problems never get solved, of course, and that's by design because grievance is powerful. Resentment is good. It keeps you mad. It keeps you engaged. It keeps you voting for the demagogues that shamelessly overpromise and bribe the citizenry. And that's just a small part of it, of course. The deeper why on the left is control. The progressive disposition is the belief that human nature can be molded into utopia. The modern French revolutionaries, believing that all tradition and foundations can be thrown out in favor of some post-modern revolution. They chastise the Constitution and its protection of natural rights and checks and balances because such things get in the way of a rapid and transformative agenda. Just ask Woodrow Wilson. He hated the Constitution. All cultural icons that do not affirm and support the post-modern woke lingo of critical race theory or intersectionality, well, they're canceled. Dr. Seuss, Aunt Jemima be damned. Now here's the good news. Parents are waking up to this, to the corruption of our school systems and they're fighting back and they're doing so because they know that this anti-American narrative, this idea that our founding should be torn down, should be deemed racist and evil, they know it's toxic. They know that it can never be replaced with anything good. They know that's such nihilistic revolutionary reasoning, it always ends up in bloodshed and despair. Or in the case of the year 2020, CHAZ, in Seattle, or in the case of the 20th century, tens of millions dead, but progressives don't care because utopia is a powerful magnet and the progressive loves to chase it. Now liberals, the few real ones that are left, they can't stand up to the progressives. There's no foundation for them. There's no set of limiting principles for the kind, compassionate, open-minded liberals - so they go along with the radical progressives who promise them their utopia. The problems of our time become purposefully exaggerated by these radicals. The population purposefully terrified, so as to justify the most extreme solutions that result in the most possible control by the government. You're told the world's going to end in 12 years if we don't blanket our landscapes with wind turbines and solar panels, but they scoff at building a new nuclear plant. You're told that the only way to help black communities is to defund the police, even though 80% of the black community favors the same or more policing in their communities. You're told that the rich don't pay any taxes, but in reality, the Trump tax cuts made our system more progressive, wherein the top 1% pay 40% of all federal revenue. You're told that voter ID is voter suppression, even though three out of five Americans believe that voter ID is a good idea. You're told an open border is the only way to be considered compassionate, even though it's the open border that causes death and human trafficking and prevents legal immigrants from making it through our system in a timely manner. Their solutions make no sense if one only thinks about it briefly, but that's not the point because control is the point. Chaos and crisis. They justify their quest for more power, terrify the public, then lock down their schools and their businesses, make you believe in injustice and crisis, and then bribe you with false promises. We're the ones who understand that, to be free, you must be responsible and strong and self-reliant, and that to coddle each generation is to weaken them and chip away at these precious freedoms. We're a party that understands - now more than ever - that we have to speak out loudly and forcefully for these truths. And we will. I'm optimistic. I hope you are too. And we have work to do and we have a country to fight for. And I'm proud to join you in that fight. And I'm so happy to be here with you today. Thank you so much for having me. | | | | | == | | | | | | | Paid for by Dan Crenshaw for Congress | | Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

name: Peter Franchot
subject: New Endorsement Alert!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
I’m incredibly excited to announce that Delegate Jay Walker has endorsed our campaign!
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Individual_JayWalker_1200x1200.png]
As Delegate for Prince George’s County’s District 26, Jay has been a true champion for Maryland’s working families. From education, to economic development, to public safety and more, Jay has dedicated his career to improving the quality of life for Prince George’s residents.
And as the husband to my incredible running mate, Monique Anderson-Walker, I also know Jay to be a great friend and true family man. Jay, I’m honored to have received your endorsement, and I won’t let you down. In the years to come, I look forward to partnering with you to secure a stronger and brighter future for our state.
This new endorsement announcement adds to the growing strength of our inclusive, people-powered movement. I’ve already received the endorsements of over 100 current and former elected officials – the most of any candidate for Governor in either category – and recent polls consistently show that our movement continues to lead by a strong margin.
With the help of grassroots supporters like you, we’re on track to build the critical mass of statewide support needed to pull ahead even further in this competitive primary race. Together, we’re going to deliver a bolder, stronger, and brighter future for Maryland in the years to come.
Will you help spread the word about this latest endorsement announcement by sharing with your friends on social media?
Click here to view and reshare on Facebook. [https://www.facebook.com/photo?fbid=547986596693406&set=a.422901372535263]
Click here to view and retweet on Twitter. [https://twitter.com/peterfranchot/status/1512084052697776136/photo/1]
Click here to view and reshare on Instagram. [https://www.instagram.com/p/CcDdi11P3BS/]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

name: Team Charlie Crist
subject: Here’s how we flip Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
|
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43888621/339145354/1278717326?refcode=20220407_f_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDQyMzA2ZS1hOGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eVwD1beqLLG80HAN8sSDYCxUPoXD08ZJSxCAvLeUQ4g=)
---

Folks,

Florida’s elections are always close — **_painfully close_**. Our statewide elections are usually decided by _less than a percentage point_.

**_[We can (finally!) flip Florida blue and defeat Gov. DeSantis this year, but we have to build momentum NOW. Will you pitch in to help make it happen?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43888622/339145355/1278717326?refcode=20220407_f_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDQyMzA2ZS1hOGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eVwD1beqLLG80HAN8sSDYCxUPoXD08ZJSxCAvLeUQ4g=)_**

Democrats can’t afford to keep coming up short. If we do, Gov. DeSantis will win a second term, which he'll use to launch his presidential campaign for 2024. _That would be a disaster._

**We know Charlie is the ONLY Democrat positioned to beat DeSantis in November.** According to a recent _POLITICO_ article, Democrats are desperate to beat DeSantis, and they know Charlie has the best chance of getting it done.

We know this election is going to be close — it always is in Florida. **But with the best candidate (Charlie!) who believes in putting people over politics and the broadest, strongest movement of folks (like you!) who are ready to build a Florida for all,_we can win_.**

**_[We need a strong grassroots network of supporters so we can defeat Gov. DeSantis and his wealthy Republican backers in the general election. Will you pitch in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43888623/339145356/1278717326?refcode=20220407_f_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDQyMzA2ZS1hOGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eVwD1beqLLG80HAN8sSDYCxUPoXD08ZJSxCAvLeUQ4g=)_**

Let's do this.

— Team Crist

[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43888624/339145357/1278717326?refcode=20220407_f_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDQyMzA2ZS1hOGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eVwD1beqLLG80HAN8sSDYCxUPoXD08ZJSxCAvLeUQ4g=)
---

subject: $100 million for the Valley

body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wURU7ixoRNeIe8LVM2BD4CpQEIT4C7rcq-WqrQb-934=/e6H8GV0DeBTSkFoiUQ91kE8nNOcPZjCi0TtGD2MeZZk=)
**In this year alone, the Valley will get $100 million to invest in transit because of the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law.**
That means a stronger economy, a cleaner environment, and more opportunities for working families in Tempe, Phoenix, and Mesa. I fought so hard to pass this bill -- and I'm ready to make sure the Valley gets even more.
[**Republicans are pouring money into my race in an effort to flip my seat. Will you help me keep fighting for Arizona by chipping in to my campaign now?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wURU7ixoRNeIe8LVM2BD4CpQEIT4C7rcq-WqrQb-934=/GuxAQTbuAq5Nhqks40YBAAjA7kgIyA2HedkAJcLU_8g=?refcode=X_040722_Infrastructure)

name: Laurie Teper
subject: Saturday and SIGNS!
body:
Hi Team,
Current top needs, **specifically this Saturday, April 9 and help with signs!**

_Canvassing - Door Knocking in Person County from 8:00-12:00_
**Meet at Allensville Bottom Ball Field, 724 Gentry Ridge Rd in Roxboro. There is a parking lot between the two ballfields.**

Please sign up here: _<https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0E4CADA629A3FACE9-canvassing>_
_After signing up, I will contact you regarding the Campaign Sidekick App._

_SIGNS!_ It's time to get those signs out! Name recognition is huge! Can you help the County Coordinator in your county? Days, times and number of volunteers vary so I will put you in touch with the coordinator of the county you can help with.
Person County - contact Daniel at _[poole_christian@yahoo.com](mailto:poole_christian@yahoo.com)_
Durham County - contact Renee at _[rhill632@aol.com](mailto:rhill632@aol.com)_
Granville County - contact Ron at _[ron_conway@msn.com](mailto:ron_conway@msn.com)_

_THESE ARE ONGOING:_
_Call Fire Department Chiefs in Granville and Orange counties_ , You are just asking when the best time is for Courtney to stop by the station to say hello and introduce herself to the first responders. A list will be provided. **We need at least 3-5 people.**

_Host a phone banking party._ Gather neighbors, friends and family at your house or a central location to phone bank! We need to do this twice/week from now until Election Day! Want to do it alone? You can do that too! It's very simple and the time goes fast!

_Host a Meet and Greet._ It can be at your home, a restaurant or bar! Invite neighbors, friends and family in District 4 to meet Courtney and ask her questions.

**Recruit friends and family to help you for any of these needs. You will be supported, coached and given everything you need to be successful. Please either sign up or let me know where you want to volunteer.
**

Courtney will be at a Town Hall along with her opposing candidate, Robert Thomas on Tuesday, April 19, 7:00pm at the Durham GOP headquarters. Please attend and bring some friends!

Follow us on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/courtneygeels), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/courtneygeels/), and give us a like on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/CourtneyGeelsForCongress) to keep up with Courtney.

Be sure to like and share!

__Fighting for Truth, Justice and Unity together!__
Laurie Teper
Volunteer Coordinator
Courtney Geels for Congress NC04
Email: [volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)
Cell: (847)212-5651
[courtneygeelsforcongress.com](http://courtneygeelsforcongress.com)

subject: Judge Jackson’s confirmation vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | |
---
**BREAKING: Final vote TODAY on Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson's nomination to the Supreme Court!**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/7284?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220407-SupremeCourtALERT-KBJVotePreview-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220407-SupremeCourtALERT-KBJVotePreview-Pros-sl1&akid=3717%2E9716520%2E8pGDry)
History is about to be made, team.

The **_pivotal_** final Senate vote is coming up TODAY on Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination to become the **first Black woman _ever_ on the Supreme Court!**

Judge Jackson is already one of the most popular high-court nominees in DECADES, but in order to track changes in public opinion, **our campaign strategists need to know where you stand BEFORE this history-making vote.**

**So please, tell us now:**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/7284?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220407-SupremeCourtALERT-KBJVotePreview-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220407-SupremeCourtALERT-KBJVotePreview-Pros-sl1&akid=3717%2E9716520%2E8pGDry)
**Do you approve of Judge Jackson’s nomination to the Supreme Court?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/7284?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220407-SupremeCourtALERT-KBJVotePreview-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220407-SupremeCourtALERT-KBJVotePreview-Pros-sl1&akid=3717%2E9716520%2E8pGDry)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/7284?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220407-SupremeCourtALERT-KBJVotePreview-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220407-SupremeCourtALERT-KBJVotePreview-Pros-sl1&akid=3717%2E9716520%2E8pGDry)

Thank you for your input,

Team DSCC

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nathan=20Hochman=20for=20Attorney=20General=202022?=
subject: New Majority Endorses Nathan Hochman for Attorney General
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022
body:
| | |
---
| | | “We are thrilled to support Nathan Hochman for California Attorney General. Nathan has the experience, leadership and passion needed to tackle California’s big problems. Throughout his career, he has worked on behalf of the public to hold criminals and corrupt politicians accountable – something which is long overdue in California. As Attorney General, Nathan has a plan to address the rampant crime problem in California, tackle the fentanyl poisoning and opioid epidemic and find effective solutions to address homelessness. During these times of increased crime and lawlessness, Nathan is the right person to make our streets and communities safe.” _**-Howard Hakes, Chairman of New Majority California.**_
---
| Welcome to the team, New Majority!

New Majority is comprised of chapters in Los Angles, Orange County, and San Diego and is made up of community and business leaders committed to improving California through sound public policy.

New Majority is a key pillar of the Republican movement in California and I am honored to have their support in my campaign for Attorney General.

With less than two months until the June primary election, we have momentum on our side. New Majority is the latest organization to join our growing bipartisan coalition of leaders, prosecutors, law enforcement officials, and grassroots activists who understand the importance of this race to transform California.

We are going to advance past the primary in June, win this election in November, and do the hard work of restoring public safety and justice to the State of California.

I hope you will join us in this effort.

Nathan Hochman
_Candidate for California Attorney General_
---
| |
---

When President Trump got elected, everyone suddenly claimed to be an America First Republican.
But you’re truly committed to our cause, Peter! You’ve put in the work, cast your vote, and now we _know_ we can count on you when it matters most.
With these Midterm Elections coming up (and with so much on the line), we’d be _thrilled_ to have you as part of our elite America First Club -- and we hope you’ll accept this invitation.
