name: John Fetterman
subject: what Joe Manchin said about me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
(Respectfully, I haven’t met the guy either)
#
Derek, Well, it looks like Senator Joe Manchin just made an endorsement in our Democratic primary.
He told _Politico_ that Conor Lamb would “be an outstanding U.S. senator.“
Then he went on to say this about yours truly 🙄
> "Haven’t met the guy,” Manchin said of Fetterman. “I keep saying, you know, to get rid of the filibuster, just elect more liberals. I guess he fits the bill."
Respectfully, Derek, I haven’t met the guy either.
**But if Joe Manchin is your ideal senator, then I am probably *not* your candidate.**
And if you’re looking for a Democrat who can actually pass some bills for once by scrapping Joe Manchin’s precious filibuster, then I’m your dude.
**If you want a Democrat you can depend on, one you know is always going to stand up + fight for you, and is actually going to vote like a Democrat, then I am *humbly* asking for your support:**
**[Will you add a $5 donation right now? No matter how much you can give, every little bit helps ensure our campaign can take on all the attacks getting lobbed our way by the super PACs + Joe Manchins of the world.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47013?refcode=em20220407-5289&t=1&akid=5289%2E434096%2Ep7g-Xm)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47013?refcode=em20220407-5289&amounts=5&t=20&akid=5289%2E434096%2Ep7g-Xm)**
The truth is, I can’t win the primary or flip this seat alone. Just 40 days left until the election — even sooner than that people will start voting by mail. We could *really* use your help in the final sprint.
Our grassroots fundraising strength is the biggest thing standing in the way of them getting what they want. So thank you, Derek, from the bottom of my heart for everything.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220407-5289-footer&t=21&refcode2=5289_434096_p7g-Xm&akid=5289%2E434096%2Ep7g-Xm)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=22&akid=5289%2E434096%2Ep7g-Xm)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=5289%2E434096%2Ep7g-Xm)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

clean_body: | | | | We Made History Today! www.votelindstrom.com Friends, We made history today. We passed the AGAIN! This important bill passed unanimously and will This tax cut will cut income tax rates, property taxes, and expedite implementation of my tax cut on social security benefits. What a great day for all of Nebraska! And we are just getting started. The Lindstrom administration is ready to get to work for YOU. We have the momentum and are so close to WINNING. I am ready to get to work on day 1 to make meaningful tax reform and invest in our Nebraska communities. Today's historic tax cuts are just the start of bringing a New Generation of Leadership to Nebraska. I need your help to cut even more tax cuts. Let's get to work. Together we will bring a New Generation of Leadership! Always fighting for you, Brett | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- Paid for by Friends of Lindstrom Campaign - 2437 S. 130th Cir, Omaha, NE 68144

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Thank you in advance for your first $3 donation.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
When I think about my most important supporters, I don’t think about the people who are the biggest donors.
#

Friends —
I want you to know just how important you are to this campaign.
When I think about my most important supporters, it’s not about how much someone gives.
I think about the people who were there when I needed them most. So far, nearly 1 million people have contributed to either my first campaign or my re-election.
But now that we’re in an election year and attack ads are already running, I need you more than ever.
We’ve started April a bit more slowly on fundraising than we had hoped, so I want to do something special today. I want to call a few of the folks who chip in TODAY. So, I’m asking:
[**Can you please make your first online $3 contribution to my re-election campaign? Help us reach our fundraising goals and defend this seat from the corporate special interest groups that want to beat us. And if you donate today, you might be one of the people I reach out to.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22?refcode=em220407-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2535_6688874_F7yzXr&akid=2535%2E6688874%2EF7yzXr)

Bob is THAT candidate and our team knows that he’ll get the job done in Congress, but he needs your help! | | SUPPORT BOB HEALEY BY CHIPPING IN TODAY! | | | | | | | | | | | | Bob really needs your help to fight back. He’s looking forward to fighting for ENERGY INDEPENDENCE in Congress! Thanks,JakeDigital Campaign TeamBob Healey Jr. for Congress | | | | | | | | Paid for by Bob Healey for Congress | | P.O. Box 999, Edison NJ, 08818 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

Hello,
Right now, Ukrainians are bravely defending their country with Iowa-made weapons. Russian armored columns are getting stopped in their tracks with American Javelin missiles – crucial parts of which are made right here in Iowa.
**But if it were up to Donald Trump, Ukraine would be on its own against his pal Putin – still waiting for American military aid until President Zelensky agreed to open a sham investigation into Joe Biden.**
And my opponent Chuck Grassley was one of 52 Republican senators who chose blind loyalty to Trump over helping Ukraine defend itself against Russia.
When I defeat Chuck Grassely this November, I will be the most senior military person ever-elected to the Senate. I understand the real threat Russia poses and the importance of NATO, and I’ll ensure Iowa continues to help Ukraine against Putin’s war-crime invasion.
If our campaign is successful in turning Iowa blue, Democrats are guaranteed to hold onto our majority in the Senate. But the polls are showing a very close race, and McConnell’s Super PACs are about to spend millions against me.
**We need to raise $35,000 before midnight tomorrow, and right now we’re still falling short. The only way we’ll defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Senate majority is if grassroots donors like you give right now:**
[**I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important. Please, will you give $5 or more right now – no amount is too small – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43889629/339151739/-42398318?refcode=em20220407pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjAzMzY0Yy1hZGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GC6rb2ukIqquh3I1QxWdfOnFlAUED0010wjVanUqYFE=)

clean_body: Hello, Right now, Ukrainians are bravely defending their country with Iowa-made weapons. Russian armored columns are getting stopped in their tracks with American Javelin missiles – crucial parts of which are made right here in Iowa. But if it were up to Donald Trump, Ukraine would be on its own against his pal Putin – still waiting for American military aid until President Zelensky agreed to open a sham investigation into Joe Biden. And my opponent Chuck Grassley was one of 52 Republican senators who chose blind loyalty to Trump over helping Ukraine defend itself against Russia. When I defeat Chuck Grassely this November, I will be the most senior military person ever-elected to the Senate. I understand the real threat Russia poses and the importance of NATO, and I’ll ensure Iowa continues to help Ukraine against Putin’s war-crime invasion. If our campaign is successful in turning Iowa blue, Democrats are guaranteed to hold onto our majority in the Senate. But the polls are showing a very close race, and McConnell’s Super PACs are about to spend millions against me. We need to raise $35,000 before midnight tomorrow, and right now we’re still falling short. # One of the sponsors of my program, Legacy Metals, wants to share the following with you!
---
| Friends,

Since November of last year the stock market has plummeted, while gold has been on the rise.

Gas prices are insane. The stock market is extremely volatile. Inflation is even worse than it was last year and now we have a war with Russia and Ukraine that could spread to the rest of the world. The markets do not like instability.

The good news is you have options.

Gold prices are rising as investors turn to gold for protection. Gold provides a hedge against inflation and protects against a weakening dollar.

[Legacy Precious Metals](http://click1.srnemail.com/ozkqwlccwpkdppncdkkvtdmpswdrlsspzlvnszkjftjwml_hwmwwssbsqbfzvwsfbwcqnn.html) is the only company I trust for investing in gold and silver.

name: Pat Clark,  Keystone Progress
subject: Are you signed up for tomorrow?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress, www
body:
Dear Friend,

Tomorrow is the big day!

Our 13th annual, virtual Keystone Progress Summit — Pennsylvania's Progressive Summit — will kick off discussing one of the most pressing issues in our state: our deteriorating democracy and creating a 10-year plan to protect it.

This is why we need you — we need your input, your energy, and your experiences — personal or professional. We are here for this fight and we must mobilize NOW.

REGISTER NOW [https://hopin.com/events/keystone-progress-summit-2022?utm_source=email&utm_campaign=040722] if you haven't yet for the summit on April 8-9. We will see you at this virtual event.

Join Keystone Progress and our 2022 KP Summit sponsoring partner, the ACLU of Pennsylvania. Together, we will make real progress in creating a progressive future.

Pat Clark
Keystone Progress

body:
| **BREAKING:** "Ohio lawmakers introduce bill similar to Florida's 'Don't Say Gay' bill that also targets 'divisive' teachings about race" _— CBS News_
Team,

House Republicans in Ohio introduced a bill on Monday that was heavily inspired by Florida's new "Don't Say Gay" law.

This copy-cat bill, sponsored by Representatives Mike Loychik and Jean Schmidt, would also target what Republicans have deemed "divisive education" about race.

But let's make one thing clear: This bill is about being as anti-democratic as possible and directly targeting Ohio's LGBTQ+ youth.**Fear-mongering representatives want to divide and distract Ohioans from their ongoing misdeeds by trying to enact alienating legislation, and we can't let them get away with it.**

**[Chip in today so that we can fight this racist and homophobic bill.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43890372/339155969/1375374031?refcode=em22_220407_Fundra_fndd_gq_act___TODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220407_Fundra_fndd_gq_act___TODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjVmNmQ2OC1hZmI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HbIz-82p6f5tJOFADSZSSg-GANnT5sHIJYh9ZehsRlE=)**

Folks—while my GOP opponents are rolling around in the mud and
pandering to their right-wing base, we need to spend this time spreading
our message across every corner of the state.

That’s how we win this race.

Shooting ads and getting them up is tough enough, but I’ve got to admit—I
underestimated just how damn expensive it is to keep them on the air.

We can’t afford to go dark during a critical moment like this.
Folks, I need your help.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10389?t=1014&amount=25&akid=3164%2E3611125%2EUHhbXf ]Can I count on you to donate toward our $75,000 ads goal so we can keep
our ads up and running? Having to pull our ads early would be devastating

name: Sarah Palin
subject: I announced my candidacy for the U.S House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Patriot,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I'm representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I've watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I'm asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can't do this without your support.

That's why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you'll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW TO BECOME AN OFFICIAL FOUNDING SUPPORTER.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60067922:JeiwlYoND:m:1:3299561967:F192B5C74CD5536AE5CADD134F2CAF9B:r)**

This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I'm running, and YOU will be the reason we win.

_**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60067922:JeiwlYoND:m:1:3299561967:F192B5C74CD5536AE5CADD134F2CAF9B:r)**_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60067922:JeiwlYoND:m:1:3299561967:F192B5C74CD5536AE5CADD134F2CAF9B:r)

At this critical time in our nation's history, we need leaders who will combat the left's socialist, big-government, America-last agenda.

This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children's future, and selling out our nation's interest to the highest bidder.

I'm in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country.

I just have one simple question for you:

**WILL YOU JOIN ME?**

**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60067922:JeiwlYoND:m:1:3299561967:F192B5C74CD5536AE5CADD134F2CAF9B:r)**

Thank you & God Bless America.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60067922:JeiwlYoND:m:1:3299561967:F192B5C74CD5536AE5CADD134F2CAF9B:r)
Sarah Palin

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60067922:JeiwlYoND:m:1:3299561967:F192B5C74CD5536AE5CADD134F2CAF9B:r)**

Friend, In a historic vote, the Senate just confirmed Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court of the United States, where she will be the first Black woman to serve on our highest court.

From the beginning, it was clear that Justice Jackson's stellar credentials as a Harvard-educated lawyer, former trial court judge, public defender, and Judge on the U.S. Court of Appeals for the D.C. Circuit **could not be denied.**

Of course, the Senate GOP didn't see it that way, and chose hyperpartisanship and thinly-veiled racism to vote against confirming Justice Jackson. But Senate Democrats lead the way with the majority vote to make this historic confirmation possible, **proving just how _crucial_ it is for us to win this Senate seat to make real progress.**

**[In the Senate, Conor will always vote for democracy, equity, upholding our Constitutional values, and ensuring fair representation for all. Will you help him win this highly competitive Senate race for PA?>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43890446/339156248/124576002?refcode=em22_220407_scotus&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGVlMGIxYi1iMGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IAUDT7nmHykCnhnbm8PvCQ9WOQ6uYXwJIo6TCDKTiww=)**

Since he was elected to replace Mark Meadows, Madison Cawthorn has done nothing but embarrass himself on the national stage. Last week, he dished some seriously juicy information about the GOP.

While he was a guest on a podcast, Madison Cawthorn revealed to the world that in his two years in Congress – well, we'll let Madison tell you:

"Then you realize they're [GOP leadership] asking you to come to an orgy. ... Some of the people leading on the movement to try and remove addiction in our country, and then you watch them do a key bump of cocaine right in front of you. And it's like, this is wild."

**That's right; Madison Cawthorn admitted that he has been invited to Republican orgies and witnessed his fellow members of the GOP do cocaine.**

His own party leader, Kevin McCarthy, is trying to convince the American people that Cawthorn was lying, but we know better. clean_body: Since he was elected to replace Mark Meadows, Madison Cawthorn has done nothing but embarrass himself on the national stage. Last week, he dished some seriously juicy information about the GOP. Team, Since he was elected to replace Mark Meadows, Madison Cawthorn has done nothing but embarrass himself on the national stage. Last week, he dished some seriously juicy information about the GOP. While he was a guest on a podcast, Madison Cawthorn revealed to the world that in his two years in Congress – well, we'll let Madison tell you: "Then you realize they're [GOP leadership] asking you to come to an orgy. ... Some of the people leading on the movement to try and remove addiction in our country, and then you watch them do a key bump of cocaine right in front of you. And it's like, this is wild." That's right; Madison Cawthorn admitted that he has been invited to Republican orgies and witnessed his fellow members of the GOP do cocaine. His own party leader, Kevin McCarthy, is trying to convince the American people that Cawthorn was lying, but we know better. Now we need to know what you think: | | | Thanks, Team Never Again Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Madison Cawthorn, Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. Those are just a few of the Republicans in Congress that Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. Thank you for supporting Never Again PAC as we continue our fight against American fascism and corruption. We are building a war chest to vote out the nation's most dangerous elected officials and hold them accountable for their acts of treason. = Never Again PAC will hold these most dangerous and radical elected officials accountable by building a war chest to support ongoing rapid response efforts in 2022 and beyond. Through advertising, grassroots & digital organizing in targeted members’ districts, at a time in the cycle when other political organizations have historically not spent resources, will ensure our resources will in fact go further, our message will be heard more clearly, and our targets will feel the pressure immediately. = For generations people have risked everything seeking refuge on American shores to escape the very same sorts of political violence that took place at the U.S. Capitol on January 6th –– and every generation has an opportunity to make investments to protect this democracy –– it is time to do our part. = PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC Never Again PAC PO Box 2153 Purcellville, VA 20134 United States

**As long as we're constantly vigilant to stay environmentally conscious and responsible** , this can can be a prime example of how our district can contribute to a 'Made in America' initiative. It means a resurgence of our domestic production. Our district might be rural, but we contribute a great deal to the production of goods and materials on which Americans and the rest of the world depend. In this district, we thrive in the production of **electronic circuit boards, medical devices, lumber, industrial equipment and fabrics, machinery, aerospace, raw materials, agricultural goods,** and so much more. Products Made in Northern Michigan and the U.P. contribute to a better quality of life for all citizens. In what ways?
* Producing products in the district creates family-sustaining, well-paying jobs and enables the mutual success of workers and employers.
* Purchasing and contracting within the region keeps trade local, boosts employment rates, helps municipal tax bases, grows population naturally and gradually, and ensures regional resilience in a fluctuating global economy.
* Creating jobs in the district is an investment in our future. It leads to higher consumer spending rates, helps businesses succeed, decreases poverty, and improves the efficacy of other federal resources. Less financial stress on a community decreases crime rates, civil unrest, violence, and addiction.
* Improving the environment where Northern Michiganders and Yoopers work bolsters business productivity, boosts employee retention, and fosters a healthier community.
* Living in a community where citizens value local products and services is priceless to our culture and way of life.

How can we do more?
* Mobilize existing grit and talent.
* Attract new investment and talent.
* Create business-friendly communities by incubating start-ups and fostering innovation.
* Provide businesses the tools, resources, and partnerships they need to outsource within Michigan.
* Revitalize trade schools, STEM programs, and other non-traditional education programs to supply high worker demand.
* Improve infrastructure to make it possible for workers to commute, deliver and access all the necessary tools to supply consumer demand.
* Protect and improve the environment to create a place where workers want to live, work, and enjoy.

As your Representative, no matter which side of the aisle an idea originates, I will support economic 'Made in America' solutions that prevent off-shoring and enable the Northern Michigan and U.P. economy to thrive. Let's get to work. \- Dr. Bob
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ken=20Cuccinelli?=
subject: Our Border Plan picking up steam + Abbott's border tricks
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Friends, Yesterday, Texas Governor Greg Abbott [announced a series of new measures](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=3715f2e75a&e=17913c7d6d) he intends to take in light of the Biden administration’s disastrous decision to end Title 42 removal authority at the southern border. **The end of Title 42 will ensure a catastrophic surge of illegal immigration** heading into the warmer spring and summer months that will overwhelm an already battered Border Patrol. Governor Abbott is instructing the Texas Department of Public Safety to conduct “enhanced safety inspections” of vehicles crossing into Texas from Mexico, providing voluntary charter buses and flights to send illegal immigrants to Washington D.C., and initiating “boat blockades” along the Rio Grande to deter crossings.
---
|
---
| In the context of 2021’s [record illegal immigration levels](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=3b41f9d9de&e=17913c7d6d), an astonishing 78 percent increase in year-over-year apprehensions so far in 2022 from last year’s record levels, and the pending termination of Title 42, these actions fall far short of the measures needed to secure Texas, diminish cartel control along the border, and defend American communities overrun with crime, drugs, and violence. **Simply put, Governor Abbott must do more than just set up road inspections, deploy water obstacles, and offer voluntary illegal immigrant transportation services to left-wing cities. These policy solutions will literally have no impact on the numbers of illegal aliens crossing Texas’ border with Mexico. None. ** Governor Abbott must make clear that the invasion taking place in his state constitutes an invasion under Article I, Section 10, Clause 3 of the United States Constitution and that in light of the Biden administration’s willful negligence and dereliction of its duty to carry out its Article IV, Section 4 responsibilities to protect the states, **Texas will physically apprehend and remove illegal border crossers back across the border into Mexico.**
---
| It is up to states to use their inherent Article I authority to do what Washington refuses to do: secure their borders with Mexico. The Center for Renewing America has provided state legislators and governors with a [clear policy path](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=05d32fc255&e=17913c7d6d) for bringing an end to the security crisis playing out along the southern border. This plan has already been validated by Arizona Attorney General Mark Brnovich in a [landmark legal opinion](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=d4479b9fad&e=17913c7d6d) issued earlier this year.
---
| Americans do not have the luxury of withstanding another three years of the Biden administration’s intentionally destructive policies at the southern border. It is up to states and those elected to govern them to step into the breach and restore order and security. **Texas has the ability to get this done. All that is required is the resolve to see it through.** **Nothing Governor Abbott announced will accomplish any reduction of the flow of illegal aliens across Texas’ border, but Governor Abbott indicated that he intended to announce other efforts next week. **
---
|
---
| After a year of Texas’ “Operation Lone Star,” it should be clear to all - until illegal border crossers are returned to Mexico reliably and regularly, no other efforts will have any useful impact. In fact, the money Texas is spending on Operation Lone Star is effectively being wasted because the one thing that would give it ‘teeth’ and deter potential illegal border crossers is not being done. For the sake of Texas and America,**it is my most earnest hope that next week - finally - Governor Abbott will use the power he has under the U.S. Constitution to repel the invasion crossing Texas’ border every single day.**
---
| [D O N A T E](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=8febbf3be0&e=17913c7d6d "D O N A T E")
---
| Thanks to your help, we'll keep fighting,

**Ken Cuccinelli**
Senior Fellow, Center for Renewing America 8.5.7

clean_body: | | | | | | | Friends, Yesterday, Texas Governor Greg Abbott he intends to take in light of the Biden administration’s disastrous decision to end Title 42 removal authority at the southern border. The end of Title 42 will ensure a catastrophic surge of illegal immigration heading into the warmer spring and summer months that will overwhelm an already battered Border Patrol. Governor Abbott is instructing the Texas Department of Public Safety to conduct “enhanced safety inspections” of vehicles crossing into Texas from Mexico, providing voluntary charter buses and flights to send illegal immigrants to Washington D.C., and initiating “boat blockades” along the Rio Grande to deter crossings. | | In the context of 2021’s , an astonishing 78 percent increase in year-over-year apprehensions so far in 2022 from last year’s record levels, and the pending termination of Title 42, these actions fall far short of the measures needed to secure Texas, diminish cartel control along the border, and defend American communities overrun with crime, drugs, and violence. Simply put, Governor Abbott must do more than just set up road inspections, deploy water obstacles, and offer voluntary illegal immigrant transportation services to left-wing cities. These policy solutions will literally have no impact on the numbers of illegal aliens crossing Texas’ border with Mexico. None. Governor Abbott must make clear that the invasion taking place in his state constitutes an invasion under Article I, Section 10, Clause 3 of the United States Constitution and that in light of the Biden administration’s willful negligence and dereliction of its duty to carry out its Article IV, Section 4 responsibilities to protect the states, Texas will physically apprehend and remove illegal border crossers back across the border into Mexico. | It is up to states to use their inherent Article I authority to do what Washington refuses to do: secure their borders with Mexico. The Center for Renewing America has provided state legislators and governors with a for bringing an end to the security crisis playing out along the southern border. This plan has already been validated by Arizona Attorney General Mark Brnovich in a issued earlier this year. | Americans do not have the luxury of withstanding another three years of the Biden administration’s intentionally destructive policies at the southern border. It is up to states and those elected to govern them to step into the breach and restore order and security. Texas has the ability to get this done. All that is required is the resolve to see it through. Nothing Governor Abbott announced will accomplish any reduction of the flow of illegal aliens across Texas’ border, but Governor Abbott indicated that he intended to announce other efforts next week. | | After a year of Texas’ “Operation Lone Star,” it should be clear to all - until illegal border crossers are returned to Mexico reliably and regularly, no other efforts will have any useful impact. In fact, the money Texas is spending on Operation Lone Star is effectively being wasted because the one thing that would give it ‘teeth’ and deter potential illegal border crossers is not being done. For the sake of Texas and America,it is my most earnest hope that next week - finally - Governor Abbott will use the power he has under the U.S. Constitution to repel the invasion crossing Texas’ border every single day. | "D O N A T E" | Thanks to your help, we'll keep fighting, Ken Cuccinelli Senior Fellow, Center for Renewing America 8.5.7 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Citizens for Renewing America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: 300 Independence Ave. SE Washington, DC 20003 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

| Friend,

By now, it's clear that Joe Biden's pick for Supreme Court Justice, _**Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson,**___**could not be more WRONG**__ _**for our constitutional freedoms and the Rule of Law in America.**_
---
| [ ](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=b82f97c987&e=edf8a4d16d)
---
| **Ten Republican Attorneys General from across the United States have joined together to oppose her nomination. **

[Their letter to the Biden Administration](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=020aa52e8a&e=edf8a4d16d) details Judge Jackson's _"unconscionable leniency toward criminals who possess, publish and produce child pornography - or, more accurately, images of child rape."_

It should go without saying, Friend, but a judge with such a shameful track record is unquestionably _**UNFIT**_ to hold a place on our nation's highest court.

**Do you agree?**_**[_Add your name below to say NO to Judge Jackson and help Republican Attorneys General keep America safe._](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=5fc52e607e&e=edf8a4d16d)**_

---

name: Tina Kotek
subject: Let's work together to solve our housing crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek P
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43882617/339117903/69228752?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGIzZGYyYS05NGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TI4uMPuH4jURMETMh95k1ATDHgoc4iTG_Y9IwxguCNY=&emci=f8938e99-c9b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=20b3df2a-94b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15353729)
---
Everywhere I go, people are talking about homelessness and the lack of affordable housing.

We all know that safe, affordable housing is out of reach for too many Oregonians. We see it every day in our communities. This is a humanitarian crisis in our neighborhoods.

Tackling Oregon's housing and homelessness crisis will be my top priority as your Governor, and I will bring urgency, focus, and energy to solving this challenge.

**[As an experienced problem-solver, I will be able to deliver the right solutions. But I need your support to get there. Will you stand with me and contribute $5 or whatever you can?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43882618/339117905/1324368245?refcode=em22_220407_housing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGIzZGYyYS05NGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TI4uMPuH4jURMETMh95k1ATDHgoc4iTG_Y9IwxguCNY=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43882621/339117907/1324368245?refcode=em22_220407_housing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGIzZGYyYS05NGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TI4uMPuH4jURMETMh95k1ATDHgoc4iTG_Y9IwxguCNY=) Here are my five goals for taking on this challenge:
1. End unsheltered homelessness for veterans, families with children, unaccompanied young adults, and people 65 years and older by 2025, and continue to strengthen pathways to permanent housing for all Oregonians experiencing homelessness.
2. Build enough housing to meet the needs of people currently experiencing homelessness, address the current shortage of housing, and keep pace with future housing demand by 2033.
3. Advance racial equity by reducing the racial homeownership gap by 20 percent by 2027.
4. Keep people housed who are currently on the brink of homelessness.
5. Encourage intergovernmental and private sector partnerships to have more effective and efficient responses to solving this crisis.

I know we can do this - if we work together, we can do anything.

Oregonians have a "can do" attitude and are willing to roll up their sleeves. My plan will focus everyone's energy on achieving success for our state and our neighbors.

**[I can only lead the charge if I get into office, and to do that I need your support. Can you support me today so we can solve problems together?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43882622/339117908/1324368245?refcode=em22_220407_housing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGIzZGYyYS05NGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TI4uMPuH4jURMETMh95k1ATDHgoc4iTG_Y9IwxguCNY=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43882624/339117909/1324368245?refcode=em22_220407_housing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGIzZGYyYS05NGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TI4uMPuH4jURMETMh95k1ATDHgoc4iTG_Y9IwxguCNY=) Together we can deliver the change we need. Thank you for stepping up to help!

Tina

Hello Derek,
As we turn the dial up on our organizing and ground game, Chris is doing everything he can to engage with voters and talk about the issues impacting our neighborhoods.
Pennsylvanians deserve a leader who will fight for our democracy, shared values, and the future of Western PA. People like you are the heart and soul of our movement. That’s why we’re reaching out to you.
Our team wants you to share what issues matter most to you and your community. The truth is, we cannot build a winning coalition without input from our top supporters.
[**Chris wants to hear from you so we can represent your interests on the campaign trail. Team, In 1977, Curtis Brownell kidnapped, raped, and killed Louise Marie Betts. Four months later, he was caught attempting to do the same to a pregnant woman. name: Sarah Palin
subject: Become a Founding Supporter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWLKkjqHNy

America is at a tipping point.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWLKkjqHNy

Friend,

Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat
representing Alaska.

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected
to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is
here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in
Alaska, even when I'm representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I've watched the far
left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the
fight. And now I'm asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can't do this without your support.

That's why for a short time, when you make your next
contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you'll automatically cement your name
as an Official Founding Supporter.

CONTRIBUTE NOW TO BECOME AN OFFICIAL FOUNDING SUPPORTER.
>>

This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the
reason I'm running, and YOU will be the reason we win.

Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the
fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter. >>

At this critical time in our nation's history, we need
leaders who will combat the left's socialist, big-government,
America-last agenda.

This country was built by heroes, and the radical left
dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal
immigrants, mortgaging our children's future, and selling out our
nation's interest to the highest bidder.

I'm in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom
alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our
country.

I just have one simple question for you:

WILL YOU JOIN ME?

Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the
fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter. >>

Thank you & God Bless America.

Sarah Palin

CONTRIBUTE NOW >>

Paid for by Sarah for Alaska.

P.O. BOX 871235 WASILLA, AK 99687

name: Team WisGOP
subject: Did you hear.....
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
Conservatives Dominate in Local Elections

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cd_icymi_2&n=1)
---
Hi Friend- We wanted to make sure you heard the great news that.....
## **Conservatives Dominate in Local Elections**
While Democrats try to [ _hang their hats_](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TteBNAQXAm-1eoRX2n9Yh0d_msAakgID6YXPeLY2_1hCf9XF_2LraSdqrha7ZPeGKil7mJeiRFlgrweJQ29GDpWKNGN3o4XM7xPRSsbUSnFp&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cd_icymi_2&n=2) on winning a mayoral race in a city where their party has routinely carried 80 percent of the vote, the enthusiasm for conservatives was clear in last night’s Spring Election. Across the state, **conservatives were successful in roughly two-thirds of the races in which we were active** , including swing and Democrat leaning areas. This success was a testament to the strength of the grassroots Republican operation, including the infrastructure provided by our county parties, and Wisconsinites’ frustration with harmful and divisive curriculum in our schools, attacks on [ _election integrity_](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tug1U98m5fTMwfqRZPKhlPjRqHmXw73_7XF_ep0I99IRQ0-nZpJOE3h5_H0XZSKqIOh0kH47sPNV0p10kuuQWGLPRb9psSnQ0K4zknYdiqTT&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cd_icymi_2&n=3), and far-left overreach from liberal local elected officials. **Some highlights from Tuesday's election include:**
* Maria Lazar’s victory marked the second time an Evers appointee was defeated in the Second District Appellate Court.
* Samantha Kerkman became the first woman, and [_reportedly_](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TnfNR2Os07bazRql6v4pW4ZEPMTuxwDohPWUbfksuNUC9Nx3i-kPwYiz5Pw52OVaiJlJOZYpus1B4EbCfdSKM-gZd4Yo-TV19U8HqsCqSRX7&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cd_icymi_2&n=4) the first Republican, elected as Kenosha County Executive in a historically Democrat county.
* A conservative was elected County Executive in Portage County, the heavily Democrat area once known as Dane County North.
* After Democrats spent about $100,000 on digital advertising on three Green Bay City Council seats, conservatives won two of those three seats and a majority on the council.
* **Adams, Calumet, Door, Kenosha, Marathon, Rock, and St. Croix counties all flipped their County Boards. An additional 9 County Boards are now within 3 seats of a Conservative majority.**
* Conservatives nearly doubled their seats on the 30-person La Crosse County Board, going from seven seats to 13 and nearly flipping control.
* **Every targeted Conservative candidate won their School Board elections in Cedarburg, Elmbrook, Manitowoc, Menomonee Falls, Germantown, Wausau, Oconomowoc, Whitnall, Waukesha, Altoona, Amery, New London, Neenah, West Bend.... and many others!**
* All 3 Conservative candidates in the Wausau School Board were victorious, leading to an 8-1 majority on the board, a board that in 2020 Democrats had control of 7-2.
* 3 School Boards in Kenosha County flipped to Conservative control.
* Conservative Jane Lang became the second female Mayor in the City of Neenah's history while winning in a city President Biden won by over 1,000 votes in 2020.
* Conservatives in the City of Pewaukee saw phenomenal success as they won the mayoral election and their 3 target aldermanic races.
* Waukesha, Washington, and Langlade County all won over 80% of their targeted races across their respective Counties.
* Waukesha had over 170 candidates across the County.
* Conservatives in Rock County won almost 90% of the County Board races they were targeting, ultimately flipping the County Board their way. They also elected conservatives to School Boards in their two major Democratic cities of Beloit and Janesville.

This massive success for conservatives couldn't have been done without the tireless efforts from our grassroots, and most importantly, from those brave individuals who put their name on the ballot and ran for office. **Conservatives are energized and it is clear the momentum is in our favor heading into November!** | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0coD43uhuC0lkL-ug-GSI10sdniJZJq-u2PdbOlVOTukV-q-lxyXAQNmdeAet6jubQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cd_icymi_2&n=5 "Click here to view our press release") [Click here to view our press release](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0coD43uhuC0lkL-ug-GSI10sdniJZJq-u2PdbOlVOTukV-q-lxyXAQNmdeAet6jubQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cd_icymi_2&n=5)
---
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6myz1ydj26pS20sqllUBZd4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cd_icymi_2&n=6) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tr24D9XbJYDft_QizpripYs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cd_icymi_2&n=7) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y0VJVp2OCKNw8zDVmWeSo7yP6jlGmDIaYIm5b1oT1T4S&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cd_icymi_2&n=8) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cd_icymi_2&n=9)

|

What a week! First you all helped us crush our fundraising goals and then the Jayhawks won the NCAA Men's Basketball Championship for the first time in almost 15 years!

All that to say: thank you so much for all of your support of my campaign during our end of quarter fundraising deadline. I’m blown away that so many people share my vision of a better future for Kansas and our country.

November is fast approaching, and I know that we can prove to the GOP that we are here to stay! Together, we can ensure that Kansans are represented by someone who will actually **_show up to vote and work for the people of this great state._**

Thank you for being a part of our movement and ROCK CHALK!

Mark

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sara=20Walsh?=
subject: BIG NEWS – My pro-life bill passed!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Walsh for Congress
body:
I’m so excited to share that the Missouri House passed a bill that includes my pro-life language! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/40285fb37f42/big-news-my-pro-life-bill-passed?e=4df934edcc)
---
| |
---
| | Friends,

I’m so excited to share that the Missouri House passed a bill that includes my pro-life language!

Called the Born Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act, my legislation will grant any child born alive during or after an attempted abortion the same rights and privileges possessed by any other live-born child. It would also require doctors to provide the same care for a baby born alive after a failed attempt at abortion as they would for any child of the same gestational age.

This bill has been my priority this legislative session, because protecting human life is my passion.

Now, we pray that the State Senate takes up the bill and sends it to the Governor for his signature.

If you agree that protecting the unborn is important, I’d ask you to consider donating to my campaign so I can serve you in Washington by continuing to advocate for the most vulnerable. You can contribute [here](https://saraformissouri.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=84aa3adf8d6ab062aee220759&id=800e61ebd7&e=4df934edcc).

God Bless,
Sara Walsh

name: Sarah Palin
subject: Major Announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt9vq88a5iba6kmjoq873h41vfeknorci3s95hk0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sphm6p32cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s366pob2o31msqm2ohimpj34p1nmoo74tjjcpi3ed1k6aoe0sllmcp72obmc2oefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup32pjge2qr6o3mc9j32c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Friend,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can’t do this without your support.

That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW TO BECOME AN OFFICIAL FOUNDING SUPPORTER.>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdeo5vhqbit76ma0aeddlr98h7cs1km0p2avtj68_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sphm6p32cdh2bs)**

This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I’m running, and YOU will be the reason we win.

_**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgdf3l5sp4s60ekkjvlg0cdhf6m5qkv13j9tqngo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sphm6p32cdh2bs)**_

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn67qo3agp4o044kcl96u7ivqnnf101hak5ceur0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sphm6p32cdh2bs)

At this critical time in our nation’s history, we need leaders who will combat the left’s socialist, big-government, America-last agenda.

This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children’s future, and selling out our nation’s interest to the highest bidder.

I’m in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country.

I just have one simple question for you:

**WILL YOU JOIN ME?**

**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zddim7ubpqu0nlulcang1o3v0m3cstoun3p93b3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sphm6p32cdh2bs)**

Thank you & God Bless America.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z40af8hsm7mp9b19h4isqu5ll5qabenqagj58sk8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sphm6p32cdh2bs)
Sarah Palin

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z93b4l7ab7j7sjbc71o3bakl7eekh30h3vk4dduo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sphm6p32cdh2bs)**

name: Lena Moffitt, Evergreen Action
subject: I saw you hadn't signed yet—this is the last chance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Sign an official public comment in favor of stronger clean air standards!
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-EPA-clean-air-pollution/?utm_source=ema_2022-04-07_EPA_MATS_comment_bump_&source=ema_2022-04-07_EPA_MATS_comment_bump_&t=2&akid=12961%2E53494%2EbPpjIT) Friend, Right now, we have a chance to officially demand stronger clean air standards—but time is running out. [**_Sign an official public comment telling the EPA to restore and strengthen the Mercury and Air Toxics Standards now._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-EPA-clean-air-pollution/?utm_source=ema_2022-04-07_EPA_MATS_comment_bump_&source=ema_2022-04-07_EPA_MATS_comment_bump_&t=3&akid=12961%2E53494%2EbPpjIT) Here's the TL;DR: Trump-era officials gutted a critical EPA clean air standard, and right now the EPA is considering bringing it back. We can weigh in with a public comment and demand that it come back even stronger. **But the window closes this Monday, April 11, and I saw you hadn't signed on yet.[_Will you join over 3,500 other Evergreen supporters and sign an official public comment? (We'll submit it directly to EPA decision-makers on your behalf!)_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-EPA-clean-air-pollution/?utm_source=ema_2022-04-07_EPA_MATS_comment_bump_&source=ema_2022-04-07_EPA_MATS_comment_bump_&t=4&akid=12961%2E53494%2EbPpjIT)** | [SIGN ON](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-EPA-clean-air-pollution/?utm_source=ema_2022-04-07_EPA_MATS_comment_bump_&source=ema_2022-04-07_EPA_MATS_comment_bump_&t=5&akid=12961%2E53494%2EbPpjIT)
---
Restoring this rule is a key part of securing 100% clean power by 2035. It's our road map for achieving President Biden's climate commitments by winning clean power victories across every level of government—and it starts right here, right now with these public comments!
Let's do this,
Lena Moffitt
Chief of Staff, Evergreen Action
\------ Forwarded message ------
From: **Lena Moffitt, Evergreen Action**
Date: Wed, Mar 30, 2022
Subject: Tell the EPA: Clean air is "appropriate and necessary"
_This email marks the start of Evergreen's newest policy push: our**100% Clean Power Campaign.** Together, we'll mobilize support for EPA rules & reforms and win critical victories for our clean energy future.
Interested? [**_Act today to stay in the loop!_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-EPA-clean-air-pollution/?utm_source=ema_2022-04-07_EPA_MATS_comment_bump_&source=ema_2022-04-07_EPA_MATS_comment_bump_&t=6&akid=12961%2E53494%2EbPpjIT)_
---
Friend,
Let's state the obvious: Clean air is **necessary.**
That's why the Environmental Protection Agency was created—to enforce the _Clean Air Act_ and stop polluters. It's the definition of **appropriate** work for the agency.
But in 2020, the Trump administration gutted a key public health standard from the EPA, claiming that it was **not "appropriate or necessary" for the agency to limit toxic air pollution from power plants.**
To put it mildly, we disagree. That's why we're thrilled that the EPA is reconsidering this Trump-era change—and right now, we have a chance to not only bring the rule back, but strengthen it. [**_Will you sign an official public comment today to tell the EPA that clean air is "appropriate and necessary"? (We'll submit it on your behalf directly to EPA decision-makers!)_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-EPA-clean-air-pollution/?utm_source=ema_2022-04-07_EPA_MATS_comment_bump_&source=ema_2022-04-07_EPA_MATS_comment_bump_&t=7&akid=12961%2E53494%2EbPpjIT)
[SIGN A PUBLIC COMMENT](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-EPA-clean-air-pollution/?utm_source=ema_2022-04-07_EPA_MATS_comment_bump_&source=ema_2022-04-07_EPA_MATS_comment_bump_&t=8&akid=12961%2E53494%2EbPpjIT)
---
Coal- and oil-fired power plants are directly harming families across the U.S. by contributing to high rates of asthma, cancer, heart disease, and other health threats—and those hardest hit are children, Indigenous communities, people of color, and low-income communities.
Since 2012, the EPA's Mercury and Air Toxics Standards (MATS) have dramatically reduced the toxic air pollutants linked to these diseases and improved air quality for all Americans, especially these at-risk communities—until the Trump Administration gutted the rule.
[**_Every single one of us deserves clean air. Will you sign an official public comment right now demanding the EPA restore MATS and set even stronger standards to reduce toxic air pollution?_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-EPA-clean-air-pollution/?utm_source=ema_2022-04-07_EPA_MATS_comment_bump_&source=ema_2022-04-07_EPA_MATS_comment_bump_&t=9&akid=12961%2E53494%2EbPpjIT)
[SIGN A PUBLIC COMMENT](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-EPA-clean-air-pollution/?utm_source=ema_2022-04-07_EPA_MATS_comment_bump_&source=ema_2022-04-07_EPA_MATS_comment_bump_&t=10&akid=12961%2E53494%2EbPpjIT)
---
This is an opportunity to directly influence policy and push the EPA to do more to protect our families and communities. We'll submit these public comments straight to EPA decision-makers, so sign yours today and help win clean air for all!
Together,
Lena Moffitt
Chief of Staff, Evergreen Action
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-EPA-clean-air-pollution/?utm_source=ema_2022-04-07_EPA_MATS_comment_bump_&source=ema_2022-04-07_EPA_MATS_comment_bump_&t=11&akid=12961%2E53494%2EbPpjIT)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=12961%2E53494%2EbPpjIT). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---
All content © 2022 EVERGREEN ACTION, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/287?t=1&akid=12961%2E53494%2EbPpjIT)

name: Victoria Virasingh
subject: Climate Crisis is a Health Crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Victoria for Congress
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_LOGO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_LOGO] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Today is World Health Day. This year, the World Health Organization highlights the urgent needs to keep people and the planet healthy. “Our Planet, Our Health” reimagines a world where clean air, water, and food are available to all, and where economies are focused on health and well-being.
As the pandemic continues and the world faces a climate crisis, WHO estimates there are more than 13 million deaths around the world caused by avoidable environmental threats. From lung cancer resulting from breathing unhealthy air caused by burning of fossil fuels, to water scarcity, extreme weather patterns and so much more.
The climate crisis is accelerating. If we want to preserve our communities and ensure a safe world with clean air and water for the next generation, we need urgent, bold action. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=healthday]
We have to put our money where our mouth is, and start passing and complying with climate legislation that works if we want a healthier tomorrow. The state of our planet and our health depends on it.
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Your support means everything. Thank you!
Victoria

clean_body: [] [] [] Today is World Health Day. This year, the World Health Organization highlights the urgent needs to keep people and the planet healthy. “Our Planet, Our Health” reimagines a world where clean air, water, and food are available to all, and where economies are focused on health and well-being. As the pandemic continues and the world faces a climate crisis, WHO estimates there are more than 13 million deaths around the world caused by avoidable environmental threats. From lung cancer resulting from breathing unhealthy air caused by burning of fossil fuels, to water scarcity, extreme weather patterns and so much more. The climate crisis is accelerating. If we want to preserve our communities and ensure a safe world with clean air and water for the next generation, we need urgent, bold action. [] We have to put our money where our mouth is, and start passing and complying with climate legislation that works if we want a healthier tomorrow. The state of our planet and our health depends on it. Peter, It's wild to think that the first quarter has come and gone! Pretty soon our primary will be upon us, **May 17th** , so as you might imagine we're hitting the pavement hard out here in beautiful state of Oregon identifying and talking to as many voters as possible.

My newsletter goes more in depth as to what we've been up to; as such, please take a few moments to read our second newsletter of the 2022 cycle!

| [**Read My April Newsletter** **› › **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=195baf5faa7b487d89b72e1eb8a9a3dd&_e=Qn2QzCXQnWx8rgbDOEyOsAByIXY5ZxZdxeTgW0EcHzZGwrmhgh54crr90O6DQY6F4Cbk41xKdBLxjn1wg_VOOK7w6BdVNvyfv-6qGtJbHRQAhIRrYnXCXyYmJia5WPEcEzeqorqUzqrBNQMzGQPzSEFmrRS_lWk3Kt-gUrYk-j6PN4J9veW4M72WYWosnj8WYo79_a7jn21zb6C7b9TzsoA6qZX_1JWpLG1mDvCq02jWSzb9AglaSdXRA5HHFE-mXj1DjqFkhQ7-QdjBAnxQiKykqHnq6ZeAHJasUMkl8m0kbXUiaIsmFjz-OqDgQOkvGs1ENYGAKp5ndZZG_aM5Rv_LyyHK7rb4Qsyv8ToT1gY%3D)

name: Sarah Palin
subject: I announced my candidacy for the U.S House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhp8ujv4j3901b9hnf2tp72dlthmj3j9a8ge58c8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sphmeo34cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf9o5k6orm4stkmtim9d71meqrdcj5mspmbcjieoob8opimmor8tdk65rm5dtieurt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8omcs3gmmqjfdj1coon1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Friend,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can’t do this without your support.

That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW TO BECOME AN OFFICIAL FOUNDING SUPPORTER.>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zneof86eefffgoveht0oah1avjtcb68v85au638g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sphmeo34cth2bs)**

This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I’m running, and YOU will be the reason we win.

_**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7v5lv4ponc6innrtr5shhaqgugbvu87qvnropu8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sphmeo34cth2bs)**_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zutspgk5g0ds5v78e7gqr1vg4h74poe1jieqq9uo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sphmeo34cth2bs)

At this critical time in our nation’s history, we need leaders who will combat the left’s socialist, big-government, America-last agenda.

This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children’s future, and selling out our nation’s interest to the highest bidder.

I’m in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country.

I just have one simple question for you:

**WILL YOU JOIN ME?**

**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9s7bogtmfr23isg5qe0u1pfr700etvh4p76osd0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sphmeo34cth2bs)**

Thank you & God Bless America.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3888frl0aqnaap3q56b6r7v29abf6b89jetef20_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sphmeo34cth2bs)
Sarah Palin

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6p648oc22q70svfa5vl0bl8n9fat7tl7hbnrs2g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sphmeo34cth2bs)**

---

P.O. BOX 871235 WASILLA, AK 99687

name: BREAKING SCOTUS UPDATE [via Voter Protection Project]
subject: Sen. Mitt Romney SAVES Judge Jackson’s confirmation!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
we’re feeling so thankful:
| _To make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8073?t=1&akid=1748%2E878179%2EW1r8Hq)._
---
Listen, we're feeling so thankful... _here 's why:_ [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8398?t=7&akid=1748%2E878179%2EW1r8Hq) **Sen. Mitt Romney 's groundbreaking pledge to support Judge Jackson could single-handedly SAVE her nomination. _YES!!!_**

So we're gathering _1000 Democrats_ to sign our massive letter THANKING Sen. Romney for stepping up and voting to CONFIRM Judge Jackson to the Supreme Court!

[**We 're sending our letter to Romney's office at 9 AM tomorrow - so we need you to sign IMMEDIATELY. Donate to sign our letter and thank Sen. Romney for supporting Judge Jackson! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8398?t=8&akid=1748%2E878179%2EW1r8Hq) | [_DONATE $1 TO SIGN THE LETTER & THANK MITT ROMNEY »_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8398?t=9&akid=1748%2E878179%2EW1r8Hq)
---
_Dear Senator Romney,_

**Thank you.** The entire nation is talking about you - because you've made a HISTORIC decision:

**You 're doing what's right and pledging to confirm Judge Jackson.** With your help, we'll SAVE the Supreme Court from Trump's far-right Justices!

I know it wasn't an easy decision for you to go against your party and support the confirmation of a liberal Justice. [So I'm signing this letter to thank you and donating to Voter Protection Project to help them confirm Judge Jackson »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8398?t=10&akid=1748%2E878179%2EW1r8Hq) | [_DONATE $1 TO SIGN THE LETTER & THANK MITT ROMNEY »_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8398?t=11&akid=1748%2E878179%2EW1r8Hq)
---
Senator, I'll be honest: I am surprised by your decision.

Even though Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson is the MOST qualified Supreme Court nominee in recent history - _you could have easily blocked her nomination._

**The majority of your party are threatening to DESTROY Judge Jackson 's confirmation.**

While I don't always agree with you, I have to thank you for doing what is right.
[So I'm signing this letter to THANK YOU and pitching in $1 to VPP to help them confirm Judge Jackson. »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8398?t=12&akid=1748%2E878179%2EW1r8Hq)
[_DONATE $1 TO SIGN THE LETTER & THANK MITT ROMNEY »_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8398?t=13&akid=1748%2E878179%2EW1r8Hq)
---
Thank you for doing the right thing.

Sincerely,

**__x A Thankful Democrat__**
[_DONATE $1 TO SIGN THE LETTER & THANK MITT ROMNEY »_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8398?t=14&akid=1748%2E878179%2EW1r8Hq)

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1748%2E878179%2EW1r8Hq). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1748%2E878179%2EW1r8Hq).**

body:
Voting rights are under attack in North Carolina and across the country. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43893385/339167906/823540626?refcode=ea.987f6129-bcb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.987f6129-bcb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODdmNjEyOS1iY2I2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2sQjBTb-h_QHJeTbfu8zpjEeQ3uvG1bmlBaeaQkkc0=&emci=ae429022-bcb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=987f6129-bcb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
Peter, Despite the founding promise of our nation — that ours would be a government by and for the people — Americans have _always_ had to fight to secure our right to vote and be heard in our democracy. **Now, the right to vote is once again under attack.** Republican-controlled state legislatures, including here in North Carolina, have passed measures specifically designed to make it harder for some folks to cast a ballot. Meanwhile, their ultra-partisan gerrymandering tactics are designed to ensure that some folks’ votes matter more than others. We can’t stand for it, Peter, not after coming so far. **[If you're with Roy in the fight for voting rights, sign on to support national Democrats' efforts to protect and expand access to the ballot box>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43893386/339167907/-1069600883?refcode=ea.987f6129-bcb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.987f6129-bcb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODdmNjEyOS1iY2I2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2sQjBTb-h_QHJeTbfu8zpjEeQ3uvG1bmlBaeaQkkc0=&emci=ae429022-bcb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=987f6129-bcb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43893387/339167908/-1069600883?refcode=ea.987f6129-bcb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.987f6129-bcb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODdmNjEyOS1iY2I2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2sQjBTb-h_QHJeTbfu8zpjEeQ3uvG1bmlBaeaQkkc0=&emci=ae429022-bcb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=987f6129-bcb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)

Radical Republicans have one simple goal: to remain in power no matter the cost, by any means necessary. They’ve found that partisan gerrymandering and anti-voter legislation is a winning strategy. And disturbingly, they’ve proven that they may not respect the results of elections they _don’t_ win.
If Democrats are to have a fair shot in elections to come, we have to ensure that every last voter is able to have their voice heard at the ballot box.

name: Alek
subject: Six years ago, the good guys won.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
I stopped a terrorist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. I stopped a terrorist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ffd8afe01fa44687bce1e2bd17f97c6f&_e=jFYF8ayiYrllJ3lwFYGffKP-50e14b6TlfDChJVt0-iEnAuBwpl1wnSQadrMwhLrctNgMrHvq4KGGGGdMPBrET8Z7ytJgupM-BSztPIy10GV_1Cn0ST1y62NScnZYHp5p41-jHlDdTlLga2W1dOl0OGDuItMtDVBcwAIY8qnemTNt94c5017u55VHetB3r2q5gEP7u5mQT1v51YePCDrH1unnY-DXS27rEHfb5DLk6xHkYOyGwjfYKAR3JVZtQKshjfGDGlBMxmfbiMp6Qnw04UhMt3s1UGpi8ywsSbRD3rOITjTwLuxRPbc2agTGBwdBMCcYO2h8018lLsJTr8XtI_xUME7CptT6MDyvLPV_HCNfIxXvbqonI6u9PjGr1OvXnSTWL2BjpdX-oneMZ8vm8YwpN7ADVex_vOthvaRuTQneVvm0QPGc5RypQ4PA0wcNzxcQ5uQ2APiIXAQjW5MYnPAKr56USfyc_KqmHEzQN8%3D)
---
Peter,

Like so many Americans, I watched the scenes of Afghanistan's fall with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st 2021 marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

**I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe**. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Peter - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $3 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ffd8afe01fa44687bce1e2bd17f97c6f&_e=jFYF8ayiYrllJ3lwFYGffKP-50e14b6TlfDChJVt0-iEnAuBwpl1wnSQadrMwhLrctNgMrHvq4KGGGGdMPBrET8Z7ytJgupM-BSztPIy10GV_1Cn0ST1y62NScnZYHp5p41-jHlDdTlLga2W1dOl0OGDuItMtDVBcwAIY8qnemTNt94c5017u55VHetB3r2q5gEP7u5mQT1v51YePCDrH1unnY-DXS27rEHfb5DLk6xHkYOyGwjfYKAR3JVZtQKshjfGDGlBMxmfbiMp6Qnw0470WEFj4nM8dibRGnWYenqwg_s_LKYPOiNr1EiSsZDeHmq55LeHw4XPQz2egOL6GTKUFqVlBP-KCPHMgbiWbF4lFKbJIhffgawoUxfVz_Btzoyw9ZiLAdz61CcXZ4d4ZK4gTD0vuZ97Eey2aUfOCdkMxh3b9ZxjVN_0KV9SSvNYxDRUIbiNI5_k9t5nyBP7ZFJOsVyBLdA7qFOG2heY_Rc%3D)

[**DONATE $3 TODAY -> **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ffd8afe01fa44687bce1e2bd17f97c6f&_e=jFYF8ayiYrllJ3lwFYGffKP-50e14b6TlfDChJVt0-iEnAuBwpl1wnSQadrMwhLrctNgMrHvq4KGGGGdMPBrET8Z7ytJgupM-BSztPIy10GV_1Cn0ST1y62NScnZYHp5p41-jHlDdTlLga2W1dOl0OGDuItMtDVBcwAIY8qnemTNt94c5017u55VHetB3r2q5gEP7u5mQT1v51YePCDrH1unnY-DXS27rEHfb5DLk6xHkYOyGwjfYKAR3JVZtQKshjfGDGlBMxmfbiMp6Qnw0y1oYAkz_blgq-93aYBpYHXzpRT93MorEeuM-JshJlsUT-FXjDzxUm07gOcCHF8l3LHSE-FZBfBoTWD4QHoxPALOkOK90X7g94R2Lj1c5ptay7DpJydc9wTF_wh1IlPUHSeDwKKttDvN1PGkl3KEo0TeN4F9GDqRDUcQsQDDaS4N9uJXMhppkrKEwcFguDz-SZvi7Vmn50CxBvglbdgMHeo%3D)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Peter and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. clean_body: I stopped a terrorist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. I stopped a terrorist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, Like so many Americans, I watched the scenes of Afghanistan's fall with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes... August 21 st 2021 marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever. I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all. As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist. This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Peter - I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values. Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream. Right now, Democrats are... Opening and destroying our borders. They are granting dangerous amnesty that will flood every corner of America. Raising our taxes like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable. Defunding the police, leading to a surge in violent crime Erasing historical figures from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln Teetering on the edge of a dangerous foreign policy crisis These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. They only care about their own radical agenda. The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. We need a fighter in Congress, Peter and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.** My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. Thank you very much, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. subject: Bill McSwain: Josh Shapiro feels entitled to Pennsylvanian's paychecks
body:
Josh Shapiro supports sky-high taxes, views Pennsylvania families as the government's ATM. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/bill-mcswain-josh-shapiro-feels-entitled-to-pennsylvanians-paychecks?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| **PRESS RELEASE
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**April 7, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# Bill McSwain: Josh Shapiro feels entitled to Pennsylvanian's paychecks

_Josh Shapiro supports sky-high taxes, views Pennsylvania families as the government's ATM _
**West Chester, Pa.** \-- Bill McSwain on Wednesday [announced](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=7d2ebfad4f&e=b1ec95759b) his plan to permanently cut the PA state gas tax in half as Governor, a plan which Josh Shapiro [called](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=0d739001c9&e=b1ec95759b) 'reckless and irresponsible'. McSwain had this to say in reply:
---
|
> **_"The hard-working families of Pennsylvania are struggling under the highest gas tax in the nation, which is an unacceptable burden imposed by career politicians and a bloated, wasteful state government.
>
> Josh Shapiro has called cutting the gas tax 'reckless and irresponsible'. That's because he has never met a tax he didn't like.
>
> Josh Shapiro supports a sky-high gas tax that forces Pennsylvanians to choose between paying for groceries or paying for gas, unconcerned with the welfare of those he hopes to represent. Just as he supported the crippling lockdowns and closures of the Wolf administration during COVID, Shapiro has proven that he will always prioritize government authority over individual liberty. If given the chance, he will unapologetically enact policies that rob Pennsylvanians of their hard-earned money." _**
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **
Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as U.S. Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=479c294916&e=b1ec95759b)
###
