clean_body: We must send a strong message to the Senate. | = | Peter, I wanted to make sure you got a chance to sign my petition urging the Senate to swiftly pass the Affordable Insulin Now Act, which would cap the out-of-pocket monthly cost of insulin at $35. We must send a strong message to the Senate that this life-changing legislation has massive grassroots support. | Thanks so much, Susan | | SIGN NOW: Tell the Senate to swiftly pass the Affordable Insulin Now Act | Peter, Last week, the House passed the historic Affordable Insulin Now Act. I was proud to vote in favor of this legislation, which would cap the monthly out-of-pocket cost of insulin at $35. This would be life-changing, and in many cases literally lifesaving, to so many people here in the district and across the country. But the fight isn’t over: this bill must pass through the Senate before it becomes law. | Honored to have you on our team, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. name: Katy Personette
subject: We’re at risk of getting doxxed.

body:
I have had to learn a new skill set: cybersecurity.
I have had to learn a new skill set: cybersecurity.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43884986/339128646/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220407Foundations_VR_KP_90DO_4_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3MWI3NjhkLTljYjYtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nmUaDeM_F8XhLi0A3jSI7LVwwX_XmIDp45nA7gUgfs4=)
Fellow Activist,
As the New Pennsylvania Project’s director of development and policy, I have had to learn a new skill set: cybersecurity. Right now, our organization is at high risk of being doxxed and put in danger solely because of our mission – expanding the electorate to ensure often-neglected communities of color, immigrant communities, and the youth are included in our democracy and heard at the polls.

It’s a scary time right now for an organization like ours. 2022 is a critical year for Pennsylvania, but there are special interest groups who are not in line with our values and want to disrupt our work. Not only do organizations like ours have a target on our backs, but sometimes so do the foundations and funders who support us. They are being scrutinized by the same special interest groups. This can tighten the money that those funders distribute. Because of that, we are relying on you.

In the past few years, turnout for voters of color has been at its highest point— showing up to the polls against all odds and all barriers. We deserve free and fair elections that make it easier – not harder – for Black, brown, and young voters to cast their ballots.
Now more than ever, we rely on grassroots support like yours because of the current climate we are in. **[So, will you please give $10 today to show your support for our mission to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43884992/339128652/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220407Foundations_VR_KP_90DO_4_G_N_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3MWI3NjhkLTljYjYtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nmUaDeM_F8XhLi0A3jSI7LVwwX_XmIDp45nA7gUgfs4=)**

_The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. We will register them to vote, provide education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize people to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : PRIMARY: May 17, 2022 GENERAL: November 8, 2022 || || || New Pennsylvania Project 717 Market Street #295 Lemoyne, PA 17043 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Donald Trump, Madison Cawthorn and Ted Budd are rallying far-right voters in North Carolina on Saturday
body:
Derek,
Donald Trump is coming to North Carolina on Saturday to hold a rally for Ted Budd — his hand-picked candidate in this Senate race.
That’s not all. They just announced that Madison Cawthorn will be joining them on stage as well.
Ted’s campaign is flailing. Trump, Ted Budd’s super PAC, and multiple GOP insiders have all said as much to reporters. So this is a clear effort to prop up his campaign, fire up the far-right base, and pretend that their brand of divisive politics is what the people of North Carolina want.
So we have to be prepared for anything. Trump may be coming to North Carolina and may even attack our campaign. Ted Budd may have his super PACs spending $14 million dollars to buy this seat.
The good news is we have each other, and if we are in this together, we will be ready for anything they throw our way.
Can you please split a donation of $25 or more between my campaign and CommonGood before Donald Trump gets here for his rally with Ted Budd and Madison Cawthorn? Every dollar will help us flip this seat and expand the Senate majority for Democrats. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_cb?refcode=20220407_CGVA_CB]

I believe that we can win by uniting the people and focusing on the real issues people care about — like health care, climate change, voting rights, an economy that works for everyone, and rising costs. That’s exactly what our campaign will do with your support.
Thank you for your support,
Cheri Beasley

name: Daniel Wasta
subject: The GOP just won't quit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
They’re scared because they know that she can beat him. And they should be.
| | |
---
Hi Peter,
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43894198/339172026/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk913-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzM4ODZjNS1iZWI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LForVORzCr7DG85-lMgxMGX9AnMcRhF3XAF7ih-lG4=)
It’s Abby’s husband, Daniel. I wanted to give you an update on Abby and her campaign after the vicious attacks they experienced this week. **Just last week, Republican elites launched an orchestrated attack to have her removed from the ballot.**
They lost their challenge, but they just won't quit. Now they're appealing that decision. Thanks to supporters like you, our campaign was ready to take on this fight and came out on top. **[Can you rush $5 now to show the GOP just how strong we are and help defend this campaign from further attacks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43894199/339172027/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk913-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzM4ODZjNS1iZWI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LForVORzCr7DG85-lMgxMGX9AnMcRhF3XAF7ih-lG4=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43894200/339172028/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk913-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzM4ODZjNS1iZWI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LForVORzCr7DG85-lMgxMGX9AnMcRhF3XAF7ih-lG4=)
---
Truth is, they’re scared: scared to have a 33-year-old woman running against an 88-year-old man (who both Republicans and Democrats can agree has spent too damn long on Capitol Hill).

**They’re scared because they’ve seen what she can do**. In 2018, she became the youngest woman EVER to flip a congressional seat from red to blue and she fought every day in the U.S. House for Iowa’s working families.
**They’re scared because they know that she can beat him.** And they should be scared. Abby’s the strongest person I know. In 2020, she faced countless attacks from D.C. Republicans who were willing to lie and say anything to defeat her reelection campaign.
It was disheartening. They spewed lie after lie about her – and they won. **But instead of giving up, instead of backing down, Abby stood up for Iowans and decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **This week has been a tough one for our family. It was hard to see Republican elites launch these attacks at her yet AGAIN and to know that they’ll keep coming for her again and again and again.
[**We need to be prepared. The GOP has a $41 million war chest ready that they're ready to use to intimidate candidates like Abby – can you donate $5 now to raise another 1,784 donations and make sure we’re prepared?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43894201/339172029/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk913-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzM4ODZjNS1iZWI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-LForVORzCr7DG85-lMgxMGX9AnMcRhF3XAF7ih-lG4=)

clean_body: They’re scared because they know that she can beat him. And they should be. | | | Hi Peter, = It’s Abby’s husband, Daniel. I wanted to give you an update on Abby and her campaign after the vicious attacks they experienced this week. Just last week, Republican elites launched an orchestrated attack to have her removed from the ballot. They lost their challenge, but they just won't quit. Now they're appealing that decision. Thanks to supporters like you, our campaign was ready to take on this fight and came out on top. = | | = Truth is, they’re scared: scared to have a 33-year-old woman running against an 88-year-old man (who both Republicans and Democrats can agree has spent too damn long on Capitol Hill). They’re scared because they’ve seen what she can do. In 2018, she became the youngest woman EVER to flip a congressional seat from red to blue and she fought every day in the U.S. House for Iowa’s working families. They’re scared because they know that she can beat him. And they should be scared. Abby’s the strongest person I know. In 2020, she faced countless attacks from D.C. Republicans who were willing to lie and say anything to defeat her reelection campaign. It was disheartening. They spewed lie after lie about her – and they won. But instead of giving up, instead of backing down, Abby stood up for Iowans and decided to run for the U.S. Senate. This week has been a tough one for our family. It was hard to see Republican elites launch these attacks at her yet AGAIN and to know that they’ll keep coming for her again and again and again. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Our family appreciates your support – now let’s go and win this. \- Daniel | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:
Ketanji Brown Jackson is making history!

|
---
Peter — History was made today in the United States, and true to his word, President Joe Biden fulfilled yet another campaign promise. **Ketanji Brown Jackson was confirmed to the United States Supreme Court moments ago by the U.S. Senate.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43885677/339131260/405560545?refcode=idp-em-220407-scotus&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTc2MDc3Zi05ZGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_kFTm2Ft-skX0trh5HgEKvlghPzwHC8k_3_YHlFoL5k=) Justice Jackson was chosen after the President underwent a thorough and rigorous process to name a qualified nominee with strong experience, character, integrity, and dedication to the Constitution and the rule of law. President Biden knew nominating a Supreme Court Justice is one of the most serious decisions any president makes, and Justice Jackson showed incredible grace, depth and knowledge of the country’s legal system, and demonstrated excellent poise and temperament during what was an ugly partisan smear campaign – _characteristics all required to serve on the nation’s highest court._ **Unfortunately, Indiana’s U.S. Senators let their partisanship come before American history.** Despite meeting the pre-requisite standards, Mike Braun and Todd Young repeatedly shifted the goalposts surrounding Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination as part of their political performance to prove their loyalty to their party rather than fulfilling their constitutionally required duties. name: Rushern Baker
subject: a plague of violence
body:
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

Friend,
Yesterday this campaign held a press conference because we are in a crisis. Violent crime plagues our communities and we have to address it. On March 25 th a young Black man, Daquan Dockery, was murdered and two 16 year-old boys were arrested as suspects. Last Sunday, a 12 year-old girl was shot in the back in an apartment complex in Camp Spring. These are our children.
This past year, Prince George’s County recorded over 130 homicides and 394 carjackings.
This isn’t our destiny. This isn’t fate. We can take on the root causes of crime and see results. We’ve done it before and we must do it again.
In 2011 when I took office as County Executive, there were 13 murders in 13 days. We were in the midst of the great recession. We had to do something, and knew we weren’t going to be able to arrest ourselves out of the problem.
We brought our government together and partnered with the community to create the Transforming Neighborhoods Initiative (TNI). Eight years later, our administration achieved a 50% reduction in violent crime and Prince George’s County led the State in job creation.
Yesterday, we proposed a Transforming Maryland Initiative (TMI), patterned after the successful Transforming Neighborhoods Initiative that I launched during my tenure as County Executive. TMI would identify zones in each jurisdiction in the State based on similar criteria that was used for TNI, with some minor updates, such as incorporating median net worth and other factors that relate more to inequity and disparities.
To learn more, click here to be redirected to our website. [https://www.rushernbaker.com/]
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
If you elect me and Nancy, that’s the kind of leadership you can expect. We won’t hide from the real problems, we’ll take them head on. [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Thank you,
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Rushern L. Baker, III
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
**P.S. because of Maryland’s Public Finance program, your donation will be eligible for a matching program explained here [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
By Authority, Baker and Navarro for Maryland, Calvin Brown, Treasurer
Baker & Navarro for Maryland
9646 Marlboro Pike
Upper Marlboro , MD 20772
United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Shawn=20Hyland?=
subject: ICYMI: The end game of campaigning is to govern
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us5.campaign-archive.com/?e=5167ed8367&u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=f308da15b3)
---
| | | | | | _Peter,_ Politics is the art and strategy of winning an election, just as there is an art and strategy to winning a football game. It takes physical and mental endurance to stand up to opponents. It’s not for the weak or the faint of heart. Though football is rough, and injuries occur, there are regulations and rules that must be followed for fair competition. If a player was to violate a rule intentionally or mistakenly, officials will enforce a penalty.But who throws a flag in campaign activities? The Federal Elections Commission regulates campaign financing, but they do not settle disputes regarding underhanded tactics that deliberately deceive voters. I sense today there are voices on the hard Left and Right that manipulate people with anger, fear, and lies.Good candidates who faithfully want to represent the people they are called to serve are urged to abandon their principles for pragmatic voter turnout efforts. The end justifies the means. Victory at all costs, including distorting the facts for personal ambition and gain.I believe this catabolic toxic energy weakens our political debate and strains the moral fabric that holds our union together. Polarizing hype in our political discourse makes legislators hesitant to legislate. They want to avoid unfair criticisms to common good solutions. **America suffers in the process.** Remember, the end game of campaigning is to govern. Political parties want wins, but people want results. Concrete policy positions must be stated on a campaign website to inform the voter how the candidate will approach the issue. But an openness to discuss nuanced complexed issues should not be perceived as a sign of weak and ineffective leadership.In other words, you can fully support and fund law enforcement while reforming our policing and justice system. You can secure the border to stop the flow of illegal immigration while sensibly finding solutions to undocumented families and workers in this country. You can immediately return America to energy independence while investing in cleaner renewable sources over the next 20-30 years. You can teach students to be kind, respectful and have a fuller understanding of our nation’s history, without indoctrinating them with radical gender and divisive racial ideology.**We need a clear positive vision for this country rooted in our conservative values.** Victory without that vision may produce a 51% majority on election day, but a 40% approval rating months later. I reject the idea that our political discourse must be driven by passion over reason. James Madison warned us that uncivil times and men would damage our enduring hope of freedom. **I believe the evidence that conservative policies benefit our nation should be persuasive enough to win over voters.**
---

Shawn Hyland|

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | Peter, Politics is the art and strategy of winning an election, just as there is an art and strategy to winning a football game. It takes physical and mental endurance to stand up to opponents. It’s not for the weak or the faint of heart. Though football is rough, and injuries occur, there are regulations and rules that must be followed for fair competition. If a player was to violate a rule intentionally or mistakenly, officials will enforce a penalty.But who throws a flag in campaign activities? The Federal Elections Commission regulates campaign financing, but they do not settle disputes regarding underhanded tactics that deliberately deceive voters. I sense today there are voices on the hard Left and Right that manipulate people with anger, fear, and lies.Good candidates who faithfully want to represent the people they are called to serve are urged to abandon their principles for pragmatic voter turnout efforts. The end justifies the means. Victory at all costs, including distorting the facts for personal ambition and gain.I believe this catabolic toxic energy weakens our political debate and strains the moral fabric that holds our union together. Polarizing hype in our political discourse makes legislators hesitant to legislate. They want to avoid unfair criticisms to common good solutions. America suffers in the process. Remember, the end game of campaigning is to govern. Political parties want wins, but people want results. Concrete policy positions must be stated on a campaign website to inform the voter how the candidate will approach the issue. But an openness to discuss nuanced complexed issues should not be perceived as a sign of weak and ineffective leadership.In other words, you can fully support and fund law enforcement while reforming our policing and justice system. You can secure the border to stop the flow of illegal immigration while sensibly finding solutions to undocumented families and workers in this country. You can immediately return America to energy independence while investing in cleaner renewable sources over the next 20-30 years. You can teach students to be kind, respectful and have a fuller understanding of our nation’s history, without indoctrinating them with radical gender and divisive racial ideology.We need a clear positive vision for this country rooted in our conservative values. Victory without that vision may produce a 51% majority on election day, but a 40% approval rating months later. I reject the idea that our political discourse must be driven by passion over reason. James Madison warned us that uncivil times and men would damage our enduring hope of freedom. I believe the evidence that conservative policies benefit our nation should be persuasive enough to win over voters. | | | | | | | Working for a Better America, Shawn Hyland| | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2022 ShawnHyland.com. All rights reserved.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: POLL: Will you personally endorse me for reelection?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
I've come to the decision that as it pertains to the next chapter in my public service, the best move is no move at all. I'm running for reelection an It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=41c5f47b454c428ca94a8d2a336acfa0&_e=lwEeD8939FD5k_ERQbyl5xIjgvwmG9SI1pzrrK_FcVI0rAUOIOIW4F6nfG6COgQL2CqqqqQTpXO6VlSb4eroImNjLTukOape2okYQfmmFL-Q4_RkJUCcnuw-eO8U8MdaFcAVFSKFj6_tGOqWAaUTmCs_NVt8bcc_ARtdpKA1ee_yp5AaTGqCX6JPKwLg9k19ap7-AMZhTqrEAXHPwXnpsBqUxRYHyltOPWHRVzwz-vvzTKXZ2pEMrBAFEKNpl72IF1ByVftbFY15z_Kf1s-eMd4SpegtTE3ote6dZGE7-YV-SkMkcV3srkE8Gi7LqGdLDdf7QcmKCDhDWc8jG2NrEyiga-oc384RUA7UWzX39WlmkVL0GWat-7ACpmpd2uR1nsVMGC_Ffzm3V3xeN-AB6fJMZQN1vrgps_S4ujQOe4nuLD9mLKURXUaZBB0YpNzRuXRdlfaEU6swJ05PYsizi8ovDdFXHiQODRnefMWWBeo%3D)
---

Peter,

I’ve been fighting for you and for the truth since I first was elected to Congress in November 2006. Since then, the voters of Ohio’s 4th Congressional District have continued to put their faith in me and have sent me back for two-year stints ever since.

I have never - and will never - take a single vote for granted. I will continue to work hard for every single vote; I’ve watched a lot of people lose their jobs because they forget who they report to; the American people.

**I will never take the position I currently hold for granted**.

For as long as the folks I represent continue putting their faith in me, **I’ll keep fighting every single day to make America a better version of itself.**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=41c5f47b454c428ca94a8d2a336acfa0&_e=lwEeD8939FD5k_ERQbyl5xIjgvwmG9SI1pzrrK_FcVI0rAUOIOIW4F6nfG6COgQL2CqqqqQTpXO6VlSb4eroImNjLTukOape2okYQfmmFL-Q4_RkJUCcnuw-eO8U8MdaFcAVFSKFj6_tGOqWAaUTmCs_NVt8bcc_ARtdpKA1ee_yp5AaTGqCX6JPKwLg9k19ap7-AMZhTqrEAXHPwXnpsBqUxRYHyltOPWHRVzwz-vvzTKXZ2pEMrBAFEKNpl72IF1ByVftbFY15z_Kf1s-eMdO6C--89fRH3E_yldDvPm1afqviEtWKeiU4kA15RpEkcmzI_W4ggj03ZnOlW88PJRpvUuop9zYXNHNqPbrQ2QpfgPRSANnEI2wfnpRoVJoK3JJmtE__7EoRkr2gzUTOTm8-54f3X5hReVVaoIRctVl6UiEbDPdpKqcRiFTm-UAhQ2kav7f2IAt9YuvNJ7h3UG1cm3bA27W2D5c2uLJK4u0%3D)
I’ll work to hold the mainstream media accountable.
I’ll work to make sure you have all of the information YOU need when you go vote.

I’ll work to make sure Democrats in positions of power are held accountable for their lies to the American people; NO Representative should be out for personal gain when serving the American people in an ELECTED office.

But first, I have to win reelection. **[My primary on May 3rd is fast approaching and today I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll endorse me for re-election](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=41c5f47b454c428ca94a8d2a336acfa0&_e=lwEeD8939FD5k_ERQbyl5xIjgvwmG9SI1pzrrK_FcVI0rAUOIOIW4F6nfG6COgQL2CqqqqQTpXO6VlSb4eroImNjLTukOape2okYQfmmFL-Q4_RkJUCcnuw-eO8U8MdaFcAVFSKFj6_tGOqWAaUTmCs_NVt8bcc_ARtdpKA1ee_yp5AaTGqCX6JPKwLg9k19ap7-AMZhTqrEAXHPwXnpsBqUxRYHyltOPWHRVzwz-vvzTKXZ2pEMrBAFEKNpl72IF1ByVftbFY15z_Kf1s-eMeni2VxftwLza_DE8vfqq6fK2M6MHn0d192xN6qMKLayN08otFnJpvNltgL0x5GFxE2ysC_kgxpVUTqTvOMdylFMtmtgim5qJs1LBTXNa_gI77UKljtJyEpvx5g9t-WD_Prdwc2BQdOt-uI-76wOyPboXsW_6E0_x4jTOI6JZjbCucZd_91uopUTTY1JHg6lXbNjnTygkcT4HLERKAtZy0U%3D)**.

I’ll only be able to continue fighting on your behalf for as long as I’m in Congress, **[which is why I’m asking for your support today.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=41c5f47b454c428ca94a8d2a336acfa0&_e=lwEeD8939FD5k_ERQbyl5xIjgvwmG9SI1pzrrK_FcVI0rAUOIOIW4F6nfG6COgQL2CqqqqQTpXO6VlSb4eroImNjLTukOape2okYQfmmFL-Q4_RkJUCcnuw-eO8U8MdaFcAVFSKFj6_tGOqWAaUTmCs_NVt8bcc_ARtdpKA1ee_yp5AaTGqCX6JPKwLg9k19ap7-AMZhTqrEAXHPwXnpsBqUxRYHyltOPWHRVzwz-vvzTKXZ2pEMrBAFEKNpl72IF1ByVftbFY15z_Kf1s-eMSAtyhUPdlfcTb5VOaJQPzCTbeIOniKeyFjugQNjXtZh6pqtqcFjpg0b79lovo69LpNzwBPBY17qcqCMUlGATOAErcD0MAnJ20LLr_0CCtEF72OxOW57i2PXwKuhuCXEL0TC-EuXPQjMMOcfHY5PLx3A1ZJf1neveWERaUwlJ7qZ4yRACi_uhb3pgQHWZ2s6916npekhO7keysElvan-8LU%3D)** It’s imperative we have strong conservative voices who are willing to speak up for the truth. I assure you that I’m worthy of your support and **[I hope you’ll offer your endorsement of my candidacy today](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=41c5f47b454c428ca94a8d2a336acfa0&_e=lwEeD8939FD5k_ERQbyl5xIjgvwmG9SI1pzrrK_FcVI0rAUOIOIW4F6nfG6COgQL2CqqqqQTpXO6VlSb4eroImNjLTukOape2okYQfmmFL-Q4_RkJUCcnuw-eO8U8MdaFcAVFSKFj6_tGOqWAaUTmCs_NVt8bcc_ARtdpKA1ee_yp5AaTGqCX6JPKwLg9k19ap7-AMZhTqrEAXHPwXnpsBqUxRYHyltOPWHRVzwz-vvzTKXZ2pEMrBAFEKNpl72IF1ByVftbFY15z_Kf1s-eMeSqYJEsky9dPe9fb3kbFl2klCT7_lhgOV4wmVePNFYvvjGyIk_4k5iGy6DFgMiBtlLn7knd_rh9qf_JrkSB-QN3I6eJChgj3qRjrjLpTITUhb6Xqa5sko0w6P1XlSEW19zByCwUUTesYt__kyiNUtQN4sDOekhzQxETO-za14uQJlDJiHfsRwsG0Q5LJoDTrHT8Jzz9qJA5EZrzf7tYA3U%3D)**.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=41c5f47b454c428ca94a8d2a336acfa0&_e=lwEeD8939FD5k_ERQbyl5xIjgvwmG9SI1pzrrK_FcVI0rAUOIOIW4F6nfG6COgQL2CqqqqQTpXO6VlSb4eroImNjLTukOape2okYQfmmFL-Q4_RkJUCcnuw-eO8U8MdaFcAVFSKFj6_tGOqWAaUTmCs_NVt8bcc_ARtdpKA1ee_yp5AaTGqCX6JPKwLg9k19ap7-AMZhTqrEAXHPwXnpsBqUxRYHyltOPWHRVzwz-vvzTKXZ2pEMrBAFEKNpl72IF1ByVftbFY15z_Kf1s-eMS8EuYm3L4tMpD3qtbSw4yGzJoCMk5MmNQs6_DIQTb9thA37iMA9KXgpd1368verx4tsOSZW_Wot0yGKti9Sv340lQQo68_tyFhd9I9RF0AmdXU7i95jxoaKUsC_-_JcxigYh0K05ewU9Jteyo-7LkfWFJp9dUtQbgRjRfs3yDccOXUQKl8LxzULEwPSMEclAgH9ryTsFEcwF_Nt-gyxr4U%3D)
We’ve got so much work to do in the remaining three years Joe Biden has in the White House.

Biden and his people have no idea what they’re doing and it’s going to take a herculean effort on the part of House Republicans to keep them from ruining our country; to keep Big Tech and big media from colluding to keep the truth about this White House -- and the people at the helm – from the**American people**.

I hope if you’re still reading this email, you’ll **[take a moment to offer your personal endorsement of my campaign](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=41c5f47b454c428ca94a8d2a336acfa0&_e=lwEeD8939FD5k_ERQbyl5xIjgvwmG9SI1pzrrK_FcVI0rAUOIOIW4F6nfG6COgQL2CqqqqQTpXO6VlSb4eroImNjLTukOape2okYQfmmFL-Q4_RkJUCcnuw-eO8U8MdaFcAVFSKFj6_tGOqWAaUTmCs_NVt8bcc_ARtdpKA1ee_yp5AaTGqCX6JPKwLg9k19ap7-AMZhTqrEAXHPwXnpsBqUxRYHyltOPWHRVzwz-vvzTKXZ2pEMrBAFEKNpl72IF1ByVftbFY15z_Kf1s-eMY3mI-yoxBNeMPVieJ8BV86KGMzKeHAlikXh6ppcZ960iA-uTRoN1TFuAAlo4Y-oeIfTtJxk1XqoxK4EHFSuklumY6YbKACg6fCY--UtJKoIefuHmf7yY90ByDBf0tvvIVXHF6hGjjdXxBio3uCQEB2_7GOQhwFtzzVspUNR305UDR-K11lzInsuk9cJD8mgeNqtvU7mseDsa5UJ70S21HI%3D)**.

Thank you so much,
Jim Jordan

Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=41c5f47b454c428ca94a8d2a336acfa0&_t=8AVJKMF4ljRS98vWZkJ5y3F-umcbUnuxalnEgCDz-LXEPeOF5rgcrBMGoiFjPswIeP4MthuMxYj1G-uaVwQziEB9a5vZo0v5maIFfE04zffaryrvB_ekfMXq5bfXCEiND2_6M7I_nZwl466EK4bB5WGgokIJU2ZYptDIvYke9Ss%3D)

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015

name: Morgan Harper
subject: I’m so proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
I’m so fired up because we saw today that change is possible and we can make history
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220407-913-footer-ak&t=2&akid=913%2E90090%2E_-2HUr)
Hi,
I hope you saw the news: **Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson has officially been confirmed by a bipartisan vote to make her the newest Justice on the U.S. Supreme Court – and the first Black woman to ever serve on the Supreme Court.** This is wonderful news, today I’m proud to be a Democrat and to see history in the making.
Like Justice Jackson, I’m fighting to make history too, and to become the first Black woman elected to the Senate from Ohio. We have a real chance to make this happen. I’m the only candidate in this race fighting for Medicare for All, a living wage, and protecting the right to abortion by codifying Roe v. Wade and expanding the court. But I need your help to defeat my corporate-backed primary opponent. **[Can you make a contribution today to support my campaign?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31066?t=3&akid=913%2E90090%2E_-2HUr)**
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31066?t=4&akid=913%2E90090%2E_-2HUr)
**[And like Justice Jackson, I am ready to serve. Will you join me in fighting for progressive change in Ohio by supporting my campaign today? Your donation will boost our campaign with only 26 days to the Primary.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31066?t=5&akid=913%2E90090%2E_-2HUr)**
Thank you,
Morgan

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220407-913-footer&t=6&refcode2=913_90090__-2HUr&akid=913%2E90090%2E_-2HUr)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.

name: Gwen Moore
subject: JUSTICE Ketanji Brown Jackson
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
My Sisters and Brothers,

I am so elated that the Senate has voted to confirm Ketanji Brown Jackson to a seat on the Supreme Court!

Our country is a more just place when those who lead look like those they lead. And today, we took one more step toward that goal. Representation does matter!

My hope for our future is renewed once again. Every day we fight for what is right is another day that we bend the arc of the moral universe toward justice.

The appointment of Justice Jackson is just what our present judicial system and America needs. This appointment only strengthens my resolve to continue my fight for more equity and opportunity in our country through my work in Congress.

I cannot lead this fight alone. I need you by my side!

Support Justice: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gwenapril22?refcode=0407

Your support is what keeps me fighting every day!

Together, #WeRepresent

-Gwen

Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District
Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act
100% Pro-Choice

name: Imani Oakley
subject: The FIRST EVER Black woman on the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
Peter,

First, Rep. Donald Payne Jr. called Imani unqualified. Now, he’s doing what all men do when they feel threatened by a supremely qualified, outspoken woman: he’s trying to paint her as “too ambitious.”

You know as well as we do that being ambitious is only a flaw when a woman does it, particularly a Black woman like Imani.

And you can bet that no one has EVER called Payne Jr. “too ambitious” — for good reason, too.

Payne Jr. hasn’t shown a single ounce of ambition during his 10 years in Congress. He’s barely lifted a finger to help our community through the challenges of the last decade. All he’s done is take corporate PAC money, do what special interests tell him to do, and ignore his constituents.

And you know what? Given the choice, we’d rather have a Congresswoman who’s ambitious — ambitious about securing housing as a human right, ambitious about securing universal healthcare, and ambitious about protecting our democracy — than a do-nothing Congressman who isn’t ambitious enough to put on pants for work, much less fight for our community.

If you agree that it’s time to elect a proud, ambitious, and outspoken progressive to fight for our community in Congress, click here to chip in $27 and help elect Imani Oakley. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?refcode=405ambitious]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: Peter, First, Rep. Donald Payne Jr. called Imani unqualified. Now, he’s doing what all men do when they feel threatened by a supremely qualified, outspoken woman: he’s trying to paint her as “too ambitious.” You know as well as we do that being ambitious is only a flaw when a woman does it, particularly a Black woman like Imani. And you can bet that no one has EVER called Payne Jr. “too ambitious” — for good reason, too. Payne Jr. hasn’t shown a single ounce of ambition during his 10 years in Congress. He’s barely lifted a finger to help our community through the challenges of the last decade. All he’s done is take corporate PAC money, do what special interests tell him to do, and ignore his constituents. And you know what? Given the choice, we’d rather have a Congresswoman who’s ambitious — ambitious about securing housing as a human right, ambitious about securing universal healthcare, and ambitious about protecting our democracy — than a do-nothing Congressman who isn’t ambitious enough to put on pants for work, much less fight for our community. If you agree that it’s time to elect a proud, ambitious, and outspoken progressive to fight for our community in Congress, click here to chip in $27 and help elect Imani Oakley. subject: Supreme Court Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson

body:
History made: The Senate just voted to confirm Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson as our next Supreme Court justice and the first Black woman to serve on the highest court in the land.

With reproductive rights, voting rights, LGBTQ+ rights, civil rights, and so much more at risk right now, Judge Jackson’s confirmation to the Supreme Court has never been more important.

**This confirmation vote was only possible because Democrats flipped the Senate. If Republicans had ONE more seat, Mitch McConnell would have blocked it.**

That’s why we must defeat Ron Johnson to defend and expand our majority — and Sarah Godlewski is our best chance to flip Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate seat. name: Legislative Update @ DanKildee.com
subject: Dan wanted you to hear→
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Hi,

Did you see this headline?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43886358/339134809/482703917?refcode=DK_EM_PT_3MO_20220407_1_1&utm_source=dk_em_pt_3mo_20220407_1_1&source=DK_EM_PT_3MO_20220407_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzYyZTkwYS1hMGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vTZOJEcJq_JD9QarrgJU1l2CoJlpMwqdhGGWED9fTHI=&emci=ccbe95c9-9eb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f762e90a-a0b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=31479900)
As the father of a type-1 diabetic, Dan knows firsthand how expensive prescription drugs are. That’s why Dan introduced legislation to cap the price of insulin at $35 because, regardless of your insurer, no one should be forced to ration or skip their life-saving medication because they can’t afford it.

Now, that legislation has passed the House!

Dan is dedicated to helping lower costs for mid-Michigan families on things like prescription drugs, gas, and more. Not only that, but he recently pushed through funding for local economic development projects in our community—including projects that will provide affordable housing for veterans, clean up blight and fund after school programs.

**[As Dan continues his work for us, we need to hear from you: What work of Dan’s has made the largest impact on you and your family? Take our survey by midnight tomorrow→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43886361/339134812/482703917?refcode=DK_EM_PT_3MO_20220407_1_1&utm_source=dk_em_pt_3mo_20220407_1_1&source=DK_EM_PT_3MO_20220407_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzYyZTkwYS1hMGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vTZOJEcJq_JD9QarrgJU1l2CoJlpMwqdhGGWED9fTHI=&emci=ccbe95c9-9eb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f762e90a-a0b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=31479900)**

clean_body: | Hi, Did you see this headline? As the father of a type-1 diabetic, Dan knows firsthand how expensive prescription drugs are. That’s why Dan introduced legislation to cap the price of insulin at $35 because, regardless of your insurer, no one should be forced to ration or skip their life-saving medication because they can’t afford it. Now, that legislation has passed the House! Dan is dedicated to helping lower costs for mid-Michigan families on things like prescription drugs, gas, and more. Not only that, but he recently pushed through funding for local economic development projects in our community—including projects that will provide affordable housing for veterans, clean up blight and fund after school programs. Dan’s facing his toughest race ever, so he needs to hear from his supporters as he goes to work everyday for Michigan. Let us know what matters most to you and your family to ensure we keep working for you. Thanks for your support, Team Kildee Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to protect the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States **

Thank you so much for your support, Regina M. Campaign Manager Jessica Cisneros for Congress | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

I’d like to introduce myself. My name is Larissa, and I’m the Organizing Director for Conor Lamb’s Senate campaign.

**We’re less than 6 weeks out from the May 17th primary election.**

As we approach election day here in Pennsylvania, our team is ramping up our outreach to voters on the ground.

**I’m emailing you for two reasons:**
1. Generosity from grassroots donors like you is what keeps our voter outreach program running, and I want to show you where your money is going.

Fellow American,

We've been in the race for the United States Senate for seven months, and all signs point to this being the race to watch in the November elections. Polling shows it's already a dead heat.

The race for the Senate seat here in Georgia - which will determine the balance of power in Washington - is no slam dunk for either party. That's why we're working on gathering the endorsements of conservatives all over America.

President Trump was my very first supporter in this race, and he offered an endorsement any candidate would be honored to receive. When I announced my intent to enter this race, President Trump wrote:

| _**"Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down."**_
---

Since President Trump endorsed our campaign, we've been blessed to receive multiple endorsements from other Republican leaders including:

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=1daba5edcbd84540b5fc1b8e3b8bde4d&_e=gQghErqppi3wqMW7tIZXawvzFQafQtUvoyB4UOzm13ybQx4n5-YtKK2xiGSbx6raHWnXLmsGrUf4x9kQgyxW9gYJph9AnxSEGE8WR9KInpfeJ5s98b670uJC9BmPMiD5giPgM6th_WLeFsVtlIsTp-76kvHzgknp_PUN_XHkJONQkurAljl7uotJ4ba9ffN7RYoHfw294u6db-BcRVbBxvK8w97hTRfRxiLa_FtBFX6UvHLIbhWMMcymKj-HMWwqhPnbqtVQfp7PlP94qOOuRnNUVntOVbHGNX3-SpZ6nDQH2AOGLsA_9bN40Uu_tgCRVaQjlGo-PFxYx3b2i9N5nivqTzZ_WkrD6ShpX8PALKrWUhEsg23SGVLSVT4GLLq0LYbljyLB3jnBzndPVPlMJUDRHtSqBtHmBW5gg8f82vm09WHTicWU_e5eGupiAXLbLNy-fF-H6Zbu0JexL-PSq3L0p3I1SIqoD9rbzNooUS6drP6nSBi0ik4tQwbY-Wa6UtYhWMzeG6__Jg0mYZihLeOIcQHGW8Ed9N4eXwwKcHPaL2sPg-I1CauX-0eIFUgslHMTRTyX5_VsfxY07G484xHp5OaQP8hI1saU7yQdaaz0a1Cnnrp-QGUDYLKj-N5O)
We're thankful for the support from Republican public officials, but we won't get anywhere without CONSERVATIVE PATRIOTS like you on our side.

I'm a team player - always have been, and we need you on our team. **_[So, I'm asking you to join our team today by offering your personal endorsement of our Senate campaign.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=1daba5edcbd84540b5fc1b8e3b8bde4d&_e=gQghErqppi3wqMW7tIZXawvzFQafQtUvoyB4UOzm13ybQx4n5-YtKK2xiGSbx6raHWnXLmsGrUf4x9kQgyxW9gYJph9AnxSEGE8WR9KInpfeJ5s98b670uJC9BmPMiD5giPgM6th_WLeFsVtlIsTp-76kvHzgknp_PUN_XHkJONQkurAljl7uotJ4ba9ffN7RYoHfw294u6db-BcRVbBxvK8w97hTRfRxiLa_FtBFX6UvHLIbhWMMcymKj-HMWwqhPnbqtVQfp7PlP94qOOuRnNUVntOVbHGNX3-SpZ6nDQH2AOGLsA_9bN40Uu_tgCRVaQjlGo-PFxYx3b2i9N5nivqTzZ_WkrD6ShpX8PALKrWUhEsg23SGVLSVT4GLLq0LYbljyLB3jnBzndPVPlMJUDRHtSqBtHmBW5gg8f82vmu_1aKhHFu64XbjawWnitT-ENNeLQwWuoF6nMPOLEbWsmw_s2gZBlmCsRVux-_4ma5KK3HdEXIVwNxEy5JmBY8JMoyu22Wh6kxMchqbj-NugWbglBpKKsNnjbvTgm7eSWc5PH05ChbjqLPoZh__2h1sVOpxjrKnbtCEsgQiLlEZufIQ9cdtphQkdhDdOaLQvcFALMjw0DmakDEPHfpHaSP)_**

I believe in strong conservative values. I believe in smaller government, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL AMERICANS - regardless of income level, race, or religion - can pursue their dreams.

While my opponent may have the support of Hollywood and national Democrats, we're building a grassroots army of PATRIOTS from around the country. Your endorsement will benefit our campaign as we work to flip Georgia's Senate seat RED and restore some sanity to Washington.

clean_body: It’s crucial that you’re on Team Herschel today. Can we count on your personal endorsement? It's crucial that you're on Team Herschel today. Can we count on your personal endorsement? | Fellow American, We've been in the race for the United States Senate for seven months, and all signs point to this being the race to watch in the November elections. Polling shows it's already a dead heat. The race for the Senate seat here in Georgia - which will determine the balance of power in Washington - is no slam dunk for either party. That's why we're working on gathering the endorsements of conservatives all over America. President Trump was my very first supporter in this race, and he offered an endorsement any candidate would be honored to receive. When I announced my intent to enter this race, President Trump wrote: | "Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down." Since President Trump endorsed our campaign, we've been blessed to receive multiple endorsements from other Republican leaders including: We're thankful for the support from Republican public officials, but we won't get anywhere without CONSERVATIVE PATRIOTS like you on our side. I'm a team player - always have been, and we need you on our team. I believe in strong conservative values. I believe in smaller government, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL AMERICANS - regardless of income level, race, or religion - can pursue their dreams. While my opponent may have the support of Hollywood and national Democrats, we're building a grassroots army of PATRIOTS from around the country. Your endorsement will benefit our campaign as we work to flip Georgia's Senate seat RED and restore some sanity to Washington. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: RINOs Fund Failure Again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
|
---
Peter: They did it again.
Democrats needed Republican votes to fund the government. Senate Republican leaders had the leverage to fight for real reforms - building a border wall, boosting U.S. energy production, defunding unconstitutional vaccine mandates.
And what did they do? **Nothing.**
Mitch McConnell and his lackeys not only worked with Democrats to pass the $1.5 trillion bill. They brought back earmarks, too - 4,000 of them! As usual, establishment Republicans sold out their principles, their constituents, and our children.
What did we get? More spending, more debt, and more fuel to the inflation fire.
_**You and I both know that these outrageous Senate votes will not change until the Senators do.**_
**[Let's dump the Senate establishment to save America!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60067672:Jdi0oYoNv:m:1:3253819041:1699085A469CAA2D3AE62308014098F1:r)**
The Senate Conservatives Fund (SCF) is committed to creating a conservative majority in the U.S. Senate. No more corporate cronies! No more party hacks! No more McConnell lapdogs!
In 2022, we can stop the Washington Mono-Party by electing true conservatives to Senate seats across the country:
---
* **MO BROOKS** in Alabama;
* **JOSH MANDEL** in Ohio;
* **TED BUDD** in North Carolina;
* **ADAM LAXALT** in Nevada; and
* Senators **MIKE LEE** , **RAND PAUL** , and **RON JOHNSON**.

---
Fighting, principled conservatives like them - joining America First leaders like Ted Cruz, Josh Hawley, and others - can change the Senate, Washington, and America.
SCF exists to leverage activist energy around the country and concentrates it on the most critical Senate races every cycle. This year, these races will determine not only whether the Senate goes Republican or Democrat but whether it will even matter.
**[Help us stop the endless Senate Sellouts by supporting SCF and our priority candidates today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60067672:Jdi0oYoNv:m:1:3253819041:1699085A469CAA2D3AE62308014098F1:r)**
_You can donate directly to multiple candidates with one transaction, and SCF will pay all processing fees so those candidates can spend 100% of your contributions on voter contact._
If moderate Republicans take these seats, conservatives will be left on the outside looking in, regardless of which party wins the majority. Only by nominating and electing tough, tenacious patriots will they have a chance to take on the Swamp next year.
**[Let 's make this latest sellout the last one we ever see.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60067672:Jdi0oYoNv:m:1:3253819041:1699085A469CAA2D3AE62308014098F1:r)**
Thank you for considering this important request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future. Sincerely,
---
---
Matt Hoskins Senior Advisor Senate Conservatives Fund
---
|
---
**PRIORITY SENATE CANDIDATES**
---
---
---
|
---
| [DONATE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60067672:Jdi0oYoNv:m:1:3253819041:1699085A469CAA2D3AE62308014098F1:r "DONATE")
---
Senate Conservatives Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003
---
|
---
Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington. Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.
---
|
---
PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM
---

body:
Fwd: The deadline is fast approaching for this incredible opportunity! Read more >>
| | | Peter, I hope you saw this message from my team! I wanted to reach out personally to ask if you’ve had a chance to enter to win yet. The “Countdown to the Majority” event is going to be in Dallas, Texas, on May 9th, and President Trump will be the featured speaker of the evening. The lucky winner of this contest and their guest may even have a chance to meet him.
---
[**DONATE NOW & BE ENTERED TO WIN >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/e4370692579a52f3/35b4f7767876b341c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Don’t miss this incredible opportunity, Peter. Please keep scrolling for more details from my team! —Kevin Hern
---
|

[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/e4370692579a52f3/b4c0d1616c55367dc3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter, We’ve written to you before about this incredible opportunity, but the deadline is fast approaching and you won’t want to miss out. President Trump is headlining the “Countdown to the Majority” event in Dallas, Texas on May 9th, and you can enter now to win tickets to see him in person. **Just make a grassroots donation by May 1st, and you could be having dinner with President Trump and other top Republicans!**
---
[**DONATE NOW & BE ENTERED TO WIN >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/e4370692579a52f3/d9b53491b229ac25c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
One lucky winner and guest will win tickets to the event, airfare, and accommodations. It’s going to be a fantastic time, and a chance to meet some of the most influential people in conservative politics today. **[Don’t miss your chance to attend — enter by May 1st to win. >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/e4370692579a52f3/f9aad9970a9f377bc3d6b838967d376c/34143)** We hope to see you there,
Team Hern ### You can read the full contest rules [here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/e4370692579a52f3/fa1cd572a69b18bcc3d6b838967d376c/34143) Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by [clicking here. ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/e4370692579a52f3/2116ca67b613cedbc3d6b838967d376c/34143)
NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution use this form. To enter without making a contribution, click [here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/e4370692579a52f3/96d28d40283402a2c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Wednesday, March 9th, 2022 at 12:00 am Eastern Time and ends on Sunday, May 1st, 2022 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Sunday, May 1st, 2022. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) tickets to the May 9th NRCC 2022 Majority Dinner; transportation for two (2), made at the discretion of the NRCC, within the continental United States to event location and from winner’s home location, with an approximate retail value of $1,500; one (1) one-night hotel stay at a Dallas, Texas hotel, with an approximate retail value of $500. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $2,500. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Restrictions and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply, they are listed in the Official Rules. The Sponsor is NRCC, 320 First St SE, Washington, DC 20003.

It's been 16 MONTHS since the Jan. 6 insurrection, and every day, members of the congressional committee investigating the attack work tirelessly to expose the truth.
Now, a federal judge has added even more credence to their claim that Trump crossed the line. **According to NPR, the judge found it was "more likely than not" that**** Trump's efforts to overturn Joe Biden's victory in the 2020 election ****constituted criminal behavior. **
But with Trump increasingly hinting at a 2024 presidential run, it's more important now than ever that we protect the country from another term of Trump's illegal activity and lies. **Hundreds of concerned Democrats have shared where they stand, but we’re missing your response, friend. For the first time Black women will be represented on the Supreme Court | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0a4ZLzkfrFqdtVKuNIuwQsn0c91jgEdSA5OANsq926BffC7faAQGaBY74u73WFJVk6-IOSqXM6b8SsErnrVXyg39mTCjc2W89v0Uu19yNCBjy3qiz5MnvyailDuc1Q1q6bmZlHcU-i3idOZ7NdmM8laK7f731wdQ79y3vv7aylzmrzuCWWSYWSXDuR8Ndy26q9sIx3krYiOKISUCMuvittsMS23PhCKEIlNxK11vVul7Hle4ZyJS4gvm1Yaq5xl1ftIymeRRavJUncVmtO3_wGe/3l0/vT1Scd1AQfiDo5fdvMA9sw/h0/HfAaY5Qe5fEr2soWUNJ6ynz5NXWyOmibGGFh1oPTuBo) Dear Team, Today, the Senate voted to confirm the first ever Black woman to serve on the Supreme Court, Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson. Let’s pause and take in this historic moment. I am so proud that we will have a justice on the nation’s highest court who not only looks like us, and knows what it means to be a marginalized American with the odds stacked against her, but has stood up for marginalized communities and people at every chance she could. Through this confirmation process, we once again watched an overqualified Black woman be forced to prove herself far more than any less qualified white man ever would. She truly was twice as good, because she had to be to survive the shameless but expected Republican display of despicable, racist, and sexist behavior. Despite this, Black women will never stop fighting for our seat at the same political table we are expected to protect with our vote, year after year. **Our campaign has had to achieve more than any primary challenger in IL-7 in decades, just to be labeled as**** _“viable”._****But we have done the work, and the machine is watching.** [**Can you help us display the strength and resolve we need to win? Donate $15 right now, election day is less than 12 weeks away.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESE2rg3ZIZ8Fukd6pHArAus-rTpb7cOWK9cQuCZD3dz-yTFPluiejOYpRxPKxR5vDKZK44Pw7vTYzejOsrfJjAXLFWNa7ZAmS-UXoe9BJiMKEfdabzSiLUgPeaAQb5PQ3WGqCpjC-7Ex4XKc3czH699TBbuQOOQ3oXNFWkLXOYxrtmN3rWgQvSe40PIHUjeGvvO65qe5gOXYWONSDPnBztA4GG4U9VS5rqxTh6Rpcf62fLOZyn0OHX193tF3903Uj9Xntf35l-LsWJTWAr7YHfyJrrPa4LRLiBWI66-w6xD2A/3l0/vT1Scd1AQfiDo5fdvMA9sw/h1/NZK9PoKsDoC2sLH3EtnuxfxLH6sQ-EZBcgtOSFL8Xgg) [Donate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxES3-vnd2BXmAgQP9_fCNGDSxKnSpFrFekRSY8FstXVzarMHPDWYeDZkG4ZZtamVxQhseHa6PoxYM30fBeBP6FtTPFOpvHacEDxueZkkkSRS0AorKSBK7f64umFMYRYku9LU0T7OWVuBxgGLftoSfUR2JF_uwe4mmko6WhsFJytYx1l5iGvevHCc6MZrY5KxNfjOGejogTCaVzugq4t90P47iorwbplh_4_1qi3h2AI4xyHrwKGWvj_1TiZJmL4pmNmDgJW1Uu0PseGTiwP-qwxoAfIyRzRsYb9uT0B2UqPpog/3l0/vT1Scd1AQfiDo5fdvMA9sw/h2/CVduYAudMJaGjKiT9BiN-GGIFu3CEFGoNsMoJ1uaBzs) Let me be clear: This is not the end of the fight. _Roe_ is likely to be overturned in just a few months, the Court still has a right-wing majority hell-bent on striking down voting rights, and LGBTQ+ rights and protections are still not safe. Today is a moment to celebrate, but tomorrow, we all have to get back to work and keep fighting. For us, that means continuing the fight to bring true engaged representation to IL-7. name: =?utf-8?Q?Michelle=20Benson?=
subject: Getting Back To Educating Children
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE
body:
Parents have woken up during the past two years – and they must never fall asleep again. | | | | [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=8b260b2d4b&e=9d6926af69)
---
| | | Dear Fellow Republicans,

It’s time to get back to the business of educating children.

[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=3bab6b5358&e=9d6926af69)**For two years, learning has been disrupted by pandemic-related shutdowns, forced masking, and isolation, and the Minneapolis teacher’s union strike.**

The results have been devastating to our school children. Children fell far behind during the first year of the pandemic, and they have not caught up.
* Data shows that students’ math and reading levels were FAR BEHIND normal levels this fall,
with the largest shortfalls among Black and Hispanic students as well as economically-disadvantaged students.
* Our students are experiencing an academic crisis, compounded by mental health issues resulting from 2-plus years of pandemic disruptions.
* The teacher’s union strike in Minneapolis further set these students behind. At the time of year most critical for learning, they walked out.

This was the last straw for many parents, already frustrated with a school system that hasn’t met their students’ academic needs.

**Parents have woken up during the past two years – and they must never fall asleep again. **It’s time to address the crisis in our schools head-on.
* **No more masking and isolation.**
* **No more divisive issues in the classroom.**
* **No more hiding the fact that our schools are failing far too many children**

**Did you know? **
* **Three out of five students in Minneapolis cannot read by the end of third grade.**
* **Less than one-third of Native American students graduate from high school in Minneapolis.**

**These children are our future, and we are failing them miserably.**

It’s time to focus on students and meeting their needs. **_We owe it to each and every child in Minnesota_** to prepare them for success, to prepare them to be ready for their futures, whether that’s college or a skilled career.

We know how to do this. We’ve seen other states do it, and it is time that Minnesota takes this education crisis seriously. We need to reset the education system to affirm that all children have the right to a quality education, and then we need to deliver it.

We can and we will prepare every child for success in kindergarten. We can and we will teach the science of reading, so every single child reads well by the end of third grade. We can and we will set high expectations for schools to prepare students. And we can and we will provide school choice for families to choose the best setting for students.

**Minnesota students are in crisis, but parents are awake, I have a plan, and together we will end this crisis and ensure that every Minnesota student is ready for their future.**
---
| **Your Support**

Together we can fight to create a Safer, Better, and Stronger Minnesota!

We have a long road to get through the state convention next month and the general election in November but we can defeat Tim Walz and put Minnesota on the right track.

**If you can help please donate by making a secure donation today at [https://secure.winred.com/michelle-for-minnesota/donate](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=82d9fd0d53&e=9d6926af69)**

Sincerely,

clean_body: Parents have woken up during the past two years – and they must never fall asleep again. | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Republicans, It’s time to get back to the business of educating children. two years, learning has been disrupted by pandemic-related shutdowns, forced masking, and isolation, and the Minneapolis teacher’s union strike. The results have been devastating to our school children. Children fell far behind during the first year of the pandemic, and they have not caught up. Data shows that students’ math and reading levels were FAR BEHIND normal levels this fall, with the largest shortfalls among Black and Hispanic students as well as economically-disadvantaged students. Our students are experiencing an academic crisis, compounded by mental health issues resulting from 2-plus years of pandemic disruptions. The teacher’s union strike in Minneapolis further set these students behind. At the time of year most critical for learning, they walked out. This was the last straw for many parents, already frustrated with a school system that hasn’t met their students’ academic needs. Parents have woken up during the past two years – and they must never fall asleep again. It’s time to address the crisis in our schools head-on. No more masking and isolation. No more divisive issues in the classroom. No more hiding the fact that our schools are failing far too many children Did you know? Three out of five students in Minneapolis cannot read by the end of third grade. Less than one-third of Native American students graduate from high school in Minneapolis. These children are our future, and we are failing them miserably. It’s time to focus on students and meeting their needs. We owe it to each and every child in Minnesota to prepare them for success, to prepare them to be ready for their futures, whether that’s college or a skilled career. We know how to do this. We’ve seen other states do it, and it is time that Minnesota takes this education crisis seriously. We need to reset the education system to affirm that all children have the right to a quality education, and then we need to deliver it. We can and we will prepare every child for success in kindergarten. We can and we will teach the science of reading, so every single child reads well by the end of third grade. We can and we will set high expectations for schools to prepare students. And we can and we will provide school choice for families to choose the best setting for students. Minnesota students are in crisis, but parents are awake, I have a plan, and together we will end this crisis and ensure that every Minnesota student is ready for their future. | Your Support Together we can fight to create a Safer, Better, and Stronger Minnesota! We have a long road to get through the state convention next month and the general election in November but we can defeat Tim Walz and put Minnesota on the right track. If you can help please donate by making a secure donation today at Sincerely, Michelle Benson PS Don’t hesitate to visit my website at or to reach out via email: mailto:Michelle@MichelleForMNGovernor.com or by phone at (612) 356-2256 if you have any questions or would like to volunteer to help my campaign. | | mailto:Team@MichelleForMinnesota.com?subject=I%20would%20like%20to%20volunteer%20to%20help%20Michelle "VOLUNTEER FOR MICHELLE" | "SUPPORT MICHELLE BY DONATING" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PREPARED & PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE OUR MAILING ADDRESS P.O. body:
Supreme Court Nominee CONFIRMED! | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wQTMJu9IZWurr0e1V7f1n0sODZ2FHKYLElcio5SYG9KhC0HwSvqXqszuJYgUL11SpTK6VktCdCO1xgr1ibVaks4FQOhe_ZptZY2Pt5T_OnLUIVFX-E7F_ZUJ72TvpSo_8UztbXWwO1UtbIoP0djnJJkrdQKCECKkJJwZkd4aMLv-PaK6tIgZXkriuLpQmcJT0cHWMr-MSe9a0Otcns_LCvu6cf4-hColeGRV8XthfnlTAgdO-gRcw3O8-s_eSGTZMa1cPsIg7LFJX0QitlrAl9Q99px2jmM44bjvc0cy3I-XITDx9xQ83L96AXMac7VuOzkPBuB4apElwT_D4vROtitRqVRmtLwENOCF_0BhQQ9g/3l0/mqYHSV_-SR-VYa3JknHPMA/h0/J9WH2JHBsXNrV6r5TuYuaFZUkBt6AlTe2w3JGTjvxtc)
Team BTE,

It was just announced: nominee Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson is now Supreme Court Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson, who is the first ever Black woman to serve on the Supreme Court.

**Ketanji Brown Jackson has broken barriers. And our country is better off for it.**

During one of Jackson’s first confirmation hearings, she said she “struggled juggling motherhood and career.” She, like so many others, was faced with barriers of having to balance a full time career and being a full time mom. During her speech, you even hear Jackson apologizing to her two daughters for “not being perfect.”

She is a voice for all women, especially working moms, women of color, and candidates out there. It’s not going to be easy, you may not be the perfect working parent, but she reminds us that this is okay.

Peter, now is the time to break barriers at every level of government. We need to use each win as a catalyst for more change.

Something that we will never forget from this historic moment is that this is a mother who has sacrificed so much to serve this country. With her daughters watching, she took up space to voice that.

[**Chip in $12 today to help give voice to more moms, parents, and candidates breaking barriers in your community and beyond.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wG78Ij5HBeK7_vav6LE6CXGDsjBBce8Ed_jOS_QDHDO_IsD5OoRxdaPthTur8dyRJoxopU1r6YrBXkWRhMmfghV8kA8q7VUo2AFahcE0QF137lv-W1bemxrdlfyQX6jNqCuf7WsDyk3T4vUm216ulXsCR262hA24b45R34Sw41321_qYIG_qblh41mBv7T5PDpE6TH_nXghRiXsogFJkB76tiKzeNXDNDAQ3f9bxAIJc6cHfRmVGXS5_qpnPzIzLt-hCt3x1-yRMHCPUp7SmrsXSTTnLyLWrX6kYuAqMEXBjUr6t0g7jdWfUcquW9VR4M/3l0/mqYHSV_-SR-VYa3JknHPMA/h1/s3qfiyk6LE26pc0IaRqK6W5VHiM3Py0eb663floA1s0)

clean_body: Supreme Court Nominee CONFIRMED! | | | Team BTE, It was just announced: nominee Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson is now Supreme Court Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson, who is the first ever Black woman to serve on the Supreme Court. Ketanji Brown Jackson has broken barriers. And our country is better off for it. During one of Jackson’s first confirmation hearings, she said she “struggled juggling motherhood and career.” She, like so many others, was faced with barriers of having to balance a full time career and being a full time mom. During her speech, you even hear Jackson apologizing to her two daughters for “not being perfect.” She is a voice for all women, especially working moms, women of color, and candidates out there. It’s not going to be easy, you may not be the perfect working parent, but she reminds us that this is okay. Peter, now is the time to break barriers at every level of government. We need to use each win as a catalyst for more change. Something that we will never forget from this historic moment is that this is a mother who has sacrificed so much to serve this country. With her daughters watching, she took up space to voice that. | Peter,
---

---
_It’s abundantly clear that Rove helped McConnell drum up false allegations against me, had them notarized in Washington D.C., and then immediately gave them to the press to try and torpedo our must-win Senate campaign._
---
But they made one massive mistake: They believed I wouldn’t fight back. Well, they thought wrong...
---
**_We’ve officially SUBPOENAED Karl Rove._**

_Now more than ever, I’m counting on your support to help me keep up the fight to EXPOSE anti-Trump swamp creatures, McConnell and Rove._

name: Riley for Congress
subject: insulin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress
body:
Last week the House passed a bill that would cap the price of insulin at $35.

| Peter,

Last week the House passed a bill that would **cap the price of insulin at $35.** We know that about a quarter of diabetics skip or skimp on their insulin due to the cost, so this bill can literally save lives.

Peter, this bill is major progress in the fight to make prescription drugs more affordable. But, here’s the thing: 193 Republicans voted AGAINST this bill. It’s truly shameful.

**And now, it’ll be an uphill battle to get this life-saving bill passed the Senate. That’s why we need to elect more people like Josh Riley, who will stand up against special interests and vote to make prescription drugs more affordable.

[_Will you sign our petition to show the Senate that you support this crucial legislation?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43887157/339138190/522303755?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjdmMWRlZS1hMmI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OHyJCC-C6H-jp_4n9vBzl9kTUJRBMLQiuW8jz1Te_Mo=&emci=c723e300-7cb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=227f1dee-a2b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4588596)**

We’re fed up with stories of Upstate New Yorkers having to choose between life-saving medication or rent or food for their families.

In Congress, you can count on Josh to vote to lower the cost of prescription drugs to ensure Upstate New Yorkers have access to these crucial, life-saving medications.

[_**It’s time you let the Senate know that you agree no one should have to ration their medication because they cannot afford it. clean_body: | = | | We’ve got breaking news, folks: Former Republican Congressman Scott Taylor just endorsed Elaine’s top Republican opponent, Jen Kiggans. = Yes, that Scott Taylor – the one Elaine unseated in 2018 and then defeated again in 2020. And with his endorsement comes the full support of his network of GOP mega-donors. It’s clear Kiggans is consolidating GOP support in her bid to become the Republican nominee for VA-02, which is why we need to raise $5,000 by midnight. = | | | = Jen Kiggans is building some serious momentum, folks. Scott Taylor’s support is just the latest in a series of prominent Republican endorsements. And with every new endorsement, the GOP is signaling that Kiggans is a viable candidate – which means she’s about to receive an influx of donations from national Republicans eager to flip the House red. Elaine is one of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s top targets – and they’re already smearing her record with attack ads because her seat is critical to taking back the House majority. This is an all-hands-on-deck situation. name: HER Time
subject: Don't let them hurt our kids.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/x9wOVBCiiURRnALbGSVodHR9BKTrZKU3Yfro771tSd4=/Y-woNv2MQ-f3l_fgUcW8wPvzDrsWSbMswoqxmAg-jzI=)
**Every child should have access to support, love, and community -- no matter their identity. Full stop.**
The wave of recent "Don't Say Gay" and anti-trans bills introduced by GOP lawmakers will do the exact opposite. They'll isolate LGBTQ youth, prevent trans kids from gender-affirming care, and punish families for supporting their children. It's a _disgusting attack_ on some of our most vulnerable communities.
We're urging Congress to protect LGBTQ youth and their families, but we need as much help as we can get.
[**Will you stand up for these children and their families by signing on here?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/x9wOVBCiiURRnALbGSVodHR9BKTrZKU3Yfro771tSd4=/5xAbX_XJcg2nvMzq2ULkhiFvk1QZIrUHTmtPDpmSZjQ=)

You and I both know that voting rights are our most precious asset as Americans. The ability to elect our leaders makes us unique among nations; **it truly is the whole ballgame.**

Part of our civic responsibility is to uphold these rights. We need to make sure that elections run smoothly, and _voter confidence_ is prioritized.

[**_We are recruiting Democrats from Lucas County to be poll workers and help our neighbors exercise their voting rights.
