name: Alvin Williams, President
subject: Destroy the Liberal Lies...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Black America's PAC Action Fund
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62293&info=2022EA0302&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0302&n=1)
---
| | [](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62293&info=2022EA0302&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0302&n=2)
---
Dear Peter,
Dr. Carson is absolutely correct: **_without Black voters, the Republican Party may never win another Presidential election._**
Even worse, the GOP will find it increasingly difficult to win Senate seats in swing states - putting your conservative values in **serious jeopardy**!
**And nobody knows this more than the Democrats.**
That's why liberal race-baiters have launched an all-out assault on outspoken, Black conservatives - _like Dr. Ben Carson, Burgess Owens, and Sheriff Clarke_ \- **because they know their stranglehold on Black voters depends on it.**
You see, Black Republicans are crucial in destroying the Liberal Lie that **all Republicans are racist**.
You and I both know that isn't true, but Black voters only hear the liberal side of the story that says only government can create prosperity. They simply never hear the truth about conservatism.
[](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62293&info=2022EA0302&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0302&n=3)
---
It's a BIG problem that is threatening to destroy our values, Peter.
**[I'm hoping you'll help me fight back against the race-baiting Liberal Lies](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62293&info=2022EA0302&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0302&n=4)** , but first let me tell you **the BIG secret liberals do NOT want you to know**.
**The Democrats are scared to death right now...**
...because they know if Republicans can reclaim just 12% of the Black vote, _it will be the Democrats who will be unable to win another Presidential election_.
**Even a 7% increase in Blacks voting Republican could STOP the Democrats from winning the 2022 midterms!**
They're watching their **stranglehold** on Black voters start to slip after decades of failed policies that have **enslaved** entire generations of minorities to the government plantation.
The tide is turning because proud, Black conservatives _(like Dr. Ben Carson, Burgess Owens, Sheriff Clarke, and many more)_ \- are recruiting minorities to the Republican Party like never before - simply by sharing the promise of conservatism.
**That's why hateful liberals are desperate to destroy every Black conservative!**
**They know the ONLY way to keep Blacks voting for Democrats is to spread the lie that** **all Republicans are racist.**
That's why they call Sheriff Clarke a **"traitor to his race."**
That's why they spent MILLIONS to target and finally defeat Rep. Mia Love, a GOP rising star known for championing personal responsibility.
And that's why they attack Dr. Ben Carson with articles titled **"F*ck Ben Carson"** and call him hateful names like **"Uncle Tom"** and **"the acceptable negro for whites"**.
You and I can NOT let this stand!
There is simply too much at stake to let liberal race-baiters continue to attack Black Republicans and spread hate-filled lies about conservatives like you and me.
**[That's why I'm hoping you'll help me fight back with a contribution of $20.22 or more TODAY!](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62293&info=2022EA0302&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0302&n=5)**
Your contribution will be put to use immediately to defend our proud, Black conservatives from hate-filled liberal attacks.
**[Your support will also help Black America's PAC Action Fund purchase radio ads in urban markets](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62293&info=2022EA0302&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0302&n=6)** across America to spread conservativism to minority communities and reclaim Black voters to the Republican Party, where they belong.
These issues-based radio ads are absolutely critical if you and I are to reclaim Black voters, protect our values, and end the Democrat Party's **reign of terror** over the Black Community.
I can tell you from personal experience - once the message of conservatism reaches Black voters, it spreads like wildfire and obliterates the Liberal Lies that keep Blacks voting for Democrats.
**[So can I count on your contribution of $20.22 today?](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62293&info=2022EA0302&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0302&n=7)**
**Remember, just a 7% increase in Blacks voting Republican could STOP the Democrats from winning the 2022 midterms...**
...but we can't do anything without your immediate help, Peter.
As a conservative leader in your community, your support is needed now more than ever!
**[So please join me in fighting back against the Liberal Lies and taking the fight to the Democrats with a contribution of $20.22 or more TODAY!](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62293&info=2022EA0302&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0302&n=8)**
Or if you can't afford that much right now, **[then please give $5 or even $1 as a symbol of your support](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62293&info=2022EA0302&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0302&n=9)**.
**[If you make a donation of ANY amount today, I'll send you this exclusive _"Destroy the Liberal Lies"_ magnet as a special thank you gift.](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62293&info=2022EA0302&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0302&n=10)**
[](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62293&info=2022EA0302&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0302&n=11)
---
Together, you and I can END the Liberal Lies by standing strong beside our Black conservatives.
Thank you, in advance, for joining the fight to destroy the Liberal Lies.
| [](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62293&info=2022EA0302&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0302&n=12)
---
_For America,_ |
---
**Alvin Williams**
President & CEO
BAMPAC, BAMPAC Action Fund
[DONATE](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62293&info=2022EA0302&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0302&n=13)
---
**P.S.** Just a 7% increase in Blacks voting Republican will STOP the Democrats from winning the 2022 midterms - **and nobody knows this more than Democrats**. That's why liberals - _desperate to keep their stranglehold on Black voters_ \- spread the vicious lie that all Republicans are racist! **[Your contribution of $20.22 or more will help BAMPAC Action Fund take the fight to the Democrats and destroy the Liberal Lies.](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62293&info=2022EA0302&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0302&n=14)** **[And if you make a donation of ANY amount today, I'll send you this exclusive "Destroy the Liberal Lies" magnet as a special thank you gift.](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62293&info=2022EA0302&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0302&n=15)** | [](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62293&info=2022EA0302&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0302&n=16)
---
Thank you and God Bless.
|
###### © Black America's PAC Action Fund

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year.
---
You're receiving this email because you've been critical to our mission of reclaiming Black voters, destroying the Liberal Lies, and supporting Black conservative candidates like John James, Tim Scott, and Burgess Owens. If you're giving up on this critical fight, then please [click here](https://www.bampac.org/unsubscribe?e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0302&n=17) to stop receiving emails.
---

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Re: Beto
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=167%2E5257348%2E47N5PC ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek, you need to see this. The race for Texas governor is
extremely close. Beto O’Rourke is closing the gap in the polls with
right-wing Republican Governor Greg Abbott.

Abbott—R: 42%

O’Rourke—D: 40%

Margin of error: +/- 3.2%

“Pretty much tied,” an ABC News affiliate in Texas reported over the
weekend, and “well within the margin of error.”

This is no joke. The Texas governor’s race is up for grabs — and if you
know Beto like I do, you know he’ll cover every square inch of Texas
talking to every voter between now and November. But he needs the
resources to do it.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20220407_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&refcode2=167_5257348_47N5PC&akid=167%2E5257348%2E47N5PC ]Rush an urgent donation of $10, $25, or even $50 split between Beto’s
campaign and ours to flip Texas blue and defend our House Majority today.
Beto has the momentum, and this race is winnable, but we all need to do
our part so his campaign has the grassroots support to win.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Beto O’Rourke and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20220407_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=10&t=1005&refcode2=167_5257348_47N5PC&akid=167%2E5257348%2E47N5PC ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20220407_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=25&t=1006&refcode2=167_5257348_47N5PC&akid=167%2E5257348%2E47N5PC ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20220407_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=50&t=1007&refcode2=167_5257348_47N5PC&akid=167%2E5257348%2E47N5PC ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20220407_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=100&t=1008&refcode2=167_5257348_47N5PC&akid=167%2E5257348%2E47N5PC ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20220407_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=250&t=1009&refcode2=167_5257348_47N5PC&akid=167%2E5257348%2E47N5PC ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20220407_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&refcode2=167_5257348_47N5PC&akid=167%2E5257348%2E47N5PC ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

During his Senate run in 2018, Beto turned out more Democratic voters in
Texas than anyone in history. Let me repeat that: more than anyone in
history.

That’s no empty statistic — in 2018, Stacey Abrams’ campaign did the same
thing in Georgia, just before Democrats flipped that state blue in 2020.

That same tectonic shift is possible in Texas, and it’s never been more
urgent that we see it through this fall.

Beto’s opponent, Greg Abbott, is just... terrible. He’s directed the
state’s child protection agency to investigate the parents of transgender
children for child abuse. And that’s not all.

Voting rights, abortion rights, COVID protections — Abbott has thrown them
all out the window in a vain effort to bolster his right-wing bonafides
and juice his fundraising.

If Beto can win this race, it will send shockwaves throughout the nation.
And Texas’ 38 electoral votes are no joke come November 2024.

This isn’t an empty hope, Derek. The numbers show that this is
possible. But for Beto to have a good shot at this, he needs an army of
grassroots supporters to have his back. Will you?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20220407_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&refcode2=167_5257348_47N5PC&akid=167%2E5257348%2E47N5PC ]Pitch in $10, $25, or $50 to split between Beto’s campaign and mine.
Help us flip Texas blue, protect our House Majority, and bring
generational change to our country’s politics.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Beto O’Rourke and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20220407_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=10&t=1012&refcode2=167_5257348_47N5PC&akid=167%2E5257348%2E47N5PC ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20220407_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=25&t=1013&refcode2=167_5257348_47N5PC&akid=167%2E5257348%2E47N5PC ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20220407_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=50&t=1014&refcode2=167_5257348_47N5PC&akid=167%2E5257348%2E47N5PC ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20220407_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=100&t=1015&refcode2=167_5257348_47N5PC&akid=167%2E5257348%2E47N5PC ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20220407_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=250&t=1016&refcode2=167_5257348_47N5PC&akid=167%2E5257348%2E47N5PC ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_beto?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20220407_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1017&refcode2=167_5257348_47N5PC&akid=167%2E5257348%2E47N5PC ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Let’s do this. Thanks for having Beto’s back — and mine.

— Adam

name: Sarah Palin
subject: Major Announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeh3j83kofmhfiprcs84lsv8d2f4uird88tc7a38_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbor0obnmhg62o72mqr68ddnm3hb4srk6hi66c3mm8r7cotj63h79p36mapm8cbgsv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti65j70sllm5jr4cb666ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5iecpr2c5i6aoh5u)
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Friend,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can’t do this without your support.

That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW TO BECOME AN OFFICIAL FOUNDING SUPPORTER.>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp0iaddcch718a0rphahiv4i4pult9k9fm65hne0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4spjm4ob4clh2bs)**

This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I’m running, and YOU will be the reason we win.

_**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze0jhff7bgit4iqnmk54b61r2j1ud6qgb2rmk8og_rp22sh2s8i66ob4spjm4ob4clh2bs)**_

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9q5tdbqkcb2kfu4ai3hra0opd3301d2l7js2dvo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4spjm4ob4clh2bs)

At this critical time in our nation’s history, we need leaders who will combat the left’s socialist, big-government, America-last agenda.

This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children’s future, and selling out our nation’s interest to the highest bidder.

I’m in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country.

America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska. Friend, Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska. I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C. America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing. I can’t do this without your support. That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an Official Founding Supporter. This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I’m running, and YOU will be the reason we win. I'm gaining ground in my race, friend, but if I don't have the resources to seize this momentum, I risk losing this critical pickup opportunity and the Senate. Florida's last Senate race was decided by 0.12 points (just 10,033 votes). Winning such a tight race means I cannot afford to be massively outspent by Marco Rubio and his allies, which means I cannot afford to miss today's goal.I need your help to compete in this race that will decide Senate control. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for your support. Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. name: Tom Barrett for Congress
subject: House GOP Conference Chair Endorses Barrett
body:
New York Congresswoman Elise Stefanik announces support of Army veteran | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=624f3847f2ebdf676d92e3f3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D624ec521ce95f050df6490f5%26ss_email_id%3D624f3847f2ebdf676d92e3f3%26ss_campaign_name%3DHouse%2BGOP%2BConference%2BChair%2BEndorses%2BBarrett%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-04-07T19%253A15%253A44Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=tGH5QsNqK1QF5vafGOSoZtN_8vI%3D)
---
| **GOP Conference Chair Stefanik Endorses Barrett**(Lansing, Mich.) - New York Congresswoman Elise Stefanik, Chair of the House Republican Conference, and the third ranking member of the GOP leadership, has announced her endorsement of Senator Tom Barrett for Michigan’s 7th Congressional District.“Tom Barrett has lived a life of service and will work to reverse the devastating and destructive policies of House Democrats under Nancy Pelosi and her Democrat puppets,” said Stefanik. “Tom has my complete endorsement to flip Michigan's 7th District, and I look forward to working with him to take back the House.”“I’m honored to have Congresswoman Stefanik’s support,” said Barrett. “She is a rising star in the Republican Party and one of the most effective leaders in our party.”Stefanik joins House GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy and House GOP Whip Steve Scalise, the top two GOP leaders, in support of Barrett. Barrett has also been endorsed by the Congressional Leadership Fund’s Trailblazers and was named an NRCC “Young Gun.”The new 7th Congressional District is a PVI +2 Republican and Barrett polling shows him with a 7-point lead over Slotkin.###

body:
#

Friend, today I watched in awe as Judge Kentaji Brown Jackson was confirmed to be the next Supreme Court Justice of the United States.
Justice Jackson is a trailblazer, an intellectual heavyweight, and a highly regarded jurist who has dedicated her life and career to advocating for others.
As Republican Senators attempted to smear Justice Jackson during the Supreme Court confirmation hearings, she thoughtfully answered each question, proving her intelligence and willingness to champion justice, equality, and respect for the rule of law above all else.
Justice Jackson’s confirmation as the first Black woman Supreme Court Justice is a historic step toward transforming our Supreme Court so that it reflects the diversity of our nation.
With voting rights, reproductive freedom, and our environment under assault, we must also continue to work toward restoring balance to our nation’s highest court by adding four seats to it.

name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: This is huge, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

This is huge,
Peter.

Judge Kentanji Brown Jackson was just confirmed to the Supreme Court —
making her the FIRST Black woman to join the highest court in our
country.

It’s a huge leap forward in making sure our courts and offices are led by
folks who will fight for the change our communities urgently need. We’re
thrilled — but it’s important to remember that this confirmation wasn’t a
guarantee.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220407?refcode=em20220407-1732&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1732_346206_bUiKgJ&akid=1732%2E346206%2EbUiKgJ ][IMG]

But with your help, we can make sure this is Rand’s last year in the U.S.
Senate. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220407?refcode=em20220407-1732&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1732_346206_bUiKgJ&akid=1732%2E346206%2EbUiKgJ ]Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to show
Rand that a grassroots movement is rising up to take him out of office and
elect the first Black Senator to represent Kentucky?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220407?refcode=em20220407-1732&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1732_346206_bUiKgJ&akid=1732%2E346206%2EbUiKgJ ]Contribute $5

Look, Peter: We
don't need any more leaders who use hatred and division to distract from
the fact that they're not helping us. We need leaders who will recognize
our common bonds and fight for change. We know that a different type of
politics is possible — and it’s what Charles and our movement is fighting
for.

We’re fighting for politics and leadership rooted in love, justice, unity,
and compassion. We’re fighting for a future where every voice is heard and
people have enough to pay their bills, put food on their tables, and have
a safe place to live.

And Charles is ready to take on this fight. But he can’t do it alone. It’s
going to take significant resources and ALL of us working together to
defeat a heavily funded incumbent like Rand Paul — so we have to ask one
more time:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220407?refcode=em20220407-1732&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&refcode2=1732_346206_bUiKgJ&akid=1732%2E346206%2EbUiKgJ ]Will you make a $5 donation to our campaign and help us
end this chapter of failed leadership? Together, we can create a new kind
of politics that’s rooted in love and compassion. Thank you.

In solidarity,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220407-1732-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1732_346206_bUiKgJ&akid=1732%2E346206%2EbUiKgJ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1732%2E346206%2EbUiKgJ

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Murray HQ
subject: "We will...finish building the wall"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
The Republican immigration plan.
#
Peter,
Republicans across the country are ramping up the xenophobic fearmongering that was a trademark of the Trump administration. Even in 2022, the GOP is promising voters that they “will secure our border, finish building the wall, and name it after President Donald Trump.”
**[Can you help stop Mitch McConnell and the GOP from taking over the Senate to enact their radical agenda? Pitch in $5 now to protect the Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43896447/339181984/-642821004?refcode=pm_em_220407_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTUyZjdhNC1jYWI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j_C0c9S3PXRlORg2zp8dZFd5hd15tt2zGh_HMHjCEL4=)**

Instead of finding ways to make our country stronger by welcoming immigrants into our communities, Republicans are pushing inhumane policies to deter immigrants and their families from coming here altogether.
**[We must support people like Senator Murray who are working hard to protect and support our immigrant communities and create a fair pathway to citizenship. clean_body: The Republican immigration plan. Peter, Republicans across the country are ramping up the xenophobic fearmongering that was a trademark of the Trump administration. Even in 2022, the GOP is promising voters that they “will secure our border, finish building the wall, and name it after President Donald Trump.” = Immigrants deserve dignity and respect and are critical parts of our communities. Patty Murray is dedicated to lifting up and supporting immigrants in Washington state and across the country—and that absolutely includes creating a fair pathway to citizenship. Instead of finding ways to make our country stronger by welcoming immigrants into our communities, Republicans are pushing inhumane policies to deter immigrants and their families from coming here altogether. = Thank you, Murray HQ **= As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values. PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

From now until June 28, it’s all hands on deck. We are going to win this race because we have the most extensive, robust field operation NY-03 has ever seen, led by some truly extraordinary volunteers.
So, we’ve got boots on the ground. But now we have to connect those volunteers with resources and supplies so that they can do what they do best. Little things — pens, printing campaign literature, gas costs (NY-03 is many things but it is _not_ a small district), coffee for the 6am shifts, just to name a few — have a way of really adding up when you factor in the sheer scale of our on-the-ground work.

body:

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: This new policy will expand ACA cost savings to 1 million people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I’m proud to say that the Congressional Progressive Caucus called for this action from the President shortly after his State of the Union address.
#
Peter,
I applaud President Biden for his executive action earlier this week to fix a loophole in the Affordable Care Act. This action will make health insurance coverage affordable for 1 million more Americans that were previously left out of the cost savings of the ACA Marketplace.
I’m proud to say that the Congressional Progressive Caucus called for this action from the President shortly after his State of the Union address. It was one of our foremost asks of the White House, because we know so many middle class and low income folks are struggling to pay their bills and get health coverage.
We know this isn’t enough, Peter. Which is why we need to keep expanding coverage and cost savings to more people, all while we push for Medicare for All. I will not stop my advocacy for immediate wins for working people AND transformative policies to guarantee health care for all.
[Peter, I’m asking you today to make your first donation to fuel my fight to deliver for the people. When you chip in $3 or anything at all, you’re helping me continue my fierce advocacy to make health care a human right for everyone in this country. We need to be bold, and we need to pass Medicare for All.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11904?refcode=em20220407-1165&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=1165%2E420207%2EXXqcyp)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11904?refcode=em20220407-1165&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1165%2E420207%2EXXqcyp)**
This executive action will have a particular impact for women and children, many of whom have been effectively locked out of the ACA marketplace before this loophole was fixed. With costs on the rise and corporations continuing to squeeze working families, actions like today’s are exactly what we need from President Biden to provide immediate, tangible economic relief.
As we continue the fight for Medicare For All — because health care is a right, not a privilege — this is an important step that will ensure millions more get care they need now.
[If you can chip in to help me continue my advocacy for Medicare for All, please contribute today.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11904?refcode=em20220407-1165&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1165%2E420207%2EXXqcyp)
I hope the President will next answer our call to use his executive action power to lower prescription drugs for millions of people.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220407-1165-footer&t=22&refcode2=1165_420207_XXqcyp&akid=1165%2E420207%2EXXqcyp)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=1165%2E420207%2EXXqcyp)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=1165%2E420207%2EXXqcyp)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Team Welch
subject: Supreme Court Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Why our Senate majority matters:

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=198%2E61531%2EWLXJFS)
Hello,
Today, the Senate voted to confirm Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court. She’ll be the first Black woman and first former federal public defender to serve on our nation’s highest court, making this a historic moment for the Court and for our country.
But this moment would not have happened if Republicans controlled the Senate. Republican Senator Lindsey Graham said this week that a GOP-controlled Senate wouldn’t have even given her a hearing, and certainly not a vote.
[](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1768?t=3&akid=198%2E61531%2EWLXJFS)
That’s why we can’t afford to lose this seat. The standard democratic processes that we rely on—like the Senate holding hearings for and confirming qualified Supreme Court Justices—could be a thing of the past if Mitch McConnell becomes Majority Leader again.
[**We need All Hands On Deck to win this race and keep the Senate blue—can you chip in to our campaign right away?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1768?t=4&akid=198%2E61531%2EWLXJFS)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

---
| [$3](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1768?t=15&amount=3&akid=198%2E61531%2EWLXJFS)
---
| [$15](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1768?t=17&amount=15&akid=198%2E61531%2EWLXJFS)
---
| [$28](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1768?t=19&amount=28&akid=198%2E61531%2EWLXJFS)
---
| [$50](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1768?t=21&amount=50&akid=198%2E61531%2EWLXJFS)
---
| [$100](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1768?t=11&amount=100&akid=198%2E61531%2EWLXJFS)
---
| [OTHER](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1768?t=13&akid=198%2E61531%2EWLXJFS)
---

---
The Court is taking on monumental issues right now: abortion, voting rights, immigration, our ability to tackle climate change—you name it. That means we have to win here in Vermont—and with a Trump appointee in the race, who was hand-picked by the same national Republicans who want to block the president from filling seats on the Supreme Court, we have no time to lose.
[**If you can help power this team to victory right now, chip in $5 right away.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1768?t=8&akid=198%2E61531%2EWLXJFS)
Thank you,
Team Welch

---

body:
Thank you Sheriff Joe Arpaio for your endorsement and support in this race!
---
| | | | | | |
---
🚨BREAKING NEWS🚨
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V2LJkHUbc8SFBDKkvDsbHslWOeMVbMMV2s0eKOfhgw1S87Kvp4NnZuZFrXccJxxHUZoeIrQibTNYmdZHxCKXt2ln29lkua9PfmhaV2xnTprWh8uSEdW82S2pj8F7j6sZCy9QxXFvzgREgMCI-OB_or2T32CNou-VqrhVq_AR0ZY=&c=krM4WpI-xM881hPtWOZbM7XICUTZYoHVbN0O5nD2zJNA7c-BaZZ02g==&ch=HNeW_lWmrHqxwiKrHXHeFahMyEQSOAt8BvQBoXwjbxtakfHYUkkySg==)

| Patriot, I am thrilled to have my friend Sheriff Joe Arpaio's support in the CO-07 race. I met Sheriff Joe at President Trump's inauguration many years ago and I am thrilled to have his support in this race.
I am humbled to receive Sheriff Joe's endorsement. He is an icon in the battle to save America. One of our first freedom fighters protecting our citizens from disastrous open border policies. I am honored to stand with him to defend America's southern border and continue to protect American citizens and defend their right to life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.
I can't win this fight on my own and I need your help to get to congress. Please donate today to commemorate this huge announcement for my campaign.
---

\-- Sheriff Joe Arpaio Former Sheriff of Maricopa County Arizona
With your support today our mission to take back Colorado, CD7, and the US House in 2022 can become a reality!

Sincerely,

name: Cora Neumann
subject: I believe in the right to choose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cora for Montana
body:
We can’t risk what’s happening in Oklahoma to happen at the federal level. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43889166/339149358/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWRlZTYxNi1hZGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2s-1BkyoLuvxVeG170Ci2Di1Sjgihh1eRV20P3c88ik=) Friend, Across the country, far-right politicians are destroying women’s reproductive freedoms that are enshrined in our constitution. First it was Texas, then Missouri, and then Idaho. But this week, news broke that the Republican-led Oklahoma state House PASSED a near-total ban on abortions. Under this bill, anyone who performs an abortion would face up to 10 years in prison and up to $100,000 in fines. Friend, I need you to know where I stand on this issue. As a mother and public health expert, I’m a firm believer that all women deserve the right to a safe, legal abortion.**As a Montanan, I stand by our state’s proud history of supporting the right to privacy. We respect freedom and privacy. It’s in our bones, it’s our way of life, and legislation like this directly attacks a woman’s right to privacy.** I think it's shameful that today's GOP legislatures would both undercut policies like paid family leave and comprehensive reproductive care, while still pushing forced pregnancy and birth. It’s hypocritical and we deserve better. **If elected, I’d be the only pro-choice woman representing Montana at the federal level. And you can bet I'll do everything in my power to defend a woman's right to choose and receive access to quality health care.** [**Can I count on you to give a donation to protect reproductive freedom in Montana and across the country? clean_body: We can’t risk what’s happening in Oklahoma to happen at the federal level. | = Friend, Across the country, far-right politicians are destroying women’s reproductive freedoms that are enshrined in our constitution. First it was Texas, then Missouri, and then Idaho. But this week, news broke that the Republican-led Oklahoma state House PASSED a near-total ban on abortions. Under this bill, anyone who performs an abortion would face up to 10 years in prison and up to $100,000 in fines. Friend, I need you to know where I stand on this issue. As a mother and public health expert, I’m a firm believer that all women deserve the right to a safe, legal abortion.As a Montanan, I stand by our state’s proud history of supporting the right to privacy. We respect freedom and privacy. It’s in our bones, it’s our way of life, and legislation like this directly attacks a woman’s right to privacy. I think it's shameful that today's GOP legislatures would both undercut policies like paid family leave and comprehensive reproductive care, while still pushing forced pregnancy and birth. It’s hypocritical and we deserve better. If elected, I’d be the only pro-choice woman representing Montana at the federal level. And you can bet I'll do everything in my power to defend a woman's right to choose and receive access to quality health care. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, friend. name: =?utf-8?Q?Steve=20Roberts?=
subject: Judge Jackson's historic confirmation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roberts for Congress
body:
First Black woman ever confirmed to the US Supreme Court! | |
---
| | |
# HISTORY WAS MADE!!!
---
|
---
|
---
| Moments ago, _history was made._

Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson - a Black woman from a working-class family in Florida - was just confirmed to our nation's highest court.

It's taken 230 years for our Supreme Court to reflect the amazing diversity of America - and with Judge Jackson's historic confirmation we've taken one giant step forward in the right direction.

_**I hope you join me - and encourage every single American to join us - and celebrate this moment!**_

But while we all should celebrate, know that if Republicans had been in the majority this moment never would have happened. One **_Republican Senator, Lindsey Graham, literally said they would have never given her a hearing!_**

This is the fight we're in and why it's so critical who we choose to represent us in Washington, DC. We've seen these nasty political tactics up close - and we know they seek to divide us - but when we stand strong and stand together, nothing is impossible.

[Can you pitch in to my grassroots campaign to help me represent Missouri's 1st Congressional District. Just $25 or even $5 will make all the difference in the world.](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=230c3b2eea&e=a088917f89)

We have a long way to go but with your support I know we'll win this race!

~ Steve Roberts

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Why are Democrats Gaslighting America?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
We have to stop them |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f4b5e9acc5&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark Finchem. I am the Election Integrity Patriot leading the vanguard of audits and ballot protection across America. I am also running for Secretary of State in Arizona.

[Right now, we are absolutely dominating our race, and if we keep up the momentum, I will be the next Secretary of State of Arizona.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=207de0ff4a&e=44b8c466b0)

**And it is my singular goal to make sure that Arizona becomes the GOLD STANDARD for election integrity.**
* I will add currency-grade watermarking and protections of the ballot
* I will restore the election process to the people
* I will return to in-person balloting.
* I will stop ballot harvesting
* I will fight fraud at every turn and apply maximum pressure to the Attorney General’s office to make sure that those responsible for election fraud are held accountable to the highest degree.

**And this is why the Left is Scared. _This is why they are gaslighting America._**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=db49836a5b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| They have gotten more outrageous with every claim. First they were just claiming that 2020 was a secure election (what a joke).

Then, they claimed that we were wasting resources by doing an audit (which uncovered undeniable irregularities and fraud).

**Then, they just called us liars – acting like everything we uncovered was made up.**

**_And now – they are claiming that we are trying to steal the 2024 presidential election? This is ridiculous._**

What fantasy land is this? If Alice stumbled into Wonderland and saw such backwards logic, that would have been the craziest thing by far.

There is nothing more blatant than claiming we want to steal the 2024 presidential election when all we want (and clearly state) is there to be free and fair elections for all.

The _Concord Monitor_ claims:

_If Big Lie supporters were willing to install Trump into power before, is there any reason to believe they wouldn’t do it again? They’re running for office on a pledge to do it._

_There’s actually a coalition of America First Secretary of State candidates including candidates in key swing states. We have Jody Hice in Georgia, Mark Finchem in Arizona and Kristina Karano in Michigan. They have all received the coveted Trump endorsement. It would appear that only the most slavish devotees get the nod._

_Here is the most disturbing scenario: if the Democratic candidate wins the popular vote in a battleground state, the pro-Trump forces are prepared to replace electors chosen by the populace with electors hand-picked by legislators, as state legislators control the rules for choosing electors. This is hardly that far-fetched. 147 House Republicans voted to invalidate Biden’s election last time._

**I don’t know about you, but if the Leftist Media is spending all their time fantasizing about attempts to overthrow Democracy, what do you think _they_ are doing?**

Look, folks, this is as transparent as transparent gets.

They are gaslighting America and hoping – praying – that no one notices.

**This is what I am fighting against every day. We have to power forward on election integrity, or the Democrats WILL win. **

[I need your help to push forward ads and education to make sure the people of Arizona are not gaslit into believing the Democrats’ cartoonishly false narrative.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=442b5da6eb&e=44b8c466b0)

[_Can you help me?_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b5113d5666&e=44b8c466b0)

_[Please donate whatever you can today, I am counting on you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6715f80bcd&e=44b8c466b0)_

Thank you for your support!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e59faf2b16&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of State15508 W Bell Rd.STE 101-423Surprise, AZ 85374
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=19a005d4fd) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=19a005d4fd).

Hello,
I happen to know a few genuine heroes. In my book, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky is the definition of today's hero.
Do not forget: This is the same President Zelensky who Donald Trump tried to withhold Javelin missiles from unless Zelensky opened a fake investigation into Joe Biden.
And that is the same phone call that got Trump impeached the first time. The same phone call my Republican opponent Senator Chuck Grassley agreed was “perfect.”
Trump and Grassley sided with Vladimir Putin for 4 years – and now, we are seeing an emboldened Russia rearing its ugly head.
When I defeat Chuck Grassley this November and turn Iowa blue, I will be the most senior military person ever-elected to the United States Senate. You can be sure I’ll always side with democracy and those defending democracy.
Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs are already readying millions of dollars in attacks, but I’m not taking a dime in corporate PAC money, so I’m counting on grassroots donors like you if we’re going to fight back and win.
The early polls show a close race, but we need to raise another $35,000 before our deadline at midnight tomorrow, and right now we’re still short:

Peter,

I want to update you with an exciting announcement:

**Last night, I was honored to receive President Donald J. Trump’s endorsement in my campaign to continue representing the people of Louisiana’s 4th Congressional District.**

For four years, I worked tirelessly to fight for President Trump’s America First agenda, bringing peace, safety and prosperity to ALL Americans.

[ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=85e94cd2ca024518961419d563095db0&_e=Wfh2gnuRwfgy2zNz0VJ6ZXJEHR8P5Su9Bj_JItQtPeeVts-6_VL3m2y-v8BjU1XpwtEUdlU222s5vK1LF3PmdfTNzCEStJ7nE_slZY5l2ouOFx8Vnjcfmj2b1RWtiENkmw_8WcVcOyhE2dPRM0N3xWPNUpMIhOxkWEqcSJzd0Pfj_-aSVdGpmIsmWN-6WKf0keeDk8gDuNO1O1xTHvjzj56iVSebGdVuAgzguHvp6diaIH4eP6Ws9ZwHOTL8CVyIJ-Gk9d8nbfqqJTlyp6Xs1MThih_nZ4kq8DFHW4EQdkX1Q4arFYedIQvHtqLzS2nKiWt0Hvw0AOQmh8u1NiREUrQOUzAdZ68piRMzaLV5sn1E8RpQ5sjuYS_W1ILc4NxV)

Under President Trump, we built the greatest economy in U.S. history, took concrete steps to secure our southern border, projected strength abroad, and fought back against the radical Left EVERY DAY – no matter what they threw at us.

Despite both the House, Senate, and White House being controlled by Democrats, I’ve continued to do what my constituents sent me to Washington to do: fight for the fundamental principles that make our country so great.

And I won’t stop.

I’m humbled to receive President Trump’s endorsement, and I plan on continuing his America First agenda once Republicans regain the majority in November.

[**But we can’t count our chickens before they hatch. Democrats are putting up a serious fight, and they’re consistently raising more funds than our side. Will you stand with me and President Trump to save America?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=85e94cd2ca024518961419d563095db0&_e=Wfh2gnuRwfgy2zNz0VJ6ZXJEHR8P5Su9Bj_JItQtPeeVts-6_VL3m2y-v8BjU1XpwtEUdlU222s5vK1LF3PmdfTNzCEStJ7nE_slZY5l2ouOFx8Vnjcfmj2b1RWtiENkmw_8WcVcOyhE2dPRM0N3xWPNUpMIhOxkWEqcSJzd0Pd9UqHt3HXhSeBJnR7vw1PSyppJHSePVrKduUwhFFHLqybamcczal4MS0ELEsUfRJFrLyv8jGQKmDZ5z2MA1SVOGosothuIDrik20ZAGdS8ZI_5Q5wL0kS9nYu_A8C8-6kM2KCEHt7OGjKZa0DeGJCl-5hXQzKkomycP4-iEi-mWPvNaNj5ciNwCFG1n9_UjDBOO_d14xl9VOftuKPZ_EW2)

Friend, how many more red flags will it take for Washington to treat the existential climate emergency as such?
An alarming report from the UN concluded that the world is heading down a _dangerous trajectory_ due to several nations falling short of their pledges to reduce greenhouse gas emissions.
Meanwhile, you have GOP-kooks making matters even worse here at home with their anti-science propaganda and straight-up negligence.
And let’s be real: Oregonians don’t have to rely on a UN report to know that millions of people are feeling the negative impacts of climate change as we speak. THIS IS AN EMERGENCY, FOLKS.
Desperate times call for desperate measures — but we want to know where YOU stand, friend:
**Do you think Congress should do more to protect the environment and combat climate change?**

clean_body: Matt is waiting for your response: | URGENT: “‘It’s now or never’: World’s top climate scientists issue ultimatum on critical temperature limit” \- CNBC | The climate clock is ticking, and our leaders are taking too long to get anything done. Do you think Congress should do more to protect the environment and combat climate change? | = | = ---|--- Friend, how many more red flags will it take for Washington to treat the existential climate emergency as such? An alarming report from the UN concluded that the world is heading down a dangerous trajectory due to several nations falling short of their pledges to reduce greenhouse gas emissions. Meanwhile, you have GOP-kooks making matters even worse here at home with their anti-science propaganda and straight-up negligence. And let’s be real: Oregonians don’t have to rely on a UN report to know that millions of people are feeling the negative impacts of climate change as we speak. THIS IS AN EMERGENCY, FOLKS. Desperate times call for desperate measures — but we want to know where YOU stand, friend: Do you think Congress should do more to protect the environment and combat climate change? = | = ---|--- Thanks for your support, Team West = = PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress Matt West for Congress PO Box 1926 Beaverton, OR 97075 United States Click here to

name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: Congratulations Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
BREAKING: Ketanji Brown Jackson confirmed by Senate as first Black woman on US Supreme Court **BREAKING: Ketanji Brown Jackson confirmed by Senate as first Black woman on US Supreme Court** Peter,

Earlier today, the Senate voted to confirm Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court. This is a historic moment – Judge Jackson is the first Black woman appointed to the Supreme Court, bringing the Court a step closer to reflecting our nation's diversity.

Throughout her career, Judge Jackson has shown a strong commitment to equal justice under the law. And during her confirmation hearings, Judge Jackson proved that she will continue that commitment as a Justice and make historic contributions to the Court.

With the Supreme Court considering cases that could overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , roll back voting rights, and so much more, Judge Jackson's confirmation couldn't come at a more important time. Kim knows that Judge Jackson is eminently qualified to succeed Justice Stephen Breyer and applauds this historic confirmation.

name: Marisa Wood
subject: women's reproductive rights are under attack.
body:
draconian anti-abortion policies and threatening women's constitutional right to reproductive choice. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43897015/339189535/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWIwNDNhNS1kMGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Qoj_jlDLclpD9_h8vKRu2ESGiQhtbU4_aep7eh3HOs=)
Friend,

In case you missed it, the Senate just confirmed Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the United States Supreme Court. This is great news, and it could not have come at a more critical moment for our country.

Right now, GOP-led state legislators across the country are implementing draconian, anti-abortion policies and threatening women's constitutional right to reproductive choice. In Oklahoma, a near-total abortion ban was just passed in the state House that would see doctors literally imprisoned for performing abortions.

Texas and Mississippi both passed laws that severely restrict these freedoms and rights. The Texas law is particularly shocking -- it deputizes private citizens to turn in neighbors who violate the law for a $10,000 bounty.

**It's not just in the states where this anti-choice sentiment is reaching a fever pitch. In Congress, my opponent Kevin McCarthy joined with over 200 other Republican members to urge the Supreme Court to overturn _Roe v. Wade._**

As a mother of a daughter, and a teacher of many young women, I'll make this as clear as possible: I support efforts to expand, not restrict, reproductive rights.

The House passed a critical piece of legislation that would make protections under _Roe v. Wade_ the law of the land -- no matter what the Supreme Court decides. We need the Senate to take up this bill again, and we need it now.

**[Add your name next to mine to tell the Senate that it's high time to pass the Women's Health Protection Act. Our voices are stronger together.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43897016/339189536/-969738095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWIwNDNhNS1kMGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Qoj_jlDLclpD9_h8vKRu2ESGiQhtbU4_aep7eh3HOs=&emci=dd983462-ccb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=85b043a5-d0b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=21170704)**
| ****[Add your name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43897017/339189540/-969738095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWIwNDNhNS1kMGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Qoj_jlDLclpD9_h8vKRu2ESGiQhtbU4_aep7eh3HOs=&emci=dd983462-ccb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=85b043a5-d0b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=21170704)****
---

Thank you,

clean_body: draconian anti-abortion policies and threatening women's constitutional right to reproductive choice. | = Friend, In case you missed it, the Senate just confirmed Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the United States Supreme Court. This is great news, and it could not have come at a more critical moment for our country. Right now, GOP-led state legislators across the country are implementing draconian, anti-abortion policies and threatening women's constitutional right to reproductive choice. In Oklahoma, a near-total abortion ban was just passed in the state House that would see doctors literally imprisoned for performing abortions. Texas and Mississippi both passed laws that severely restrict these freedoms and rights. The Texas law is particularly shocking -- it deputizes private citizens to turn in neighbors who violate the law for a $10,000 bounty. It's not just in the states where this anti-choice sentiment is reaching a fever pitch. In Congress, my opponent Kevin McCarthy joined with over 200 other Republican members to urge the Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade. As a mother of a daughter, and a teacher of many young women, I'll make this as clear as possible: I support efforts to expand, not restrict, reproductive rights. The House passed a critical piece of legislation that would make protections under Roe v. Wade the law of the land -- no matter what the Supreme Court decides. We need the Senate to take up this bill again, and we need it now. | ** Thank you, Marisa Wood Public School Teacher and Democrat for Congress =** | = Marisa Wood is a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in California's 23rd District. 2022 is our best shot in decades to finally defeat McCarthy. Consider supporting Marisa's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: Marisa Wood for Congress, PO Box 12103, Bakersfield, CA 93389. name: Team Erica Smith
subject: We are fueled by YOU (literally!)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US
body:
#
Early voting for our primary election starts in just 21 days, and our team is hard at work connecting with Democratic voters and spreading Erica’s vision for bold change.
But we’ll be honest with you: This is expensive work, and we need significant resources to compete.
Erica doesn’t come from wealth, and we don’t have a war chest full of corporate cash. We’re doing this the right way — we’re relying on a steady stream of small-dollar grassroots donations to power our campaign.
[**We’re building this movement town by town, county by county — but time is running out before early voting starts. Can you chip in to our gas fund and help fuel (literally!) our people-powered movement for NC-01?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/47949?refcode=em20220407-1068&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1068%2E3698%2EixhwCE)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/47949?refcode=em20220407-1068&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1068%2E3698%2EixhwCE)**
As a state senator, Erica worked closely with Governor Roy Cooper to expand Medicaid and protect reproductive healthcare and voting rights in North Carolina.
And in Congress, she’ll continue to fight to lift up families and family farms, raise the minimum wage, provide high-quality broadband and healthcare for all, and build a brighter future for North Carolinians.
Erica is the only candidate who can excite our base and fight back against the far-right Republican forces that are attempting to flip this wide-open seat red in November — but we can’t be out-organized.
[**So, can you chip in $5 towards our next tank of gas and help us reach as many voters as we can in North Carolina’s 1st District before early voting starts?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/47949?refcode=em20220407-1068&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1068%2E3698%2EixhwCE)
Thank you for supporting us every step of the way,
Team Erica Smith

name: Chris Walsh, AlessandraBiaggi.com
subject: Our path to victory
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
#
Friends, it's Chris, Alessandra's campaign manager.
Because this is such a crowded primary, voters often ask me — and our team — why Alessandra is the best Democratic candidate in this race, and what her path to victory looks like. So I wanted to take some time to sketch that out for you today.
**The truth is that Alessandra is the only person in this primary with a clear record of delivering for all New Yorkers.**
In 2018, when she saw that her state senator was working against progressive interests, she challenged him — and won, despite being outspent 10-to-1.
When she was elected, she got straight to work passing bold legislation like codifying legal abortion and historic climate action bills.
She’s the best candidate in this primary because of her history delivering for her community and the people of New York. Look, don’t take my word for it, ask her constituents who elected her for reelection in 2020. She even outperformed Joe Biden in her senate district by _four_ points.
That’s why I know that Alessandra is the candidate to beat. But the other candidates know that, too, and they’ll throw ridiculous amounts of money into stopping her momentum.
**[So please, make a contribution of $5 or whatever you can afford to Alessandra’s campaign today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-april/?refcode=em220407-1-60&refcode2=685_59515_xmNx6T&akid=685%2E59515%2ExmNx6T)**
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-april/?refcode=em220407-1-60&refcode2=685_59515_xmNx6T&akid=685%2E59515%2ExmNx6T)**
Look, I wouldn’t be on Alessandra’s team if I didn’t believe in her and her ability to get things done for the people of NY-3. But no one, not even Alessandra, can win in such a crowded race without lots and lots of support from people like you chipping in small amounts of money when you can.
Thanks for reading,
Chris
Chris Walsh
Campaign Manager

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=685%2E59515%2ExmNx6T).

subject: Congratulations Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson! 🎉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hold the House PAC
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43890586/339156732/-348435730?refcode=hth_monthly_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDExMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDU2MTc5Yy1iMGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FTWev-Vzw1PU-2Al01nS7WrfSbcLGVFddM6xt9QL7ss=)

| | This JUST in, Peter. Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson just became the first Black woman to earn the title of Supreme Court Justice. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43890587/339156733/-367278400?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDExMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDU2MTc5Yy1iMGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FTWev-Vzw1PU-2Al01nS7WrfSbcLGVFddM6xt9QL7ss=&emci=2eed4194-a1b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=4d56179c-b0b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=3254788) History was made today. Black women finally have the representation they deserve at our nation’s highest court. Justice Jackson’s confirmation wouldn’t have been possible without President Biden and our Democratic majorities. Most Republicans remain too partisan to approve of Justice Jackson’s qualifications, and we’re thankful our Democratic representatives didn’t back down. I lost three of my friends in an Islamophobic hate crime. I regularly receive handwritten death threats, like this one below: | [ ](http://clicksp.nidaallam.com/f/a/tilgp6tTdCw8rgURNvNieQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRkMc3NP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2dhLWVtLW5pZGE_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIyMDQwN19lbV9mcl9iMV9wb2xsaW5nYXR0YWNrc19lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yN1U2c3pkckF6UWZ3ZUhzcGY3cVoyTXRVelMmcmVmY29kZTI9MjdVNnN6ZHJBelFmd2VIc3BmN3FaMk10VXpTJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTI3VTZzemRyQXpRZndlSHNwZjdxWjJNdFV6U1cDc3BjQgpiS81IT2KBvX3hUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAcA~~)
---|---
**Yet my opponent or her allies just polled attacks against me that echo the GOP’s hatred and claim our campaign is "radical" and bent on "destruction." This isn't just ugly campaigning— _it's dangerous._** [**_I’m not going to let these attacks stop our campaign from fighting for what’s right. We need to raise $5,000 by midnight to make these attacks backfire and fight them head on. Will you join us and pitch in $27 now? >>_**](http://clicksp.nidaallam.com/f/a/tilgp6tTdCw8rgURNvNieQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRkMc3NP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2dhLWVtLW5pZGE_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIyMDQwN19lbV9mcl9iMV9wb2xsaW5nYXR0YWNrc19lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yN1U2c3pkckF6UWZ3ZUhzcGY3cVoyTXRVelMmcmVmY29kZTI9MjdVNnN6ZHJBelFmd2VIc3BmN3FaMk10VXpTJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTI3VTZzemRyQXpRZndlSHNwZjdxWjJNdFV6U1cDc3BjQgpiS81IT2KBvX3hUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAcA~~) I ran for office because I wanted to carry on my friends' legacy.

This hateful language makes me fear for my family. We've all seen the rise in hate crimes fueled by division and anger across America.**This isn't a game and campaigns should never come to this.**

As Vice Chair of the NC Democratic Party for four years, I helped found the Interfaith Caucus to bring people of all faiths together to deliver for working people.

**No one in this primary should campaign by playing with Islamophobic dogwhistle attacks and division. That's not who we are.**

The poll also went into other chapters of the GOP playbook, trying to blame me for inflation and higher property taxes, despite the fact I championed property tax relief.

_This should be a contest over who will best help working families, not who will best imitate Republicans._

I'm campaigning on the strength of my ideas, organizing, and track record. That's what I want to be judged for, win or lose. [**_If you want to be a part of our grassroots movement, stand up against division, and show that hate has no place in NC-04 or anywhere else, join us now by chipping in $27 or whatever you can afford >>_**](http://clicksp.nidaallam.com/f/a/tilgp6tTdCw8rgURNvNieQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRkMc3NP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2dhLWVtLW5pZGE_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIyMDQwN19lbV9mcl9iMV9wb2xsaW5nYXR0YWNrc19lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yN1U2c3pkckF6UWZ3ZUhzcGY3cVoyTXRVelMmcmVmY29kZTI9MjdVNnN6ZHJBelFmd2VIc3BmN3FaMk10VXpTJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTI3VTZzemRyQXpRZndlSHNwZjdxWjJNdFV6U1cDc3BjQgpiS81IT2KBvX3hUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAcA~~) | | [Chip in $15 immediately >>](http://clicksp.nidaallam.com/f/a/o3tYdG9a5Bq-RWvBerNl-A~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRkMc3NP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2dhLWVtLW5pZGE_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIyMDQwN19lbV9mcl9iMV9wb2xsaW5nYXR0YWNrc19lbiZhbW91bnQ9MTUmY2RtYz0yN1U2c3pkckF6UWZ3ZUhzcGY3cVoyTXRVelMmcmVmY29kZTI9MjdVNnN6ZHJBelFmd2VIc3BmN3FaMk10VXpTJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTI3VTZzemRyQXpRZndlSHNwZjdxWjJNdFV6U1cDc3BjQgpiS81IT2KBvX3hUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAcA~~)

clean_body: | | ~~ I lost three of my friends in an Islamophobic hate crime. I regularly receive handwritten death threats, like this one below: | ~~ ---|--- Yet my opponent or her allies just polled attacks against me that echo the GOP’s hatred and claim our campaign is "radical" and bent on "destruction." This isn't just ugly campaigning— it's dangerous. ~~ I ran for office because I wanted to carry on my friends' legacy. This hateful language makes me fear for my family. We've all seen the rise in hate crimes fueled by division and anger across America.This isn't a game and campaigns should never come to this. As Vice Chair of the NC Democratic Party for four years, I helped found the Interfaith Caucus to bring people of all faiths together to deliver for working people. No one in this primary should campaign by playing with Islamophobic dogwhistle attacks and division. That's not who we are. The poll also went into other chapters of the GOP playbook, trying to blame me for inflation and higher property taxes, despite the fact I championed property tax relief. This should be a contest over who will best help working families, not who will best imitate Republicans. I'm campaigning on the strength of my ideas, organizing, and track record. That's what I want to be judged for, win or lose. ~~ | | ~~ | ~~ | ~~ | ~ | ~ | ~ Thank you for your support, Nida Allam | ~~ 6409 Fayetteville Rd Ste 120-378 Durham, NC 27713 Paid for by Nida for NC Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Armed with the information she needs to be a voice for Alabamians, Katie has released her plan for Alabama. In the Senate, born-and-bred Alabamian Katie will: ☑️ Support America First immigration policies that will secure our border ☑️ Fight to balance our budget in Washington ☑️ Promote energy and food production independence ☑️ Reduce the size, scope, and reach of the federal government ☑️ Support our men and women in law enforcement ☑️ Stand for the right to life ☑️ Back election integrity by ensuring all elections are secure, fair, and free ☑️ Develop broadband in rural areas to bring all of Alabama into the 21st century ☑️ Always fight to protect our inalienable Second Amendment rights As one of the people Katie hopes to represent in Washington, your support of her plan is paramount. Let her know if you endorse her plan for Alabama via this secure link >> . Thank you, Katie Britt for Alabama Alerts Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Awful COVID Bill Withdrawn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Humiliation and Defeat](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziorRktqP81c6M6gj9ZDW8IIv2BoTGt69uEthYm9Q8WReMA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr7_final&n=1) The Supermajority’s scheme to turn my gas tax bill into a tax increase was such a debacle they’re destroying the evidence it ever happened. Today the Assembly did something no one had ever seen, passing a motion to “strike” the bill out of existence. It was an extraordinary attempt at damage control after the [most humiliating episode](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAyVWTfsh9NwNblTreMSTbyiRSgM-g-lZoUxLPzDYVD-3Q&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr7_final&n=2) for the Legislature in recent memory. But we’re giving them a chance at redemption: another vote on the gas tax is coming soon. Meanwhile, the bill to defund police for not enforcing mask mandates was [withdrawn by the author](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvaGE_dL30m3umomz1M9lIir1bAy9Mx9F2RZvT5wzvAHpJIzVoZ1Y6TZ7DZDRzsW8w&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr7_final&n=3) for a second straight week. I suspect it’s as good as dead, though he claims he’s bringing it up for real in two weeks. We need to keep up the pressure. This follows our defeat of AB 1993, the employer mandate. Five other “Vaccine Work Group” bills haven’t even received a hearing. Citing our [bill tracker](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziopHp8C5NAApBvI0WlVCOedu&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr7_final&n=4), CalMatters reports “the aggressive slate of COVID vaccine bills seems to be facing an uphill battle.” Another awful bill, requiring parents to report the guns in their home to school officials, was also defeated last week. But unfortunately, it’s not all good news. One of the most vile bills ever introduced, AB 2223, has passed its first committee. The legislation could “decriminalize killing newborns days or even weeks after birth.” It will next be heard by the Health Committee, whose members are listed [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=AKG8TJBiJC6bl8o2UC0WCSSMfntM986mrk0aUxjzS_3LTk_lqp07jghAy_MO0IdE&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr7_final&n=5). Finally, new math scores show California 8th graders testing at the level of 5th graders. This is what Newsom calls “a model for the nation.” As we know all too well, California is just the opposite: a warning to the nation. [Help me deliver that warning in Congress](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr7_final&n=6) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAzaxCXOenqUSGLjskQ0l-zJTKRWNe0VtIrxR61-5d2_5A&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr7_final&n=7) Kevin Kiley
California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr7_final&n=8).

subject: Representation matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43891444/339160471/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWIxOGRjZS1iNGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IGGyBAfhUGmBEUv-g_gOh0r4HCny5xtLn8daIu06St8=&emci=af7c71c1-a9b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=e9b18dce-b4b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=26261389)

| | **I can't get this smile off of my face today, now that Ketanji Brown Jackson has been confirmed to be our country's next Supreme Court Justice.** There are so many reasons why I am excited about this historic nomination, but let me tell you about one reason I'm feeling hopeful today about the future of our country: Growing up, I looked up at our country's leaders and wondered if any of them looked like me. When I was little, I wanted to serve this country in some way, but didn't feel like I had someone to look up to who looked like I did. After having been the second Korean American elected to Congress, I never knew how humbled I would be to serve as a leader and role model for kids across the country and my own two boys. **Representation matters.** With Judge Jackson now confirmed, a generation of young Black women will see someone who looks like them on the nation's highest court, **_for the first time in our country's history._** This victory is a long time coming – long overdue – and is tremendously important. I hope it is the first of many like this. Our Supreme Court and our whole country are better for today's massive victory. **And today is just the beginning.** _Andy_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll name: John Fetterman
subject: Well, Politifact just weighed in…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
(It’s time for one of my favorite GIFs)
#
Derek,
Yesterday, Politifact reviewed Conor Lamb’s super PAC attack ad against me and rated it as...
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47021?refcode=em20220407-5301&t=1&akid=5301%2E434096%2Evn-uiU)
Yep. The verdict is in — and the fact-checkers agree that the ad was spreading stone-cold, Republican-style lies about me. That Truth-O-Meter is off the chain.
**Which means it’s time for one of my favorite GIFs 👇**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47021?refcode=em20220407-5301&t=2&akid=5301%2E434096%2Evn-uiU)
But guess what? **The ad is STILL running in multiple media markets across PA!**
I need this team’s help to make sure we’re able to counter these baseless attacks + get our *real* message out to voters ASAP.
**[My Democratic primary opponent is spending nearly half a million dollars to spread lies about me across PA. Please help us fight back right away by chipping in anything you can spare »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47021?refcode=em20220407-5301&t=3&akid=5301%2E434096%2Evn-uiU)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47021?refcode=em20220407-5301&amounts=5&t=22&akid=5301%2E434096%2Evn-uiU)**
Call me crazy, but I don't think fellow Democrats should do the GOP’s job for them. That’s why I’m proud that we’re running an honest, people-powered campaign. And I’m so glad you’re part of it.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220407-5301-footer&t=23&refcode2=5301_434096_vn-uiU&akid=5301%2E434096%2Evn-uiU)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=5301%2E434096%2Evn-uiU)

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Looking for 5,000 signatures before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
It's so important to show we're all in this together
#

Friends,
When I decided to launch this campaign for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania, there was one thing I knew from the very beginning.
There's no way I can win this race for working families and flip this open Senate seat alone. It's something we can only accomplish together.
So, with less than six weeks left before our May 17 primary, I'm asking you to do something important today to show you're a part of this team.

clean_body: It's so important to show we're all in this together Friends, When I decided to launch this campaign for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania, there was one thing I knew from the very beginning. There's no way I can win this race for working families and flip this open Senate seat alone. It's something we can only accomplish together. So, with less than six weeks left before our May 17 primary, I'm asking you to do something important today to show you're a part of this team. Being a part of this movement means fighting for health care for everyone, standing up for workers, pushing for science-backed climate justice, and so much more. And with Pennsylvania being the most important Senate race this year, we’ve got to show that we have the momentum to take our movement for economic, racial, and environmental justice all the way to Washington. It may seem like a small action, but something as simple as signing on to say you support our work makes a real difference. So I hope you'll add your name today to show you stand with working families and with the movement we're building. It would mean so much to have your support. Will you be one of the 5,000 people who stand with our campaign today? Thanks so much for being a part of this, Malcolm * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 3254 Philadelphia, PA 19107 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, to unsubscribe.
