body:
|
---
| | We're so excited and proud to share our new video with you, Peter. Take a look: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43897242/339205533/694633305?refcode=2022-04-07-vid&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=471dc80d-d8b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzFkYzgwZC1kOGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oAw4b67CkQcEM80shf0vfeLR5R3xl93bspoC_XAmEI0=) **[Check out the video now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43897243/339205541/694633305?refcode=2022-04-07-vid&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=471dc80d-d8b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzFkYzgwZC1kOGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oAw4b67CkQcEM80shf0vfeLR5R3xl93bspoC_XAmEI0=)** We think Peter DeFazio says it pretty well: **Val is the Democrat with the record of fighting and winning for Oregon's families.** Period. It's a simple message, but the stakes couldn't be higher, Peter. For decades, the radical right has been trying to strip away protections for working people while lining the pockets of the ultra-rich. In 2020, Washington Republicans spent millions trying to drown out the voices of working Oregonians so they could install Donald Trump's hand-picked candidate in this seat. Now, they're getting ready to try again. _We're not letting that happen._ There's too much on the line, from combating climate change to ensuring a fair day's pay for a fair day's work to defending our democracy itself. **That's why our movement of nurses, teachers, firefighters, environmental activists, and thousands of grassroots supporters like you is growing every day. And together, we're going to send Val to Washington to keep fighting for us.** **[Check out the video clean_body: | | | We're so excited and proud to share our new video with you, Peter. Take a look: = = We think Peter DeFazio says it pretty well: Val is the Democrat with the record of fighting and winning for Oregon's families. Period. It's a simple message, but the stakes couldn't be higher, Peter. For decades, the radical right has been trying to strip away protections for working people while lining the pockets of the ultra-rich. In 2020, Washington Republicans spent millions trying to drown out the voices of working Oregonians so they could install Donald Trump's hand-picked candidate in this seat. Now, they're getting ready to try again. We're not letting that happen. There's too much on the line, from combating climate change to ensuring a fair day's pay for a fair day's work to defending our democracy itself. That's why our movement of nurses, teachers, firefighters, environmental activists, and thousands of grassroots supporters like you is growing every day. And together, we're going to send Val to Washington to keep fighting for us. = Team Val = Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. ---|--- | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. By donating through this email, you agree that the first $5,000 of your contribution will be deposited in House Majority PAC's Contribution Account and the remainder in House Majority PAC's Non-Contribution Account. You may also designate a different allocation formula below. You also agree that this allocation formula may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution to the Contribution Account.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: We need 35 endorsements in 35 min
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
I've come to the decision that as it pertains to the next chapter in my public service, the best move is no move at all. I'm running for reelection an It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=f4461b1e0a5e4b5b851ee5494cd1f557&_e=YVh_KOcKWhAyDa75O1J-O5NbcFduWa-NvNylJbZx_k4tlX2Mk2ZhFM1KGAfyY7_3EuDa6ghDAnOy5cneCiqGNpNC7mu96YeyTGXCGDvtbEaG7f59Gp_DU3QIQoUJ1OwYkKaG2olFUjGFWoieMp1f6bQ2chgBCpz06_-VYSGPeTRiRW-q7sVG4X7s8fO87naQvX02jxC4z80IWTiuLmw2DvWRhIORGP93pmsyW2uLs87-X-x9CtOfAmJlkuVGBDThZHGe2YKNwMgVLIGQyzV7htqpDcBM7xJAYxunL6qaWS0U4P0yZWA7lXjHJ37F6e0HPTicr_7idcrb6wkSPGQy7GlqbsDZFbcx9S-g4zXLyc_juWHy90HGYXa870uf75KSsdSI6IsvvZgfkaU9kFgK0JqY9100nu3ekpXmjN23_VZozMT2jU7QEw8-I0iTf8gdp6QWX6L94cCSFlHGHYRCQQox4nOXe3l___ospL7RZac%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been fighting for you and for the truth since I first was elected to Congress in November 2006. Since then, the voters of Ohio’s 4th Congressional District have continued to put their faith in me and have sent me back for two-year stints ever since.

I have never - and will never - take a single vote for granted. Ever. I will continue to work hard for every single vote; I’ve watched a lot of people lose their jobs because they forget who they report to; the American people.

**I will never take the position I currently hold for granted**.

For as long as the folks I represent continue putting their faith in me, **I’ll keep fighting every single day to make America a better version of itself. I promise you that.**

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=f4461b1e0a5e4b5b851ee5494cd1f557&_e=YVh_KOcKWhAyDa75O1J-O5NbcFduWa-NvNylJbZx_k4tlX2Mk2ZhFM1KGAfyY7_3EuDa6ghDAnOy5cneCiqGNpNC7mu96YeyTGXCGDvtbEaG7f59Gp_DU3QIQoUJ1OwYkKaG2olFUjGFWoieMp1f6bQ2chgBCpz06_-VYSGPeTRiRW-q7sVG4X7s8fO87naQvX02jxC4z80IWTiuLmw2DvWRhIORGP93pmsyW2uLs87-X-x9CtOfAmJlkuVGBDThZHGe2YKNwMgVLIGQyzV7hhSTWLHTSGr6fA-pHyxsWMTjyij0-tfylu2MUeDJeRGGPy0IBupxGRhgi1KgrrHd95_7ZW37ZWZi1MMSglihHShvTDjEi-L7cQfF9X50MYwiVZZDE1qzpvXxNdXFgoiSR2Kle9Ye5dASKTp2xBqnmlBc2B1tcIpVuXWzCu3-MvmVm-Fz_OFrxIsetpbosDAMwHf71Kk65Xj9vqy7Wrulpvg%3D)
I’ll work to hold the mainstream media accountable.
I’ll work to make sure you have all of the information YOU need when you go vote.

I’ll work to make sure Democrats in positions of power are held accountable for their lies to the American people; NO Representative should be out for personal gain when serving the American people in an ELECTED office.

But first, I have to win reelection. **[My primary on May 3rd is fast approaching and today I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll endorse me for re-election](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=f4461b1e0a5e4b5b851ee5494cd1f557&_e=YVh_KOcKWhAyDa75O1J-O5NbcFduWa-NvNylJbZx_k4tlX2Mk2ZhFM1KGAfyY7_3EuDa6ghDAnOy5cneCiqGNpNC7mu96YeyTGXCGDvtbEaG7f59Gp_DU3QIQoUJ1OwYkKaG2olFUjGFWoieMp1f6bQ2chgBCpz06_-VYSGPeTRiRW-q7sVG4X7s8fO87naQvX02jxC4z80IWTiuLmw2DvWRhIORGP93pmsyW2uLs87-X-x9CtOfAmJlkuVGBDThZHGe2YKNwMgVLIGQyzV7hrKymyIkoCTp4Ube0-0lpRlJCRvoIOEONOcWMZNzsLElBldTD5YIJ0wL4Pp2WUcCWBCCJmWhQhV8B5_-rKpMamZC4LWtYMW7d-ITkh1C4-Ta5YR6ZDSQdFyQzjRGqyBdFNByrxJo-7d5bHsjZEHReO6P6M2KtL-mn7h0OlD54nHchdm0361jhAFY-caXOJaMVyHV5PjPHlHdryTk1OvGYHU%3D)**.

I’ll only be able to continue fighting on your behalf for as long as I’m in Congress, **[which is why I’m asking for your support today.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=f4461b1e0a5e4b5b851ee5494cd1f557&_e=YVh_KOcKWhAyDa75O1J-O5NbcFduWa-NvNylJbZx_k4tlX2Mk2ZhFM1KGAfyY7_3EuDa6ghDAnOy5cneCiqGNpNC7mu96YeyTGXCGDvtbEaG7f59Gp_DU3QIQoUJ1OwYkKaG2olFUjGFWoieMp1f6bQ2chgBCpz06_-VYSGPeTRiRW-q7sVG4X7s8fO87naQvX02jxC4z80IWTiuLmw2DvWRhIORGP93pmsyW2uLs87-X-x9CtOfAmJlkuVGBDThZHGe2YKNwMgVLIGQyzV7hudos2BAV67OxK0gTDG4A4-xFQFJhE_xkgvZOWW6E4UQyGCZ87usYAcbzX5I8W4kG4DoS0ExqMvoVcdBDRJ90PzhtguzaxBKMvtF2RADjYKuvpCrM37dxRUOvdckNAN3GN4BEzftWQoPjGtDvKfo5pYhZ0Y121SAvpSZyhX5EAICU-QNimUFe0ohMg6OuhL2vT255EQa-XmltuERCysVLmQ%3D)** It’s imperative we have strong conservative voices who are willing to speak up for the truth. I assure you that I’m worthy of your support and **[I hope you’ll offer your endorsement of my candidacy today](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=f4461b1e0a5e4b5b851ee5494cd1f557&_e=YVh_KOcKWhAyDa75O1J-O5NbcFduWa-NvNylJbZx_k4tlX2Mk2ZhFM1KGAfyY7_3EuDa6ghDAnOy5cneCiqGNpNC7mu96YeyTGXCGDvtbEaG7f59Gp_DU3QIQoUJ1OwYkKaG2olFUjGFWoieMp1f6bQ2chgBCpz06_-VYSGPeTRiRW-q7sVG4X7s8fO87naQvX02jxC4z80IWTiuLmw2DvWRhIORGP93pmsyW2uLs87-X-x9CtOfAmJlkuVGBDThZHGe2YKNwMgVLIGQyzV7hkuzEhsCgjQTx9kQ63cZYlIeJjR4kMl70qSUEFJDlvDh_zft4sw4FZK7cgq0RUIcaKcXMSLJrcqCMC4S8-CC4yerPyfgIKomDCzZ7S0gpEdGadVcnsRrvtrp8lFgI4z5wT4XQF3aCCMhQXoKELnvLKvrl7nTVsZI70GiMLdmPDXTDB5HYLiyGIkC9wiCJqFVEhQdymVvnE0w18GYHhY-3YQ%3D)**.

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=f4461b1e0a5e4b5b851ee5494cd1f557&_e=YVh_KOcKWhAyDa75O1J-O5NbcFduWa-NvNylJbZx_k4tlX2Mk2ZhFM1KGAfyY7_3EuDa6ghDAnOy5cneCiqGNpNC7mu96YeyTGXCGDvtbEaG7f59Gp_DU3QIQoUJ1OwYkKaG2olFUjGFWoieMp1f6bQ2chgBCpz06_-VYSGPeTRiRW-q7sVG4X7s8fO87naQvX02jxC4z80IWTiuLmw2DvWRhIORGP93pmsyW2uLs87-X-x9CtOfAmJlkuVGBDThZHGe2YKNwMgVLIGQyzV7hnHjBeqAWDUtlX5LhY0IgiYg4nq4z_0XcG3M_3AGdstPQyAbQgVx03nlmzLRiKg9K1k5i6F_GUfeUBPPO9tfRnLZ5ujLLH44Gsv3tRDySuqXh3XftKdK8OQZnusgldpQPO3075u_2kyCMmJmoRZRuOh3_3UFvwPg66E0QCXSe-ivt8iXM8DfykpEAs-8JUCbguLBvbm8ZQrGx27ZmFIiy_Y%3D)
We’ve got so much work to do in the remaining three years Joe Biden has in the White House.

Biden and his people have no idea what they’re doing and it’s going to take a herculean effort on the part of House Republicans to keep them from ruining our country; to keep Big Tech and big media from colluding to keep the truth about this White House -- and the people at the helm – from the**American people**.

I hope if you’re still reading this email, you’ll **[take a moment to offer your personal endorsement of my campaign](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=f4461b1e0a5e4b5b851ee5494cd1f557&_e=YVh_KOcKWhAyDa75O1J-O5NbcFduWa-NvNylJbZx_k4tlX2Mk2ZhFM1KGAfyY7_3EuDa6ghDAnOy5cneCiqGNpNC7mu96YeyTGXCGDvtbEaG7f59Gp_DU3QIQoUJ1OwYkKaG2olFUjGFWoieMp1f6bQ2chgBCpz06_-VYSGPeTRiRW-q7sVG4X7s8fO87naQvX02jxC4z80IWTiuLmw2DvWRhIORGP93pmsyW2uLs87-X-x9CtOfAmJlkuVGBDThZHGe2YKNwMgVLIGQyzV7hjN9U489GbgNTWOE02dd0lAMDgLvvLNdC-_Q1uG-NsBY2KIsTX7v0swEiPdM61H6kl0XCbI-t0SK0klHKazYikQiadoTP3QCxS0zcxm1QuYIW3b52BPcH-fsN5rP9rvvX13XgMY6wUvnVXZxVKmTAxXlsJH2BXjgZmhs2UuctEHRvu7VsJW0iTvQ_Ui8MUotITvnaIBEgg3PwR0athFhd18%3D)**.

I'm thankful for your support,
Jim Jordan

clean_body: I've come to the decision that as it pertains to the next chapter in my public service, the best move is no move at all. I'm running for reelection an It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight? | Fellow Conservative, I’ve been fighting for you and for the truth since I first was elected to Congress in November 2006. Since then, the voters of Ohio’s 4th Congressional District have continued to put their faith in me and have sent me back for two-year stints ever since. I have never - and will never - take a single vote for granted. Ever. I will continue to work hard for every single vote; I’ve watched a lot of people lose their jobs because they forget who they report to; the American people. I will never take the position I currently hold for granted. For as long as the folks I represent continue putting their faith in me, I’ll keep fighting every single day to make America a better version of itself. I promise you that. I’ll work to hold the mainstream media accountable. I’ll work to make sure you have all of the information YOU need when you go vote. I’ll work to make sure Democrats in positions of power are held accountable for their lies to the American people; NO Representative should be out for personal gain when serving the American people in an ELECTED office. But first, I have to win reelection. . I’ll only be able to continue fighting on your behalf for as long as I’m in Congress, It’s imperative we have strong conservative voices who are willing to speak up for the truth. I assure you that I’m worthy of your support and . We’ve got so much work to do in the remaining three years Joe Biden has in the White House. Biden and his people have no idea what they’re doing and it’s going to take a herculean effort on the part of House Republicans to keep them from ruining our country; to keep Big Tech and big media from colluding to keep the truth about this White House -- and the people at the helm – from theAmerican people. I hope if you’re still reading this email, you’ll . I'm thankful for your support, Jim Jordan Don't want to receive our emails? | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

| | **I'm back from the Senate floor, where I just voted to confirm Ketanji Brown Jackson as this country's next Supreme Court Justice.** I have one word for you right now: _Wow_. What a day, friends. I am humbled and thrilled by what just happened. **Judge Jackson will be a terrific addition to the court – not just because of her record and background, which are among the most accomplished we've ever seen.** But this is about so much more. When my friend and colleague Cory Booker said that no one was going to steal his joy over this momentous occasion, it's impossible not to agree. **Judge Jackson represents a new generation of inclusion for Black women and girls. Alongside Vice President Kamala Harris and leaders in each state across America, we're seeing the dawn of a brighter, more equitable future.** We have a lot of work to do over the coming months to deliver on that promise of hope. body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/lSW7BNyjOQ0a8_mZPB2i_dOu5ZAqBqkB4wVgfPF5HgY=/jaweaYMqfUYAW7Zv0ooyLKVEglS-CWGiga07hfL1Y9c=?refcode=E14984-20220407-KBJConfirmation-header-SCOTUS-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Hey Peter, It's not often I get to send happy emails, but today is one of those times. **The Senate just confirmed Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson as the first Black woman to serve on our Supreme Court!** Despite all the nasty and frankly, racist attacks Judge Brown Jackson has faced throughout her confirmation process (I have been vocal that I don't think she would have received this kind of vitriol if she were a white man...), it is nice to see that at least a few Republicans like Mitt Romney, Lisa Murkowski and Susan Collins chose to be on the right side of history. It's also an example of why winning elections matters. Remember the big wins we had in the Georgia Senate races? Because of those victories, we had the votes to confirm Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson. _Every election matters._ Today I'm taking a deep breath to enjoy the good news and reflect on how far we've come as a country. It's a historic day and I refuse to let it get lost in the news cycle! A big congratulations to an incredibly qualified and brilliant judge. And cheers to winning some of the big fights. \- Josh [DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/lSW7BNyjOQ0a8_mZPB2i_dOu5ZAqBqkB4wVgfPF5HgY=/jaweaYMqfUYAW7Zv0ooyLKVEglS-CWGiga07hfL1Y9c=?refcode=E14984-20220407-KBJConfirmation-SB-SCOTUS-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22)

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43893009/339166365/-1995343361?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2022.04.07_b1_kbj_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2022.04.07_b1_KBJ_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDNmYzVlMi1iOWI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bQyqN7W421uDABhF4KXcDUBTpiB7c99JRcNFRt23xBA=)

Friends --

We watched in awe these past few weeks as Ketanji Brown Jackson moved through her Senate confirmation hearings with grace. She defended the Constitution with conviction and responded to even the most uncivilized questions with respect that they did not deserve. **Ketanji Brown is beyond qualified to serve on the United States Supreme Court, and I am ecstatic she will be our next Supreme Court Justice.**

**[Please, will you join me in congratulating Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson for her confirmation to the Supreme Court?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43893010/339166366/-161086590?refcode=ABD_EM_PET_2022.04.07_b1_KBJ_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2022.04.07_b1_kbj_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2022.04.07_b1_KBJ_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDNmYzVlMi1iOWI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bQyqN7W421uDABhF4KXcDUBTpiB7c99JRcNFRt23xBA=&emci=e4d621f3-a7b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f03fc5e2-b9b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=3200050)** | [SIGN YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43893015/339166368/-161086590?refcode=ABD_EM_PET_2022.04.07_b1_KBJ_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2022.04.07_b1_kbj_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2022.04.07_b1_KBJ_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDNmYzVlMi1iOWI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bQyqN7W421uDABhF4KXcDUBTpiB7c99JRcNFRt23xBA=&emci=e4d621f3-a7b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f03fc5e2-b9b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=3200050)

Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson represents the very best our country has to offer, the manifestation of the American dream. Her parents were public school teachers who grew up during institutionalized segregation and they worked hard to give their daughter opportunities they were systematically denied. Today, Ketanji Brown Jackson stands before us an accomplished Judge and an avid defender of justice. She makes me proud to be an American.

This past year alone, we have seen the reproductive rights of millions of women instantaneously stripped away and witnessed relentless assaults on voting rights that threaten to take us back in time. One of the only viable tools against these affronts to Democracy is the United States Supreme Court. With Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson on the bench, Democrats stand a chance of fighting back against conservative extremism. **Her confirmation to the Court is a hope that all we hold dear will be saved**

We won, Peter.
I’m so excited, honored, and humbled to report that our campaign for the working families in Colorado’s 8th District _**secured the Democratic nomination**_ at last night’s Congressional Assembly, with more than 70% of the vote!
Let that sink in for a minute: _We won_. A Latina, a daughter of immigrants from Mexico, will be the Democratic nominee on the ballot in November; and with a win, will be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress.
**I want you to know how grateful I am for the outpouring of support from family, friends, and neighbors across the 8th Congressional District.** Our grassroots coalition is widespread, diverse, and growing stronger by the day.
As the daughter of immigrants, raised on my dad’s construction worker salary, I know the value of hard work.
As a pediatrician serving patients across CO-08, more than 65% of whom are on Medicaid, I know that the system is no longer working for too many families.
As a state legislator, I’ve worked hard to deliver for working families across Colorado, to solve many of those issues — and I’m proud of what I’ve accomplished to lower healthcare costs, protect choice, expand access to the ballot box, and stand up to big corporations.
_**But there's so much more work to be done.**_
Together, our coalition will ensure that working families from Commerce City up to Greeley will have a representative in Congress who will advocate for them — not just the powerful few. It’s time for our voices — the voices of working Coloradans, too long overlooked — to be represented in Washington. I look forward to growing the Caraveo Coalition through November, so we can together create a better future for working families and for our children.
The toughest and most intense phase of this race is just beginning. If you could give our campaign an extra boost and help us build on this momentum, I’d be grateful for any support you can offer — [_**a grassroots contribution of any amount goes a long way towards building the kind of resilient, small-dollar power we’ll need to win in November.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43893083/339166483/1781007925?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220407nomination2_esc4c_allop_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjFmYThmOC1iOWI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cLlqDDPFYem9cN9Vh9x0W2Y2S4VKSvBQ0PuuZhROA1I=)

clean_body: | Did you hear the news, Peter? Dr. Caraveo swept the primary field at Tuesday night’s Congressional Assembly and won the Democratic nomination for Colorado’s 8th District outright! As campaign manager, I can tell you that this is an absolutely seismic turn of events. Since we won’t have to spend resources on a primary campaign, we can turn our full attention and efforts to taking on the GOP in November — and we can start now. Take a look at Dr. Caraveo’s note about this incredible moment for our campaign, then = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = This race is going to be one of the most competitive in the entire country , so every dollar you give now will go towards helping Democrats hold the House of Representatives so that we can fight for working families. Thank you for all your support! Elana Schrager, Campaign Manager \--------Forwarded message-------- From: Dr. Yadira Caraveo Date: April 6, 2022 Subject: BREAKING: We won the Democratic nomination! = We won, Peter. I’m so excited, honored, and humbled to report that our campaign for the working families in Colorado’s 8th District secured the Democratic nomination at last night’s Congressional Assembly, with more than 70% of the vote! Let that sink in for a minute: We won. A Latina, a daughter of immigrants from Mexico, will be the Democratic nominee on the ballot in November; and with a win, will be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress. I want you to know how grateful I am for the outpouring of support from family, friends, and neighbors across the 8th Congressional District. Our grassroots coalition is widespread, diverse, and growing stronger by the day. As the daughter of immigrants, raised on my dad’s construction worker salary, I know the value of hard work. As a pediatrician serving patients across CO-08, more than 65% of whom are on Medicaid, I know that the system is no longer working for too many families. As a state legislator, I’ve worked hard to deliver for working families across Colorado, to solve many of those issues — and I’m proud of what I’ve accomplished to lower healthcare costs, protect choice, expand access to the ballot box, and stand up to big corporations. But there's so much more work to be done. Together, our coalition will ensure that working families from Commerce City up to Greeley will have a representative in Congress who will advocate for them — not just the powerful few. It’s time for our voices — the voices of working Coloradans, too long overlooked — to be represented in Washington. I look forward to growing the Caraveo Coalition through November, so we can together create a better future for working families and for our children. The toughest and most intense phase of this race is just beginning. If you could give our campaign an extra boost and help us build on this momentum, I’d be grateful for any support you can offer — = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Let's go win this. With gratitude, Yadira | Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests. Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation. = | = | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Kadida Kenner
subject: BREAKING: Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson Confirmed To Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
This is a powerful moment to finally have a justice that reflects the diversity of our nation.
This is a powerful moment to finally have a justice that reflects the diversity of our nation.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43893144/339166664/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220407KBJ_RR_KK_90DO_4_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3MWVjNDQ5LWJhYjYtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a3u9JIMY3bKyDPvhBhphcdA9psHQAX8T4MXc-Op5vQo=)
| **The U.S. Senate just confirmed Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson becoming the 116th Associate Justice of the United States Supreme Court in a _53/47 vote_.**

This is a powerful moment to finally have a justice that reflects the diversity of our nation.

**[Pitch in $40 right now or whatever you can do to help us register one voter and expand the electorate, because when people show up to the polls and vote their values, justices like her sit on the bench.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43893145/339166665/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220407KBJ_RR_KK_90DO_4_G_N_L1&amount=40&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3MWVjNDQ5LWJhYjYtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a3u9JIMY3bKyDPvhBhphcdA9psHQAX8T4MXc-Op5vQo=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43893146/339166666/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220407KBJ_RR_KK_90DO_4_G_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3MWVjNDQ5LWJhYjYtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a3u9JIMY3bKyDPvhBhphcdA9psHQAX8T4MXc-Op5vQo=) Fellow activist,

Today’s bipartisan confirmation of Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson is a groundbreaking and historic moment as she becomes the first Black woman to serve on the highest court in our nation. Additionally, Justice Jackson is the first justice to have been a public defender.

**_Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson belongs on the bench._**

Representation on the United States Supreme Court by eminently qualified judges, like Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson, not only leads to better decision-making and fairer rulings, it builds confidence in the judiciary and provides role models for all people, as well as an example for judges on other, less representative courts.

As Pennsylvanians weigh in on who will represent them in the U.S. Senate this May and November, voters should consider who represents their values and who will vote their values when it matters most. Our U.S. Senators play a major role in providing advice and consent for lifetime appointments to the federal benches. Educating constituents about the role elected officials play, registering _new_ voters and expanding the electorate is the work we are doing every day. **[Registering one voter costs $40. Pitch in $40 right now or whatever you can in honor of this historic day.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43893147/339166667/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220407KBJ_RR_KK_90DO_4_G_N_L2&amount=40&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3MWVjNDQ5LWJhYjYtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a3u9JIMY3bKyDPvhBhphcdA9psHQAX8T4MXc-Op5vQo=)**

Feeling joyous and represented,

Kadida Kenner

_Founding Executive Director
The New Pennsylvania Project_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43893148/339166668/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220407KBJ_RR_KK_90DO_4_G_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3MWVjNDQ5LWJhYjYtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a3u9JIMY3bKyDPvhBhphcdA9psHQAX8T4MXc-Op5vQo=) | _The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented communities of color and immigrant communities. We will register them to vote, provide education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize people to vote in every election._ _[**______**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43893149/339166669/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220407KBJ_RR_KK_90DO_4_G_N_BIO&amount=40&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3MWVjNDQ5LWJhYjYtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a3u9JIMY3bKyDPvhBhphcdA9psHQAX8T4MXc-Op5vQo=)**[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43893150/339166670/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220407KBJ_RR_KK_90DO_4_G_N_BIO&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3MWVjNDQ5LWJhYjYtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=a3u9JIMY3bKyDPvhBhphcdA9psHQAX8T4MXc-Op5vQo=)**_

body:
*Club 45* *PBC Gun Show* | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d89124d29f1c/are-you-free-to-volunteer-in-april-6235973?e=77bc5297c6)

# Dear Patriots,
If you are available to volunteer at either event below -- please reply to this email.

Thank you to ALL who have help and continue to help!!

(1.) WHEN: April 11th 2022
TIME: 5p-6p
WHERE: [150 Australian Avenue
West Palm Beach, Florida, 33406](https://melissamartz.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4170e64cfef2b4eb82baf8e12&id=77bd399742&e=77bc5297c6)
WHAT: Stand outside of *CLUB 45* Wear a Martz for Congress T-shirt while collecting signatures and passing out campaign flyers.

(2.) WHEN: April 16th and 17th
TIME: Saturday: 9:00am - 5:00pm; Sunday: 10:00am - 4:00pm WHERE: [South Florida Fairgrounds](https://melissamartz.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4170e64cfef2b4eb82baf8e12&id=3c57f4088e&e=77bc5297c6) : 9067 Southern Blvd West Palm Beach, FL 33411 WHAT: *Palm Beach Gun show* Man the campaign table. Collect signatures and pass out campaign materials.

-The Melissa Martz Campaign

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43893191/339166941/-241209467?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220406twomonths_gv_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2RiM2NiNi1iYWI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WmVMCY-Bc4nXwGQHZxiAPzjF4e5TZVfJb9tKWPSpLRc=)

Friend, I almost can’t believe it, but **New Mexico’s 2022 primary election is just two months from now on June 7.** That means we only have two months left to travel across NM-02 to meet with voters, hold events, run ads, and do everything in our power to spread the word about our campaign so I become the official Democratic candidate to take on far-right Rep. Yvette Herrell in November. We secured more than 80% of the vote at the New Mexico Democratic Pre-Primary Convention, but two months from today, we need enough voters to come out and show their support so we make it onto the general election ballot. There’s a lot on the line in this toss-up race: good-paying job opportunities, action on climate change, reproductive choice, our public lands, and democracy as we know it. **The path to protecting Democrats’ House majority runs right through NM-02.** I’m ready to fight for each and every one of you in Congress, but in order to do that, we have to pull out all the stops between now and June 7 so we win the primary and go on to flip this seat from red to blue. **[Please, if you can, chip in $10 or whatever you can afford today to help our campaign continue to build momentum over these critical next two months.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43893192/339166942/-241209467?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220406twomonths_gv_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2RiM2NiNi1iYWI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WmVMCY-Bc4nXwGQHZxiAPzjF4e5TZVfJb9tKWPSpLRc=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Friend, I almost can’t believe it, but New Mexico’s 2022 primary election is just two months from now on June 7. That means we only have two months left to travel across NM-02 to meet with voters, hold events, run ads, and do everything in our power to spread the word about our campaign so I become the official Democratic candidate to take on far-right Rep. Yvette Herrell in November. We secured more than 80% of the vote at the New Mexico Democratic Pre-Primary Convention, but two months from today, we need enough voters to come out and show their support so we make it onto the general election ballot. There’s a lot on the line in this toss-up race: good-paying job opportunities, action on climate change, reproductive choice, our public lands, and democracy as we know it. The path to protecting Democrats’ House majority runs right through NM-02. I’m ready to fight for each and every one of you in Congress, but in order to do that, we have to pull out all the stops between now and June 7 so we win the primary and go on to flip this seat from red to blue. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for all you do, Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/51c7345b4b4a/join-us-for-the-us-senate-debate-this-weekend?e=7bbb93570f)
---
| |
---
| | Friend,

Team King is excited to be a part of the U.S. Senate Debate this Saturday, April 9th at 6:00 PM! I look forward to standing on the debate stage and sharing how I plan to #WinforGeorgia and #WinforAmerica as your next Senator.
---
|
---
| Republicans have the opportunity this cycle to take back control of the U.S. Senate and put an end to the Democrats' efforts to destroy the American Dream. It's critical that we vet our candidates and choose the one who is best equipped to retire Raphael Warnock this November.

Today is the LAST day you can sign up for tickets. Please use the link below to RSVP. If you can't make it, you can livestream the event at [whiteco.tv](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=9ea4dfcbde&e=7bbb93570f). Don't forget to VOTE in the straw poll! The straw poll will open at the start of the debate at 6:00 PM. It will be conducted electronically, so whether you're watching online or in person you will be able to participate.
---
| [RSVP HERE](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=eb21758d2b&e=7bbb93570f "RSVP HERE")

| We hope to see you this weekend. Let's #WinforAmerica!

Very Respectfully,

Thanks to the hard work of our volunteers, we've successfully filed our petition to get Kara on the ballot. With more than **twice** the number of signatures required and support coming from all 11 towns in NY-01, the grassroots support behind Kara is undeniable.

A sincere thank you to everyone who went door-to-door to make this happen. We're continuing to rely on volunteers to help us in the next phase of our field efforts. # **Stepping Up for Kara**
Kara is steadfastly committed to progressive values and has the experience to fight for what matters in our community.

That's why our April Plan is straightforward. We'll continue connecting with as many voters as we can, to explain why Kara's experience and her dedication to Long Island make her the right choice for New York's 1st District. When they get to know Kara, they support her.

But just because it's straightforward doesn't mean it'll be easy. That's why we'll need resources and volunteers. And with fewer than 90 days until the primary, we'll need your support.

clean_body: | = Hey team, It's already April — which means we've got less than 90 days until the June primary election! And while that may seem like a good amount of time, it's going to pass before we know it. So I'll get right to business on this month's campaign update — right after I take a moment to ask for your help. We've gotten this far with your support, and to get over the top on primary day, we have to keep up the momentum. = = Kara's on the Ballot | Thanks to the hard work of our volunteers, we've successfully filed our petition to get Kara on the ballot. With more than twice the number of signatures required and support coming from all 11 towns in NY-01, the grassroots support behind Kara is undeniable. A sincere thank you to everyone who went door-to-door to make this happen. We're continuing to rely on volunteers to help us in the next phase of our field efforts. If you have some time, we'd love to have you out there with us sharing Kara's message. Our New Campaign Website Our new campaign website is something we've been working on for a while now, and I'm so pleased to be able to finally share it with you. is now your one-stop shop to learn more about Kara, see her positions on key issues, and find ways to get involved. Kara's Pledge in Plainview, at a recent candidate forum on gun safety and other issues, Kara was the only candidate to pledge that she wouldn't take corporate PAC money to fund this campaign. Kara knows that the corrosive influence of money in politics is at the root of why we haven't seen progress on common sense issues like enacting gun safety measures or lowering prescription drug costs. Kara is out here to represent you, not big money groups and corporate donors. When we say we are powered by the grassroots, we mean it. Kara around NY-01 On March 27th, Kara joined the Pakistani American Society of New York in Hauppauge. Speaking with key stakeholders, Kara reaffirmed her commitment to our diverse communities standing against Islamophobia. = On April 2nd, Kara joined community members in Coram for a spring clean up (bringing her own trash picker and bucket she keeps in her car). = On April 6th, Kara celebrated Southold Democrats' historic wins from 2021 at Greenport Harbor Brewery in Peconic. = Stepping Up for Kara Kara is steadfastly committed to progressive values and has the experience to fight for what matters in our community. That's why our April Plan is straightforward. We'll continue connecting with as many voters as we can, to explain why Kara's experience and her dedication to Long Island make her the right choice for New York's 1st District. When they get to know Kara, they support her. But just because it's straightforward doesn't mean it'll be easy. That's why we'll need resources and volunteers. And with fewer than 90 days until the primary, we'll need your support. = = Kelley Hardon Campaign Manager Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. This open seat is a must win for Democrats to defend our majority in the House and continue driving progress in America, but we can't do it without your help. Make a recurring donation to sustain our movement for the long haul and send Kara to Congress! = =

name: Team Doug
subject: the end of Net Neutrality hurt rural communities
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
One of the biggest challenges working families face in Washington’s Fourth District is broadband access.

Rural communities rely on fast, reliable internet to run our businesses efficiently, access training and education, and so much more.

But when net neutrality ended – **5 years ago as of this month** – broadband internet became even more inaccessible, enabling service providers to charge rural users even more for efficient connectivity.

[The Senate passed a $60+ billion dollar plan to invest in rural broadband but now they’re dragging their feet. Will you be one of the 6,500 petition signatures Doug needs to join him in calling on Congress to strengthen our communities' access to broadband now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43893362/339167796/283027337?refcode=DW_EM_PT_90DO_220407_1_1&refcode2=0ccf4f0a-bcb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=kmA0b1FJQ4XijMh9UXumS5ruCmaBX1dWv6m5VfGi06rQ1AAv7XLL++fIT1Oym6DG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2NmNGYwYS1iY2I2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ksszrytMSGJE6Pp9uSUnpde5yo6I5TbMNUGDazcQ9LI=&emci=35307c03-bcb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=0ccf4f0a-bcb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=7651992) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43893363/339167797/283027337?refcode=DW_EM_PT_90DO_220407_1_1&refcode2=0ccf4f0a-bcb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=kmA0b1FJQ4XijMh9UXumS5ruCmaBX1dWv6m5VfGi06rQ1AAv7XLL++fIT1Oym6DG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2NmNGYwYS1iY2I2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ksszrytMSGJE6Pp9uSUnpde5yo6I5TbMNUGDazcQ9LI=&emci=35307c03-bcb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=0ccf4f0a-bcb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=7651992)**

As a fourth-generation farmer and a business owner, Doug knows that rural businesses have evolved in recent decades to require adequate internet access – in fact, their survival and the local economy often depend on it.

And when the pandemic hit, our communities became even more reliant on the internet, as classrooms and businesses went remote and the only way to gather safely with friends and family became Zoom video calls.

[Reliable internet access is one of the easiest things Congress can do to level the playing field and boost rural economies. Sign on if you agree!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43893364/339167798/283027337?refcode=DW_EM_PT_90DO_220407_1_1&refcode2=0ccf4f0a-bcb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=kmA0b1FJQ4XijMh9UXumS5ruCmaBX1dWv6m5VfGi06rQ1AAv7XLL++fIT1Oym6DG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2NmNGYwYS1iY2I2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ksszrytMSGJE6Pp9uSUnpde5yo6I5TbMNUGDazcQ9LI=&emci=35307c03-bcb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=0ccf4f0a-bcb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=7651992)

Thank you for joining Doug’s call to action,

Team Doug

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, four
moderate Democratic Senate campaigns in 2020 spent $334,997,642 and still
managed to lose. And that doesn’t include what the DSCC and Super PACs
spent.

Some of these races, in Maine and North Carolina, were ones Democrats
should have been able to flip in order to increase the Democratic majority
in the Senate. Others, in South Carolina and Kentucky, were massive money
dumps to campaigns that were never going to win.

Imagine what we could do to elect a wave of progressives to join AOC, Cori
Bush, and Jamaal Bowman in Congress if we had just a fraction of $334
million this election cycle. But our fundraising has actually decreased
each month so far this year. That trend cannot continue if we want to win
our primaries against the same Democratic establishment that raised
hundreds of millions on a handful of moderate, Wall Street-backed, losing
Senate campaigns in 2020.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/102610?refcode=em20220407-22764&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=22764%2E1203867%2Ev5sVR_ ]Peter,
that’s why we have to ask: can chip in
$3 right now? If we raised just .047% of what these 4
losing Senate campaigns raised in 2020, we’d turn our fundraising around
at a critical time (only 6 weeks away from our next primary) and be in a
strong position to add 6 more working-class progressives to the Squad.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/102610?refcode=em20220407-22764&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=22764%2E1203867%2Ev5sVR_ ]Contribute $3

If the Democratic establishment ran more candidates who support Medicare
for All, a Green New Deal, and student debt cancellation, it could compete
in these winnable races against Republicans. Instead, corporate Democrats
stick with their fossil fuel, Wall Street, and Big Pharma funders, and use
corporate-backed talking points. It’s a losing strategy.

Our mission to transform the Democratic Party into a party that delivers
real, progressive, lasting change to the people continues right now as we
try to win our primaries and add more fighters to the Justice Democrats
bloc on Capitol Hill. Can you help us make this a reality?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/102610?refcode=em20220407-22764&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=22764%2E1203867%2Ev5sVR_ ]We don’t take a cent from corporate PACs, and neither do our
candidates. That’s why we’re relying on you to help us raise what we need
to win this year, just a small fraction of what the Democratic
establishment raises. So,
Peter, can you chip in
$3 or anything at all today?

We appreciate anything you can give and all the ways you support our
movement. We know we can only do this together with you.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=22764%2E1203867%2Ev5sVR_ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=22764%2E1203867%2Ev5sVR_ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220407-22764-footer&t=1025&refcode2=22764_1203867_v5sVR_&akid=22764%2E1203867%2Ev5sVR_

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=22764%2E1203867%2Ev5sVR_

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Letitia James
subject: She will be the first, but not the last

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43893505/339168455/265476937?code=jtk422-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWI5YWNhOC1iY2I2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P4c6hbw1Zxv5tipX8k-XYSfEEbOS1nAn5ZMk0nI8JHo=)

Peter, today, history was made.

Moments ago, the Senate voted to confirm Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to serve on the Supreme Court. She will be the first Black woman EVER to sit on our nation’s highest court.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43893506/339168456/-762733335?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk422-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWI5YWNhOC1iY2I2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P4c6hbw1Zxv5tipX8k-XYSfEEbOS1nAn5ZMk0nI8JHo=&emci=05e4397c-21b2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f1b9aca8-bcb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)
For generations, hardworking and qualified Black women have been shut out of positions of power and recognition. But we didn’t sit idly by and wait for an invitation to the table. We continued to work hard, determined to topple over every last barrier.

**And now, finally, this seemingly impenetrable and unreachable glass ceiling has been shattered.**

Judge Jackson’s confirmation today WILL change the course of history. Because for the first time in the court’s 233-year history, Black women will finally see themselves represented. Vice President Kamala Harris put it best when she said this: **_“Without any question, she will be the first, but not the last.”_**** _ _**

This historic moment, though long overdue, is sorely needed. Every day, the overwhelmingly conservative Supreme Court makes decisions that directly harm Black women – from the doctor’s office to the ballot box. But now, with Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson confirmed, we will finally have something we have always needed on the nation’s highest court: an ally.

**Peter, I’m so thrilled for Judge Jackson and her well-deserved and historic confirmation to the Supreme Court. That’s why I set a goal to gather 5,000 fearless fighters’ signatures to congratulate Judge Jackson with me.

[Will you take 30 seconds now to commemorate this special moment with me and add your signature to Judge Jackson’s card? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43893507/339168457/-762733335?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk422-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWI5YWNhOC1iY2I2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P4c6hbw1Zxv5tipX8k-XYSfEEbOS1nAn5ZMk0nI8JHo=&emci=05e4397c-21b2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f1b9aca8-bcb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Sign our card!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43893508/339168458/-762733335?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk422-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWI5YWNhOC1iY2I2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P4c6hbw1Zxv5tipX8k-XYSfEEbOS1nAn5ZMk0nI8JHo=&emci=05e4397c-21b2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f1b9aca8-bcb6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)

Letitia

| Coloradoan, I am thrilled to have been endorsed by my friend, Former Attorney for President Donald J. Trump, Dr. John Eastman. Dr. Eastman was canceled after he agreed to represent President Trump in his fight to find the truth in the 2020 Presidential Election. Dr. Eastman is currently representing the group known as PARABLE in their suit against Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold to overturn Proposition 107 and 108. I am a named plaintiff in the case brought by PARABLE.
Dr. John Eastman is not only a phenomenal attorney but I have come to call him a friend. It is an honor to be endorsed by such a fighter for election integrity and the battle to stop the steal in 2020. It is an honor to be represented by Dr. Eastman in the PARABLE V. GRISWOLD Lawsuit. Together we will continue to work together to restore election integrity to our great state
---
| "Laurel has my enthusiastic endorsement. She's rock solid on the issues, and also understands that election integrity is key to having a government under the control of we, the sovereign people of the United States."
\-- Dr. John C. Eastman Former Attorney for President Donald J. Trump

Sincerely,

body:
Selker Yard Signs are now available!!

Please contact Amanda Larson for a yard sign(s):
[amandalarson199@gmail.com](mailto:amandalarson199@gmail.com)

Please let us know:
\- How many yard sign(s) would you like?
\- What address would you like them delivered to?
\- Could you pick them up at the Corvallis RiverRocks concert 1-5pm on April 16th in Central Park in Corvallis?

As always, you can reach the Selker campaign through _Contact Us_ on the campaign website:
[Selker4congress.org](http://selker4congress.org/)

Would be helpful:
\- Please confirm a good phone number where we can reach you, to coordinate delivery
\- If you attend your local Farmer’s Market, would you be willing to take some Yard Signs to your local Farmer’s Market?

Melanie Place

name: Maggie Toulouse Oliver
subject: BREAKING → Historic confirmation of Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson to SCOTUS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Maggie_
body:
We are living in a powerful moment today.
We are living in a powerful moment today.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43893705/339169442/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220407Confirmed_VR_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjM5N2VjZC1iZGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8nUlxhbpMNaem7EufZe0yuDeuNESvYvL3aQMW1FDPa4=)
Team,

We are living in a powerful moment today. The first African American woman has been confirmed to be a Supreme Court Justice.

This is why I do this work. When people show up to the polls and vote, someone like Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson gets nominated to the highest bench in our nation. It is critical that we continue fighting for voting rights here in New Mexico. It has been 55 years since the first Black man was appointed to the Supreme Court. It was way past time for a Black woman to be confirmed.

This bipartisan Senate confirmation truly honors the values we hold dear in this country.

Increasing access to the ballot box and ensuring all voices are heard in fair, honest elections is critical to moving our state forward. I will continue to fight for voting rights and election transparency for all New Mexicans. [**Will you pitch in $20 right now so I can continue to fight for you? We need more Black women on the bench, and I will continue to fight to ensure no one is locked out of our democracy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43893706/339169443/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220407Confirmed_VR_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjM5N2VjZC1iZGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8nUlxhbpMNaem7EufZe0yuDeuNESvYvL3aQMW1FDPa4=)
_**______[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43893707/339169444/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220407Confirmed_VR_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjM5N2VjZC1iZGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8nUlxhbpMNaem7EufZe0yuDeuNESvYvL3aQMW1FDPa4=)**_
In solidarity,

Maggie Toulouse Oliver
_Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence.

She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. **Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! Make a contribution today >>**_ _**______[DONATE $25 MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43893708/339169445/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220407Confirmed_VR_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_BIO&amount=25&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjM5N2VjZC1iZGI2LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8nUlxhbpMNaem7EufZe0yuDeuNESvYvL3aQMW1FDPa4=)**_

clean_body: We are living in a powerful moment today. We are living in a powerful moment today. = Team, We are living in a powerful moment today. The first African American woman has been confirmed to be a Supreme Court Justice. This is why I do this work. When people show up to the polls and vote, someone like Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson gets nominated to the highest bench in our nation. It is critical that we continue fighting for voting rights here in New Mexico. It has been 55 years since the first Black man was appointed to the Supreme Court. It was way past time for a Black woman to be confirmed. This bipartisan Senate confirmation truly honors the values we hold dear in this country. Increasing access to the ballot box and ensuring all voices are heard in fair, honest elections is critical to moving our state forward. I will continue to fight for voting rights and election transparency for all New Mexicans. = _____= In solidarity, Maggie Toulouse Oliver Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence. She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! Make a contribution today >> ___= Friends of Maggie PO Box 473 Albuquerque, NM 87103 United States | Paid for by Friends of Maggie Contributions or gifts to Friends of Maggie are not tax deductible. _

name: Wade Herring
subject: Confirmed!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wadeparade?refcode=whem0407 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wadeparade?refcode=whem0407]
Peter –
In all my years as a law student and a lawyer, I’ve read over many Supreme Court cases – none of which contained decisions made by a Black woman.
With today’s historic confirmation of Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the U.S. Supreme Court, that legacy has changed.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/unnamed_2.png]
As one of the most exceptionally qualified nominees in history and as the only former public defender to sit on the bench, she will bring a thoughtful and independent perspective to our justice system.
It has taken over 230 years to select a Black woman to the bench, and I’m hopeful this sets a new precedent for the future.
Congratulations, Supreme Court Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson!
Onward,
Wade
https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1 [https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1] https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1 [https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1] https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringforcongress/]

name: Jim Jordan
subject: POLL: Will you personally endorse me for reelection?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
I've come to the decision that as it pertains to the next chapter in my public service, the best move is no move at all. I'm running for reelection an It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cef5cbf089674b4787b3c071d564d9bb&_e=7Ci0_jk62x0S-zp3fkVnI2Y-V05GUW9S73vjfmk_U3jEjY6mjyJP3FPK6AXqRBjReHyw2nc9Rs7vyifb5qjx0nR5q2zE5azyECFv1jUyL8DnNfVbaBVENreR6Tyrq3c1AziobZvjV2PF5gzhzjCstCytRRGWTV2mEjZ4VKxV8HODp6lohhAz1dADlkHmA4urfscu2fnfTX_f1fqIBSxM4GqLATq27AA6nGkE4uMKgPGA07jHYYs-8ueQyet4RLdOoDS0JthdtNesxKiD8Jpj9HPnbRwT7qGsm9hBRqWIIEmIm76eGE2x85fjZipidFpf63jvZIwq8HqLE0Fp9Xq4yyIbt-_kRdQg-z3ExjnxpsnxrXVZEQANQjpBWwG4bULhGa9oy5lLd3zRyYYGqTzOCRx9gWWi-hkEPjxJDMoHmxWJwDiKkq_0okcgNXTKSdjxLiGr7vMsRYmEVZbFOGuWAv0TCutXW6XFMcTDD2HACKY%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been fighting for you and for the truth since I first was elected to Congress in November 2006. Since then, the voters of Ohio’s 4th Congressional District have continued to put their faith in me and have sent me back for two-year stints ever since.

I have never - and will never - take a single vote for granted. I will continue to work hard for every single vote; I’ve watched a lot of people lose their jobs because they forget who they report to; the American people.

**I will never take the position I currently hold for granted**.

For as long as the folks I represent continue putting their faith in me, **I’ll keep fighting every single day to make America a better version of itself.**

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cef5cbf089674b4787b3c071d564d9bb&_e=7Ci0_jk62x0S-zp3fkVnI2Y-V05GUW9S73vjfmk_U3jEjY6mjyJP3FPK6AXqRBjReHyw2nc9Rs7vyifb5qjx0nR5q2zE5azyECFv1jUyL8DnNfVbaBVENreR6Tyrq3c1AziobZvjV2PF5gzhzjCstCytRRGWTV2mEjZ4VKxV8HODp6lohhAz1dADlkHmA4urfscu2fnfTX_f1fqIBSxM4GqLATq27AA6nGkE4uMKgPGA07jHYYs-8ueQyet4RLdOoDS0JthdtNesxKiD8Jpj9A1mX_h6X8QL1Bff3Ra2V5vskGopxFxuwCyihLxCAWsTV6hiVL05RVo2JuMKgO_muu1_Vm2-abu-ZVC0thsFbcdTtCpthVglMrx2sV6IvTNdOKJBpj2vTRbtDrIdbKuG63oQsp6yc0o3G7sQ0vkwl14OIKo4RaXifeij5cjBYryS4mjrT2snr0Dr0X5ob5XygHy-EyEroZNTu1W0UtdcON8%3D)
I’ll work to hold the mainstream media accountable.
I’ll work to make sure you have all of the information YOU need when you go vote.

I’ll work to make sure Democrats in positions of power are held accountable for their lies to the American people; NO Representative should be out for personal gain when serving the American people in an ELECTED office.

But first, I have to win reelection. **[My primary on May 3rd is fast approaching and today I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll endorse me for re-election](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cef5cbf089674b4787b3c071d564d9bb&_e=7Ci0_jk62x0S-zp3fkVnI2Y-V05GUW9S73vjfmk_U3jEjY6mjyJP3FPK6AXqRBjReHyw2nc9Rs7vyifb5qjx0nR5q2zE5azyECFv1jUyL8DnNfVbaBVENreR6Tyrq3c1AziobZvjV2PF5gzhzjCstCytRRGWTV2mEjZ4VKxV8HODp6lohhAz1dADlkHmA4urfscu2fnfTX_f1fqIBSxM4GqLATq27AA6nGkE4uMKgPGA07jHYYs-8ueQyet4RLdOoDS0JthdtNesxKiD8Jpj9EA3LoAPv-D-dh-ujE1L2FsR2jGI9WIDGi_N7Bg4Gls2_2egTe-bjtSwvqupP1Xgg9rWbDVRyRVixrz1FT85xv7UUgW0mcneHMlnB_K65lPsvhTVhbDhsXKQ02Ny21oKWs0icee13dDk0oHgGZlytiMGXWaj2ocnKQZiYu28LXO1Rtk8gz1FRLuXZ5dmIo_RTX5GFp01iL-dRF3WDXHao6s%3D)**.

I’ll only be able to continue fighting on your behalf for as long as I’m in Congress, **[which is why I’m asking for your support today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cef5cbf089674b4787b3c071d564d9bb&_e=7Ci0_jk62x0S-zp3fkVnI2Y-V05GUW9S73vjfmk_U3jEjY6mjyJP3FPK6AXqRBjReHyw2nc9Rs7vyifb5qjx0nR5q2zE5azyECFv1jUyL8DnNfVbaBVENreR6Tyrq3c1AziobZvjV2PF5gzhzjCstCytRRGWTV2mEjZ4VKxV8HODp6lohhAz1dADlkHmA4urfscu2fnfTX_f1fqIBSxM4GqLATq27AA6nGkE4uMKgPGA07jHYYs-8ueQyet4RLdOoDS0JthdtNesxKiD8Jpj9Pys0hWOuv2FHpHdQWL_ixfEEAkSe4snRfAuSfVVXWAVd4XN191MVcYthstxU5FwrKC2DpGpQ1WI2rNbhyJGQFtXyU8as23okpKJUpv3-Z_z_C4EIewHhNYPqh3nsAEhKihfL_kxw_fVYyEHl1A4e6CXI1XJza7zEi1nPLLDh85r1YoKSXrIJ2Yg5efsJ2q0J1npHi6MZ6AY9-EOwxygfiA%3D)** It’s imperative we have strong conservative voices who are willing to speak up for the truth. I assure you that I’m worthy of your support and **[I hope you’ll offer your endorsement of my candidacy today](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cef5cbf089674b4787b3c071d564d9bb&_e=7Ci0_jk62x0S-zp3fkVnI2Y-V05GUW9S73vjfmk_U3jEjY6mjyJP3FPK6AXqRBjReHyw2nc9Rs7vyifb5qjx0nR5q2zE5azyECFv1jUyL8DnNfVbaBVENreR6Tyrq3c1AziobZvjV2PF5gzhzjCstCytRRGWTV2mEjZ4VKxV8HODp6lohhAz1dADlkHmA4urfscu2fnfTX_f1fqIBSxM4GqLATq27AA6nGkE4uMKgPGA07jHYYs-8ueQyet4RLdOoDS0JthdtNesxKiD8Jpj9BNz9S4JnzBaOIOyutDQL6N4a21uwfuundC8c-GYVirtT4673vU1APpD9nS4EmtUhg3y-rkbFcdpAFMJ3ckQiugDYwAtCxJO9DIPe87Cn6yA_dT46JFT6ChYqL3Dmf8MgUyXvZNMm34Mddw-np8sSs3N3IUznVG46oChs5avljtL3Ma00XUa9Z3qJy7MXLDy0b7mAbLbW-8Jc2NxJ-TcjPI%3D)**.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cef5cbf089674b4787b3c071d564d9bb&_e=7Ci0_jk62x0S-zp3fkVnI2Y-V05GUW9S73vjfmk_U3jEjY6mjyJP3FPK6AXqRBjReHyw2nc9Rs7vyifb5qjx0nR5q2zE5azyECFv1jUyL8DnNfVbaBVENreR6Tyrq3c1AziobZvjV2PF5gzhzjCstCytRRGWTV2mEjZ4VKxV8HODp6lohhAz1dADlkHmA4urfscu2fnfTX_f1fqIBSxM4GqLATq27AA6nGkE4uMKgPGA07jHYYs-8ueQyet4RLdOoDS0JthdtNesxKiD8Jpj9N9W2p7iT5R2oIlZayDhsKO3yVz5ibmeVO0hksy2PDL4C9kYAOd-dpXSukbmKMLq9By1fGaVTuHmaURBeDxJP96m-92HR7k17pgL86Wd6ERUN3PNI7OFnDpwN3zh89Hgs7pDURLW5WqaV4-ejJSQAwsp6GaeiBgdyh8VS7IwEggXcN-Hm2VcSUbMp-W5ESjKq1QvNFc_0pV22W4zEDqkWLE%3D)
We’ve got so much work to do in the remaining three years Joe Biden has in the White House.

Biden and his people have no idea what they’re doing and it’s going to take a herculean effort on the part of House Republicans to keep them from ruining our country; to keep Big Tech and big media from colluding to keep the truth about this White House -- and the people at the helm – from the**American people**.

I hope if you’re still reading this email, you’ll **[take a moment to offer your personal endorsement of my campaign](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cef5cbf089674b4787b3c071d564d9bb&_e=7Ci0_jk62x0S-zp3fkVnI2Y-V05GUW9S73vjfmk_U3jEjY6mjyJP3FPK6AXqRBjReHyw2nc9Rs7vyifb5qjx0nR5q2zE5azyECFv1jUyL8DnNfVbaBVENreR6Tyrq3c1AziobZvjV2PF5gzhzjCstCytRRGWTV2mEjZ4VKxV8HODp6lohhAz1dADlkHmA4urfscu2fnfTX_f1fqIBSxM4GqLATq27AA6nGkE4uMKgPGA07jHYYs-8ueQyet4RLdOoDS0JthdtNesxKiD8Jpj9NfOARiLq6SQ-W4UEspWwljs-yeQla-QkYHmpECFzBSgoHW3J0CkaC8nb4lcaLW8M1MjYRtzFGQtLpkWj3puzOr1nAEvzGN7GlZyI1g_sD29WC7IuCIv2nP5F4AxLJJnkKKjhgOLOoC8YspJFIFrXGnSAv7UerYaEfAt_9f0ErJcEe-ppR07dPb52zTFG1fqaMhwAQ5ksD1EA1985jUOWzU%3D)**.

Thank you so much,
Jim Jordan

Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=cef5cbf089674b4787b3c071d564d9bb&_t=0WFhsJFw77k2wRVKGJqGx_up5nGMEsAYaYNyWOmH2PA7H0Hag1QRmh0_YPHpL9kncofgJ4LGpTBkXPvakkiRqMKDqXsm6nYsQAO__5txZFIRPx04cXoAwdK1BWx1vtuKZw97IovZsu-v8Qf_2hAcgmqrDTeNAHXiE72ObAuHLKY%3D)

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015

name: John Lira
subject: Gonzales is happy to leave people with chronic illness behind
body:
Peter, once again, Rep. Tony Gonzales has let us down.

Gonzales voted against The Affordable Insulin Now Act that would cap insulin prices at either $35 a month or 25% of an insurance plan's negotiated price, whichever is lower.

Thankfully, despite the efforts of representatives like Gonzales, the bill still passed in the House and we are one step closer to seeing affordable healthcare for all in Texas.

But Gonzales sent a message with his vote — a message that he is happy to leave people with diabetes and other chronic illnesses behind.

Over 2 million Texans live with diabetes and too many of those people are making painful choices every day about skipping or rationing their insulin.

Peter, no one should have to choose between taking life-saving medication and putting food on the table or a roof over their head.

What possible explanation could Gonzales have for attempting to keep the people of TX-23 from being able to access affordable insulin?

It’s time we tell him that we hear him loud and clear and we will hold him accountable for decisions against affordable healthcare by voting him out of office this year.

Can you make a donation right now to power our fight to kick Tony Gonzales out of office so I can get to Washington and fight for people with diabetes and other chronic illnesses, their families, and every member of TX-23 and beyond?

Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220407?refcode=em20220407]

Insulin is not a luxury and receiving the medication you are prescribed should not be a privilege.

We owe it to the millions of Texans living with diabetes and other chronic illnesses to make it as easy as possible for them to get the life-changing, life-saving treatment they need.

I’m ready to get to Washington and get things done. I’m ready to vote for bills like this with the people’s interests and needs behind me — and nothing else.

Make a donation right now to help power this campaign so I can get to Congress and do what Gonzales won’t — fight for the people of TX-23. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220407?refcode=em20220407]

Let’s get to work,
John Lira

Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220407?refcode=em20220407]

https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress [https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress] https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress [https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress]

John Lira for Congress
1721 WW White Rd, Suite 120
#8096
San Antonio, TX 78220
United States
John Lira is a retired member of the US Marines. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Marines or the Department of Defense.

name: Chris Evans, Beto for Texas
subject: Talking to everyone, everywhere
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Beto and our team are back on the road to meet with young people across the state.
#
Hey — it's Chris coming to you with an update from the campaign trail.
Beto and our team are back on the road to meet with young people across the state. We're in Temple today and heading out to Del Rio, Laredo, and McAllen next!
I'll explain more about why this is so important in a moment, but first I have to ask: [Could you chip in $3 or more right now to put gas in the van and fund our next campaign events?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54923?refcode=ema20220407-184009&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=184009%2E444211%2ECn8XwZ)
During Beto's Senate run, we broke records with a historic increase in young voter turnout. In 2018, young voter turnout across Texas was up by **500%** during early voting and up by more than **230%** overall compared to the previous midterm election.
Students and young voters have the power to decide this election and make history in Texas. **That's why we're making an unprecedented investment in organizing young voters** — starting with meeting them where they're at.
Last weekend, Beto rallied with members of the Texas College Democrats in Houston and discussed our positive, unifying vision for a state where every Texan can live to their full potential.
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54923?refcode=ema20220407-184009&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=184009%2E444211%2ECn8XwZ)
It's because of supporters like you that we can make these huge investments in organizing young voters — and build the coalition it will take to bring real, needed change to Texas.
**Together, we're on our way to defeating Greg Abbott. But we need to keep up this momentum if we're going to make history on Election Day.[Please, will you donate $3 immediately to help us continue to organize young voters, spread our positive vision, and elect Beto as Texas' next Governor?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54923?refcode=ema20220407-184009&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=184009%2E444211%2ECn8XwZ)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54929?refcode=ema20220407-184009&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=184009%2E444211%2ECn8XwZ)**
Thank you,
Chris Evans
Communications Director, Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220407-184009-footer&t=23&refcode2=184009_444211_Cn8XwZ&akid=184009%2E444211%2ECn8XwZ)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=24&akid=184009%2E444211%2ECn8XwZ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=184009%2E444211%2ECn8XwZ)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

It’s hard to believe it, but June 7th is coming up fast. That means now more than ever before, With such a critical stage of this election right around the corner, it’s crunch time for our campaign. We need to double down on our efforts over the next two months to ensure that our team prevails on election day. Chip in whatever you can now to help fuel our fight: We need to give everything we’ve got in this final stretch. The future of our campaign and our entire state is on the line. There is still so much left to be done to help push us to November. Our race could disappear on June 7th if our top supporters don’t step up to help RIGHT NOW. That’s why this double impact is CRUCIAL for you to take advantage of – we cannot afford for you to miss out on this opportunity! It’s so important we keep our campaign fueled with the resources it needs to talk to more voters and get our message out there to as many New Mexicans as possible. Please, Peter, We’re running out of time to earn our way to the next step of securing a better future for New Mexico. If we want to make it to the general election and defeat Michelle Lujan Grisham once and for all, we have to win this primary on June 7th. Thank you so much for your support during this critical period of our campaign. I won’t forget those who stepped up and helped me out during these pivotal final two months. Sincerely, Mark Ronchetti | | Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer. Please send checks to Mark Ronchetti for Governor. 8100 Wyoming Blvd. NE Ste - M4, Box 225 Albuquerque, NM 87113 Click to unsubscribe.

We’re so excited: **Ketanji Brown Jackson has officially been confirmed as the first Black female Supreme Court Justice.**

Throughout her hearings, it was clear she has the knowledge, experience and poise to hold this distinguished position.

We want to make sure she knows she has supporters across the country. **[So Peter, will you be one of the people we need from FL and sign your name to congratulate Ketanji Brown Jackson?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43894794/339174881/-1921632477?refcode=ABD_EM_PET_2022.04.07_b1_KJB_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2022.04.07_b1_kjb_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2022.04.07_b1_KJB_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3ZmFlMjQzLWMyYjYtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UBDIZkZ62CBHe4O954iWkca-Ie91SuUTKv7wSd7PG-0=&emci=59a442e4-b6b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=27fae243-c2b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=10067282)** | [SIGN YOUR NAME »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43894796/339174883/-1921632477?refcode=ABD_EM_PET_2022.04.07_b1_KJB_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2022.04.07_b1_kjb_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2022.04.07_b1_KJB_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3ZmFlMjQzLWMyYjYtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UBDIZkZ62CBHe4O954iWkca-Ie91SuUTKv7wSd7PG-0=&emci=59a442e4-b6b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=27fae243-c2b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=10067282)

This is a moment our country will never forget.

And with so many Republicans trying to roll back rights for every single vulnerable group in America right now, it’s comforting to know we have another advocate for our values on the Court.

**[So Peter, don’t wait. Represent FL and sign your name to congratulate Ketanji Brown Jackson on her historic confirmation today>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43894798/339174885/-1921632477?refcode=ABD_EM_PET_2022.04.07_b1_KJB_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2022.04.07_b1_kjb_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2022.04.07_b1_KJB_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3ZmFlMjQzLWMyYjYtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UBDIZkZ62CBHe4O954iWkca-Ie91SuUTKv7wSd7PG-0=&emci=59a442e4-b6b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=27fae243-c2b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=10067282)**
