Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

To help level the playing field, Democrats Serve was born. Since launching in May 2021, of the 29 endorsed candidates who have appeared on a ballot so far, every single one has won their election.

For the 2022 midterms, the PAC has made endorsements nationwide in competitive elections, including: U.S. Senate Candidates Cheri Beasley (NC), Val Demings (FL), and Sarah Godlewski (WI); U.S. House Candidates Christina Bohannan (IA-01), Matt Castelli (NY-21), Jasmine Crockett (TX-30), Val Foushee (NC-06), Kara Hahn (NY-1), Jonathan Logemann (IL-17), Seth Magaziner (RI-02), Karin Norington-Reaves (IL-01), Ruben Ramirez (TX-15), and Tony Vargas (NE-2); Incumbent House Democrats Carolyn Bourdeaux (GA-07), Jahana Hayes (CT-05), Andy Kim (NJ-03), Tom Malinowski (NJ-07), Tom O'Halleran (AZ-01), Katie Porter (CA-45), Mikie Sherrill (NJ-11), Abigail Spanberger (VA-07), Elissa Slotkin (MI-08), Lauren Underwood (IL-14), and Susan Wild (PA-07); Gubernatorial Candidate Katie Hobbs (AZ); and Attorney General Candidate Aramis Ayala (FL).

If you’d like to support Democrats Serve, you can [click here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43894800/339174886/-1840301555?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.02.15_X_footer_X_F1_S1_C1__footer&utm_campaign=abd_em_pet_2022.04.07_b1_kjb_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_PET_2022.04.07_b1_KJB_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3ZmFlMjQzLWMyYjYtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UBDIZkZ62CBHe4O954iWkca-Ie91SuUTKv7wSd7PG-0=) to make a donation.

Democrats Serve

Milford, CT 06460

This is not a budget; it is a plan to bankrupt America. On the campaign trail, Joe Biden promised not to raise taxes on the middle class. name: Nick Paprocki
subject: Newt Gingrich is back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friends,
Kevin McCarthy and his Republican colleagues recently attended an event in Florida in hopes of gaining some campaigning tips from Newt Gingrich.
Newt Gingrich is a relic of the past and has no place in 2022 politics. Ben is running because our country needs to come together and focus on the future.
Can you donate to Ben’s campaign and help us keep our focus where it should be, on solutions. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2204-q2-bs-newt?refcode=220407-email]
It looks like Gingrich, McCarthy, and Trump are working together. They want to use old tricks, obsolete ideas, and antiquated strategies to keep America from prosperity and progress.
Democrats only hold the House by five seats. We need all hands on deck to protect and expand our majority so that democrats can deliver for the American people. Just like we need leadership to look forward, not behind, we must look to the future when legislating, not the past.
Ben can unseat Ann Wagner and help protect our majority. Help usher in fresh leadership. Donate $30 now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2204-q2-bs-newt?refcode=220407-email&amount=30]
Ben wants to deliver 21st-century solutions, he is not interested in hyper-partisanship, and he holds a stake in the future of our democracy and our planet. We need youthful leaders who inspire hope and bring new and unique ideas to the table. Not those focused on dragging us backward and undermining our freedoms.
Ben Samuels will help keep our House Majority, Don’t let Gingrich, McCarthy, or Trump have a say. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2204-q2-bs-newt?refcode=220407-email]

| | | Friend,**** The Senate race in New Hampshire is going to be one of the closest and most expensive in the entire country... _The Granite State could even hold the keys to flipping this entire chamber_** _RED_** _in November!_ So it goes without saying that we can’t afford to start another month BEHIND Maggie Hassan and her team of D.C. Donors. Instead, we have to start April on a high note since this critical election season is now in _full swing._ [**Can proven leader Chuck Morse count on your support to start the month?**](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTIzNDY2MTQ5Nzc3OTA2MjUxJmM9ZTVtOCZlPTAmYj05NTQyMjYzMDkmZD1wNWw0ZTNx.czzsHHiCp1vc8urBzuN7Hl1tElZcKirzA02OGOU0p10) We can’t allow the powerful Washington crowd to jump out far ahead of us... or else they will use their dark money to ensure this Senate seat represents **_the radical liberal agenda_** rather than the values of the 603!

---

It doesn’t have nearly enough small business owners, folks who have lived the American Dream, or genuine leaders with a proven record of lowering costs for the people they serve. But Chuck Morse represents all of those qualities and more. He’s the product of all the best parts of our state and country. _And we can help him get to work standing up for OUR voices in Washington - but not if we let an important month on the campaign trail pass us by..._ **So we have an important favor to ask:****[Can you help us start April on a high note instead by contributing just $10 or more to Chuck’s campaign today?](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTIzNDY2MTQ5Nzc3OTA2MjUxJmM9ZTVtOCZlPTAmYj05NTQyMjYzMzImZD1lNmc1cTVx.22yE2Z6vIRUT5ig4Q16o11gJ9hgSnH0f2rKIauNWBQw)** Thank you in advance for helping kick off this month strong and standing up for the 603!__

name: =?utf-8?Q?Courtney=20Geels?=
subject: Freedom Raffle
body:
Sign up for chance to win... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6ce8be8d7d1f/freedom-raffle?e=20ac8f046f)
---
| |
---
| |
# Dear Peter,
Courtney Geels is a one-of-a-kind congressional candidate for US Congress in North Carolina District 4. After spending a decade advocating for patients needs in the Emergency Room, she is now choosing to invest time in her community, and is building out a team to ensure that your voice is heard in Washington DC. She has built her platform on the righteous and biblical values of **TRUTH** , **JUSTICE** , and **UNITY**. We hear politicians say these words all the time, but how many times have we seen them misrepresent or [cover up the truth to benefit themselves, their career, and their own families](https://courtneygeelsforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0ca724a68d4210b231de53e89&id=e373758ffe&e=20ac8f046f)? That's why we shouldn't send any more career politicians to DC. Instead, **let's send a nurse**.

Courtney is already in great position to win the upcoming primary, and **she is asking for your vote** in the upcoming **Republican Primary on May 17**. She needs your vote, because a strong showing in the Primary, will communicate to those who don't yet know Courtney, that there is a viable alternative candidate in NC District 4.

If you'd like to join her team, volunteering is a great way to get connected to her campaign team. There are lots of easy ways to get involved before the primary, including helping with door knocking, placing her signs in strategic locations, and helping with campaign administrative tasks. Courtney also has big plans for after the primary to get the word out in some unconventional ways. **Courtney would love to see you join her team. **Click the button below to sign up to volunteer:
---
| [Volunteer](https://courtneygeelsforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0ca724a68d4210b231de53e89&id=0ac4d8691e&e=20ac8f046f "Volunteer")
---
|
---
| Since **Courtney is a big advocate and supporter of the 2nd Amendment**, she has started the Freedom Raffle for those of you who would both like to support Courtney, and would appreciate the opportunity to **win a brand new Sig Sauer P365 XL Spectre 9mm Luger valued at $2,000**. Tickets are $20 each, or 6 for $100. Buy some freedom raffle tickets, to show Courtney that you also support the 2nd amendment, and for a chance to win a nice prize.
---
| [Purchase a Freedom Raffle Ticket](https://courtneygeelsforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0ca724a68d4210b231de53e89&id=92dff8a850&e=20ac8f046f "Purchase a Freedom Raffle Ticket")
---
| Thanks again, Peter. I appreciate your support on my campaign and I look forward to representing you well in Washington DC.
---
| |
---
---
| Courtney Geels
---
| | | | | | [](https://courtneygeelsforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0ca724a68d4210b231de53e89&id=051b6c3905&e=20ac8f046f)
---
| | [](https://courtneygeelsforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0ca724a68d4210b231de53e89&id=56cb5c1dca&e=20ac8f046f)
---
| | [](https://courtneygeelsforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0ca724a68d4210b231de53e89&id=e535acdf3f&e=20ac8f046f)
---
| | [](https://courtneygeelsforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0ca724a68d4210b231de53e89&id=38ae1fa51d&e=20ac8f046f)
---
| |
---
| _Paid for by**Courtney Geels for Congress**_

**Our mailing address is:**

**Courtney Geels for Congress**
PO Box 995
Hillsborough, NC 27278

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://courtneygeelsforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=0ca724a68d4210b231de53e89&id=8d4a8b36d2&e=20ac8f046f&c=45d8035c91) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://courtneygeelsforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0ca724a68d4210b231de53e89&id=8d4a8b36d2&e=20ac8f046f&c=45d8035c91).

Dear Peter,

Did you know that Steven personally signs every thank you letter to our donors? After wrapping up a successful fundraising quarter last week, his hand was a little sore but his spirits were high!

Animated image of Steven Olikara signing thank you letters with link to campaign donation page:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/Steven%20signing%20card.gif]

We’re only four months away from the primary election on August 9th . Support from donors is critical to provide the necessary funding to share our campaign’s message with as many voters across Wisconsin as possible. With your help we can realize our mission of changing the business model of politics and ensure Dignity for All. Please donate today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate?refcode=0407email]

Thank you for supporting our campaign!
Team Olikara

This is a movement to build a more inclusive, honest, and kind form of politics, and we need your help to continue reaching more voters in Wisconsin.

name: Shahid Buttar
subject: Something to celebrate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St
body:
Today, Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson joined the Supreme Court. Her confirmation is historically important for reasons beyond her race and gender. | | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yRkW_Sw2xr1MvIXEt6jooTbMnsVYqhUO8Xwt4ORz78ORT8Pt3SALA3pMGVDypeKbyy2kgsjsCmnmy8k7FgsqB6wuCJ9K2SYervuUQSBWz0O5v6cU0tJO8UaeLUy0KfGBKTn9bUbKFeEvawniGBmoDNiRXl07RI2uTBSjfY8YiKaNwORfmhD7aQVUazYULGpZdioPoSXS-EnwMkIqgek1NwqehhN27d5GEx0whjNrQo7VtR9OINPrUfXAiknbVlwZWTdGjjapIWiNNeUvy0s_IvhaLCQ7JAgJo5k5XSQLlXg8eL239jlhhZ7YARv1bk8bmZaXeUhmawAqJC4AElt75RkRq4nENgLKqWwJwRxzKTCKbQsvFo_ZEXHbuIFNZwUv0/3l0/i-8H1oFhTxmfPpVVDfmGpg/h0/M6XuRu1CD2crtFTq0-D7RSRMTxxL1qXHzU73LRYplnA)
| | Dear Peter, **** We’re excited today by the Senate’s confirmation of Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson to a seat on the U.S. Supreme Court.
As the first Black woman to join the Court, Justice Jackson’s confirmation is a triumph for race, gender—and also much more. **[A policy I proposed over a decade ago could remove long-serving Justices from the Supreme Court, making space for Justice Jackson's vision to influence jurisprudence. Can you join us today to continue offering novel solutions to problems long before others see the need?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MLcdYe_TjVBCL5uz5i3gOIp2sfolHifxZtjGgbd64nN6-Ap56_JYVKe_e6DimZ1CC6t8JoR0KRfRMIXwvsamvcIZOFJiHGD7uMqqKgEwS3fpBjV1405Zy0b0wMppaPQZb7CBIZ5eRohlX7hOQwSqujkd0DPBgGYHVnuL2Ojv_zDj1om0GIaVKuhb8dIE78lBTamc4AMd1nZZfw3N1P6GCjMPtzouydCFZtCNF84rdZUiCRxkfSuPus3pwtNfwymOgujFeBkcxgUZ2l3swLeC_pdZ45Dc0VETtb8maWmXernGw/3l0/i-8H1oFhTxmfPpVVDfmGpg/h1/F-fXfNwooD7ZzvD9o0n9_qjWcHqw8DDY6f64wJKA9IM)** Judges are institutionally responsible for guarding constitutional rights, limiting the executive branch, and serving as a bulwark to defend people from power run amok. Seen through that lens, Justice Jackson's confirmation is significant not only for her identity, but also her experience as a Public Defender. Unlike her colleagues on the bench, she built her career standing up to the government, defending vulnerable people in a “justice” system whose continuing biases are notorious. The co-optation of the Rehnquist and Roberts Court by veterans of the executive branch has had tragic consequences which Justice Jackson is uniquely poised to help address. Her experience positions her to lead a jurisprudential movement to revive judicial checks & balances on executive power abandoned by the Rehnquist & Roberts Court. She could help enable the courts to do their jobs. Her confirmation is a victory for all Americans, as well as law and jurisprudence. **[Having worked on federal judicial nominations since 2005, I'm better prepared than most Members of Congress to defend constitutional rights in Congress and hold the Article III courts accountable to political neutrality. Can you send me to Washington to champion checks and balances on executive authority, alongside judicial independence?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MLcdYe_TjVBCL5uz5i3gOIp_9o6VJJfDTDq1M8Hn2X7w1IcxwsUhhPXeVa6UZyNjiqTO-6LXUP-fxJPo74CAW5kqlfnS2oCRnmWW0P0F3--pp8Gu3DrCXVvJQ_dfqQnwc3SAa8kWkRAyfIkQbrvvwTM7WroMC4ouAfye4PAUDWAgcKwE5S_45TrdU6z0hu8LB-x-UEjPkbnL4NA6pfuSARcfcSYT617IaPtDEnlh6k30vH6sIi2x3yv8ZHT9crPpywjKIbCuDxpLeN1yEx2mK_23k0xbR6gtYfDF42YVWWjCA/3l0/i-8H1oFhTxmfPpVVDfmGpg/h2/_229Y85C9xB7DDK6z9Kcr9Egd7DBARkjMzcvSBReuZ0)** Will Justice Jackson be able to revive the constitutional separation of powers, or impose checks and balances, or enable a vision of law as a tool to defend people from arbitrary power run amok?
Not by herself. On a Court composed on nine Justices, six votes are held by reliable ideological reactionaries. And because Justices are appointed for life, the current balance of power could hold for a generation or more—unless something changes. We’d like to support the chance for KBJ’s jurisprudence to influence the law. A proposal that I explained over a decade ago would do precisely that: ending judicial life tenure in order to force overdue turnover on the bench by imposing 18-year staggered terms on her predecessors. [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhjCB1Z8H0TLUFI912OKefiY7vmEnH8Gp3W_JLeXNPf_gsAMWB2EZM-bFQF-ICv6rkUZGsoxkDPgPwF-UA14KiGMJB-lSCM6x6yyY7xV_py5huWST5yAtaWlXfOytlsSVgIVQeHrT3tXh_z3P7r5eY6DP513HQKXsFWfFanlt1e5xUduEJ2OoJuHWtryLg4w3f1TzNb_D-gJmdItrlN0dT82X2fX7wiS9a_Op8Di2AuG_lvOU9QIbh6Z06Ru9I-3PK596bWGPUYa1hx5lKCBSsou675SJgW6RV1Tz1zOsPmawSBWsk8JR4bRsoNgpu4e1TBUjoUEzOtdqXyxRyUEVrTI/3l0/i-8H1oFhTxmfPpVVDfmGpg/h3/4LQxTVOhuAkhw2ccQMdu4yyl1heyaCWohVrmqQjzWog) The proposal has been endorsed more recently by figures including Andrew Yang and Ro Khanna. It offers a path to restore judicial independence. We're eager to bring it to Congress. [**Can you help us continue developing novel ideas to shake loose generational stasis in Washington, break the logjams that limit our institutions, and serve the long overlooked needs of our communities? I’m eager to help, but need your support.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MLcdYe_TjVBCL5uz5i3gOIp_B6A1iVMPGhNohyRBP8XKtcFfRPOy0W3VlNGAEnPS5mludzK8tDNgZeDa2YF0kqAFEmIkNK4By3SKdiNjs1KydmMOYpOp8UWb0FCaRs6MopQhAF6AGDui5reiC-xrmQ5XiWe02WE4kvAU7jfWoyk6XujQv0xF-V8LVdtX0qDxH83iMEqISaDdF5P_K9PcIj36fIiv6DOx8vO2sMsjpQBiEottMK7PBUXsuP825WHeQBN_dV7vMP88ZJOH5UoUr7m_wPmWf2iDFerHs6Tq1BzeA/3l0/i-8H1oFhTxmfPpVVDfmGpg/h4/bWTF-vhyc6PCGAW6o4KHsv5OHY-Q2NXDx6r1yJ0dFoI) While so many challenges persist across our country, days like today give me hope. I hope it offers you hope, as well! Your voice,
Shahid PS – If you’re in the Bay Area, join us tonight for a discussion about biased policing at the SF Public Library in Civic Center (at 100 Larkin) from 6:00-7:30pm! With your support, we hope to offer an opportunity to hold publicly accountable a wealthy officeholder who'll be speaking on the panel despite an unfortunate pattern of orchestrating racist accusations as an election strategy. Text 415-761-3475 if you're available to join us. |
---|---|---
|

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiK3QYPf9O2YAvIrWYttWwfKbrvdFDWvz82F3fhc9xdSWrEtJBAD45J15pOe3kQprShjyR6uSR33zFd-kkOa2aXCzV5wPQhjX6_oPw5RgA6riLjIK_ghscctSlS2dgZ_-iVwhu5cDVKibh1rnQSoyWA-rF94DmdMsHr00R8uvE2-wHe07FKDWv9CCw01njnxU9pSIbefJW8tMm-Fx2OWZoY5-KDMyE3dW9kuoefZsWBPF_7v3mCDim65ceHuY9b4Z7nkBKVhptz8gFRaORrBtkGquqyneDaP24Ag7MN-mKMrPg/3l0/i-8H1oFhTxmfPpVVDfmGpg/h5/1ufnO9UOt2RACq3HDxoIWki_UNKo8EDSvYiQQ8ThZjI) [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhqFPbIOt_SSei2w6SESbB97ywZMbmRV0RLmqyLIOr_bbzcxyWi_SRA_sPEwXVoD0HJVpyiXnVC57XkC4nK5ZBajnB_wxYQ4ShKljp0RZ-WPIWWrSiWa27GGsfYheiKZGp34qEZ_zukzo1tsK8W_ZDNJ0GFL1bU7wJg3F7p2wGCAJpJrA9BTx3NO5ILPjuHbd2_1AEqJpcwt7lPKLK76sdfzZV7Z0sNongzL71hHygVWYm2-Y1rneTTeAPJ6qPLLgzrMwOaVqV8zHPA1TU81UoKjYMxt-W2GfNQhYIC38fJR-pk7qWIlRHjZGz-IvxjtyxA/3l0/i-8H1oFhTxmfPpVVDfmGpg/h6/wGPnZA84KjFtVqR1FAiqNq5iLqpaHWIihYTCS6TTgQk)

| Friend,
It's no secret that some of the candidates in this race have been spending a whole lot of money trying to _**buy themselves a senate seat**_ , but as the only lifelong Pennsylvanian in the race, I know the truth --******y ou can't put a price tag on Pennsylvania. **
So it didn't surprise me that the latest poll shows **3/4 Republicans don't want a _Johnny-come-lately_ representing them in Washington**.**
****Now , we have to make sure that doesn't happen. **
With my opponents making this the most expensive primary in history, **we're counting on grassroots strength to ensure that** _**Pennsylvania is represented by a Pennsylvanian**_. We need Republicans in every corner of our state knocking doors and making phone calls in their communities for our campaign.**Can we count on you?**

Fellow American,

I want to update you with an exciting announcement:

**Last night, I was honored to receive President Donald J. Trump’s endorsement in my campaign to continue representing the people of Louisiana’s 4th Congressional District.**

For four years, I worked tirelessly to fight for President Trump’s America First agenda, bringing peace, safety and prosperity to ALL Americans.

[ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ef0b914e6118477083ff55c418d0e490&_e=S4pucpTmqj_NhhSe20a36VOzuIj7ZJ1AtEuzYxnoS1Qg8M09bNtWXHRuWxJpjhmogoxCzdToP7XPs81-NhRr3Kf_J5WbcgZMRROXB0pwi2Qya4660xPAfQlXKiChq5wAFv4pwhHld-90gDA-sQhh_sbC-Bt8UXa44gSrTCeVBkOXW4x9Kc9hXRi5bNErdaljukVenPL-N_dYg-Ncw25JGQ_F3pQNS8I29R80modWZ-7011K5U5NIRPTnyHcazCvIpOllkVcp2PmBi4b0H9jyI6eArkvzTWtbbGEE9O8kk4lqks6FZae73ShUCoMd3NsfoFhwVUUVzOfuc-EOsi3RkKlxTjYBQmNgfLFz35WQXXSNsLX3GkiskoPIFDCidZ2wRjbIfIbvTSbX53bNZpOHCw%3D%3D)

Under President Trump, we built the greatest economy in U.S. history, took concrete steps to secure our southern border, projected strength abroad, and fought back against the radical Left EVERY DAY – no matter what they threw at us.

Despite both the House, Senate, and White House being controlled by Democrats, I’ve continued to do what my constituents sent me to Washington to do: fight for the fundamental principles that make our country so great.

And I won’t stop.

I’m humbled to receive President Trump’s endorsement, and I plan on continuing his America First agenda once Republicans regain the majority in November.

[**But we can’t count our chickens before they hatch. Democrats are putting up a serious fight, and they’re consistently raising more funds than our side. name: Veterans Task Force
subject: Do you have time to help a veteran?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jesse Jensen for Congress

Peter,

Today we watched history in the making as the Senate voted to confirm Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson as the first Black woman to serve on the United States Supreme Court.

I know that Judge Jackson will serve the American people honorably. I know she'll bring her unique experience as a jurist, former public defender, and district judge to our country's highest court.

This is also a meaningful step forward in ensuring every branch of our government fully represents the lived experiences of all of its people.

[**I extend my sincerest congratulations to Ketanji Brown Jackson -- and I hope you'll join me.
